            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .check-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(240,147,251,0.4);
        }
        
        .result {
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            display: none;
        }
        
        .result.anagram {
            background: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .result.not-anagram {
            background: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .anagram-list {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .anagram-list h3 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .anagram-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        
        .anagram-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        
        .word-pair {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .word {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .status {
            color: #f5576c;
        }
        
        .find-more {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        
        #findWord {
            width: 70%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px 0 0 5px;
        }
        
        .find-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f5576c;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 0 5px 5px 0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🔄 অ্যানাগ্রাম চেকার</h1>
        
        <div class="input-group">
            <label>প্রথম শব্দ:</label>
            <input type="text" id="word1" placeholder="যেমন: listen">
        </div>
        
        <div class="input-group">
            <label>দ্বিতীয় শব্দ:</label>
            <input type="text" id="word2" placeholder="যেমন: silent">
        </div>
        
        <button class="check-btn" onclick="checkAnagram()">পরীক্ষা করুন</button>
        
        <div class="result" id="result"></div>
        
        <div class="anagram-list">
            <h3>উদাহরণ অ্যানাগ্রাম</h3>
            <div id="exampleAnagrams"></div>
            
            <div class="find-more">
                <h3>অ্যানাগ্রাম খুঁজুন</h3>
                <input type="text" id="findWord" placeholder="শব্দ লিখুন">
                <button class="find-btn" onclick="findAnagrams()">খুঁজুন</button>
                <div id="foundAnagrams"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const exampleAnagrams = [
            ['listen', 'silent'],
            ['angel', 'glean'],
            ['earth', 'heart'],
            ['night', 'thing'],
            ['astronomer', 'moon starer'],
            ['debit card', 'bad credit'],
            ['school master', 'the classroom'],
            ['conversation', 'voices rant on'],
            ['eleven plus two', 'twelve plus one'],
            ['the eyes', 'they see']
        ];

        function displayExamples() {
            const container = document.getElementById('exampleAnagrams');
            container.innerHTML = exampleAnagrams.map(pair => `
                <div class="anagram-item">
                    <div class="word-pair">
                        <span class="word">${pair[0]}</span>
                        <span>⇄</span>
                        <span class="word">${pair[1]}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="status">✓ অ্যানাগ্রাম</span>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function checkAnagram() {
            const word1 = document.getElementById('word1').value;
            const word2 = document.getElementById('word2').value;
            const resultDiv = document.getElementById('result');

            if (!word1 || !word2) {
                alert('দয়া করে দুটি শব্দ লিখুন');
                return;
            }

            const cleaned1 = word1.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '').split('').sort().join('');
            const cleaned2 = word2.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '').split('').sort().join('');

            const isAnagram = cleaned1 === cleaned2 && cleaned1 !== '';

            if (isAnagram) {
                resultDiv.className = 'result anagram';
                resultDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <strong>অভিনন্দন!</strong> "${word1}" এবং "${word2}" অ্যানাগ্রাম!
                `;
            } else {
                resultDiv.className = 'result not-anagram';
                resultDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <strong>দুঃখিত!</strong> "${word1}" এবং "${word2}" অ্যানাগ্রাম নয়।
                `;
            }
        }

        function findAnagrams() {
            const word = document.getElementById('findWord').value;
            const foundDiv = document.getElementById('foundAnagrams');

            if (!word) {
                alert('একটি শব্দ লিখুন');
                return;
            }

            const cleaned = word.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '').split('').sort().join('');
            const found = [];

            // কিছু কমন শব্দ থেকে খুঁজি
            const commonWords = [
                'silent', 'listen', 'angel', 'glean', 'earth', 'heart',
                'night', 'thing', 'aster', 'stare', 'rates', 'tears',
                'dear', 'read', 'dare', 'fired', 'fried', 'cried',
                'icier', 'melon', 'lemon', 'stone', 'tones', 'notes'
            ];

            for (const w of commonWords) {
                const wCleaned = w.split('').sort().join('');
                if (wCleaned === cleaned && w !== word.toLowerCase()) {
                    found.push(w);
                }
            }

            if (found.length > 0) {
                foundDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <h4>পাওয়া গেছে:</h4>
                    ${found.map(w => `<span class="suggestion" onclick="useWord('${w}')">${w}</span>`).join(' ')}
                `;
            } else {
                foundDiv.innerHTML = '<p>কোনো অ্যানাগ্রাম পাওয়া যায়নি</p>';
            }
        }

        function useWord(word) {
            document.getElementById('word2').value = word;
            checkAnagram();
        }

        displayExamples();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫০: শব্দ অনুসন্ধান (সম্পূর্ণ)
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>শব্দ অনুসন্ধান</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .search-box {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        #searchInput {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            font-size: 16px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        
        .search-btn {
            padding: 15px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .search-btn:hover {
            background: #38f9d7;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }
        
        .filters {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .results {
            min-height: 300px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .result-item {
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .result-item:hover {
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        
        .result-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        
        .result-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        
        .result-category {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 3px 10px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        
        .result-snippet {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .highlight {
            background: #ffeb3b;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .stats {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .suggestions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        
        .suggestion-item {
            padding: 5px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .suggestion-item:hover {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .pagination {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        
        .page-btn {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .page-btn.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🔍 শব্দ অনুসন্ধান</h1>
        
        <div class="search-box">
            <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="অনুসন্ধান করুন...">
            <button class="search-btn" onclick="search()">অনুসন্ধান</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="filters">
            <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterBy('all')">সব</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterBy('article')">নিবন্ধ</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterBy('news')">খবর</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterBy('blog')">ব্লগ</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterBy('tutorial')">টিউটোরিয়াল</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="results" id="results"></div>
        
        <div class="stats">
            <span id="resultCount">০টি ফলাফল</span>
            <span id="searchTime">০.০০ সেকেন্ড</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="suggestions" id="suggestions"></div>
        
        <div class="pagination" id="pagination"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ডামি ডাটা
        const data = [
            {
                title: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট টিউটোরিয়াল',
                category: 'tutorial',
                content: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট একটি প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা যা ওয়েব ডেভেলপমেন্টে ব্যবহার করা হয়। এটি ক্লায়েন্ট-সাইড এবং সার্ভার-সাইড উভয় ক্ষেত্রেই ব্যবহার করা যায়।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'এইচটিএমএল বেসিক',
                category: 'tutorial',
                content: 'এইচটিএমএল ওয়েব পেজের গঠন তৈরি করে। এটি বিভিন্ন এলিমেন্ট ব্যবহার করে কন্টেন্ট সংগঠিত করে।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'সিএসএস ফান্ডামেন্টাল',
                category: 'tutorial',
                content: 'সিএসএস ওয়েব পেজের ডিজাইন ও লেআউট নিয়ন্ত্রণ করে। এটি রঙ, ফন্ট, মার্জিন ইত্যাদি নির্ধারণ করে।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'রিঅ্যাক্ট জেএস পরিচিতি',
                category: 'article',
                content: 'রিঅ্যাক্ট একটি জনপ্রিয় জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট লাইব্রেরি যা ইউজার ইন্টারফেস তৈরিতে ব্যবহৃত হয়। এটি ফেসবুক তৈরি করেছে।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'নতুন আইফোন লঞ্চ',
                category: 'news',
                content: 'অ্যাপল তাদের নতুন আইফোন মডেল লঞ্চ করেছে। এতে রয়েছে উন্নত ক্যামেরা ও আরও শক্তিশালী প্রসেসর।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'কৃত্রিম বুদ্ধিমত্তার ভবিষ্যৎ',
                category: 'article',
                content: 'এআই প্রযুক্তি দ্রুত উন্নয়নশীল। ভবিষ্যতে এটি আমাদের জীবনের অনেক ক্ষেত্রে প্রভাব ফেলবে।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'স্বাস্থ্য টিপস',
                category: 'blog',
                content: 'প্রতিদিন ৮ গ্লাস পানি পান করুন। পর্যাপ্ত ঘুম এবং নিয়মিত ব্যায়াম স্বাস্থ্যের জন্য ভালো।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'পাইথন প্রোগ্রামিং',
                category: 'tutorial',
                content: 'পাইথন একটি সহজ ও শক্তিশালী প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা। এটি ডাটা সায়েন্স ও মেশিন লার্নিংয়ে বহুল ব্যবহৃত।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'ক্রিকেট বিশ্বকাপ',
                category: 'news',
                content: 'আগামী মাসে ক্রিকেট বিশ্বকাপ শুরু হচ্ছে। ১০টি দল অংশগ্রহণ করবে।',
                url: '#'
            },
            {
                title: 'ভ্রমণ গাইড: কক্সবাজার',
                category: 'blog',
                content: 'কক্সবাজার বিশ্বের দীর্ঘতম সমুদ্র সৈকত। এখানে ভ্রমণের সেরা সময় শীতকাল।',
                url: '#'
            }
        ];

        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentPage = 1;
        const itemsPerPage = 3;
        let currentResults = [];

        function search() {
            const query = document.getElementById('searchInput').value.toLowerCase();
            const startTime = performance.now();

            // অনুসন্ধান
            let results = data.filter(item => {
                if (currentFilter !== 'all' && item.category !== currentFilter) {
                    return false;
                }

                return item.title.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
                       item.content.toLowerCase().includes(query);
            });

            // হাইলাইট করার জন্য কুয়েরি সংরক্ষণ
            currentResults = results;

            // পৃষ্ঠা রিসেট
            currentPage = 1;

            // ফলাফল দেখান
            displayResults(results, query);

            // সময় গণনা
            const endTime = performance.now();
            const time = ((endTime - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('searchTime').textContent = `${time} সেকেন্ড`;
            document.getElementById('resultCount').textContent = `${results.length}টি ফলাফল`;

            // সাজেশন দেখান
            showSuggestions(query);
        }

        function displayResults(results, query) {
            const resultsDiv = document.getElementById('results');
            const start = (currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage;
            const end = start + itemsPerPage;
            const paginatedResults = results.slice(start, end);

            if (paginatedResults.length === 0) {
                resultsDiv.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align: center; color: #666;">কোনো ফলাফল পাওয়া যায়নি</p>';
                document.getElementById('pagination').innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }

            resultsDiv.innerHTML = paginatedResults.map(item => {
                const highlightedTitle = highlightText(item.title, query);
                const highlightedContent = highlightText(item.content.substring(0, 150) + '...', query);

                return `
                    <div class="result-item" onclick="window.location='${item.url}'">
                        <div>
                            <span class="result-category">${getCategoryName(item.category)}</span>
                            <span class="result-title">${highlightedTitle}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="result-snippet">${highlightedContent}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');

            showPagination(results.length);
        }

        function highlightText(text, query) {
            if (!query) return text;
            const regex = new RegExp(`(${query})`, 'gi');
            return text.replace(regex, '<span class="highlight">$1</span>');
        }

        function getCategoryName(category) {
            const categories = {
                'article': 'নিবন্ধ',
                'news': 'খবর',
                'blog': 'ব্লগ',
                'tutorial': 'টিউটোরিয়াল'
            };
            return categories[category] || category;
        }

        function showPagination(totalItems) {
            const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalItems / itemsPerPage);
            const paginationDiv = document.getElementById('pagination');

            if (totalPages <= 1) {
                paginationDiv.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }

            let buttons = '';
            for (let i = 1; i <= totalPages; i++) {
                buttons += `<button class="page-btn ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="goToPage(${i})">${i}</button>`;
            }

            paginationDiv.innerHTML = buttons;
        }

        function goToPage(page) {
            currentPage = page;
            displayResults(currentResults, document.getElementById('searchInput').value.toLowerCase());
        }

        function filterBy(category) {
            currentFilter = category;

            // বাটন আপডেট
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            // পুনরায় অনুসন্ধান
            search();
        }

        function showSuggestions(query) {
            const suggestionsDiv = document.getElementById('suggestions');

            if (!query || query.length < 2) {
                suggestionsDiv.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }

            // সাজেশন জেনারেট
            const suggestions = [
                'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট',
                'প্রোগ্রামিং',
                'ওয়েব',
                'টিউটোরিয়াল',
                'নতুন'
            ].filter(s => s.includes(query) && s !== query);

            if (suggestions.length === 0) {
                suggestionsDiv.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }

            suggestionsDiv.innerHTML = suggestions.map(s =>
                `<span class="suggestion-item" onclick="useSuggestion('${s}')">${s}</span>`
            ).join('');
        }

        function useSuggestion(suggestion) {
            document.getElementById('searchInput').value = suggestion;
            search();
        }

        // ইনপুটে টাইপ করলে সাজেশন দেখান
        document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            showSuggestions(e.target.value);
        });

        // এন্টার চাপলে অনুসন্ধান
        document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                search();
            }
        });

        // প্রাথমিক ফলাফল দেখান
        window.onload = () => {
            search();
        };
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫১: চ্যাট অ্যাপ্লিকেশন
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>চ্যাট অ্যাপ্লিকেশন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 800px;
            height: 600px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            display: flex;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            width: 250px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        .user-profile {
            padding: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            color: white;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .user-info h4 {
            color: #333;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .user-info p {
            color: #43e97b;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .chat-list {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .chat-item {
            padding: 15px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
        }
        .chat-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        .chat-item.active {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .chat-avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #43e97b;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            color: white;
        }
        .chat-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .chat-name {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .chat-last {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        /* চ্যাট এরিয়া */
        .chat-area {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        .chat-header {
            padding: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .chat-header-info h3 {
            color: #333;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .chat-header-info p {
            color: #43e97b;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .messages {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 20px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .message {
            max-width: 70%;
            padding: 10px 15px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            position: relative;
        }
        .message.sent {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            align-self: flex-end;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 5px;
        }
        .message.received {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            color: #333;
            align-self: flex-start;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 5px;
        }
        .message-time {
            font-size: 10px;
            margin-top: 5px;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }
        .message-input {
            padding: 20px;
            border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .message-input input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 25px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .message-input input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #667eea;
        }
        .send-btn {
            width: 45px;
            height: 45px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            color: white;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .send-btn:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <!-- সাইডবার -->
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="user-profile">
                <div class="avatar">R</div>
                <div class="user-info">
                    <h4>রহিম মিয়া</h4>
                    <p>অনলাইন</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="chat-list" id="chatList">
                <div class="chat-item active">
                    <div class="chat-avatar">K</div>
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-name">করিম হোসেন</div>
                        <div class="chat-last">শেষবার ৫ মিনিট আগে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chat-item">
                    <div class="chat-avatar">F</div>
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-name">ফাতেমা বেগম</div>
                        <div class="chat-last">টাইপিং...</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chat-item">
                    <div class="chat-avatar">S</div>
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-name">সুমন আহমেদ</div>
                        <div class="chat-last">আপনি: ঠিক আছে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- চ্যাট এরিয়া -->
        <div class="chat-area">
            <div class="chat-header">
                <div class="chat-avatar">K</div>
                <div class="chat-header-info">
                    <h3>করিম হোসেন</h3>
                    <p>অনলাইন</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="messages" id="messages">
                <div class="message received">
                    আসসালামু আলাইকুম
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩০ AM</div>
                </div>
                <div class="message sent">
                    ওয়ালাইকুম আসসালাম, কেমন আছেন?
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩১ AM</div>
                </div>
                <div class="message received">
                    আলহামদুলিল্লাহ্, ভালো আছি। আপনি?
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩২ AM</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="message-input">
                <input type="text" id="messageInput" placeholder="মেসেজ লিখুন...">
                <button class="send-btn" onclick="sendMessage()">➤</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function sendMessage() {
            const input = document.getElementById('messageInput');
            const message = input.value.trim();

            if (message) {
                const messagesDiv = document.getElementById('messages');
                const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('bn-BD', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });

                const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');
                messageDiv.className = 'message sent';
                messageDiv.innerHTML = `
                    ${message}
                    <div class="message-time">${time}</div>
                `;

                messagesDiv.appendChild(messageDiv);
                input.value = '';

                // স্ক্রোল ডাউন
                messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;

                // অটো রিপ্লাই (ডেমো)
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const replyDiv = document.createElement('div');
                    replyDiv.className = 'message received';
                    replyDiv.innerHTML = `
                        আপনার মেসেজ পেয়েছি। ধন্যবাদ!
                        <div class="message-time">${time}</div>
                    `;
                    messagesDiv.appendChild(replyDiv);
                    messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;
                }, 1000);
            }
        }

        // এন্টার চাপলে মেসেজ পাঠান
        document.getElementById('messageInput').addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                sendMessage();
            }
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫২: ফাইল আপলোডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফাইল আপলোডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #43e97b;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .upload-area:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-color: #38f9d7;
        }
        .upload-area.dragover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-color: #667eea;
        }
        .upload-icon {
            font-size: 50px;
            color: #43e97b;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .upload-text {
            color: #666;
        }
        .upload-text span {
            color: #43e97b;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .file-list {
            margin-top: 20px;
            max-height: 300px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .file-item {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .file-icon {
            font-size: 30px;
        }
        .file-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .file-name {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .file-size {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .file-progress {
            width: 100px;
            height: 5px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #43e97b, #38f9d7);
            width: 0%;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        .file-status {
            font-size: 12px;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 15px;
        }
        .status-success {
            background: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
        }
        .status-error {
            background: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
        }
        .remove-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #f44336;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
        }
        
        .upload-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .upload-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(67,233,123,0.4);
        }
        
        .file-input {
            display: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📁 ফাইল আপলোডার</h1>
        
        <div class="upload-area" id="uploadArea" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <div class="upload-icon">📤</div>
            <div class="upload-text">
                ফাইল ড্রপ করুন বা <span>ব্রাউজ</span> করুন
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <input type="file" id="fileInput" class="file-input" multiple onchange="handleFiles(this.files)">
        
        <div class="file-list" id="fileList"></div>
        
        <button class="upload-btn" onclick="uploadAll()">সব ফাইল আপলোড করুন</button>
    </div>

    <script>
        let files = [];

        // ড্রাগ অ্যান্ড ড্রপ ইভেন্ট
        const uploadArea = document.getElementById('uploadArea');

        uploadArea.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            uploadArea.classList.add('dragover');
        });

        uploadArea.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
            uploadArea.classList.remove('dragover');
        });

        uploadArea.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            uploadArea.classList.remove('dragover');
            handleFiles(e.dataTransfer.files);
        });

        function handleFiles(fileList) {
            for (let i = 0; i < fileList.length; i++) {
                addFile(fileList[i]);
            }
        }

        function addFile(file) {
            const fileObj = {
                id: Date.now() + Math.random(),
                file: file,
                name: file.name,
                size: file.size,
                type: file.type,
                progress: 0,
                status: 'pending'
            };
            files.push(fileObj);
            renderFileList();
        }

        function getFileIcon(type) {
            if (type.startsWith('image/')) return '🖼️';
            if (type.startsWith('video/')) return '🎥';
            if (type.startsWith('audio/')) return '🎵';
            if (type.includes('pdf')) return '📕';
            if (type.includes('word')) return '📘';
            if (type.includes('excel')) return '📗';
            return '📄';
        }

        function formatSize(bytes) {
            if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
            const k = 1024;
            const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
            const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
            return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
        }

        function renderFileList() {
            const list = document.getElementById('fileList');
            list.innerHTML = files.map(file => `
                <div class="file-item" id="file-${file.id}">
                    <div class="file-icon">${getFileIcon(file.type)}</div>
                    <div class="file-info">
                        <div class="file-name">${file.name}</div>
                        <div class="file-size">${formatSize(file.size)}</div>
                        <div class="file-progress">
                            <div class="progress-bar" style="width: ${file.progress}%"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="file-status ${file.status === 'success' ? 'status-success' : file.status === 'error' ? 'status-error' : ''}">
                        ${file.status === 'success' ? '✓ সম্পন্ন' : file.status === 'error' ? '✗ ব্যর্থ' : '⏳ অপেক্ষমাণ'}
                    </div>
                    <button class="remove-btn" onclick="removeFile('${file.id}')">✕</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function removeFile(id) {
            files = files.filter(f => f.id !== id);
            renderFileList();
        }

        function uploadAll() {
            files.forEach(file => {
                if (file.status === 'pending') {
                    simulateUpload(file);
                }
            });
        }

        function simulateUpload(file) {
            file.status = 'uploading';
            renderFileList();

            let progress = 0;
            const interval = setInterval(() => {
                progress += Math.random() * 10;
                if (progress >= 100) {
                    progress = 100;
                    clearInterval(interval);

                    file.status = Math.random() > 0.1 ? 'success' : 'error';
                    renderFileList();
                }

                file.progress = progress;
                const fileElement = document.getElementById(`file-${file.id}`);
                if (fileElement) {
                    fileElement.querySelector('.progress-bar').style.width = progress + '%';
                }
            }, 200);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৩: ইমেজ গ্যালারি
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ গ্যালারি</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        /* ফিল্টার বাটন */
        .filter-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .filter-btn:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* গ্যালারি গ্রিড */
        .gallery {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .gallery-item {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            animation: fadeIn 0.5s;
        }
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
        }
        .gallery-item:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .gallery-item img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 200px;
            object-fit: cover;
            display: block;
        }
        .gallery-item .overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.7));
            color: white;
            padding: 15px;
            transform: translateY(100%);
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }
        .gallery-item:hover .overlay {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        .image-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .image-category {
            font-size: 12px;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }
        
        /* লাইটবক্স */
        .lightbox {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            z-index: 1000;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .lightbox.active {
            display: flex;
        }
        .lightbox-content {
            max-width: 90%;
            max-height: 90%;
            position: relative;
        }
        .lightbox-content img {
            max-width: 100%;
            max-height: 90vh;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .lightbox-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: white;
            font-size: 40px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }
        .lightbox-close:hover {
            transform: scale(1.2);
        }
        .lightbox-nav {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            font-size: 24px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .lightbox-nav:hover {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
        }
        .prev {
            left: 20px;
        }
        .next {
            right: 20px;
        }
        .lightbox-info {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            text-align: center;
            color: white;
            padding: 10px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        
        /* লোড মোর বাটন */
        .load-more {
            text-align: center;
        }
        .load-more-btn {
            padding: 15px 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .load-more-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(102,126,234,0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🖼️ ইমেজ গ্যালারি</h1>
        
        <div class="filter-buttons">
            <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterImages('all')">সব</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterImages('nature')">প্রকৃতি</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterImages('city')">শহর</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterImages('people')">মানুষ</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterImages('technology')">প্রযুক্তি</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="gallery" id="gallery"></div>
        
        <div class="load-more">
            <button class="load-more-btn" onclick="loadMore()">আরও লোড করুন</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- লাইটবক্স -->
    <div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
        <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">×</button>
        <button class="lightbox-nav prev" onclick="changeImage(-1)">←</button>
        <button class="lightbox-nav next" onclick="changeImage(1)">→</button>
        <div class="lightbox-content">
            <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="">
        </div>
        <div class="lightbox-info" id="lightboxInfo"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ডামি ইমেজ ডাটা
        let allImages = [];
        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentPage = 1;
        const imagesPerPage = 12;
        let currentIndex = 0;

        // ইমেজ জেনারেট
        for (let i = 1; i <= 50; i++) {
            const categories = ['nature', 'city', 'people', 'technology'];
            const category = categories[Math.floor(Math.random() * categories.length)];
            allImages.push({
                id: i,
                url: `https://picsum.photos/400/300?random=${i}`,
                title: `${category} ইমেজ ${i}`,
                category: category,
                width: 400,
                height: 300
            });
        }

        function displayImages() {
            const gallery = document.getElementById('gallery');
            const filtered = currentFilter === 'all'
                ? allImages
                : allImages.filter(img => img.category === currentFilter);

            const start = (currentPage - 1) * imagesPerPage;
            const end = start + imagesPerPage;
            const imagesToShow = filtered.slice(0, end);

            gallery.innerHTML = imagesToShow.map(img => `
                <div class="gallery-item" onclick="openLightbox(${img.id})">
                    <img src="${img.url}" alt="${img.title}" loading="lazy">
                    <div class="overlay">
                        <div class="image-title">${img.title}</div>
                        <div class="image-category">${img.category}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function filterImages(category) {
            currentFilter = category;
            currentPage = 1;

            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            displayImages();
        }

        function loadMore() {
            const filtered = currentFilter === 'all'
                ? allImages
                : allImages.filter(img => img.category === currentFilter);

            if (currentPage * imagesPerPage < filtered.length) {
                currentPage++;
                displayImages();
            } else {
                alert('আর কোনো ইমেজ নেই!');
            }
        }

        function openLightbox(id) {
            const img = allImages.find(i => i.id === id);
            currentIndex = allImages.findIndex(i => i.id === id);

            document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = img.url;
            document.getElementById('lightboxInfo').textContent = img.title;
            document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('active');
        }

        function closeLightbox() {
            document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('active');
        }

        function changeImage(direction) {
            currentIndex += direction;

            if (currentIndex < 0) {
                currentIndex = allImages.length - 1;
            } else if (currentIndex >= allImages.length) {
                currentIndex = 0;
            }

            const img = allImages[currentIndex];
            document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = img.url;
            document.getElementById('lightboxInfo').textContent = img.title;
        }

        // কীবোর্ড নেভিগেশন
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.contains('active')) {
                if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                    changeImage(-1);
                } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                    changeImage(1);
                } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    closeLightbox();
                }
            }
        });

        displayImages();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৪: ইমেজ স্লাইডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ স্লাইডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 900px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .slider-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .slider {
            display: flex;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease;
        }
        .slide {
            min-width: 100%;
            position: relative;
        }
        .slide img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .slide-caption {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            padding: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.7));
            color: white;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        /* নেভিগেশন বাটন */
        .nav-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
            border: none;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 24px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        .nav-btn:hover {
            background: white;
            transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.1);
        }
        .prev {
            left: 20px;
        }
        .next {
            right: 20px;
        }
        
        /* ডট ইন্ডিকেটর */
        .dots {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .dot {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .dot.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            transform: scale(1.2);
        }
        
        /* থাম্বনেইল */
        .thumbnails {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .thumbnail {
            width: 80px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            opacity: 0.6;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .thumbnail:hover {
            opacity: 0.8;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .thumbnail.active {
            opacity: 1;
            border: 3px solid #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        /* কন্ট্রোলস */
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .control-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .control-btn:hover {
            background: #ff5252;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎠 ইমেজ স্লাইডার</h1>
        
        <div class="slider-container">
            <div class="slider" id="slider">
                <div class="slide">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=1" alt="Image 1">
                    <div class="slide-caption">
                        <h3>প্রকৃতির সৌন্দর্য</h3>
                        <p>সবুজ বন আর পাহাড়ের অপূর্ব দৃশ্য</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=2" alt="Image 2">
                    <div class="slide-caption">
                        <h3>সমুদ্র সৈকত</h3>
                        <p>নীল জল আর সাদা বালির মেলা</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=3" alt="Image 3">
                    <div class="slide-caption">
                        <h3>শহরের আলো</h3>
                        <p>রাতের শহরের চকচকে আলো</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=4" alt="Image 4">
                    <div class="slide-caption">
                        <h3>পাহাড়ি ঝর্ণা</h3>
                        <p>পাহাড় থেকে পড়ছে স্বচ্ছ পানি</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="slide">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=5" alt="Image 5">
                    <div class="slide-caption">
                        <h3>মরুভূমি</h3>
                        <p>সোনালি বালির বিশাল সমারোহ</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <button class="nav-btn prev" onclick="changeSlide(-1)">←</button>
            <button class="nav-btn next" onclick="changeSlide(1)">→</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
        
        <div class="thumbnails" id="thumbnails"></div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="toggleAutoPlay()" id="playPauseBtn">⏸️ বিরতি</button>
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="goToFirst()">⏮️ প্রথম</button>
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="goToLast()">⏭️ শেষ</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentSlide = 0;
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
        const totalSlides = slides.length;
        let autoPlayInterval;
        let isPlaying = true;

        function updateSlider() {
            document.getElementById('slider').style.transform = `translateX(-${currentSlide * 100}%)`;
            updateDots();
            updateThumbnails();
        }

        function changeSlide(direction) {
            currentSlide = (currentSlide + direction + totalSlides) % totalSlides;
            updateSlider();
        }

        function goToSlide(index) {
            currentSlide = index;
            updateSlider();
        }

        function updateDots() {
            const dotsContainer = document.getElementById('dots');
            dotsContainer.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < totalSlides; i++) {
                const dot = document.createElement('span');
                dot.className = `dot ${i === currentSlide ? 'active' : ''}`;
                dot.onclick = () => goToSlide(i);
                dotsContainer.appendChild(dot);
            }
        }

        function updateThumbnails() {
            const thumbnailsContainer = document.getElementById('thumbnails');
            thumbnailsContainer.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < totalSlides; i++) {
                const img = slides[i].querySelector('img');
                const thumbnail = document.createElement('img');
                thumbnail.src = img.src;
                thumbnail.className = `thumbnail ${i === currentSlide ? 'active' : ''}`;
                thumbnail.onclick = () => goToSlide(i);
                thumbnailsContainer.appendChild(thumbnail);
            }
        }

        function toggleAutoPlay() {
            const btn = document.getElementById('playPauseBtn');
            if (isPlaying) {
                clearInterval(autoPlayInterval);
                btn.textContent = '▶️ চালু';
            } else {
                autoPlayInterval = setInterval(() => changeSlide(1), 3000);
                btn.textContent = '⏸️ বিরতি';
            }
            isPlaying = !isPlaying;
        }

        function goToFirst() {
            currentSlide = 0;
            updateSlider();
        }

        function goToLast() {
            currentSlide = totalSlides - 1;
            updateSlider();
        }

        // অটোপ্লে শুরু
        autoPlayInterval = setInterval(() => changeSlide(1), 3000);

        // কীবোর্ড নেভিগেশন
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                changeSlide(-1);
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                changeSlide(1);
            }
        });

        updateDots();
        updateThumbnails();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৫: ইমেজ জুম
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ জুম</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1000px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .zoom-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        /* থাম্বনেইল */
        .thumbnails {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 100px;
        }
        .thumbnail {
            width: 100%;
            height: 80px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            opacity: 0.6;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .thumbnail:hover {
            opacity: 0.8;
        }
        .thumbnail.active {
            opacity: 1;
            border: 3px solid #f5576c;
        }
        
        /* মেইন ইমেজ */
        .main-image-container {
            flex: 1;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .main-image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 400px;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }
        .zoom-lens {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border: 2px solid #f5576c;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }
        
        /* জুমড ভিউ */
        .zoomed-view {
            width: 300px;
            height: 400px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            position: relative;
        }
        .zoomed-image {
            position: absolute;
            width: 800px;
            height: 800px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        /* কন্ট্রোলস */
        .controls {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .zoom-slider {
            width: 300px;
            margin: 0 10px;
        }
        .zoom-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f5576c;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin: 0 5px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .zoom-btn:hover {
            background: #f093fb;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }
        
        /* ইনফো */
        .image-info {
            text-align: center;
            color: #666;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🔍 ইমেজ জুম</h1>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="zoomIn()">➕ জুম ইন</button>
            <input type="range" id="zoomSlider" class="zoom-slider" min="1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1" oninput="updateZoom(this.value)">
            <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="zoomOut()">➖ জুম আউট</button>
            <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="resetZoom()">⟲ রিসেট</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="zoom-container">
            <div class="thumbnails" id="thumbnails"></div>
            
            <div class="main-image-container" id="mainContainer">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1" alt="Main" class="main-image" id="mainImage">
                <div class="zoom-lens" id="zoomLens"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="zoomed-view" id="zoomedView">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/800/800?random=1" alt="Zoomed" class="zoomed-image" id="zoomedImage">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="image-info" id="imageInfo">
            <h3 id="imageTitle">প্রকৃতির ছবি ১</h3>
            <p>মাউস ঘুরিয়ে জুম দেখুন</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const images = [
            { url: 'https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1', title: 'প্রকৃতির ছবি ১' },
            { url: 'https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=2', title: 'প্রকৃতির ছবি ২' },
            { url: 'https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=3', title: 'প্রকৃতির ছবি ৩' },
            { url: 'https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=4', title: 'প্রকৃতির ছবি ৪' },
            { url: 'https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=5', title: 'প্রকৃতির ছবি ৫' }
        ];

        let currentImage = 0;
        let zoomLevel = 1;

        function loadThumbnails() {
            const thumbnailsDiv = document.getElementById('thumbnails');
            thumbnailsDiv.innerHTML = '';

            images.forEach((img, index) => {
                const thumb = document.createElement('img');
                thumb.src = img.url;
                thumb.className = `thumbnail ${index === currentImage ? 'active' : ''}`;
                thumb.onclick = () => selectImage(index);
                thumbnailsDiv.appendChild(thumb);
            });
        }

        function selectImage(index) {
            currentImage = index;
            document.getElementById('mainImage').src = images[index].url;
            document.getElementById('zoomedImage').src = images[index].url.replace('600/400', '800/800');
            document.getElementById('imageTitle').textContent = images[index].title;

            document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail').forEach((thumb, i) => {
                thumb.className = `thumbnail ${i === index ? 'active' : ''}`;
            });
        }

        function zoomIn() {
            zoomLevel = Math.min(zoomLevel + 0.1, 3);
            document.getElementById('zoomSlider').value = zoomLevel;
            updateZoom(zoomLevel);
        }

        function zoomOut() {
            zoomLevel = Math.max(zoomLevel - 0.1, 1);
            document.getElementById('zoomSlider').value = zoomLevel;
            updateZoom(zoomLevel);
        }

        function resetZoom() {
            zoomLevel = 1;
            document.getElementById('zoomSlider').value = zoomLevel;
            updateZoom(zoomLevel);
        }

        function updateZoom(value) {
            zoomLevel = parseFloat(value);
        }

        // মাউস মুভ ইভেন্ট
        const mainContainer = document.getElementById('mainContainer');
        const mainImage = document.getElementById('mainImage');
        const zoomLens = document.getElementById('zoomLens');
        const zoomedView = document.getElementById('zoomedView');
        const zoomedImage = document.getElementById('zoomedImage');

        mainContainer.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = mainContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;

            // লেন্সের অবস্থান
            const lensSize = 100;
            let lensX = x - lensSize / 2;
            let lensY = y - lensSize / 2;

            // লেন্স সীমার মধ্যে রাখুন
            lensX = Math.max(0, Math.min(lensX, rect.width - lensSize));
            lensY = Math.max(0, Math.min(lensY, rect.height - lensSize));

            zoomLens.style.display = 'block';
            zoomLens.style.left = lensX + 'px';
            zoomLens.style.top = lensY + 'px';

            // জুমড ইমেজের অবস্থান
            const zoomX = (lensX / (rect.width - lensSize)) * (800 - 300);
            const zoomY = (lensY / (rect.height - lensSize)) * (800 - 400);

            zoomedImage.style.left = -zoomX + 'px';
            zoomedImage.style.top = -zoomY + 'px';
        });

        mainContainer.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            zoomLens.style.display = 'none';
        });

        loadThumbnails();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৬: ইমেজ ক্রপার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ ক্রপার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1000px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #43e97b;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 30px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .upload-area:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .crop-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .image-container {
            flex: 2;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        #image {
            max-width: 100%;
            display: block;
        }
        .crop-box {
            position: absolute;
            border: 2px solid #43e97b;
            background: rgba(67,233,123,0.1);
            cursor: move;
        }
        .resize-handle {
            position: absolute;
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background: #43e97b;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .handle-nw { top: -5px; left: -5px; cursor: nw-resize; }
        .handle-ne { top: -5px; right: -5px; cursor: ne-resize; }
        .handle-sw { bottom: -5px; left: -5px; cursor: sw-resize; }
        .handle-se { bottom: -5px; right: -5px; cursor: se-resize; }
        
        .preview-container {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .preview-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .preview-title {
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .preview {
            width: 150px;
            height: 150px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .preview img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 12px 25px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .btn-secondary {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        
        .aspect-ratio {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .ratio-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin: 0 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .ratio-btn.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>✂️ ইমেজ ক্রপার</h1>
        
        <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="image/*" style="display: none;" onchange="loadImage(this)">
            <h3>ইমেজ নির্বাচন করুন</h3>
            <p>অথবা এখানে ড্রাগ করুন</p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="aspect-ratio">
            <button class="ratio-btn active" onclick="setAspectRatio('free')">ফ্রি</button>
            <button class="ratio-btn" onclick="setAspectRatio('1:1')">১:১</button>
            <button class="ratio-btn" onclick="setAspectRatio('4:3')">৪:৩</button>
            <button class="ratio-btn" onclick="setAspectRatio('16:9')">১৬:৯</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="crop-container">
            <div class="image-container" id="imageContainer">
                <img id="image" src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1" alt="Image to crop">
                <div class="crop-box" id="cropBox">
                    <div class="resize-handle handle-nw"></div>
                    <div class="resize-handle handle-ne"></div>
                    <div class="resize-handle handle-sw"></div>
                    <div class="resize-handle handle-se"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="preview-container">
                <div class="preview-box">
                    <div class="preview-title">প্রিভিউ</div>
                    <div class="preview" id="preview">
                        <img id="previewImage" src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1">
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="preview-box">
                    <div class="preview-title">ক্রপ করা ইমেজ</div>
                    <div class="preview" id="cropPreview"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="cropImage()">ক্রপ করুন</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="downloadImage()">ডাউনলোড করুন</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetCrop()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let isDragging = false;
        let isResizing = false;
        let currentHandle = null;
        let startX, startY, startWidth, startHeight, startLeft, startTop;
        let aspectRatio = null;

        const image = document.getElementById('image');
        const cropBox = document.getElementById('cropBox');
        const container = document.getElementById('imageContainer');

        // ক্রপ বক্স ইনিশিয়ালাইজ
        function initCropBox() {
            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            cropBox.style.width = '200px';
            cropBox.style.height = '200px';
            cropBox.style.left = '50px';
            cropBox.style.top = '50px';
        }

        // ড্র্যাগ ইভেন্ট
        cropBox.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag);
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', drag);
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrag);

        // রিসাইজ ইভেন্ট
        document.querySelectorAll('.resize-handle').forEach(handle => {
            handle.addEventListener('mousedown', startResize);
        });

        function startDrag(e) {
            if (isResizing) return;
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.clientX;
            startY = e.clientY;
            startLeft = parseInt(cropBox.style.left) || 50;
            startTop = parseInt(cropBox.style.top) || 50;
            e.preventDefault();
        }

        function startResize(e) {
            isResizing = true;
            currentHandle = e.target.className.split(' ')[1];
            startX = e.clientX;
            startY = e.clientY;
            startWidth = parseInt(cropBox.style.width) || 200;
            startHeight = parseInt(cropBox.style.height) || 200;
            startLeft = parseInt(cropBox.style.left) || 50;
            startTop = parseInt(cropBox.style.top) || 50;
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
        }

        function drag(e) {
            if (!isDragging && !isResizing) return;

            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();

            if (isDragging) {
                let newLeft = startLeft + (e.clientX - startX);
                let newTop = startTop + (e.clientY - startY);

                // সীমার মধ্যে রাখুন
                newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(newLeft, containerRect.width - parseInt(cropBox.style.width)));
                newTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(newTop, containerRect.height - parseInt(cropBox.style.height)));

                cropBox.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
                cropBox.style.top = newTop + 'px';
            }

            if (isResizing) {
                let newWidth = startWidth;
                let newHeight = startHeight;
                let newLeft = startLeft;
                let newTop = startTop;

                switch(currentHandle) {
                    case 'handle-se':
                        newWidth = startWidth + (e.clientX - startX);
                        newHeight = aspectRatio ? newWidth / aspectRatio : startHeight + (e.clientY - startY);
                        break;
                    case 'handle-ne':
                        newWidth = startWidth + (e.clientX - startX);
                        newHeight = aspectRatio ? newWidth / aspectRatio : startHeight - (e.clientY - startY);
                        newTop = startTop + (e.clientY - startY);
                        break;
                    case 'handle-sw':
                        newWidth = startWidth - (e.clientX - startX);
                        newHeight = aspectRatio ? newWidth / aspectRatio : startHeight + (e.clientY - startY);
                        newLeft = startLeft + (e.clientX - startX);
                        break;
                    case 'handle-nw':
                        newWidth = startWidth - (e.clientX - startX);
                        newHeight = aspectRatio ? newWidth / aspectRatio : startHeight - (e.clientY - startY);
                        newLeft = startLeft + (e.clientX - startX);
                        newTop = startTop + (e.clientY - startY);
                        break;
                }

                // মিনিমাম সাইজ
                newWidth = Math.max(50, Math.min(newWidth, containerRect.width - newLeft));
                newHeight = Math.max(50, Math.min(newHeight, containerRect.height - newTop));

                if (aspectRatio) {
                    newHeight = newWidth / aspectRatio;
                }

                cropBox.style.width = newWidth + 'px';
                cropBox.style.height = newHeight + 'px';
                cropBox.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
                cropBox.style.top = newTop + 'px';
            }

            updatePreview();
        }

        function stopDrag() {
            isDragging = false;
            isResizing = false;
        }

        function loadImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = (e) => {
                    image.src = e.target.result;
                    document.getElementById('previewImage').src = e.target.result;
                    initCropBox();
                };
