                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

        function setAspectRatio(ratio) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.ratio-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            if (ratio === 'free') {
                aspectRatio = null;
            } else if (ratio === '1:1') {
                aspectRatio = 1;
            } else if (ratio === '4:3') {
                aspectRatio = 4/3;
            } else if (ratio === '16:9') {
                aspectRatio = 16/9;
            }
        }

        function updatePreview() {
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const imageRect = image.getBoundingClientRect();

            const scaleX = image.naturalWidth / imageRect.width;
            const scaleY = image.naturalHeight / imageRect.height;

            const cropX = parseInt(cropBox.style.left) * scaleX;
            const cropY = parseInt(cropBox.style.top) * scaleY;
            const cropWidth = parseInt(cropBox.style.width) * scaleX;
            const cropHeight = parseInt(cropBox.style.height) * scaleY;

            canvas.width = cropWidth;
            canvas.height = cropHeight;

            ctx.drawImage(image, cropX, cropY, cropWidth, cropHeight, 0, 0, cropWidth, cropHeight);

            const preview = document.getElementById('cropPreview');
            preview.innerHTML = '';
            const img = document.createElement('img');
            img.src = canvas.toDataURL();
            img.style.width = '100%';
            img.style.height = '100%';
            img.style.objectFit = 'cover';
            preview.appendChild(img);
        }

        function cropImage() {
            updatePreview();
        }

        function downloadImage() {
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            const preview = document.getElementById('cropPreview').querySelector('img');

            if (preview) {
                const link = document.createElement('a');
                link.download = 'cropped-image.png';
                link.href = preview.src;
                link.click();
            }
        }

        function resetCrop() {
            initCropBox();
            updatePreview();
        }

        initCropBox();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৭: ইমেজ ফিল্টার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ ফিল্টার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1000px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #667eea;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 30px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .editor-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .image-container {
            flex: 2;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        #image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 400px;
            object-fit: contain;
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .filters-panel {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .filter-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .filter-label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
        }
        input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .filter-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .filter-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .preset-filters {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .preset {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .preset:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 12px 25px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .btn-success {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎨 ইমেজ ফিল্টার</h1>
        
        <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="image/*" style="display: none;" onchange="loadImage(this)">
            <h3>ইমেজ নির্বাচন করুন</h3>
            <p>JPG, PNG, GIF ফাইল সাপোর্টেড</p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="editor-container">
            <div class="image-container">
                <img id="image" src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1" alt="Image">
            </div>
            
            <div class="filters-panel">
                <h3>ফিল্টার অ্যাডজাস্ট</h3>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>ব্রাইটনেস</span>
                        <span id="brightnessValue">১০০%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="brightness" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>কনট্রাস্ট</span>
                        <span id="contrastValue">১০০%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="contrast" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>স্যাচুরেশন</span>
                        <span id="saturateValue">১০০%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="saturate" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>গ্রেস্কেল</span>
                        <span id="grayscaleValue">০%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="grayscale" min="0" max="100" value="0" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>সেপিয়া</span>
                        <span id="sepiaValue">০%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="sepia" min="0" max="100" value="0" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>হিউ রোটেট</span>
                        <span id="hueValue">০°</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="hue" min="0" max="360" value="0" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <div class="filter-label">
                        <span>ব্লার</span>
                        <span id="blurValue">০px</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="blur" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" value="0" oninput="updateFilter()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="preset-filters">
                    <div class="preset" onclick="applyPreset('normal')">স্বাভাবিক</div>
                    <div class="preset" onclick="applyPreset('vintage')">ভিন্টেজ</div>
                    <div class="preset" onclick="applyPreset('cool')">কুল</div>
                    <div class="preset" onclick="applyPreset('warm')">ওয়ার্ম</div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="controls">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="resetFilters()">রিসেট</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="downloadImage()">ডাউনলোড</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const image = document.getElementById('image');

        function loadImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = (e) => {
                    image.src = e.target.result;
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

        function updateFilter() {
            const brightness = document.getElementById('brightness').value;
            const contrast = document.getElementById('contrast').value;
            const saturate = document.getElementById('saturate').value;
            const grayscale = document.getElementById('grayscale').value;
            const sepia = document.getElementById('sepia').value;
            const hue = document.getElementById('hue').value;
            const blur = document.getElementById('blur').value;

            // ডিসপ্লে আপডেট
            document.getElementById('brightnessValue').textContent = brightness + '%';
            document.getElementById('contrastValue').textContent = contrast + '%';
            document.getElementById('saturateValue').textContent = saturate + '%';
            document.getElementById('grayscaleValue').textContent = grayscale + '%';
            document.getElementById('sepiaValue').textContent = sepia + '%';
            document.getElementById('hueValue').textContent = hue + '°';
            document.getElementById('blurValue').textContent = blur + 'px';

            // ফিল্টার অ্যাপ্লাই
            image.style.filter = `
                brightness(${brightness}%)
                contrast(${contrast}%)
                saturate(${saturate}%)
                grayscale(${grayscale}%)
                sepia(${sepia}%)
                hue-rotate(${hue}deg)
                blur(${blur}px)
            `;
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('brightness').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('contrast').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('saturate').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('grayscale').value = 0;
            document.getElementById('sepia').value = 0;
            document.getElementById('hue').value = 0;
            document.getElementById('blur').value = 0;
            updateFilter();
        }

        function applyPreset(preset) {
            switch(preset) {
                case 'normal':
                    resetFilters();
                    break;
                case 'vintage':
                    document.getElementById('brightness').value = 110;
                    document.getElementById('contrast').value = 90;
                    document.getElementById('saturate').value = 80;
                    document.getElementById('sepia').value = 50;
                    break;
                case 'cool':
                    document.getElementById('brightness').value = 100;
                    document.getElementById('contrast').value = 110;
                    document.getElementById('saturate').value = 120;
                    document.getElementById('hue').value = 180;
                    break;
                case 'warm':
                    document.getElementById('brightness').value = 105;
                    document.getElementById('contrast').value = 105;
                    document.getElementById('saturate').value = 110;
                    document.getElementById('hue').value = 30;
                    break;
            }
            updateFilter();
        }

        function downloadImage() {
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

            canvas.width = image.naturalWidth;
            canvas.height = image.naturalHeight;

            // ফিল্টার অ্যাপ্লাই
            ctx.filter = image.style.filter;
            ctx.drawImage(image, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // ডাউনলোড
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'filtered-image.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৮: ইমেজ এডিটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইমেজ এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1200px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 12px 25px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .tool-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .editor-area {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .canvas-container {
            flex: 3;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        #canvas {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .tools-panel {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .tool-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .tool-section h3 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .color-picker {
            width: 100%;
            height: 40px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .brush-size {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .shape-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .shape-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .shape-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .text-controls input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .layers {
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .layer-item {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .layer-item.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .upload-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎨 ইমেজ এডিটর</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('brush')">🖌️ ব্রাশ</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('eraser')">🧽 ইরেজার</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('text')">📝 টেক্সট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('shape')">🔷 শেপ</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="undo()">↩️ আন্ডু</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="redo()">↪️ রিডু</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="clearCanvas()">🗑️ ক্লিয়ার</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="saveImage()">💾 সেভ</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="editor-area">
            <div class="canvas-container">
                <canvas id="canvas" width="800" height="500"></canvas>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tools-panel">
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>কালার</h3>
                    <input type="color" id="colorPicker" class="color-picker" value="#ff6b6b">
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>ব্রাশ সাইজ</h3>
                    <input type="range" id="brushSize" class="brush-size" min="1" max="50" value="5">
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section" id="shapeTools" style="display: none;">
                    <h3>শেপ</h3>
                    <div class="shape-buttons">
                        <button class="shape-btn" onclick="setShape('rectangle')">▭</button>
                        <button class="shape-btn" onclick="setShape('circle')">◯</button>
                        <button class="shape-btn" onclick="setShape('line')">⎯</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section" id="textTools" style="display: none;">
                    <h3>টেক্সট</h3>
                    <input type="text" id="textInput" placeholder="টেক্সট লিখুন">
                    <input type="number" id="fontSize" placeholder="ফন্ট সাইজ" value="20">
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>লেয়ার</h3>
                    <div class="layers" id="layers"></div>
                </div>
                
                <button class="upload-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('imageUpload').click()">
                    📁 ইমেজ আপলোড
                </button>
                <input type="file" id="imageUpload" accept="image/*" style="display: none;" onchange="uploadImage(this)">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let currentTool = 'brush';
        let isDrawing = false;
        let lastX = 0;
        let lastY = 0;
        let history = [];
        let historyIndex = -1;
        let layers = [];

        // সেটিংস
        let currentColor = '#ff6b6b';
        let currentBrushSize = 5;
        let currentShape = 'rectangle';

        // ইভেন্ট লিসেনার
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseout', stopDrawing);

        function startDrawing(e) {
            isDrawing = true;
            const pos = getMousePos(e);
            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;

            if (currentTool === 'text') {
                addText(pos.x, pos.y);
            }
        }

        function draw(e) {
            if (!isDrawing) return;

            const pos = getMousePos(e);

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.strokeStyle = currentColor;
            ctx.lineWidth = currentBrushSize;
            ctx.lineCap = 'round';
            ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

            if (currentTool === 'brush') {
                ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
                ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
                ctx.stroke();
            } else if (currentTool === 'eraser') {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
                ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;
        }

        function stopDrawing() {
            if (isDrawing) {
                isDrawing = false;
                saveToHistory();
            }
        }

        function getMousePos(e) {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
            const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;

            return {
                x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,
                y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY
            };
        }

        function selectTool(tool) {
            currentTool = tool;

            document.querySelectorAll('.tool-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            document.getElementById('shapeTools').style.display = tool === 'shape' ? 'block' : 'none';
            document.getElementById('textTools').style.display = tool === 'text' ? 'block' : 'none';
        }

        function setShape(shape) {
            currentShape = shape;
        }

        function addText(x, y) {
            const text = document.getElementById('textInput').value;
            const fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value;

            if (text) {
                ctx.font = `${fontSize}px Arial`;
                ctx.fillStyle = currentColor;
                ctx.fillText(text, x, y);
                saveToHistory();
            }
        }

        function uploadImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = (e) => {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.onload = () => {
                        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                        saveToHistory();
                    };
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

        function saveToHistory() {
            historyIndex++;
            history = history.slice(0, historyIndex);
            history.push(canvas.toDataURL());
        }

        function undo() {
            if (historyIndex > 0) {
                historyIndex--;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function redo() {
            if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {
                historyIndex++;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function loadFromHistory() {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            };
            img.src = history[historyIndex];
        }

        function clearCanvas() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            saveToHistory();
        }

        function saveImage() {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'my-drawing.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }

        // কালার পিকার চেঞ্জ
        document.getElementById('colorPicker').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            currentColor = e.target.value;
        });

        // ব্রাশ সাইজ চেঞ্জ
        document.getElementById('brushSize').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            currentBrushSize = e.target.value;
        });

        // ইনিশিয়াল হিস্টোরি
        saveToHistory();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৫৯: ড্রইং অ্যাপ
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ড্রইং অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1000px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .tool-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .tool-btn.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .canvas-container {
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            background: white;
        }
        #canvas {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            display: block;
            cursor: crosshair;
        }
        
        .color-picker {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .color-box {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
        }
        .color-box:hover {
            transform: scale(1.2);
        }
        .color-box.active {
            border-color: #333;
        }
        
        .brush-size {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        #sizePreview {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #333;
        }
        
        .status-bar {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎨 ড্রইং অ্যাপ</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn active" onclick="selectTool('brush')">🖌️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('eraser')">🧽</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('fill')">🪣</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('text')">📝</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="undo()">↩️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="redo()">↪️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="clearCanvas()">🗑️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="saveDrawing()">💾</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="color-picker">
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #000000;" onclick="selectColor('#000000')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #ff0000;" onclick="selectColor('#ff0000')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #00ff00;" onclick="selectColor('#00ff00')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #0000ff;" onclick="selectColor('#0000ff')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #ffff00;" onclick="selectColor('#ffff00')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #ff00ff;" onclick="selectColor('#ff00ff')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #00ffff;" onclick="selectColor('#00ffff')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #ff8800;" onclick="selectColor('#ff8800')"></div>
            <div class="color-box" style="background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ccc;" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff')"></div>
            <input type="color" id="customColor" onchange="selectColor(this.value)" style="width: 30px; height: 30px; border: none; padding: 0;">
        </div>
        
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
            <div class="brush-size">
                <span>ব্রাশ সাইজ:</span>
                <input type="range" id="brushSize" min="1" max="50" value="5" oninput="updateBrushSize(this.value)">
                <span id="sizeValue">5px</span>
            </div>
            <div id="sizePreview"></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="canvas-container">
            <canvas id="canvas" width="900" height="500"></canvas>
        </div>
        
        <div class="status-bar">
            <span>পজিশন: <span id="mousePos">0, 0</span></span>
            <span>টুল: <span id="currentTool">ব্রাশ</span></span>
            <span>কালার: <span id="currentColor">কালো</span></span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let isDrawing = false;
        let lastX = 0;
        let lastY = 0;
        let currentTool = 'brush';
        let currentColor = '#000000';
        let currentSize = 5;
        let history = [];
        let historyIndex = -1;

        // ডিফল্ট সেটিংস
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

        // ইভেন্ট লিসেনার
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseout', stopDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', updateMousePosition);

        function startDrawing(e) {
            isDrawing = true;
            const pos = getMousePos(e);
            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;

            if (currentTool === 'fill') {
                floodFill(pos.x, pos.y);
            }
        }

        function draw(e) {
            if (!isDrawing) return;

            const pos = getMousePos(e);

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.lineWidth = currentSize;
            ctx.strokeStyle = currentTool === 'eraser' ? '#ffffff' : currentColor;

            ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
            ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
            ctx.stroke();

            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;
        }

        function stopDrawing() {
            if (isDrawing) {
                isDrawing = false;
                saveToHistory();
            }
        }

        function getMousePos(e) {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
            const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;

            return {
                x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,
                y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY
            };
        }

        function updateMousePosition(e) {
            const pos = getMousePos(e);
            document.getElementById('mousePos').textContent = `${Math.round(pos.x)}, ${Math.round(pos.y)}`;
        }

        function selectTool(tool) {
            currentTool = tool;

            document.querySelectorAll('.tool-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            const toolNames = {
                'brush': 'ব্রাশ',
                'eraser': 'ইরেজার',
                'fill': 'ফিল',
                'text': 'টেক্সট'
            };
            document.getElementById('currentTool').textContent = toolNames[tool];
        }

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;

            document.querySelectorAll('.color-box').forEach(box => {
                box.classList.remove('active');
            });

            if (event && event.target.classList.contains('color-box')) {
                event.target.classList.add('active');
            }

            const colorNames = {
                '#000000': 'কালো',
                '#ff0000': 'লাল',
                '#00ff00': 'সবুজ',
                '#0000ff': 'নীল',
                '#ffff00': 'হলুদ',
                '#ff00ff': 'ম্যাজেন্টা',
                '#00ffff': 'সায়ান',
                '#ff8800': 'কমলা',
                '#ffffff': 'সাদা'
            };
            document.getElementById('currentColor').textContent = colorNames[color] || 'কাস্টম';
        }

        function updateBrushSize(size) {
            currentSize = size;
            document.getElementById('sizeValue').textContent = size + 'px';

            const preview = document.getElementById('sizePreview');
            preview.style.width = size * 2 + 'px';
            preview.style.height = size * 2 + 'px';
            preview.style.backgroundColor = currentColor;
        }

        function floodFill(x, y) {
            const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const targetColor = getPixelColor(imageData, x, y);
            const fillColor = hexToRgb(currentColor);

            if (colorsMatch(targetColor, fillColor)) return;

            const pixels = [[x, y]];

            while (pixels.length) {
                const [px, py] = pixels.pop();
                const index = (py * canvas.width + px) * 4;

                if (!colorsMatch(getPixelColor(imageData, px, py), targetColor)) continue;

                setPixelColor(imageData, px, py, fillColor);

                if (px > 0) pixels.push([px - 1, py]);
                if (px < canvas.width - 1) pixels.push([px + 1, py]);
                if (py > 0) pixels.push([px, py - 1]);
                if (py < canvas.height - 1) pixels.push([px, py + 1]);
            }

            ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
            saveToHistory();
        }

        function getPixelColor(imageData, x, y) {
            const index = (y * canvas.width + x) * 4;
            return [
                imageData.data[index],
                imageData.data[index + 1],
                imageData.data[index + 2],
                imageData.data[index + 3]
            ];
        }

        function setPixelColor(imageData, x, y, color) {
            const index = (y * canvas.width + x) * 4;
            imageData.data[index] = color[0];
            imageData.data[index + 1] = color[1];
            imageData.data[index + 2] = color[2];
            imageData.data[index + 3] = 255;
        }

        function colorsMatch(c1, c2) {
            return c1[0] === c2[0] && c1[1] === c2[1] && c1[2] === c2[2] && c1[3] === c2[3];
        }

        function hexToRgb(hex) {
            const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
            const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
            const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
            return [r, g, b];
        }

        function saveToHistory() {
            historyIndex++;
            history = history.slice(0, historyIndex);
            history.push(canvas.toDataURL());
        }

        function undo() {
            if (historyIndex > 0) {
                historyIndex--;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function redo() {
            if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {
                historyIndex++;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function loadFromHistory() {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            };
            img.src = history[historyIndex];
        }

        function clearCanvas() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            saveToHistory();
        }

        function saveDrawing() {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'my-drawing.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }

        // ইনিশিয়াল হিস্টোরি
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        saveToHistory();

        // ব্রাশ সাইজ প্রিভিউ আপডেট
        updateBrushSize(5);
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬০: হোয়াইটবোর্ড
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>হোয়াইটবোর্ড</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1200px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .tool-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .tool-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .whiteboard-container {
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: white;
            position: relative;
        }
        #whiteboard {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            display: block;
            cursor: crosshair;
        }
        
        .color-palette {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        .color-btn {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .color-btn:hover {
            transform: scale(1.2);
        }
        .color-btn.active {
            border-color: #333;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .slider-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        
        .participants {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .participant {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-weight: bold;
            position: relative;
        }
        .participant.online::after {
            content: '';
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background: #43e97b;
            border-radius: 50%;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            right: 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 হোয়াইটবোর্ড</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn active" onclick="selectTool('pen')">পেন</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('eraser')">ইরেজার</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('highlighter')">হাইলাইটার</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('shape')">শেপ</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="clearBoard()">ক্লিয়ার</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="saveBoard()">সেভ</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="shareBoard()">শেয়ার</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="whiteboard-container">
            <canvas id="whiteboard" width="1100" height="500"></canvas>
        </div>
        
        <div class="color-palette">
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #000000;" onclick="selectColor('#000000')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #ff0000;" onclick="selectColor('#ff0000')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #00ff00;" onclick="selectColor('#00ff00')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #0000ff;" onclick="selectColor('#0000ff')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #ffff00;" onclick="selectColor('#ffff00')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #ff8800;" onclick="selectColor('#ff8800')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #ff00ff;" onclick="selectColor('#ff00ff')"></div>
            <div class="color-btn" style="background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ccc;" onclick="selectColor('#ffffff')"></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <div class="slider-container">
                <span>সাইজ:</span>
                <input type="range" id="sizeSlider" min="1" max="50" value="5" oninput="updateSize(this.value)">
                <span id="sizeDisplay">5px</span>
            </div>
            
            <div class="slider-container">
                <span>অপাসিটি:</span>
                <input type="range" id="opacitySlider" min="0" max="100" value="100" oninput="updateOpacity(this.value)">
                <span id="opacityDisplay">100%</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="participants">
            <div class="participant online">R</div>
            <div class="participant online">K</div>
            <div class="participant">F</div>
            <div class="participant">S</div>
            <div class="participant online">A</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('whiteboard');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let isDrawing = false;
        let lastX = 0;
        let lastY = 0;
        let currentTool = 'pen';
        let currentColor = '#000000';
        let currentSize = 5;
        let currentOpacity = 1;
        let startX, startY;

        // ডিফল্ট সেটিংস
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

        // ইভেন্ট লিসেনার
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseout', stopDrawing);

        function startDrawing(e) {
            isDrawing = true;
            const pos = getMousePos(e);
            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;
            startX = pos.x;
            startY = pos.y;

            if (currentTool === 'shape') {
                // শেপ শুরু
            }
        }

        function draw(e) {
            if (!isDrawing) return;

            const pos = getMousePos(e);

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.lineWidth = currentSize;
            ctx.strokeStyle = getColorWithOpacity(currentColor, currentOpacity);
            ctx.fillStyle = getColorWithOpacity(currentColor, currentOpacity);

            if (currentTool === 'pen' || currentTool === 'highlighter') {
                ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
                ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
                ctx.stroke();
                lastX = pos.x;
                lastY = pos.y;
            } else if (currentTool === 'eraser') {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
                ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
                ctx.stroke();
                lastX = pos.x;
                lastY = pos.y;
            } else if (currentTool === 'shape') {
                // টেম্পোরারি শেপ ড্রইং
                drawTemporaryShape(pos);
            }
        }

        function stopDrawing() {
            if (isDrawing) {
                isDrawing = false;

                if (currentTool === 'shape') {
                    // ফাইনাল শেপ ড্র
                    drawShape(lastX, lastY, startX, startY);
                }
            }
        }

        function getMousePos(e) {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
            const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;

            return {
                x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,
                y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY
            };
        }

        function getColorWithOpacity(color, opacity) {
            if (color === '#ffffff') return color;

            const r = parseInt(color.slice(1, 3), 16);
            const g = parseInt(color.slice(3, 5), 16);
            const b = parseInt(color.slice(5, 7), 16);

            return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${opacity})`;
        }

        function drawTemporaryShape(pos) {
            // ক্লিয়ার করে পুনরায় আঁকা (সিম্পলিফাইড)
        }

        function drawShape(x, y, startX, startY) {
            ctx.beginPath();

            const width = x - startX;
            const height = y - startY;

            if (Math.abs(width) > 10 && Math.abs(height) > 10) {
                ctx.rect(startX, startY, width, height);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
        }

        function selectTool(tool) {
            currentTool = tool;

            document.querySelectorAll('.tool-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            if (tool === 'highlighter') {
                currentOpacity = 0.3;
                document.getElementById('opacitySlider').value = 30;
                document.getElementById('opacityDisplay').textContent = '30%';
            } else {
                currentOpacity = 1;
                document.getElementById('opacitySlider').value = 100;
                document.getElementById('opacityDisplay').textContent = '100%';
            }
        }

        function selectColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;

            document.querySelectorAll('.color-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
        }

        function updateSize(size) {
            currentSize = size;
            document.getElementById('sizeDisplay').textContent = size + 'px';
        }

        function updateOpacity(opacity) {
            currentOpacity = opacity / 100;
            document.getElementById('opacityDisplay').textContent = opacity + '%';
        }

        function clearBoard() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        }

        function saveBoard() {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'whiteboard.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }

        function shareBoard() {
            alert('শেয়ার লিংক কপি হয়েছে!');
        }

        // হোয়াইটবোর্ড ব্যাকগ্রাউন্ড
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬১: পেইন্ট অ্যাপ
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পেইন্ট অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1200px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .menu-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .menu {
            position: relative;
        }
        .menu-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .menu-content {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            background: white;
            min-width: 150px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            border-radius: 5px;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .menu:hover .menu-content {
            display: block;
        }
        .menu-item {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .menu-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .toolbox {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tool-section {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .tool-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .canvas-container {
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: auto;
            max-height: 500px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        #canvas {
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .status-bar {
            margin-top: 10px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎨 পেইন্ট অ্যাপ</h1>
        
        <div class="menu-bar">
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">ফাইল</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="newFile()">নতুন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="openFile()">খুলুন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="saveFile()">সেভ</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="saveAs()">সেভ এজ</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="printFile()">প্রিন্ট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">এডিট</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="undo()">আন্ডু</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="redo()">রিডু</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="cut()">কাট</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="copy()">কপি</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="paste()">পেস্ট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">ভিউ</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="zoomIn()">জুম ইন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="zoomOut()">জুম আউট</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="fullScreen()">ফুল স্ক্রিন</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">হেল্প</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="about()">About</div>
                    <div class="menu-item" onclick="help()">Help</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="toolbox">
            <div class="tool-section">
                <button class="tool-btn active" onclick="selectTool('pencil')">✏️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('brush')">🖌️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('eraser')">🧽</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('fill')">🪣</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectTool('text')">📝</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tool-section">
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectShape('rectangle')">▭</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectShape('circle')">◯</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectShape('line')">⎯</button>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="selectShape('triangle')">△</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tool-section">
                <input type="color" id="colorPicker" value="#ff6b6b" onchange="changeColor(this.value)">
                <input type="range" id="brushSize" min="1" max="50" value="5" onchange="changeSize(this.value)">
                <span id="sizeDisplay">5px</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="canvas-container">
            <canvas id="canvas" width="800" height="500"></canvas>
        </div>
        
        <div class="status-bar">
            <span>সাইজ: 800 x 500</span>
            <span>জুম: 100%</span>
            <span>মেমরি: 2.3 MB</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let isDrawing = false;
        let lastX = 0;
        let lastY = 0;
        let currentTool = 'pencil';
        let currentColor = '#ff6b6b';
        let currentSize = 5;
        let history = [];
        let historyIndex = -1;

        // ডিফল্ট সেটিংস
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

        // ইভেন্ট লিসেনার
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrawing);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseout', stopDrawing);

        function startDrawing(e) {
            isDrawing = true;
            const pos = getMousePos(e);
            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;

            if (currentTool === 'fill') {
                floodFill(pos.x, pos.y);
            }
        }

        function draw(e) {
            if (!isDrawing) return;

            const pos = getMousePos(e);

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.lineWidth = currentSize;
            ctx.strokeStyle = currentTool === 'eraser' ? '#ffffff' : currentColor;

            if (currentTool === 'pencil') {
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
            } else if (currentTool === 'brush') {
                ctx.globalAlpha = 0.5;
            }

            ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
            ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
            lastX = pos.x;
            lastY = pos.y;
        }

        function stopDrawing() {
            if (isDrawing) {
                isDrawing = false;
                saveToHistory();
            }
        }

        function getMousePos(e) {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
            const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;

            return {
                x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,
                y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY
            };
        }

        function selectTool(tool) {
            currentTool = tool;

            document.querySelectorAll('.tool-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
        }

        function selectShape(shape) {
            currentTool = 'shape';
            currentShape = shape;
        }

        function changeColor(color) {
            currentColor = color;
        }

        function changeSize(size) {
            currentSize = size;
            document.getElementById('sizeDisplay').textContent = size + 'px';
        }

        function floodFill(x, y) {
            const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const targetColor = getPixelColor(imageData, x, y);
            const fillColor = hexToRgb(currentColor);

            if (colorsMatch(targetColor, fillColor)) return;

            const pixels = [[x, y]];

            while (pixels.length) {
                const [px, py] = pixels.pop();
                const index = (py * canvas.width + px) * 4;

                if (!colorsMatch(getPixelColor(imageData, px, py), targetColor)) continue;

                setPixelColor(imageData, px, py, fillColor);

                if (px > 0) pixels.push([px - 1, py]);
                if (px < canvas.width - 1) pixels.push([px + 1, py]);
                if (py > 0) pixels.push([px, py - 1]);
                if (py < canvas.height - 1) pixels.push([px, py + 1]);
            }

            ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
            saveToHistory();
        }

        function getPixelColor(imageData, x, y) {
            const index = (y * canvas.width + x) * 4;
            return [
                imageData.data[index],
                imageData.data[index + 1],
                imageData.data[index + 2],
                imageData.data[index + 3]
            ];
        }

        function setPixelColor(imageData, x, y, color) {
            const index = (y * canvas.width + x) * 4;
            imageData.data[index] = color[0];
            imageData.data[index + 1] = color[1];
            imageData.data[index + 2] = color[2];
            imageData.data[index + 3] = 255;
        }

        function colorsMatch(c1, c2) {
            return c1[0] === c2[0] && c1[1] === c2[1] && c1[2] === c2[2] && c1[3] === c2[3];
        }

        function hexToRgb(hex) {
            const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
            const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
            const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
            return [r, g, b];
        }

        function saveToHistory() {
            historyIndex++;
            history = history.slice(0, historyIndex);
            history.push(canvas.toDataURL());
        }

        function undo() {
            if (historyIndex > 0) {
                historyIndex--;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function redo() {
            if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {
                historyIndex++;
                loadFromHistory();
            }
        }

        function loadFromHistory() {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => {
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            };
            img.src = history[historyIndex];
        }

        function newFile() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            saveToHistory();
        }

        function saveFile() {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'painting.png';
            link.href = canvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }

        function openFile() {
            const input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'file';
            input.accept = 'image/*';
            input.onchange = (e) => {
                const file = e.target.files[0];
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = (event) => {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.onload = () => {
                        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                        saveToHistory();
                    };
                    img.src = event.target.result;
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            };
            input.click();
        }

        // ইনিশিয়াল ক্যানভাস
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        saveToHistory();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬২: ফটো এডিটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফটো এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 1200px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #667eea;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .upload-area:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .editor-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .image-container {
            flex: 2;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        #image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            object-fit: contain;
        }
        
        .tools-panel {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .tool-section {
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }
        .tool-section h3 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .adjustment {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .adjustment label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .adjustment input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .filter-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .filter-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .transform-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .transform-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .action-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .action-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .action-btn:hover {
            background: #764ba2;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📸 ফটো এডিটর</h1>
        
        <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="image/*" style="display: none;" onchange="loadImage(this)">
            <h3>ফটো আপলোড করুন</h3>
            <p>অথবা এখানে ড্রাগ করুন</p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="editor-container">
            <div class="image-container">
                <img id="image" src="https://picsum.photos/800/500?random=1" alt="Photo">
            </div>
            
            <div class="tools-panel">
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>অ্যাডজাস্টমেন্ট</h3>
                    <div class="adjustment">
                        <label>ব্রাইটনেস <span id="brightnessValue">100</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="brightness" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyAdjustments()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="adjustment">
                        <label>কনট্রাস্ট <span id="contrastValue">100</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="contrast" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyAdjustments()">
                    </div>
                    <div class="adjustment">
                        <label>স্যাচুরেশন <span id="saturateValue">100</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="saturate" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyAdjustments()">
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>ফিল্টার</h3>
                    <div class="filter-buttons">
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('normal')">স্বাভাবিক</div>
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('grayscale')">গ্রেস্কেল</div>
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('sepia')">সেপিয়া</div>
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('invert')">ইনভার্ট</div>
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('blur')">ব্লার</div>
                        <div class="filter-btn" onclick="applyFilter('bright')">ব্রাইট</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>ট্রান্সফর্ম</h3>
                    <div class="transform-buttons">
                        <div class="transform-btn" onclick="rotate(-90)">↺ রোটেট</div>
                        <div class="transform-btn" onclick="rotate(90)">↻ রোটেট</div>
                        <div class="transform-btn" onclick="flip('horizontal')">↔️ ফ্লিপ</div>
                        <div class="transform-btn" onclick="flip('vertical')">↕️ ফ্লিপ</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="action-buttons">
                    <button class="action-btn" onclick="resetImage()">রিসেট</button>
                    <button class="action-btn" onclick="downloadImage()">ডাউনলোড</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const image = document.getElementById('image');
        let originalImage = null;
        let rotation = 0;
        let scaleX = 1;
        let scaleY = 1;

        function loadImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = (e) => {
                    image.src = e.target.result;
                    originalImage = e.target.result;
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }

        function applyAdjustments() {
            const brightness = document.getElementById('brightness').value;
            const contrast = document.getElementById('contrast').value;
            const saturate = document.getElementById('saturate').value;

            document.getElementById('brightnessValue').textContent = brightness;
            document.getElementById('contrastValue').textContent = contrast;
            document.getElementById('saturateValue').textContent = saturate;

            image.style.filter = `
                brightness(${brightness}%)
                contrast(${contrast}%)
                saturate(${saturate}%)
            `;
        }

        function applyFilter(filter) {
            let filterValue = '';

            switch(filter) {
                case 'normal':
                    filterValue = 'none';
                    break;
                case 'grayscale':
                    filterValue = 'grayscale(100%)';
                    break;
                case 'sepia':
                    filterValue = 'sepia(100%)';
                    break;
                case 'invert':
                    filterValue = 'invert(100%)';
                    break;
                case 'blur':
                    filterValue = 'blur(5px)';
                    break;
                case 'bright':
                    filterValue = 'brightness(150%)';
                    break;
            }

            image.style.filter = filterValue;

            // স্লাইডার রিসেট
            document.getElementById('brightness').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('contrast').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('saturate').value = 100;
        }

        function rotate(degrees) {
            rotation += degrees;
            image.style.transform = `rotate(${rotation}deg) scale(${scaleX}, ${scaleY})`;
        }

        function flip(direction) {
            if (direction === 'horizontal') {
                scaleX *= -1;
            } else {
                scaleY *= -1;
            }
            image.style.transform = `rotate(${rotation}deg) scale(${scaleX}, ${scaleY})`;
        }

        function resetImage() {
            if (originalImage) {
                image.src = originalImage;
            }
            rotation = 0;
            scaleX = 1;
            scaleY = 1;
            image.style.transform = 'none';
            image.style.filter = 'none';

            document.getElementById('brightness').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('contrast').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('saturate').value = 100;
            document.getElementById('brightnessValue').textContent = '100';
            document.getElementById('contrastValue').textContent = '100';
            document.getElementById('saturateValue').textContent = '100';
        }

        function downloadImage() {
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

            canvas.width = image.naturalWidth;
            canvas.height = image.naturalHeight;

            // ট্রান্সফর্ম অ্যাপ্লাই
            ctx.translate(canvas.width/2, canvas.height/2);
            ctx.rotate(rotation * Math.PI / 180);
            ctx.scale(scaleX, scaleY);
            ctx.drawImage(image, -canvas.width/2, -canvas.height/2, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // ফিল্টার অ্যাপ্লাই
            const filterCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const filterCtx = filterCanvas.getContext('2d');
            filterCanvas.width = canvas.width;
            filterCanvas.height = canvas.height;
            filterCtx.filter = image.style.filter;
            filterCtx.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);

            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.download = 'edited-photo.png';
            link.href = filterCanvas.toDataURL();
            link.click();
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৩: ভিডিও প্লেয়ার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ভিডিও প্লেয়ার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 900px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .video-container {
            position: relative;
            background: #000;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        #video {
            width: 100%;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .video-controls {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.7));
            padding: 15px;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s;
        }
        .video-container:hover .video-controls {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        .progress-bar {
            width: 100%;
            height: 5px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: #43e97b;
            border-radius: 5px;
            width: 0%;
        }
        
        .control-buttons {
