            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            color: white;
        }
        .control-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: white;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .time-display {
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .volume-control {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-left: auto;
        }
        #volumeSlider {
            width: 80px;
        }
        
        .playback-speed {
            margin-left: 15px;
        }
        #speedSelect {
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        .video-list {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .video-list h3 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #333;
        }
        .video-item {
            padding: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .video-item:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .video-item.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎬 ভিডিও প্লেয়ার</h1>
        
        <div class="video-container">
            <video id="video" src="https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"></video>
            
            <div class="video-controls">
                <div class="progress-bar" onclick="seekVideo(event)">
                    <div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill"></div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="control-buttons">
                    <button class="control-btn" onclick="playPause()" id="playPauseBtn">▶️</button>
                    <button class="control-btn" onclick="stopVideo()">⏹️</button>
                    <button class="control-btn" onclick="skip(-10)">⏪ 10s</button>
                    <button class="control-btn" onclick="skip(10)">10s ⏩</button>
                    
                    <span class="time-display" id="timeDisplay">0:00 / 0:00</span>
                    
                    <div class="volume-control">
                        <button class="control-btn" onclick="toggleMute()" id="muteBtn">🔊</button>
                        <input type="range" id="volumeSlider" min="0" max="1" step="0.1" value="1" oninput="changeVolume(this.value)">
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="playback-speed">
                        <select id="speedSelect" onchange="changeSpeed(this.value)">
                            <option value="0.5">0.5x</option>
                            <option value="1" selected>1x</option>
                            <option value="1.5">1.5x</option>
                            <option value="2">2x</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    
                    <button class="control-btn" onclick="toggleFullScreen()">⛶</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="video-list">
            <h3>ভিডিও তালিকা</h3>
            <div class="video-item active" onclick="loadVideo('https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4')">
                Big Buck Bunny
            </div>
            <div class="video-item" onclick="loadVideo('https://www.w3schools.com/html/movie.mp4')">
                Sample Video
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const video = document.getElementById('video');
        const playPauseBtn = document.getElementById('playPauseBtn');
        const progressFill = document.getElementById('progressFill');
        const timeDisplay = document.getElementById('timeDisplay');
        const muteBtn = document.getElementById('muteBtn');

        // প্লে/পজ
        function playPause() {
            if (video.paused) {
                video.play();
                playPauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️';
            } else {
                video.pause();
                playPauseBtn.textContent = '▶️';
            }
        }

        // স্টপ
        function stopVideo() {
            video.pause();
            video.currentTime = 0;
            playPauseBtn.textContent = '▶️';
        }

        // স্কিপ
        function skip(seconds) {
            video.currentTime += seconds;
        }

        // ভলিউম
        function changeVolume(value) {
            video.volume = value;
            updateMuteIcon();
        }

        function toggleMute() {
            video.muted = !video.muted;
            updateMuteIcon();
        }

        function updateMuteIcon() {
            if (video.muted || video.volume === 0) {
                muteBtn.textContent = '🔇';
            } else if (video.volume < 0.5) {
                muteBtn.textContent = '🔈';
            } else {
                muteBtn.textContent = '🔊';
            }
        }

        // স্পিড
        function changeSpeed(speed) {
            video.playbackRate = parseFloat(speed);
        }

        // সিক
        function seekVideo(e) {
            const progressBar = e.currentTarget;
            const clickX = e.offsetX;
            const width = progressBar.clientWidth;
            const duration = video.duration;

            video.currentTime = (clickX / width) * duration;
        }

        // ফুলস্ক্রিন
        function toggleFullScreen() {
            if (video.requestFullscreen) {
                video.requestFullscreen();
            }
        }

        // টাইম আপডেট
        video.addEventListener('timeupdate', () => {
            const progress = (video.currentTime / video.duration) * 100;
            progressFill.style.width = progress + '%';

            const current = formatTime(video.currentTime);
            const duration = formatTime(video.duration);
            timeDisplay.textContent = `${current} / ${duration}`;
        });

        function formatTime(seconds) {
            const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
            const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
            return `${mins}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
        }

        // ভিডিও লোড
        function loadVideo(src) {
            video.src = src;
            video.load();
            video.play();
            playPauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️';

            document.querySelectorAll('.video-item').forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৪: অডিও প্লেয়ার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>অডিও প্লেয়ার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .album-art {
            width: 250px;
            height: 250px;
            margin: 0 auto 20px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
        }
        #albumArt {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .track-info {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        #trackTitle {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        #trackArtist {
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .progress-container {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            width: 100%;
            height: 5px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
            border-radius: 5px;
            width: 0%;
        }
        .time-display {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .control-btn {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .control-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .control-btn.play {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .volume-control {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        #volumeSlider {
            width: 150px;
        }
        
        .playlist {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .playlist h3 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #333;
        }
        .playlist-item {
            padding: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .playlist-item:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .playlist-item.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .playlist-item .duration {
            color: #999;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎵 অডিও প্লেয়ার</h1>
        
        <div class="album-art">
            <img id="albumArt" src="https://via.placeholder.com/250" alt="Album Art">
        </div>
        
        <div class="track-info">
            <div id="trackTitle">ট্র্যাক নির্বাচন করুন</div>
            <div id="trackArtist">আর্টিস্ট</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="progress-container">
            <div class="progress-bar" onclick="seekAudio(event)">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="time-display">
                <span id="currentTime">0:00</span>
                <span id="duration">0:00</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="prevTrack()">⏮</button>
            <button class="control-btn play" onclick="playPause()" id="playPauseBtn">▶️</button>
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="nextTrack()">⏭</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="volume-control">
            <span>🔊</span>
            <input type="range" id="volumeSlider" min="0" max="1" step="0.1" value="0.7" oninput="changeVolume(this.value)">
        </div>
        
        <div class="playlist" id="playlist">
            <h3>প্লেলিস্ট</h3>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ডামি অডিও ডাটা
        const tracks = [
            {
                title: 'Summer Breeze',
                artist: 'John Doe',
                duration: '3:45',
                url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-1.mp3'
            },
            {
                title: 'Winter Dreams',
                artist: 'Jane Smith',
                duration: '4:20',
                url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-2.mp3'
            },
            {
                title: 'Autumn Leaves',
                artist: 'Bob Johnson',
                duration: '3:30',
                url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-3.mp3'
            },
            {
                title: 'Spring Morning',
                artist: 'Alice Brown',
                duration: '4:15',
                url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-4.mp3'
            }
        ];

        const audio = new Audio();
        let currentTrack = 0;
        let isPlaying = false;

        // প্লেলিস্ট রেন্ডার
        function renderPlaylist() {
            const playlistEl = document.getElementById('playlist');
            playlistEl.innerHTML = '<h3>প্লেলিস্ট</h3>' + tracks.map((track, index) => `
                <div class="playlist-item ${index === currentTrack ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="playTrack(${index})">
                    <span>${track.title}</span>
                    <span class="duration">${track.duration}</span>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function playTrack(index) {
            currentTrack = index;
            const track = tracks[index];

            audio.src = track.url;
            audio.play();
            isPlaying = true;

            document.getElementById('playPauseBtn').textContent = '⏸️';
            document.getElementById('trackTitle').textContent = track.title;
            document.getElementById('trackArtist').textContent = track.artist;

            renderPlaylist();
        }

        function playPause() {
            if (isPlaying) {
                audio.pause();
                document.getElementById('playPauseBtn').textContent = '▶️';
            } else {
                audio.play();
                document.getElementById('playPauseBtn').textContent = '⏸️';
            }
            isPlaying = !isPlaying;
        }

        function prevTrack() {
            currentTrack = (currentTrack - 1 + tracks.length) % tracks.length;
            playTrack(currentTrack);
        }

        function nextTrack() {
            currentTrack = (currentTrack + 1) % tracks.length;
            playTrack(currentTrack);
        }

        function changeVolume(value) {
            audio.volume = value;
        }

        function seekAudio(e) {
            const progressBar = e.currentTarget;
            const clickX = e.offsetX;
            const width = progressBar.clientWidth;
            const duration = audio.duration;

            audio.currentTime = (clickX / width) * duration;
        }

        // টাইম আপডেট
        audio.addEventListener('timeupdate', () => {
            const progress = (audio.currentTime / audio.duration) * 100;
            document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = progress + '%';

            document.getElementById('currentTime').textContent = formatTime(audio.currentTime);
            document.getElementById('duration').textContent = formatTime(audio.duration);
        });

        function formatTime(seconds) {
            if (isNaN(seconds)) return '0:00';
            const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
            const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
            return `${mins}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
        }

        // ট্র্যাক শেষ হলে পরবর্তী ট্র্যাক
        audio.addEventListener('ended', nextTrack);

        renderPlaylist();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৫: মিউজিক প্লেয়ার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>মিউজিক প্লেয়ার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .player-header {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .current-track {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 15px;
        }
        .track-thumb {
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .track-thumb img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .track-details {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .track-name {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .track-artist {
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .track-album {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .visualizer {
            width: 200px;
            height: 100px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 3px;
        }
        .visualizer-bar {
            flex: 1;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #ff6b6b, #ff8e8e);
            border-radius: 3px;
            animation: visualize 1s ease infinite;
        }
        @keyframes visualize {
            0%, 100% { height: 20%; }
            50% { height: 100%; }
        }
        
        .main-controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .control-btn {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .control-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .control-btn.play {
            width: 70px;
            height: 70px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            font-size: 30px;
        }
        
        .progress-area {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            width: 100%;
            height: 6px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e8e);
            border-radius: 3px;
            width: 0%;
            position: relative;
        }
        .progress-handle {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            border-radius: 50%;
            position: absolute;
            right: -6px;
            top: -3px;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s;
        }
        .progress-bar:hover .progress-handle {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        .time-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .volume-equalizer {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .volume-slider {
            width: 200px;
        }
        .equalizer {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .eq-bar {
            width: 8px;
            height: 30px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 4px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .eq-fill {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            transition: height 0.1s;
        }
        
        .playlist-section {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 15px;
        }
        .playlist-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .playlist-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
        }
        .playlist-stats {
            color: #999;
        }
        .playlist-items {
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .playlist-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .playlist-item:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .playlist-item.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .item-number {
            width: 30px;
            color: #999;
        }
        .item-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .item-title {
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .item-artist {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #999;
        }
        .item-duration {
            color: #999;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎧 মিউজিক প্লেয়ার</h1>
        
        <div class="player-header">
            <div class="current-track">
                <div class="track-thumb">
                    <img src="https://via.placeholder.com/100" alt="Album Art">
                </div>
                <div class="track-details">
                    <div class="track-name">Bohemian Rhapsody</div>
                    <div class="track-artist">Queen</div>
                    <div class="track-album">A Night at the Opera</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="visualizer">
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.1s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.2s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.3s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.4s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.5s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.6s"></div>
                <div class="visualizer-bar" style="animation-delay: 0.7s"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="main-controls">
            <button class="control-btn">⏮</button>
            <button class="control-btn play" id="playPauseBtn">▶️</button>
            <button class="control-btn">⏭</button>
            <button class="control-btn">🔀</button>
            <button class="control-btn">🔁</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="progress-area">
            <div class="progress-bar">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill">
                    <div class="progress-handle"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="time-info">
                <span id="currentTime">0:00</span>
                <span id="duration">3:45</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="volume-equalizer">
            <div class="volume-control">
                <span>🔊</span>
                <input type="range" class="volume-slider" min="0" max="100" value="70">
            </div>
            
            <div class="equalizer">
                <div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-fill" style="height: 60%"></div></div>
                <div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-fill" style="height: 80%"></div></div>
                <div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-fill" style="height: 45%"></div></div>
                <div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-fill" style="height: 90%"></div></div>
                <div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-fill" style="height: 70%"></div></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="playlist-section">
            <div class="playlist-header">
                <span class="playlist-title">প্লেলিস্ট</span>
                <span class="playlist-stats">১২ ট্র্যাক, ৪৫ মিনিট</span>
            </div>
            
            <div class="playlist-items">
                <div class="playlist-item active">
                    <span class="item-number">01</span>
                    <div class="item-info">
                        <div class="item-title">Bohemian Rhapsody</div>
                        <div class="item-artist">Queen</div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="item-duration">5:55</span>
                </div>
                <div class="playlist-item">
                    <span class="item-number">02</span>
                    <div class="item-info">
                        <div class="item-title">Stairway to Heaven</div>
                        <div class="item-artist">Led Zeppelin</div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="item-duration">8:02</span>
                </div>
                <div class="playlist-item">
                    <span class="item-number">03</span>
                    <div class="item-info">
                        <div class="item-title">Hotel California</div>
                        <div class="item-artist">Eagles</div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="item-duration">6:30</span>
                </div>
                <div class="playlist-item">
                    <span class="item-number">04</span>
                    <div class="item-info">
                        <div class="item-title">Imagine</div>
                        <div class="item-artist">John Lennon</div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="item-duration">3:04</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // সিমুলেটেড অডিও প্লেয়ার
        let isPlaying = false;
        let currentTime = 0;
        const duration = 235; // 3:55 in seconds

        function formatTime(seconds) {
            const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
            const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
            return `${mins}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
        }

        document.getElementById('playPauseBtn').addEventListener('click', function() {
            isPlaying = !isPlaying;
            this.textContent = isPlaying ? '⏸️' : '▶️';

            if (isPlaying) {
                // সিমুলেট প্রোগ্রেস
                const interval = setInterval(() => {
                    if (!isPlaying) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        return;
                    }
                    currentTime += 1;
                    if (currentTime >= duration) {
                        currentTime = 0;
                        isPlaying = false;
                        document.getElementById('playPauseBtn').textContent = '▶️';
                        clearInterval(interval);
                    }

                    const progress = (currentTime / duration) * 100;
                    document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = progress + '%';
                    document.getElementById('currentTime').textContent = formatTime(currentTime);
                }, 1000);
            }
        });

        document.getElementById('duration').textContent = formatTime(duration);
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৬: পডকাস্ট অ্যাপ
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পডকাস্ট অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 900px;
            width: 95%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .categories {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .category-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .category-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .category-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .featured-podcast {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
        }
        .featured-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .featured-badge {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .featured-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .featured-host {
            opacity: 0.9;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .featured-desc {
            opacity: 0.8;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        .featured-stats {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .featured-stats span {
            opacity: 0.9;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .featured-image {
            width: 150px;
            height: 150px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .featured-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .podcast-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .podcast-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .podcast-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .podcast-image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 150px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .podcast-info {
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .podcast-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .podcast-host {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .podcast-meta {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .player-bar {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .now-playing {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            flex: 1;
        }
        .now-playing img {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .now-playing-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .now-playing-title {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .now-playing-host {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .player-controls {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .player-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .player-btn:hover {
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .player-btn.play {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .player-progress {
            width: 200px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 4px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            width: 45%;
            background: #667eea;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎙️ পডকাস্ট অ্যাপ</h1>
        
        <div class="categories">
            <button class="category-btn active">সব</button>
            <button class="category-btn">টেকনোলজি</button>
            <button class="category-btn">বিজনেস</button>
            <button class="category-btn">শিক্ষা</button>
            <button class="category-btn">স্বাস্থ্য</button>
            <button class="category-btn">বিনোদন</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="featured-podcast">
            <div class="featured-info">
                <span class="featured-badge">সপ্তাহের সেরা পডকাস্ট</span>
                <h2 class="featured-title">দ্য ফিউচার অফ এআই</h2>
                <div class="featured-host">সাদমান সাকিব</div>
                <p class="featured-desc">
                    কৃত্রিম বুদ্ধিমত্তা কীভাবে আমাদের জীবন বদলে দিচ্ছে? বিশেষজ্ঞদের সাথে আলোচনা।
                </p>
                <div class="featured-stats">
                    <span>🎧 ২.৫কে লিসেনার</span>
                    <span>⭐ ৪.৮ (২৫০ রিভিউ)</span>
                    <span>⏱️ ৪৫ মিনিট</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="featured-image">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/150?random=1" alt="Podcast">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="podcast-grid">
            <div class="podcast-card">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/250/150?random=2" alt="Podcast" class="podcast-image">
                <div class="podcast-info">
                    <div class="podcast-title">টেক টক বাংলা</div>
                    <div class="podcast-host">রহিম মিয়া</div>
                    <div class="podcast-meta">
                        <span>🎧 ১.২কে</span>
                        <span>⭐ ৪.৫</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ৩০ মিনিট</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="podcast-card">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/250/150?random=3" alt="Podcast" class="podcast-image">
                <div class="podcast-info">
                    <div class="podcast-title">বিজনেস ইনসাইট</div>
                    <div class="podcast-host">করিম হোসেন</div>
                    <div class="podcast-meta">
                        <span>🎧 ৮০০</span>
                        <span>⭐ ৪.৭</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ৪০ মিনিট</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="podcast-card">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/250/150?random=4" alt="Podcast" class="podcast-image">
                <div class="podcast-info">
                    <div class="podcast-title">স্বাস্থ্য কথা</div>
                    <div class="podcast-host">ডা. ফাতেমা</div>
                    <div class="podcast-meta">
                        <span>🎧 ২.১কে</span>
                        <span>⭐ ৪.৯</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ২৫ মিনিট</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="podcast-card">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/250/150?random=5" alt="Podcast" class="podcast-image">
                <div class="podcast-info">
                    <div class="podcast-title">শিক্ষার আলো</div>
                    <div class="podcast-host">সুমন আহমেদ</div>
                    <div class="podcast-meta">
                        <span>🎧 ১.৫কে</span>
                        <span>⭐ ৪.৬</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ৩৫ মিনিট</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="player-bar">
            <div class="now-playing">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=2" alt="Now Playing">
                <div class="now-playing-info">
                    <div class="now-playing-title">টেক টক বাংলা - এপিসোড ৪৫</div>
                    <div class="now-playing-host">রহিম মিয়া</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="player-controls">
                <button class="player-btn">⏮</button>
                <button class="player-btn play">⏸️</button>
                <button class="player-btn">⏭</button>
                <div class="player-progress">
                    <div class="progress-bar">
                        <div class="progress-fill"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button class="player-btn">🔊</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // প্লেয়ার কন্ট্রোল সিমুলেশন
        let isPlaying = true;

        document.querySelector('.play').addEventListener('click', function() {
            isPlaying = !isPlaying;
            this.textContent = isPlaying ? '⏸️' : '▶️';
        });

        // ক্যাটাগরি ফিল্টার
        document.querySelectorAll('.category-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.category-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                this.classList.add('active');
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৭: ইউটিউব ডাউনলোডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইউটিউব ডাউনলোডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 700px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .input-section {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .url-input {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        #videoUrl {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            font-size: 16px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .fetch-btn {
            padding: 15px 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .fetch-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(67,233,123,0.4);
        }
        
        .video-info {
            display: none;
            background: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .video-info.show {
            display: block;
        }
        
        .video-preview {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .thumbnail {
            width: 200px;
            height: 120px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .thumbnail img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .video-details {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .video-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .video-meta {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        
        .format-selector {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .format-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .format-tab {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .format-tab.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .quality-list {
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .quality-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .quality-item:hover {
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        .quality-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .quality-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .quality-size {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .download-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .download-btn:hover {
            background: #38f9d7;
        }
        
        .downloads-section {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 15px;
        }
        .downloads-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .download-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .download-progress {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 4px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: #43e97b;
            width: 0%;
        }
        .download-status {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📥 ইউটিউব ডাউনলোডার</h1>
        
        <div class="input-section">
            <div class="url-input">
                <input type="text" id="videoUrl" placeholder="ইউটিউব ভিডিও URL লিখুন...">
                <button class="fetch-btn" onclick="fetchVideo()">ভিডিও দেখুন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="video-info" id="videoInfo">
            <div class="video-preview">
                <div class="thumbnail">
                    <img id="thumbnail" src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/dQw4w9WgXcQ/maxresdefault.jpg" alt="Thumbnail">
                </div>
                <div class="video-details">
                    <div class="video-title" id="videoTitle">Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up</div>
                    <div class="video-meta" id="videoChannel">Rick Astley</div>
                    <div class="video-meta" id="videoDuration">⏱️ 3:32</div>
                    <div class="video-meta" id="videoViews">👁️ 1.2B ভিউ</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="format-selector">
                <div class="format-tabs">
                    <button class="format-tab active" onclick="switchFormat('video')">ভিডিও</button>
                    <button class="format-tab" onclick="switchFormat('audio')">অডিও</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="quality-list" id="qualityList">
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 1080p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 150 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('1080p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 720p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 80 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('720p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 480p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 45 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('480p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 360p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 30 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('360p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="downloads-section">
            <div class="downloads-header">
                <span>ডাউনলোড লিস্ট</span>
                <span>সক্রিয়: <span id="activeDownloads">0</span></span>
            </div>
            <div id="downloadsList">
                <!-- ডাউনলোড আইটেম এখানে আসবে -->
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let activeDownloads = 0;

        function fetchVideo() {
            const url = document.getElementById('videoUrl').value;
            if (url) {
                document.getElementById('videoInfo').classList.add('show');
                // সিমুলেট ফেচিং
            } else {
                alert('দয়া করে একটি URL দিন');
            }
        }

        function switchFormat(format) {
            const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.format-tab');
            tabs.forEach(tab => tab.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            const qualityList = document.getElementById('qualityList');
            if (format === 'video') {
                qualityList.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 1080p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 150 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('1080p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP4 - 720p</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 80 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('720p')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else {
                qualityList.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP3 - 320kbps</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 15 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('320kbps')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="quality-item">
                        <div class="quality-info">
                            <div class="quality-name">MP3 - 192kbps</div>
                            <div class="quality-size">ফাইল সাইজ: 8 MB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadVideo('192kbps')">ডাউনলোড</button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        }

        function downloadVideo(quality) {
            const title = document.getElementById('videoTitle').textContent;
            const downloadsList = document.getElementById('downloadsList');
            const downloadId = Date.now();

            activeDownloads++;
            document.getElementById('activeDownloads').textContent = activeDownloads;

            const downloadItem = document.createElement('div');
            downloadItem.className = 'download-item';
            downloadItem.id = `download-${downloadId}`;
            downloadItem.innerHTML = `
                <div class="download-info">
                    <strong>${title}</strong>
                    <div class="download-status">প্রস্তুত হচ্ছে...</div>
                </div>
                <div class="download-progress">
                    <div class="progress-bar">
                        <div class="progress-fill" id="progress-${downloadId}"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            downloadsList.appendChild(downloadItem);

            // সিমুলেট ডাউনলোড
            let progress = 0;
            const interval = setInterval(() => {
                progress += Math.random() * 10;
                if (progress >= 100) {
                    progress = 100;
                    clearInterval(interval);

                    document.querySelector(`#download-${downloadId} .download-status`).textContent = 'সম্পন্ন ✓';

                    activeDownloads--;
                    document.getElementById('activeDownloads').textContent = activeDownloads;
                }

                document.getElementById(`progress-${downloadId}`).style.width = progress + '%';
                document.querySelector(`#download-${downloadId} .download-status`).textContent =
                    `ডাউনলোড হচ্ছে: ${Math.round(progress)}%`;
            }, 200);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৮: ভিডিও কনভার্টার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ভিডিও কনভার্টার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 700px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .upload-box {
            border: 3px dashed #ff6b6b;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .upload-box:hover {
            background: #fff5f5;
        }
        .upload-icon {
            font-size: 50px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .file-info {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .file-name {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .file-size {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .conversion-options {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .option-group {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .option-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #666;
        }
        select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .quality-presets {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .preset-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .preset-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .preset-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .convert-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .convert-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(255,107,107,0.4);
        }
        
        .progress-section {
            margin-top: 30px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 6px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 3px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e8e);
            width: 0%;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        .progress-status {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .download-section {
            margin-top: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .download-link {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎥 ভিডিও কনভার্টার</h1>
        
        <div class="upload-box" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="video/*" style="display: none;" onchange="handleFile(this)">
            <div class="upload-icon">📁</div>
            <h3>ভিডিও ফাইল নির্বাচন করুন</h3>
            <p>অথবা এখানে ড্রাগ করুন</p>
            <p style="color: #999; font-size: 12px;">সাপোর্টেড: MP4, AVI, MOV, MKV</p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="file-info" id="fileInfo" style="display: none;">
            <div class="file-name" id="fileName">example.mp4</div>
            <div class="file-size" id="fileSize">25.5 MB</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="conversion-options">
            <div class="option-group">
                <label>কনভার্ট টু:</label>
                <select id="targetFormat">
                    <option value="mp4">MP4</option>
                    <option value="avi">AVI</option>
                    <option value="mov">MOV</option>
                    <option value="mkv">MKV</option>
                    <option value="gif">GIF</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="option-group">
                <label>রেজোলিউশন:</label>
                <select id="resolution">
                    <option value="1080p">1080p (1920x1080)</option>
                    <option value="720p" selected>720p (1280x720)</option>
                    <option value="480p">480p (854x480)</option>
                    <option value="360p">360p (640x360)</option>
                </select>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="quality-presets">
            <button class="preset-btn active" onclick="setPreset('high')">উচ্চ মান</button>
            <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setPreset('medium')">মাঝারি মান</button>
            <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setPreset('low')">নিম্ন মান</button>
        </div>
        
        <button class="convert-btn" onclick="convertVideo()">কনভার্ট শুরু করুন</button>
        
        <div class="progress-section" id="progressSection" style="display: none;">
            <div class="progress-bar">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="progress-status">
                <span id="progressPercent">0%</span>
                <span id="progressSpeed">0 KB/s</span>
                <span id="progressTime">বাকি: --:--</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="download-section" id="downloadSection" style="display: none;">
            <a class="download-link" onclick="downloadFile()">📥 ডাউনলোড করুন</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let selectedFile = null;
        let currentPreset = 'high';

        function handleFile(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                selectedFile = input.files[0];

                document.getElementById('fileName').textContent = selectedFile.name;
                document.getElementById('fileSize').textContent = formatBytes(selectedFile.size);
                document.getElementById('fileInfo').style.display = 'block';

                document.getElementById('downloadSection').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('progressSection').style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        function formatBytes(bytes) {
            if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
            const k = 1024;
            const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
            const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
            return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
        }

        function setPreset(preset) {
            currentPreset = preset;
            document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            // প্রিসেট অনুযায়ী অপশন সেট
            const resolution = document.getElementById('resolution');
            if (preset === 'high') {
                resolution.value = '1080p';
            } else if (preset === 'medium') {
                resolution.value = '720p';
            } else {
                resolution.value = '360p';
            }
        }

        function convertVideo() {
            if (!selectedFile) {
                alert('প্রথমে একটি ভিডিও ফাইল নির্বাচন করুন');
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById('progressSection').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('downloadSection').style.display = 'none';

            let progress = 0;
            const interval = setInterval(() => {
                progress += Math.random() * 2;

                if (progress >= 100) {
                    progress = 100;
                    clearInterval(interval);

                    document.getElementById('progressSpeed').textContent = '0 KB/s';
                    document.getElementById('progressTime').textContent = 'সম্পন্ন!';
                    document.getElementById('downloadSection').style.display = 'block';
                }

                document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = progress + '%';
                document.getElementById('progressPercent').textContent = Math.round(progress) + '%';

                // সিমুলেট স্পিড
                const speed = (Math.random() * 5 + 2).toFixed(1);
                document.getElementById('progressSpeed').textContent = speed + ' MB/s';

                // সিমুলেট টাইম
                const remaining = ((100 - progress) / (speed * 10)).toFixed(0);
                document.getElementById('progressTime').textContent = `বাকি: ${remaining} সেকেন্ড`;
            }, 100);
        }

        function downloadFile() {
            const targetFormat = document.getElementById('targetFormat').value;
            const resolution = document.getElementById('resolution').value;

            alert(`ডাউনলোড শুরু হচ্ছে:\nফরম্যাট: ${targetFormat}\nরেজোলিউশন: ${resolution}`);

            // সিমুলেট ডাউনলোড
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = 'https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4';
            link.download = `converted_video.${targetFormat}`;
            link.click();
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৬৯: স্ক্রিন রেকর্ডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>স্ক্রিন রেকর্ডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .preview-container {
            background: #000;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
        }
        #preview {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .record-btn {
            padding: 15px 30px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            min-width: 120px;
        }
        .record-btn.start {
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
        }
        .record-btn.start:hover {
            background: #d32f2f;
        }
        .record-btn.stop {
            background: #9e9e9e;
            color: white;
        }
        .record-btn.stop:hover {
            background: #757575;
        }
        .record-btn:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        
        .timer {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #f44336;
            font-family: monospace;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .options {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .option-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .option-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #666;
        }
        select, input[type="checkbox"] {
            padding: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .recordings-list {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .recordings-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .recording-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .recording-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .recording-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .recording-size {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .recording-actions button {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            margin: 0 5px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📹 স্ক্রিন রেকর্ডার</h1>
        
        <div class="preview-container">
            <video id="preview" autoplay muted></video>
        </div>
        
        <div class="timer" id="timer">00:00:00</div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="record-btn start" id="startBtn" onclick="startRecording()">🎥 শুরু করুন</button>
            <button class="record-btn stop" id="stopBtn" onclick="stopRecording()" disabled>⏹️ বন্ধ করুন</button>
            <button class="record-btn start" id="pauseBtn" onclick="pauseRecording()" disabled>⏸️ বিরতি</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="options">
            <div class="option-group">
                <label>রেকর্ডিং সোর্স:</label>
                <select id="sourceSelect">
                    <option value="screen">স্ক্রিন</option>
                    <option value="window">উইন্ডো</option>
                    <option value="tab">ট্যাব</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="option-group">
                <label>
                    <input type="checkbox" id="audioCheckbox"> অডিও রেকর্ড করুন
                </label>
            </div>
            <div class="option-group">
                <label>ভিডিও কোয়ালিটি:</label>
                <select id="qualitySelect">
                    <option value="high">উচ্চ (1080p)</option>
                    <option value="medium" selected>মাঝারি (720p)</option>
                    <option value="low">নিম্ন (480p)</option>
                </select>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="recordings-list">
            <div class="recordings-header">
                <span>রেকর্ডিং লিস্ট</span>
                <button class="record-btn start" onclick="clearRecordings()">সব মুছুন</button>
            </div>
            <div id="recordingsList"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let mediaRecorder;
        let recordedChunks = [];
        let stream;
        let recordingTimer;
        let seconds = 0;
        let recordings = [];

        const preview = document.getElementById('preview');
        const startBtn = document.getElementById('startBtn');
        const stopBtn = document.getElementById('stopBtn');
        const pauseBtn = document.getElementById('pauseBtn');
        const timerDisplay = document.getElementById('timer');

        async function startRecording() {
            try {
                const source = document.getElementById('sourceSelect').value;
                const includeAudio = document.getElementById('audioCheckbox').checked;

                // স্ট্রিম ক্যাপচার
                if (source === 'screen') {
                    stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({
                        video: true,
                        audio: includeAudio
                    });
                } else {
                    // সিমুলেটেড স্ট্রিম (ডেমো)
                    stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
                        video: true,
                        audio: includeAudio
                    });
                }

                preview.srcObject = stream;

                // মিডিয়া রেকর্ডার সেটআপ
                mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);

                mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {
                    if (event.data.size > 0) {
                        recordedChunks.push(event.data);
                    }
                };

                mediaRecorder.onstop = saveRecording;

                mediaRecorder.start();

                // টাইমার শুরু
                seconds = 0;
                recordingTimer = setInterval(updateTimer, 1000);

                // বাটন আপডেট
                startBtn.disabled = true;
                stopBtn.disabled = false;
                pauseBtn.disabled = false;

            } catch (err) {
                alert('রেকর্ডিং শুরু করতে সমস্যা হয়েছে: ' + err.message);
            }
        }

        function stopRecording() {
            if (mediaRecorder && mediaRecorder.state !== 'inactive') {
                mediaRecorder.stop();
                stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());

                clearInterval(recordingTimer);

                // বাটন আপডেট
                startBtn.disabled = false;
                stopBtn.disabled = true;
                pauseBtn.disabled = true;
                pauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️ বিরতি';
            }
        }

        function pauseRecording() {
            if (mediaRecorder && mediaRecorder.state === 'recording') {
                mediaRecorder.pause();
                pauseBtn.textContent = '▶️ চালু';
                clearInterval(recordingTimer);
            } else if (mediaRecorder && mediaRecorder.state === 'paused') {
                mediaRecorder.resume();
                pauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️ বিরতি';
                recordingTimer = setInterval(updateTimer, 1000);
            }
        }

        function saveRecording() {
            const blob = new Blob(recordedChunks, { type: 'video/webm' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const timestamp = new Date().toLocaleString();

            const recording = {
                id: Date.now(),
                blob: blob,
                url: url,
                timestamp: timestamp,
                duration: formatTime(seconds),
                size: blob.size
            };

            recordings.push(recording);
            renderRecordings();

            recordedChunks = [];
        }

        function updateTimer() {
            seconds++;
            timerDisplay.textContent = formatTime(seconds);
        }

        function formatTime(totalSeconds) {
            const hours = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 3600);
            const minutes = Math.floor((totalSeconds % 3600) / 60);
            const seconds = totalSeconds % 60;

            return `${hours.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
        }

        function formatBytes(bytes) {
            if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
            const k = 1024;
            const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
            const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
            return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
        }

        function renderRecordings() {
            const list = document.getElementById('recordingsList');
            list.innerHTML = recordings.map(rec => `
                <div class="recording-item">
                    <div class="recording-info">
                        <div class="recording-name">রেকর্ডিং ${rec.timestamp}</div>
                        <div class="recording-size">${rec.duration} | ${formatBytes(rec.size)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="recording-actions">
                        <button onclick="playRecording('${rec.id}')">▶️ প্লে</button>
                        <button onclick="downloadRecording('${rec.id}')">📥 ডাউনলোড</button>
                        <button onclick="deleteRecording('${rec.id}')">🗑️ মুছুন</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function playRecording(id) {
            const rec = recordings.find(r => r.id == id);
            if (rec) {
                const video = document.createElement('video');
                video.src = rec.url;
                video.controls = true;
                video.style.width = '100%';

                const modal = document.createElement('div');
                modal.style.cssText = `
                    position: fixed;
                    top: 0;
                    left: 0;
                    right: 0;
                    bottom: 0;
                    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
                    display: flex;
                    justify-content: center;
                    align-items: center;
                    z-index: 1000;
                `;

                modal.onclick = () => modal.remove();

                video.onclick = (e) => e.stopPropagation();
                video.style.maxWidth = '90%';
                video.style.maxHeight = '90%';

                modal.appendChild(video);
                document.body.appendChild(modal);
            }
        }

        function downloadRecording(id) {
            const rec = recordings.find(r => r.id == id);
            if (rec) {
                const link = document.createElement('a');
                link.href = rec.url;
                link.download = `recording-${rec.timestamp}.webm`;
                link.click();
            }
        }

        function deleteRecording(id) {
            recordings = recordings.filter(r => r.id != id);
            renderRecordings();
        }

        function clearRecordings() {
            recordings = [];
            renderRecordings();
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৭০: ভয়েস রেকর্ডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ভয়েস রেকর্ডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .visualizer {
            height: 100px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .waveform {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 3px;
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
        }
        .wave-bar {
            width: 5px;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #43e97b, #38f9d7);
            border-radius: 3px;
            transition: height 0.1s;
        }
        
        .timer {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #43e97b;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: monospace;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .record-btn {
            width: 70px;
            height: 70px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .record-btn.record {
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
        }
        .record-btn.record:hover {
            background: #d32f2f;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .record-btn.stop {
            background: #9e9e9e;
