            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #ff6b6b;
        }
        .resume-name {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
        }
        .resume-title {
            color: #666;
            margin: 10px 0;
        }
        .resume-contact {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 20px;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .resume-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .resume-section-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            padding-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .resume-item {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .item-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .item-sub {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin: 5px 0;
        }
        .item-desc {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .export-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .export-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📄 রিজুমে বিল্ডার</h1>
        
        <div class="builder-container">
            <div class="form-section">
                <h3>ব্যক্তিগত তথ্য</h3>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>নাম</label>
                    <input type="text" id="name" value="রহিম মিয়া" oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>পদবি</label>
                    <input type="text" id="title" value="সিনিয়র ওয়েব ডেভেলপার" oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ইমেইল</label>
                    <input type="email" id="email" value="rahim@email.com" oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ফোন</label>
                    <input type="text" id="phone" value="+৮৮০ ১৭১২৩৪৫৬৭৮" oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ঠিকানা</label>
                    <input type="text" id="address" value="ঢাকা, বাংলাদেশ" oninput="updatePreview()">
                </div>
                
                <div class="section-header">
                    <h3>শিক্ষা</h3>
                    <button class="add-btn" onclick="addEducation()">+</button>
                </div>
                <div id="educationSection"></div>
                
                <div class="section-header">
                    <h3>অভিজ্ঞতা</h3>
                    <button class="add-btn" onclick="addExperience()">+</button>
                </div>
                <div id="experienceSection"></div>
                
                <div class="section-header">
                    <h3>দক্ষতা</h3>
                    <button class="add-btn" onclick="addSkill()">+</button>
                </div>
                <div id="skillsSection"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="preview-section">
                <div id="resumePreview">
                    <div class="resume-header">
                        <div class="resume-name">রহিম মিয়া</div>
                        <div class="resume-title">সিনিয়র ওয়েব ডেভেলপার</div>
                        <div class="resume-contact">
                            <span>rahim@email.com</span>
                            <span>+৮৮০ ১৭১২৩৪৫৬৭৮</span>
                            <span>ঢাকা, বাংলাদেশ</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="resume-section">
                        <div class="resume-section-title">শিক্ষা</div>
                        <div class="resume-item">
                            <div class="item-header">
                                <span>কম্পিউটার সায়েন্স এন্ড ইঞ্জিনিয়ারিং</span>
                                <span>২০১৫ - ২০১৯</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="item-sub">বুয়েট, ঢাকা</div>
                            <div class="item-desc">সিজিপিএ: ৩.৮০</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="resume-section">
                        <div class="resume-section-title">অভিজ্ঞতা</div>
                        <div class="resume-item">
                            <div class="item-header">
                                <span>সিনিয়র ওয়েব ডেভেলপার</span>
                                <span>২০২২ - বর্তমান</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="item-sub">টেক সলিউশন লিমিটেড</div>
                            <div class="item-desc">রিঅ্যাক্ট ও নোড.জেএস ব্যবহার করে ওয়েব অ্যাপ্লিকেশন ডেভেলপমেন্ট</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="resume-section">
                        <div class="resume-section-title">দক্ষতা</div>
                        <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
                            <span class="skill-tag">JavaScript</span>
                            <span class="skill-tag">React</span>
                            <span class="skill-tag">Node.js</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="export-buttons">
                    <button class="export-btn" onclick="downloadPDF()">PDF ডাউনলোড</button>
                    <button class="export-btn" onclick="downloadJSON()">JSON ডাউনলোড</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let educationItems = [
            { degree: 'কম্পিউটার সায়েন্স এন্ড ইঞ্জিনিয়ারিং', institution: 'বুয়েট, ঢাকা', year: '২০১৫ - ২০১৯', grade: 'সিজিপিএ: ৩.৮০' }
        ];

        let experienceItems = [
            { position: 'সিনিয়র ওয়েব ডেভেলপার', company: 'টেক সলিউশন লিমিটেড', period: '২০২২ - বর্তমান', description: 'রিঅ্যাক্ট ও নোড.জেএস ব্যবহার করে ওয়েব অ্যাপ্লিকেশন ডেভেলপমেন্ট' }
        ];

        let skills = ['JavaScript', 'React', 'Node.js'];

        function renderEducation() {
            const section = document.getElementById('educationSection');
            section.innerHTML = educationItems.map((item, index) => `
                <div class="education-item" style="margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.degree}" placeholder="ডিগ্রি" onchange="updateEducation(${index}, 'degree', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.institution}" placeholder="প্রতিষ্ঠান" onchange="updateEducation(${index}, 'institution', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.year}" placeholder="সময়কাল" onchange="updateEducation(${index}, 'year', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.grade}" placeholder="গ্রেড" onchange="updateEducation(${index}, 'grade', this.value)" style="width: 100%;">
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderExperience() {
            const section = document.getElementById('experienceSection');
            section.innerHTML = experienceItems.map((item, index) => `
                <div class="experience-item" style="margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 10px; background: white; border-radius: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.position}" placeholder="পদবি" onchange="updateExperience(${index}, 'position', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.company}" placeholder="কোম্পানি" onchange="updateExperience(${index}, 'company', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${item.period}" placeholder="সময়কাল" onchange="updateExperience(${index}, 'period', this.value)" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <textarea placeholder="বিবরণ" onchange="updateExperience(${index}, 'description', this.value)" style="width: 100%;">${item.description}</textarea>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderSkills() {
            const section = document.getElementById('skillsSection');
            section.innerHTML = skills.map((skill, index) => `
                <div style="display: flex; gap: 5px; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <input type="text" value="${skill}" onchange="updateSkill(${index}, this.value)" style="flex: 1;">
                    <button onclick="removeSkill(${index})" style="background: #f44336; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 10px;">×</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function addEducation() {
            educationItems.push({ degree: '', institution: '', year: '', grade: '' });
            renderEducation();
            updatePreview();
        }

        function updateEducation(index, field, value) {
            educationItems[index][field] = value;
            updatePreview();
        }

        function addExperience() {
            experienceItems.push({ position: '', company: '', period: '', description: '' });
            renderExperience();
            updatePreview();
        }

        function updateExperience(index, field, value) {
            experienceItems[index][field] = value;
            updatePreview();
        }

        function addSkill() {
            skills.push('');
            renderSkills();
            updatePreview();
        }

        function updateSkill(index, value) {
            skills[index] = value;
            updatePreview();
        }

        function removeSkill(index) {
            skills.splice(index, 1);
            renderSkills();
            updatePreview();
        }

        function updatePreview() {
            const name = document.getElementById('name').value;
            const title = document.getElementById('title').value;
            const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
            const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value;
            const address = document.getElementById('address').value;

            let educationHtml = educationItems.map(item => `
                <div class="resume-item">
                    <div class="item-header">
                        <span>${item.degree}</span>
                        <span>${item.year}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="item-sub">${item.institution}</div>
                    <div class="item-desc">${item.grade}</div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            let experienceHtml = experienceItems.map(item => `
                <div class="resume-item">
                    <div class="item-header">
                        <span>${item.position}</span>
                        <span>${item.period}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="item-sub">${item.company}</div>
                    <div class="item-desc">${item.description}</div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            let skillsHtml = skills.map(skill => `
                <span class="skill-tag" style="display: inline-block; padding: 5px 15px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 20px; margin: 5px;">${skill}</span>
            `).join('');

            document.getElementById('resumePreview').innerHTML = `
                <div class="resume-header">
                    <div class="resume-name">${name || 'রহিম মিয়া'}</div>
                    <div class="resume-title">${title || 'ওয়েব ডেভেলপার'}</div>
                    <div class="resume-contact">
                        <span>${email || 'ইমেইল'}</span>
                        <span>${phone || 'ফোন'}</span>
                        <span>${address || 'ঠিকানা'}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="resume-section">
                    <div class="resume-section-title">শিক্ষা</div>
                    ${educationHtml}
                </div>

                <div class="resume-section">
                    <div class="resume-section-title">অভিজ্ঞতা</div>
                    ${experienceHtml}
                </div>

                <div class="resume-section">
                    <div class="resume-section-title">দক্ষতা</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
                        ${skillsHtml}
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function downloadPDF() {
            alert('PDF ডাউনলোড শুরু হচ্ছে...');
            // PDF জেনারেশন সিমুলেশন
        }

        function downloadJSON() {
            const resumeData = {
                personal: {
                    name: document.getElementById('name').value,
                    title: document.getElementById('title').value,
                    email: document.getElementById('email').value,
                    phone: document.getElementById('phone').value,
                    address: document.getElementById('address').value
                },
                education: educationItems,
                experience: experienceItems,
                skills: skills
            };

            const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(resumeData, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = url;
            link.download = 'resume.json';
            link.click();
        }

        renderEducation();
        renderExperience();
        renderSkills();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৭৭: সিভি বিল্ডার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সিভি বিল্ডার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .templates {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .template-btn {
            padding: 10px 25px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 25px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .template-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .template-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .cv-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
        }
        
        .form-section {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .form-group input,
        .form-group textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .cv-preview {
            flex: 1;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        /* টেমপ্লেট ১ - মডার্ন */
        .template-1 {
            padding: 40px;
        }
        .template-1 .cv-header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .template-1 .cv-name {
            font-size: 32px;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .template-1 .cv-title {
            color: #667eea;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        /* টেমপ্লেট ২ - ক্লাসিক */
        .template-2 {
            padding: 40px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        .template-2 .cv-header {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .template-2 .cv-avatar {
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            background: #667eea;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        
        /* টেমপ্লেট ৩ - মিনিমালিস্ট */
        .template-3 {
            padding: 40px;
            border-left: 5px solid #667eea;
        }
        .template-3 .cv-name {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #333;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📄 সিভি বিল্ডার</h1>
        
        <div class="templates">
            <button class="template-btn active" onclick="selectTemplate(1)">মডার্ন</button>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="selectTemplate(2)">ক্লাসিক</button>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="selectTemplate(3)">মিনিমালিস্ট</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="cv-container">
            <div class="form-section">
                <h3>ব্যক্তিগত তথ্য</h3>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>নাম</label>
                    <input type="text" id="name" value="রহিম মিয়া" oninput="updateCV()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>পদবি</label>
                    <input type="text" id="title" value="সিনিয়র ওয়েব ডেভেলপার" oninput="updateCV()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ইমেইল</label>
                    <input type="email" id="email" value="rahim@email.com" oninput="updateCV()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ফোন</label>
                    <input type="text" id="phone" value="+৮৮০ ১৭১২৩৪৫৬৭৮" oninput="updateCV()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ঠিকানা</label>
                    <input type="text" id="address" value="ঢাকা, বাংলাদেশ" oninput="updateCV()">
                </div>
                
                <h3>সারাংশ</h3>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <textarea id="summary" rows="4" oninput="updateCV()">৫ বছরের অভিজ্ঞতা সম্পন্ন ওয়েব ডেভেলপার। মডার্ন ওয়েব টেকনোলজি ব্যবহার করে ইউজার ফ্রেন্ডলি অ্যাপ্লিকেশন তৈরি করতে ভালোবাসি।</textarea>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="cv-preview" id="cvPreview"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentTemplate = 1;

        function selectTemplate(template) {
            currentTemplate = template;
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            updateCV();
        }

        function updateCV() {
            const name = document.getElementById('name').value;
            const title = document.getElementById('title').value;
            const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
            const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value;
            const address = document.getElementById('address').value;
            const summary = document.getElementById('summary').value;

            let html = '';

            if (currentTemplate === 1) {
                html = `
                    <div class="template-1">
                        <div class="cv-header">
                            <div class="cv-name">${name}</div>
                            <div class="cv-title">${title}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 30px;">
                            <span>📧 ${email}</span>
                            <span>📞 ${phone}</span>
                            <span>📍 ${address}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h3>প্রোফাইল</h3>
                            <p>${summary}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else if (currentTemplate === 2) {
                html = `
                    <div class="template-2">
                        <div class="cv-header">
                            <div class="cv-avatar"></div>
                            <div>
                                <h2>${name}</h2>
                                <h3>${title}</h3>
                                <p>${email} | ${phone} | ${address}</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h3>প্রোফাইল</h3>
                            <p>${summary}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else {
                html = `
                    <div class="template-3">
                        <h1 class="cv-name">${name}</h1>
                        <h3>${title}</h3>
                        <p>${email} | ${phone}</p>
                        <p>${address}</p>
                        <hr>
                        <h3>প্রোফাইল</h3>
                        <p>${summary}</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            document.getElementById('cvPreview').innerHTML = html;
        }

        updateCV();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৭৮: ইনভয়েস জেনারেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইনভয়েস জেনারেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .invoice-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .company-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .invoice-info {
            text-align: right;
        }
        
        .invoice-details {
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .detail-box {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        th {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            padding: 12px;
            text-align: left;
        }
        td {
            padding: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .item-row input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 5px;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        .totals {
            width: 300px;
            margin-left: auto;
        }
        .total-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 8px 0;
        }
        .grand-total {
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 18px;
            border-top: 2px solid #333;
            padding-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .btn-secondary {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📄 ইনভয়েস জেনারেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="invoice-header">
            <div class="company-info">
                <h2>আমার কোম্পানি</h2>
                <p>১২৩, বিজনেস স্ট্রিট</p>
                <p>ঢাকা, বাংলাদেশ</p>
                <p>ফোন: +৮৮০ ১৭১২৩৪৫৬৭৮</p>
            </div>
            <div class="invoice-info">
                <h2>ইনভয়েস</h2>
                <p>নং: INV-001</p>
                <p>তারিখ: ১৫ মার্চ, ২০২৪</p>
                <p>ডিউ ডেট: ৩০ মার্চ, ২০২৪</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="invoice-details">
            <div class="detail-box">
                <h4>বিল টু:</h4>
                <p><input type="text" id="clientName" value="করিম এন্টারপ্রাইজ" placeholder="ক্লায়েন্ট নাম"></p>
                <p><input type="text" id="clientAddress" value="৪৫৬, কমার্স এরিয়া" placeholder="ঠিকানা"></p>
                <p><input type="text" id="clientPhone" value="+৮৮০ ১৯৮৭৬৫৪৩২১" placeholder="ফোন"></p>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-box">
                <h4>শিপ টু:</h4>
                <p><input type="text" id="shipName" value="করিম এন্টারপ্রাইজ" placeholder="নাম"></p>
                <p><input type="text" id="shipAddress" value="৭৮৯, ইন্ডাস্ট্রিয়াল এরিয়া" placeholder="ঠিকানা"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <table id="invoiceTable">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>আইটেম</th>
                    <th>বিবরণ</th>
                    <th>পরিমাণ</th>
                    <th>ইউনিট মূল্য</th>
                    <th>মোট</th>
                    <th></th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="invoiceItems"></tbody>
        </table>
        
        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="addRow()">+ আইটেম যোগ করুন</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="downloadPDF()">PDF ডাউনলোড</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="sendEmail()">ইমেইল পাঠান</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let items = [
            { name: 'ওয়েব ডিজাইন সার্ভিস', desc: '৫ পৃষ্ঠার ওয়েবসাইট ডিজাইন', qty: 1, price: 15000 },
            { name: 'হোস্টিং', desc: '১ বছরের হোস্টিং', qty: 1, price: 5000 }
        ];

        function renderItems() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('invoiceItems');
            tbody.innerHTML = items.map((item, index) => `
                <tr class="item-row">
                    <td><input type="text" value="${item.name}" onchange="updateItem(${index}, 'name', this.value)"></td>
                    <td><input type="text" value="${item.desc}" onchange="updateItem(${index}, 'desc', this.value)"></td>
                    <td><input type="number" value="${item.qty}" min="1" onchange="updateItem(${index}, 'qty', this.value)" style="width: 80px;"></td>
                    <td><input type="number" value="${item.price}" min="0" onchange="updateItem(${index}, 'price', this.value)" style="width: 100px;"></td>
                    <td>${(item.qty * item.price).toLocaleString()} টাকা</td>
                    <td><button onclick="removeItem(${index})" style="background: #f44336; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 10px;">×</button></td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');

            calculateTotals();
        }

        function updateItem(index, field, value) {
            items[index][field] = field === 'qty' || field === 'price' ? parseFloat(value) || 0 : value;
            renderItems();
        }

        function removeItem(index) {
            items.splice(index, 1);
            renderItems();
        }

        function addRow() {
            items.push({ name: '', desc: '', qty: 1, price: 0 });
            renderItems();
        }

        function calculateTotals() {
            const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.qty * item.price), 0);
            const tax = subtotal * 0.15;
            const total = subtotal + tax;

            // টোটাল দেখান
            const totalsDiv = document.querySelector('.totals') || document.createElement('div');
            totalsDiv.className = 'totals';
            totalsDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div class="total-row">
                    <span>সাবটোটাল:</span>
                    <span>${subtotal.toLocaleString()} টাকা</span>
                </div>
                <div class="total-row">
                    <span>ট্যাক্স (১৫%):</span>
                    <span>${tax.toLocaleString()} টাকা</span>
                </div>
                <div class="total-row grand-total">
                    <span>মোট:</span>
                    <span>${total.toLocaleString()} টাকা</span>
                </div>
            `;

            if (!document.querySelector('.totals')) {
                document.querySelector('.container').appendChild(totalsDiv);
            }
        }

        function downloadPDF() {
            alert('PDF ডাউনলোড শুরু হচ্ছে...');
        }

        function sendEmail() {
            alert('ইনভয়েস ইমেইল করা হয়েছে');
        }

        renderItems();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৭৯: বাজেট ট্র্যাকার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>বাজেট ট্র্যাকার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .budget-overview {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .overview-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .overview-card.total {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
        }
        .overview-card.income {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            color: white;
        }
        .overview-card.expense {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            color: white;
        }
        .overview-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .overview-value {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .add-transaction {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .transaction-form {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .transaction-form input,
        .transaction-form select,
        .transaction-form button {
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .add-btn {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .filters {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .transactions-list {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .transaction-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .transaction-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .transaction-category {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 3px 10px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .transaction-date {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .transaction-amount {
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .amount-income {
            color: #43e97b;
        }
        .amount-expense {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .delete-btn {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .chart-container {
            height: 200px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💰 বাজেট ট্র্যাকার</h1>
        
        <div class="budget-overview">
            <div class="overview-card total">
                <div class="overview-label">মোট ব্যালেন্স</div>
                <div class="overview-value" id="totalBalance">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="overview-card income">
                <div class="overview-label">মোট আয়</div>
                <div class="overview-value" id="totalIncome">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="overview-card expense">
                <div class="overview-label">মোট খরচ</div>
                <div class="overview-value" id="totalExpense">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="add-transaction">
            <h3>নতুন ট্রানজেকশন</h3>
            <div class="transaction-form">
                <input type="text" id="descInput" placeholder="বিবরণ">
                <input type="number" id="amountInput" placeholder="পরিমাণ">
                <select id="typeSelect">
                    <option value="income">আয়</option>
                    <option value="expense">খরচ</option>
                </select>
                <button class="add-btn" onclick="addTransaction()">যোগ করুন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="filters">
            <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterTransactions('all')">সব</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterTransactions('income')">আয়</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterTransactions('expense')">খরচ</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="transactions-list" id="transactionsList"></div>
        
        <div class="chart-container">
            <canvas id="expenseChart"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let transactions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('transactions')) || [];
        let currentFilter = 'all';

        function addTransaction() {
            const desc = document.getElementById('descInput').value;
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountInput').value);
            const type = document.getElementById('typeSelect').value;

            if (desc && amount) {
                const transaction = {
                    id: Date.now(),
                    desc: desc,
                    amount: amount,
                    type: type,
                    date: new Date().toLocaleDateString('bn-BD')
                };

                transactions.push(transaction);
                saveTransactions();
                renderTransactions();

                // ফর্ম ক্লিয়ার
                document.getElementById('descInput').value = '';
                document.getElementById('amountInput').value = '';
            }
        }

        function deleteTransaction(id) {
            transactions = transactions.filter(t => t.id !== id);
            saveTransactions();
            renderTransactions();
        }

        function saveTransactions() {
            localStorage.setItem('transactions', JSON.stringify(transactions));
        }

        function filterTransactions(filter) {
            currentFilter = filter;
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            renderTransactions();
        }

        function renderTransactions() {
            const list = document.getElementById('transactionsList');
            let filtered = transactions;

            if (currentFilter !== 'all') {
                filtered = transactions.filter(t => t.type === currentFilter);
            }

            filtered.sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id);

            list.innerHTML = filtered.map(t => `
                <div class="transaction-item">
                    <div class="transaction-info">
                        <div style="font-weight: bold;">${t.desc}</div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="transaction-category">${t.type === 'income' ? 'আয়' : 'খরচ'}</span>
                            <span class="transaction-date">${t.date}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="transaction-amount ${t.type === 'income' ? 'amount-income' : 'amount-expense'}">
                        ${t.type === 'income' ? '+' : '-'} ৳${t.amount}
                    </div>
                    <button class="delete-btn" onclick="deleteTransaction(${t.id})">×</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            updateTotals();
        }

        function updateTotals() {
            const totalIncome = transactions
                .filter(t => t.type === 'income')
                .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);

            const totalExpense = transactions
                .filter(t => t.type === 'expense')
                .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);

            const totalBalance = totalIncome - totalExpense;

            document.getElementById('totalIncome').textContent = `৳ ${totalIncome}`;
            document.getElementById('totalExpense').textContent = `৳ ${totalExpense}`;
            document.getElementById('totalBalance').textContent = `৳ ${totalBalance}`;
        }

        renderTransactions();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮০: এক্সপেন্স ট্র্যাকার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>এক্সপেন্স ট্র্যাকার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .summary-cards {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .card-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .card-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .add-expense {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .form-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr auto;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .form-row input,
        .form-row select {
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .add-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .category-breakdown {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .category-item {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .category-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .category-amount {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .expense-list {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .expense-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .expense-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .expense-category {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 3px 10px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        .expense-date {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .expense-amount {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .delete-btn {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-left: 10px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 এক্সপেন্স ট্র্যাকার</h1>
        
        <div class="summary-cards">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-label">মোট খরচ</div>
                <div class="card-value" id="totalExpense">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-label">এই মাসে</div>
                <div class="card-value" id="monthlyExpense">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-label">গড়/দিন</div>
                <div class="card-value" id="avgDaily">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="add-expense">
            <h3>নতুন খরচ যোগ করুন</h3>
            <div class="form-row">
                <input type="text" id="descInput" placeholder="বিবরণ">
                <input type="number" id="amountInput" placeholder="পরিমাণ">
                <select id="categorySelect">
                    <option value="খাবার">খাবার</option>
                    <option value="পরিবহন">পরিবহন</option>
                    <option value="বিল">বিল</option>
                    <option value="শপিং">শপিং</option>
                    <option value="বিনোদন">বিনোদন</option>
                    <option value="অন্যান্য">অন্যান্য</option>
                </select>
                <input type="date" id="dateInput">
                <button class="add-btn" onclick="addExpense()">যোগ করুন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="category-breakdown" id="categoryBreakdown"></div>
        
        <div class="expense-list" id="expenseList"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let expenses = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('expenses')) || [];

        function addExpense() {
            const desc = document.getElementById('descInput').value;
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountInput').value);
            const category = document.getElementById('categorySelect').value;
            const date = document.getElementById('dateInput').value || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

            if (desc && amount) {
                const expense = {
                    id: Date.now(),
                    desc: desc,
                    amount: amount,
                    category: category,
                    date: date
                };

                expenses.push(expense);
                saveExpenses();
                renderExpenses();

                // ফর্ম ক্লিয়ার
                document.getElementById('descInput').value = '';
                document.getElementById('amountInput').value = '';
            }
        }

        function deleteExpense(id) {
            expenses = expenses.filter(e => e.id !== id);
            saveExpenses();
            renderExpenses();
        }

        function saveExpenses() {
            localStorage.setItem('expenses', JSON.stringify(expenses));
        }

        function renderExpenses() {
            const list = document.getElementById('expenseList');
            const sorted = [...expenses].sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date) - new Date(a.date));

            list.innerHTML = sorted.map(e => `
                <div class="expense-item">
                    <div class="expense-info">
                        <div style="font-weight: bold;">${e.desc}</div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="expense-category">${e.category}</span>
                            <span class="expense-date">${e.date}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="expense-amount">৳ ${e.amount}</div>
                    <button class="delete-btn" onclick="deleteExpense(${e.id})">×</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            updateTotals();
            updateCategoryBreakdown();
        }

        function updateTotals() {
            const total = expenses.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0);
            document.getElementById('totalExpense').textContent = `৳ ${total}`;

            const currentMonth = new Date().getMonth();
            const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();

            const monthly = expenses.filter(e => {
                const date = new Date(e.date);
                return date.getMonth() === currentMonth && date.getFullYear() === currentYear;
            }).reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0);

            document.getElementById('monthlyExpense').textContent = `৳ ${monthly}`;

            const daysInMonth = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth + 1, 0).getDate();
            const avg = monthly / daysInMonth;
            document.getElementById('avgDaily').textContent = `৳ ${avg.toFixed(2)}`;
        }

        function updateCategoryBreakdown() {
            const breakdown = document.getElementById('categoryBreakdown');
            const categories = {};

            expenses.forEach(e => {
                categories[e.category] = (categories[e.category] || 0) + e.amount;
            });

            breakdown.innerHTML = Object.entries(categories)
                .map(([cat, amount]) => `
                    <div class="category-item">
                        <span class="category-name">${cat}</span>
                        <span class="category-amount">৳ ${amount}</span>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
        }

        renderExpenses();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮১: ইনকাম ট্র্যাকার
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইনকাম ট্র্যাকার</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .stats-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .stat-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .stat-card.income {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
        }
        .stat-card.expense {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
        }
        .stat-card.savings {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
        }
        
        .add-income {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .form-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr auto;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .form-row input,
        .form-row select {
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .add-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .income-list {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .income-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;
        }
        @keyframes slideIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-10px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }
        .income-source {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #333;
        }
        .income-date {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .income-amount {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #43e97b;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .delete-btn {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .chart-container {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .income-categories {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .category-item {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .category-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .category-amount {
            color: #43e97b;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💰 ইনকাম ট্র্যাকার</h1>
        
        <div class="stats-grid">
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div>মোট আয়</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="totalIncome">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card income">
                <div>এই মাসে</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="monthlyIncome">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card expense">
                <div>গড়/দিন</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="avgDaily">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card savings">
                <div>সর্বোচ্চ</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="maxIncome">৳ ০</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="add-income">
            <h3>নতুন আয় যোগ করুন</h3>
            <div class="form-row">
                <input type="text" id="sourceInput" placeholder="আয়ের উৎস">
                <input type="number" id="amountInput" placeholder="পরিমাণ">
                <select id="categorySelect">
                    <option value="বেতন">বেতন</option>
                    <option value="ফ্রিল্যান্সিং">ফ্রিল্যান্সিং</option>
                    <option value="ব্যবসা">ব্যবসা</option>
                    <option value="ইনভেস্টমেন্ট">ইনভেস্টমেন্ট</option>
                    <option value="অন্যান্য">অন্যান্য</option>
                </select>
                <input type="date" id="dateInput">
                <button class="add-btn" onclick="addIncome()">যোগ করুন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="income-list" id="incomeList"></div>
        
        <div class="income-categories" id="categoryBreakdown"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let incomes = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('incomes')) || [];

        function addIncome() {
            const source = document.getElementById('sourceInput').value;
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountInput').value);
            const category = document.getElementById('categorySelect').value;
            const date = document.getElementById('dateInput').value || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

            if (source && amount) {
                const income = {
                    id: Date.now(),
                    source: source,
                    amount: amount,
                    category: category,
                    date: date
                };

                incomes.push(income);
                saveIncomes();
                renderIncomes();

                document.getElementById('sourceInput').value = '';
                document.getElementById('amountInput').value = '';
            }
        }

        function deleteIncome(id) {
            incomes = incomes.filter(i => i.id !== id);
            saveIncomes();
            renderIncomes();
        }

        function saveIncomes() {
            localStorage.setItem('incomes', JSON.stringify(incomes));
        }

        function renderIncomes() {
            const list = document.getElementById('incomeList');
            const sorted = [...incomes].sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date) - new Date(a.date));

            list.innerHTML = sorted.map(i => `
                <div class="income-item">
                    <div>
                        <div class="income-source">${i.source}</div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="income-category">${i.category}</span>
                            <span class="income-date">${i.date}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="income-amount">৳ ${i.amount}</div>
                    <button class="delete-btn" onclick="deleteIncome(${i.id})">×</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            updateStats();
            updateCategoryBreakdown();
        }

        function updateStats() {
            const total = incomes.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.amount, 0);
            document.getElementById('totalIncome').textContent = `৳ ${total}`;

            const currentMonth = new Date().getMonth();
            const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();

            const monthly = incomes.filter(i => {
                const date = new Date(i.date);
                return date.getMonth() === currentMonth && date.getFullYear() === currentYear;
            }).reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.amount, 0);

            document.getElementById('monthlyIncome').textContent = `৳ ${monthly}`;

            const daysInMonth = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth + 1, 0).getDate();
            const avg = monthly / daysInMonth;
            document.getElementById('avgDaily').textContent = `৳ ${avg.toFixed(2)}`;

            const max = Math.max(...incomes.map(i => i.amount), 0);
            document.getElementById('maxIncome').textContent = `৳ ${max}`;
        }

        function updateCategoryBreakdown() {
            const breakdown = document.getElementById('categoryBreakdown');
            const categories = {};

            incomes.forEach(i => {
                categories[i.category] = (categories[i.category] || 0) + i.amount;
            });

            breakdown.innerHTML = Object.entries(categories)
                .map(([cat, amount]) => `
                    <div class="category-item">
                        <span class="category-name">${cat}</span>
                        <span class="category-amount">৳ ${amount}</span>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
        }

        renderIncomes();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ৮২: সেভিংস ক্যালকুলেটর
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সেভিংস ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .calculator-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .result-box {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin: 30px 0;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .result-label {
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .result-value {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .savings-chart {
            margin-top: 30px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .bar-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .bar-label {
            width: 100px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .bar {
            flex: 1;
            height: 30px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 15px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #43e97b, #38f9d7);
            width: 0%;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .savings-tips {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .tip-item {
            padding: 8px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .tip-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🏦 সেভিংস ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="calculator-box">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>মাসিক আয় (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="monthlyIncome" value="50000" oninput="calculate()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>মাসিক খরচ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="monthlyExpense" value="35000" oninput="calculate()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>বর্তমান সঞ্চয় (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="currentSavings" value="100000" oninput="calculate()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>সঞ্চয়ের লক্ষ্য (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="savingsGoal" value="500000" oninput="calculate()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>বার্ষিক সুদের হার (%)</label>
                <input type="number" id="interestRate" value="6" oninput="calculate()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="result-box">
            <div class="result-label">মাসিক সঞ্চয়</div>
            <div class="result-value" id="monthlySavings">১৫,০০০</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="savings-chart">
            <h3>লক্ষ্য অর্জনের সময়কাল</h3>
            <div class="bar-container">
                <span class="bar-label">বর্তমান</span>
                <div class="bar">
                    <div class="bar-fill" id="currentBar" style="width: 20%"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="bar-container">
                <span class="bar-label">লক্ষ্য</span>
                <div class="bar">
                    <div class="bar-fill" id="goalBar" style="width: 100%"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <p id="timeToGoal" style="text-align: center; margin-top: 15px;"></p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="savings-tips">
            <h3>সঞ্চয় টিপস</h3>
            <div class="tip-item">✅ আপনার আয়ের ২০% সঞ্চয় করার চেষ্টা করুন</div>
            <div class="tip-item">✅ অপ্রয়োজনীয় খরচ কমিয়ে ফেলুন</div>
            <div class="tip-item">✅ স্বয়ংক্রিয় সঞ্চয় সিস্টেম সেটআপ করুন</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculate() {
            const income = parseFloat(document.getElementById('monthlyIncome').value) || 0;
            const expense = parseFloat(document.getElementById('monthlyExpense').value) || 0;
            const current = parseFloat(document.getElementById('currentSavings').value) || 0;
            const goal = parseFloat(document.getElementById('savingsGoal').value) || 0;
            const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('interestRate').value) || 0;

            const monthlySavings = income - expense;
            document.getElementById('monthlySavings').textContent = formatMoney(monthlySavings);

            // প্রোগ্রেস বার
            const currentPercent = (current / goal) * 100;
            document.getElementById('currentBar').style.width = Math.min(currentPercent, 100) + '%';
            document.getElementById('goalBar').style.width = '100%';

            // সময় ক্যালকুলেশন
            if (monthlySavings > 0) {
                let months = 0;
                let savings = current;

                while (savings < goal && months < 1200) { // 100 years max
                    savings += monthlySavings;
                    savings += savings * (rate / 100 / 12);
                    months++;
                }

                const years = Math.floor(months / 12);
                const remainingMonths = months % 12;

                let timeText = '';
                if (years > 0) {
                    timeText += `${years} বছর `;
                }
                if (remainingMonths > 0) {
                    timeText += `${remainingMonths} মাস`;
                }
                if (months === 0) {
                    timeText = 'ইতিমধ্যে লক্ষ্যমাত্রা অর্জিত হয়েছে!';
                } else if (months > 1200) {
                    timeText = 'এই হারে সঞ্চয় করলে লক্ষ্য অর্জন সম্ভব নয়';
                } else {
                    timeText = `লক্ষ্য অর্জনে সময় লাগবে: ${timeText}`;
                }

                document.getElementById('timeToGoal').textContent = timeText;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('timeToGoal').textContent = 'সঞ্চয় বাড়ানোর জন্য খরচ কমাতে হবে';
            }
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toLocaleString('bn-BD');
        }

        calculate();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৩: লোন ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>লোন ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .loan-inputs {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .results-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .result-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .result-card.interest {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
        }
        .result-card.total {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
        }
        
        .amortization-table {
            max-height: 300px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }
        th {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 12px;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
        }
        td {
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        
        .loan-summary {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .summary-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .summary-row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🏦 লোন ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="loan-inputs">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>লোনের পরিমাণ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="loanAmount" value="500000" oninput="calculateLoan()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>সুদের হার (%)</label>
                <input type="number" id="interestRate" value="10" step="0.1" oninput="calculateLoan()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>মেয়াদ (বছর)</label>
                <input type="number" id="loanTerm" value="5" oninput="calculateLoan()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="results-grid">
            <div class="result-card">
                <div>মাসিক কিস্তি</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="monthlyPayment">৳ ১০,৬০৭</div>
            </div>
            <div class="result-card interest">
                <div>মোট সুদ</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="totalInterest">৳ ১,৩৬,৪২১</div>
            </div>
            <div class="result-card total">
                <div>মোট পরিশোধ</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="totalPayment">৳ ৬,৩৬,৪২১</div>
            </div>
            <div class="result-card">
                <div>সুদের হার</div>
                <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;" id="displayRate">১০%</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="loan-summary">
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>লোনের পরিমাণ:</span>
                <span id="summaryAmount">৳ ৫,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>ডাউন পেমেন্ট (২০%):</span>
                <span id="downPayment">৳ ১,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>লোন টু ভ্যালু রেশিও:</span>
                <span id="ltvRatio">৮০%</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>মোট পরিশোধযোগ্য:</span>
                <span id="totalPayable">৳ ৬,৩৬,৪২১</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="amortization-table" id="amortizationTable"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateLoan() {
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('loanAmount').value) || 0;
            const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('interestRate').value) || 0;
            const years = parseFloat(document.getElementById('loanTerm').value) || 0;

            const monthlyRate = rate / 100 / 12;
            const months = years * 12;

            let monthlyPayment = 0;
            if (monthlyRate > 0 && months > 0) {
                monthlyPayment = amount * monthlyRate * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months) / (Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months) - 1);
            } else if (months > 0) {
                monthlyPayment = amount / months;
            }

            const totalPayment = monthlyPayment * months;
            const totalInterest = totalPayment - amount;

            document.getElementById('monthlyPayment').textContent = formatMoney(monthlyPayment);
            document.getElementById('totalInterest').textContent = formatMoney(totalInterest);
            document.getElementById('totalPayment').textContent = formatMoney(totalPayment);
            document.getElementById('displayRate').textContent = rate + '%';

            document.getElementById('summaryAmount').textContent = formatMoney(amount);
            const downPayment = amount * 0.2;
            document.getElementById('downPayment').textContent = formatMoney(downPayment);
            document.getElementById('ltvRatio').textContent = '৮০%';
            document.getElementById('totalPayable').textContent = formatMoney(totalPayment);

            generateAmortizationTable(amount, monthlyPayment, monthlyRate, months);
        }

        function generateAmortizationTable(amount, monthlyPayment, monthlyRate, months) {
            let balance = amount;
            let table = '<table><tr><th>মাস</th><th>কিস্তি</th><th>সুদ</th><th>মূল</th><th>ব্যালেন্স</th></tr>';

            for (let i = 1; i <= Math.min(months, 12); i++) {
                const interest = balance * monthlyRate;
                const principal = monthlyPayment - interest;
                balance -= principal;

                table += `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${i}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(monthlyPayment)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(interest)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(principal)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(Math.max(balance, 0))}</td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            }

            if (months > 12) {
                table += `<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align: center;">... এবং আরও ${months - 12} মাস</td></tr>`;
            }

            table += '</table>';
            document.getElementById('amortizationTable').innerHTML = table;
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateLoan();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৪: ইনভেস্টমেন্ট ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইনভেস্টমেন্ট ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .investment-form {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .results-chart {
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .chart-container {
            flex: 1;
            height: 200px;
            position: relative;
        }
        .donut-chart {
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: conic-gradient(#43e97b 0deg 216deg, #ff6b6b 216deg 360deg);
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        
        .results-summary {
            flex: 1;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .result-item {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .result-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }
        .result-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .investment-details {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .detail-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        
        .returns-table {
            margin-top: 20px;
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }
        th, td {
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📈 ইনভেস্টমেন্ট ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
