        <div class="investment-form">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>প্রাথমিক বিনিয়োগ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="initialInvestment" value="100000" oninput="calculateInvestment()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>মাসিক বিনিয়োগ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="monthlyInvestment" value="5000" oninput="calculateInvestment()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>বার্ষিক রিটার্ন (%)</label>
                <input type="number" id="annualReturn" value="12" step="0.1" oninput="calculateInvestment()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>সময়কাল (বছর)</label>
                <input type="number" id="investmentPeriod" value="10" oninput="calculateInvestment()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="results-chart">
            <div class="chart-container">
                <div class="donut-chart" id="donutChart"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="results-summary">
                <div class="result-item">
                    <div class="result-label">মোট বিনিয়োগ</div>
                    <div class="result-value" id="totalInvestment">৳ ৭,০০,০০০</div>
                </div>
                <div class="result-item">
                    <div class="result-label">মোট রিটার্ন</div>
                    <div class="result-value" id="totalReturns">৳ ১২,৫০,০০০</div>
                </div>
                <div class="result-item">
                    <div class="result-label">মোট মূল্য</div>
                    <div class="result-value" id="totalValue">৳ ১৯,৫০,০০০</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="investment-details">
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>প্রাথমিক বিনিয়োগ:</span>
                <span id="detailInitial">৳ ১,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>মোট মাসিক বিনিয়োগ:</span>
                <span id="detailMonthly">৳ ৬,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>মোট বিনিয়োগ:</span>
                <span id="detailTotal">৳ ৭,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>চক্রবৃদ্ধি রিটার্ন:</span>
                <span id="detailReturns">৳ ১২,৫০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>করের পরিমাণ (১০%):</span>
                <span id="detailTax">৳ ১,২৫,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row">
                <span>নিট রিটার্ন:</span>
                <span id="detailNet">৳ ১১,২৫,০০০</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="returns-table" id="returnsTable"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateInvestment() {
            const initial = parseFloat(document.getElementById('initialInvestment').value) || 0;
            const monthly = parseFloat(document.getElementById('monthlyInvestment').value) || 0;
            const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('annualReturn').value) || 0;
            const years = parseFloat(document.getElementById('investmentPeriod').value) || 0;

            const monthlyRate = rate / 100 / 12;
            const months = years * 12;

            // ফিউচার ভ্যালু ক্যালকুলেশন
            let futureValue = initial * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months);

            for (let i = 1; i <= months; i++) {
                futureValue += monthly * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months - i);
            }

            const totalInvested = initial + (monthly * months);
            const totalReturns = futureValue - totalInvested;

            document.getElementById('totalInvestment').textContent = formatMoney(totalInvested);
            document.getElementById('totalReturns').textContent = formatMoney(totalReturns);
            document.getElementById('totalValue').textContent = formatMoney(futureValue);

            document.getElementById('detailInitial').textContent = formatMoney(initial);
            document.getElementById('detailMonthly').textContent = formatMoney(monthly * months);
            document.getElementById('detailTotal').textContent = formatMoney(totalInvested);
            document.getElementById('detailReturns').textContent = formatMoney(totalReturns);

            const tax = totalReturns * 0.1;
            document.getElementById('detailTax').textContent = formatMoney(tax);
            document.getElementById('detailNet').textContent = formatMoney(totalReturns - tax);

            // ডোনাট চার্ট আপডেট
            const investmentPercent = (totalInvested / futureValue) * 100;
            const returnsPercent = (totalReturns / futureValue) * 100;
            const angle = (investmentPercent / 100) * 360;
            document.getElementById('donutChart').style.background =
                `conic-gradient(#43e97b 0deg ${angle}deg, #ff6b6b ${angle}deg 360deg)`;

            generateYearlyTable(initial, monthly, rate, years);
        }

        function generateYearlyTable(initial, monthly, rate, years) {
            let table = '<table><tr><th>বছর</th><th>বিনিয়োগ</th><th>রিটার্ন</th><th>মোট</th></tr>';

            let totalInvestment = initial;
            let totalValue = initial;

            for (let year = 1; year <= years; year++) {
                totalInvestment += monthly * 12;

                for (let month = 1; month <= 12; month++) {
                    totalValue += monthly;
                    totalValue *= (1 + rate / 100 / 12);
                }

                const yearlyReturn = totalValue - totalInvestment;

                table += `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${year}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(totalInvestment)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(yearlyReturn)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(totalValue)}</td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            }

            table += '</table>';
            document.getElementById('returnsTable').innerHTML = table;
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateInvestment();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৫: ইএমআই ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইএমআই ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .emi-form {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .emi-result {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .emi-label {
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .emi-value {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .emi-breakdown {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .breakdown-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .breakdown-label {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .breakdown-value {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .emi-schedule {
            max-height: 300px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }
        th {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 12px;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
        }
        td {
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        
        .loan-summary {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .summary-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 8px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💰 ইএমআই ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="emi-form">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>লোনের পরিমাণ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="loanAmount" value="1000000" oninput="calculateEMI()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>সুদের হার (%)</label>
                <input type="number" id="interestRate" value="9.5" step="0.1" oninput="calculateEMI()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>মেয়াদ (বছর)</label>
                <input type="number" id="loanTenure" value="5" oninput="calculateEMI()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="emi-result">
            <div class="emi-label">মাসিক ইএমআই</div>
            <div class="emi-value" id="emiAmount">৳ ২০,৯৮৮</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="emi-breakdown">
            <div class="breakdown-card">
                <div class="breakdown-label">মোট সুদ</div>
                <div class="breakdown-value" id="totalInterest">৳ ২,৫৯,২৮০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-card">
                <div class="breakdown-label">মোট পরিশোধ</div>
                <div class="breakdown-value" id="totalPayment">৳ ১২,৫৯,২৮০</div>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-card">
                <div class="breakdown-label">পরিশোধের হার</div>
                <div class="breakdown-value" id="paymentRatio">১২৬%</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="loan-summary">
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>প্রতি মাসে মূল পরিশোধ:</span>
                <span id="principalPerMonth">৳ ১৬,৬৬৭</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>প্রতি মাসে সুদ:</span>
                <span id="interestPerMonth">৳ ৪,৩২১</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>প্রথম মাসের সুদ:</span>
                <span id="firstMonthInterest">৳ ৭,৯১৭</span>
            </div>
            <div class="summary-row">
                <span>শেষ মাসের সুদ:</span>
                <span id="lastMonthInterest">৳ ১৬৬</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="emi-schedule" id="emiSchedule"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateEMI() {
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('loanAmount').value) || 0;
            const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('interestRate').value) || 0;
            const years = parseFloat(document.getElementById('loanTenure').value) || 0;

            const monthlyRate = rate / 100 / 12;
            const months = years * 12;

            let emi = 0;
            if (monthlyRate > 0) {
                emi = amount * monthlyRate * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months) / (Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, months) - 1);
            } else {
                emi = amount / months;
            }

            const totalPayment = emi * months;
            const totalInterest = totalPayment - amount;

            document.getElementById('emiAmount').textContent = formatMoney(emi);
            document.getElementById('totalInterest').textContent = formatMoney(totalInterest);
            document.getElementById('totalPayment').textContent = formatMoney(totalPayment);

            const paymentRatio = ((totalPayment / amount) * 100).toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('paymentRatio').textContent = paymentRatio + '%';

            const principalPerMonth = amount / months;
            const avgInterest = totalInterest / months;
            document.getElementById('principalPerMonth').textContent = formatMoney(principalPerMonth);
            document.getElementById('interestPerMonth').textContent = formatMoney(avgInterest);

            const firstMonthInterest = amount * monthlyRate;
            document.getElementById('firstMonthInterest').textContent = formatMoney(firstMonthInterest);

            let balance = amount;
            for (let i = 1; i <= months; i++) {
                const interest = balance * monthlyRate;
                const principal = emi - interest;
                balance -= principal;

                if (i === months) {
                    document.getElementById('lastMonthInterest').textContent = formatMoney(interest);
                }
            }

            generateEMISchedule(amount, emi, monthlyRate, months);
        }

        function generateEMISchedule(amount, emi, monthlyRate, months) {
            let balance = amount;
            let table = '<table><tr><th>মাস</th><th>ইএমআই</th><th>সুদ</th><th>মূল</th><th>ব্যালেন্স</th></tr>';

            for (let i = 1; i <= Math.min(months, 12); i++) {
                const interest = balance * monthlyRate;
                const principal = emi - interest;
                balance -= principal;

                table += `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${i}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(emi)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(interest)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(principal)}</td>
                        <td>${formatMoney(Math.max(balance, 0))}</td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            }

            if (months > 12) {
                table += `<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align: center;">... এবং আরও ${months - 12} মাস</td></tr>`;
            }

            table += '</table>';
            document.getElementById('emiSchedule').innerHTML = table;
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateEMI();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৬: জিএসটি ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>জিএসটি ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .calculator-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input, select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .gst-type {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .gst-option {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .gst-option input {
            display: none;
        }
        .gst-option label {
            display: block;
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .gst-option input:checked + label {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .result-box {
            background: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            border: 2px solid #ff6b6b;
        }
        .result-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .result-row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        .result-label {
            color: #666;
        }
        .result-value {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .gst-rates {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .rate-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .rate-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .rate-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .formula {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🧾 জিএসটি ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="calculator-box">
            <div class="gst-type">
                <div class="gst-option">
                    <input type="radio" name="gstType" id="exclusive" checked onchange="calculateGST()">
                    <label for="exclusive">জিএসটি বাদে</label>
                </div>
                <div class="gst-option">
                    <input type="radio" name="gstType" id="inclusive" onchange="calculateGST()">
                    <label for="inclusive">জিএসটি সহ</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>পরিমাণ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="amount" value="1000" oninput="calculateGST()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="gst-rates">
                <button class="rate-btn active" onclick="setGSTRate(5)">৫%</button>
                <button class="rate-btn" onclick="setGSTRate(12)">১২%</button>
                <button class="rate-btn" onclick="setGSTRate(18)">১৮%</button>
                <button class="rate-btn" onclick="setGSTRate(28)">২৮%</button>
            </div>
            
            <input type="hidden" id="gstRate" value="5">
            
            <div class="result-box" id="result">
                <div class="result-row">
                    <span class="result-label">জিএসটি বাবদ:</span>
                    <span class="result-value" id="gstAmount">৫০ টাকা</span>
                </div>
                <div class="result-row">
                    <span class="result-label">মোট মূল্য:</span>
                    <span class="result-value" id="totalAmount">১০৫০ টাকা</span>
                </div>
                <div class="result-row">
                    <span class="result-label">জিএসটি ছাড়া মূল্য:</span>
                    <span class="result-value" id="baseAmount">১০০০ টাকা</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="formula" id="formula">
                জিএসটি = ১০০০ × (৫/১০০) = ৫০ টাকা
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function setGSTRate(rate) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.rate-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('gstRate').value = rate;
            calculateGST();
        }

        function calculateGST() {
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amount').value) || 0;
            const rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('gstRate').value) || 0;
            const isExclusive = document.getElementById('exclusive').checked;

            let gst, base, total;

            if (isExclusive) {
                base = amount;
                gst = amount * (rate / 100);
                total = amount + gst;
            } else {
                total = amount;
                base = amount / (1 + rate / 100);
                gst = total - base;
            }

            document.getElementById('gstAmount').textContent = formatMoney(gst);
            document.getElementById('totalAmount').textContent = formatMoney(total);
            document.getElementById('baseAmount').textContent = formatMoney(base);

            const formulaText = isExclusive
                ? `জিএসটি = ${formatMoney(amount)} × (${rate}÷১০০) = ${formatMoney(gst)}`
                : `জিএসটি = ${formatMoney(total)} - (${formatMoney(total)} ÷ (১ + ${rate}÷১০০)) = ${formatMoney(gst)}`;

            document.getElementById('formula').textContent = formulaText;
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return amount.toFixed(2) + ' টাকা';
        }

        calculateGST();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৭: ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .tax-inputs {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .tax-slabs {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .slab-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .tax-result {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .tax-label {
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .tax-value {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .tax-breakdown {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .breakdown-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .breakdown-row.total {
            border-bottom: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #667eea;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="tax-inputs">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>বার্ষিক আয় (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="annualIncome" value="800000" oninput="calculateTax()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>বিনিয়োগ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="investment" value="100000" oninput="calculateTax()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>অন্যান্য করছাড় (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="otherDeductions" value="50000" oninput="calculateTax()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="tax-slabs" id="taxSlabs"></div>
        
        <div class="tax-result">
            <div class="tax-label">প্রদেয় ট্যাক্স</div>
            <div class="tax-value" id="taxAmount">৳ ৫০,০০০</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="tax-breakdown">
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>মোট আয়:</span>
                <span id="grossIncome">৳ ৮,০০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>মোট করছাড়:</span>
                <span id="totalDeductions">৳ ১,৫০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>করযোগ্য আয়:</span>
                <span id="taxableIncome">৳ ৬,৫০,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>মূল ট্যাক্স:</span>
                <span id="baseTax">৳ ৪৫,০০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>স্বাস্থ্য সেবা সেস (৪%):</span>
                <span id="healthCess">৳ ১,৮০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row total">
                <span>মোট ট্যাক্স:</span>
                <span id="totalTax">৳ ৪৬,৮০০</span>
            </div>
            <div class="breakdown-row">
                <span>কার্যকর করের হার:</span>
                <span id="effectiveRate">৭.৮%</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const slabs = [
            { limit: 250000, rate: 0 },
            { limit: 500000, rate: 5 },
            { limit: 1000000, rate: 10 },
            { limit: Infinity, rate: 15 }
        ];

        function calculateTax() {
            const income = parseFloat(document.getElementById('annualIncome').value) || 0;
            const investment = parseFloat(document.getElementById('investment').value) || 0;
            const otherDeductions = parseFloat(document.getElementById('otherDeductions').value) || 0;

            const totalDeductions = Math.min(investment + otherDeductions, 300000);
            const taxableIncome = Math.max(income - totalDeductions, 0);

            // ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেশন
            let tax = 0;
            let remainingIncome = taxableIncome;
            let previousLimit = 0;

            const slabDetails = [];

            for (const slab of slabs) {
                if (remainingIncome <= 0) break;

                const slabAmount = Math.min(remainingIncome, slab.limit - previousLimit);
                const slabTax = slabAmount * (slab.rate / 100);

                if (slabAmount > 0) {
                    slabDetails.push({
                        range: `${previousLimit.toLocaleString()} - ${slab.limit.toLocaleString()}`,
                        amount: slabAmount,
                        rate: slab.rate,
                        tax: slabTax
                    });
                }

                tax += slabTax;
                remainingIncome -= slabAmount;
                previousLimit = slab.limit;
            }

            const healthCess = tax * 0.04;
            const totalTax = tax + healthCess;

            document.getElementById('taxAmount').textContent = formatMoney(totalTax);
            document.getElementById('grossIncome').textContent = formatMoney(income);
            document.getElementById('totalDeductions').textContent = formatMoney(totalDeductions);
            document.getElementById('taxableIncome').textContent = formatMoney(taxableIncome);
            document.getElementById('baseTax').textContent = formatMoney(tax);
            document.getElementById('healthCess').textContent = formatMoney(healthCess);
            document.getElementById('totalTax').textContent = formatMoney(totalTax);

            const effectiveRate = (totalTax / income * 100).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('effectiveRate').textContent = effectiveRate + '%';

            renderSlabs(slabDetails);
        }

        function renderSlabs(slabDetails) {
            const container = document.getElementById('taxSlabs');
            container.innerHTML = '<h3>কর নির্ধারণী স্ল্যাব</h3>' +
                slabDetails.map(slab => `
                    <div class="slab-item">
                        <span>${slab.range} (${slab.rate}%)</span>
                        <span>${formatMoney(slab.amount)}</span>
                        <span>ট্যাক্স: ${formatMoney(slab.tax)}</span>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateTax();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৮: সেলস ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সেলস ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .calculator-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input, select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .tax-type {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .tax-option {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .tax-option input {
            display: none;
        }
        .tax-option label {
            display: block;
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .tax-option input:checked + label {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .result-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        .result-card {
            background: white;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid #43e97b;
        }
        .result-label {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .result-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #43e97b;
        }
        
        .state-selector {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .receipt {
            background: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 2px dashed #666;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .receipt-header {
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed #666;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .receipt-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 5px 0;
        }
        .receipt-total {
            border-top: 1px dashed #666;
            padding-top: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🧾 সেলস ট্যাক্স ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="calculator-box">
            <div class="tax-type">
                <div class="tax-option">
                    <input type="radio" name="taxType" id="beforeTax" checked onchange="calculateSalesTax()">
                    <label for="beforeTax">ট্যাক্স বাদে</label>
                </div>
                <div class="tax-option">
                    <input type="radio" name="taxType" id="afterTax" onchange="calculateSalesTax()">
                    <label for="afterTax">ট্যাক্স সহ</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>পরিমাণ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="amount" value="1000" oninput="calculateSalesTax()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>ট্যাক্সের হার (%)</label>
                <input type="number" id="taxRate" value="10" step="0.1" oninput="calculateSalesTax()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="state-selector">
                <select id="state" onchange="calculateSalesTax()">
                    <option value="0">রাজ্য নির্বাচন করুন</option>
                    <option value="5">দিল্লি (৫%)</option>
                    <option value="8">মহারাষ্ট্র (৮%)</option>
                    <option value="10">কর্ণাটক (১০%)</option>
                    <option value="12">পশ্চিমবঙ্গ (১২%)</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            
            <div class="result-grid">
                <div class="result-card">
                    <div class="result-label">ট্যাক্সের পরিমাণ</div>
                    <div class="result-value" id="taxAmount">৳ ১০০</div>
                </div>
                <div class="result-card">
                    <div class="result-label">সর্বমোট</div>
                    <div class="result-value" id="totalAmount">৳ ১১০০</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="receipt" id="receipt">
                <div class="receipt-header">
                    <h3>বিক্রয় রসিদ</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="receipt-item">
                    <span>মূল্য:</span>
                    <span id="receiptBase">৳ ১০০০.০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="receipt-item">
                    <span>ট্যাক্স (@<span id="receiptRate">১০</span>%):</span>
                    <span id="receiptTax">৳ ১০০.০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="receipt-total receipt-item">
                    <span>মোট:</span>
                    <span id="receiptTotal">৳ ১১০০.০০</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateSalesTax() {
            const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amount').value) || 0;
            let rate = parseFloat(document.getElementById('taxRate').value) || 0;
            const isBeforeTax = document.getElementById('beforeTax').checked;

            // স্টেট সিলেক্ট করলে রেট আপডেট
            const stateSelect = document.getElementById('state');
            if (stateSelect.value !== '0') {
                rate = parseFloat(stateSelect.value);
                document.getElementById('taxRate').value = rate;
            }

            let tax, total, base;

            if (isBeforeTax) {
                base = amount;
                tax = amount * (rate / 100);
                total = amount + tax;
            } else {
                total = amount;
                base = amount / (1 + rate / 100);
                tax = total - base;
            }

            document.getElementById('taxAmount').textContent = formatMoney(tax);
            document.getElementById('totalAmount').textContent = formatMoney(total);

            document.getElementById('receiptBase').textContent = formatMoney(base);
            document.getElementById('receiptTax').textContent = formatMoney(tax);
            document.getElementById('receiptTotal').textContent = formatMoney(total);
            document.getElementById('receiptRate').textContent = rate;
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(2);
        }

        calculateSalesTax();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৮৯: প্রফিট ক্যালকুলেটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>প্রফিট ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .calculator-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .input-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .profit-result {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .profit-label {
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .profit-value {
            font-size: 36px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .profit-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .metric-card {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .metric-label {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .metric-value {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .breakdown {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .breakdown-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .breakdown-row.total {
            border-bottom: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💰 প্রফিট ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="calculator-box">
            <div class="input-row">
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label>বিক্রয় মূল্য (টাকা)</label>
                    <input type="number" id="sellingPrice" value="1500" oninput="calculateProfit()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label>ক্রয় মূল্য (টাকা)</label>
                    <input type="number" id="costPrice" value="1000" oninput="calculateProfit()">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-row">
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label>পরিমাণ</label>
                    <input type="number" id="quantity" value="100" oninput="calculateProfit()">
                </div>
                <div class="input-group">
                    <label>অন্যান্য খরচ (টাকা)</label>
                    <input type="number" id="otherCosts" value="5000" oninput="calculateProfit()">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="profit-result">
                <div class="profit-label">মোট মুনাফা</div>
                <div class="profit-value" id="totalProfit">৳ ৪৫,০০০</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="profit-metrics">
                <div class="metric-card">
                    <div class="metric-label">প্রতি ইউনিট মুনাফা</div>
                    <div class="metric-value" id="profitPerUnit">৳ ৫০০</div>
                </div>
                <div class="metric-card">
                    <div class="metric-label">মুনাফার হার</div>
                    <div class="metric-value" id="profitMargin">৫০%</div>
                </div>
                <div class="metric-card">
                    <div class="metric-label">বিনিয়োগের উপর রিটার্ন</div>
                    <div class="metric-value" id="roi">৪২.৮%</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="breakdown">
                <div class="breakdown-row">
                    <span>মোট বিক্রয়:</span>
                    <span id="totalSales">৳ ১,৫০,০০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="breakdown-row">
                    <span>মোট ক্রয়:</span>
                    <span id="totalCost">৳ ১,০০,০০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="breakdown-row">
                    <span>অন্যান্য খরচ:</span>
                    <span id="otherCostsDisplay">৳ ৫,০০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="breakdown-row">
                    <span>মোট খরচ:</span>
                    <span id="totalExpenses">৳ ১,০৫,০০০</span>
                </div>
                <div class="breakdown-row total">
                    <span>নিট মুনাফা:</span>
                    <span id="netProfit">৳ ৪৫,০০০</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateProfit() {
            const sellingPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sellingPrice').value) || 0;
            const costPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('costPrice').value) || 0;
            const quantity = parseFloat(document.getElementById('quantity').value) || 0;
            const otherCosts = parseFloat(document.getElementById('otherCosts').value) || 0;

            const totalSales = sellingPrice * quantity;
            const totalCost = costPrice * quantity;
            const totalExpenses = totalCost + otherCosts;
            const totalProfit = totalSales - totalExpenses;

            const profitPerUnit = sellingPrice - costPrice;
            const profitMargin = sellingPrice > 0 ? ((sellingPrice - costPrice) / sellingPrice * 100) : 0;
            const roi = totalExpenses > 0 ? (totalProfit / totalExpenses * 100) : 0;

            document.getElementById('totalProfit').textContent = formatMoney(totalProfit);
            document.getElementById('profitPerUnit').textContent = formatMoney(profitPerUnit);
            document.getElementById('profitMargin').textContent = profitMargin.toFixed(1) + '%';
            document.getElementById('roi').textContent = roi.toFixed(1) + '%';

            document.getElementById('totalSales').textContent = formatMoney(totalSales);
            document.getElementById('totalCost').textContent = formatMoney(totalCost);
            document.getElementById('otherCostsDisplay').textContent = formatMoney(otherCosts);
            document.getElementById('totalExpenses').textContent = formatMoney(totalExpenses);
            document.getElementById('netProfit').textContent = formatMoney(totalProfit);
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateProfit();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৯০: ব্রেক-ইভেন ক্যালকুলেটর (সম্পূর্ণ)
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ব্রেক-ইভেন ক্যালকুলেটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .calculator-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .result-box {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin: 30px 0;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .result-label {
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .result-value {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .breakeven-chart {
            margin: 20px 0;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .chart-line {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin: 10px 0;
        }
        .line-label {
            width: 100px;
        }
        .line-bar {
            flex: 1;
            height: 30px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 15px;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        .line-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
            width: 0%;
        }
        .marker {
            position: absolute;
            top: -5px;
            width: 4px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .analysis {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .analysis-card {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .analysis-value {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .profit-loss {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .profit {
            background: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
        }
        .loss {
            background: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 ব্রেক-ইভেন ক্যালকুলেটর</h1>
        
        <div class="calculator-box">
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>নির্দিষ্ট খরচ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="fixedCost" value="100000" oninput="calculateBreakeven()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>প্রতি ইউনিট বিক্রয় মূল্য (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="unitPrice" value="500" oninput="calculateBreakeven()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>প্রতি ইউনিট পরিবর্তনশীল খরচ (টাকা)</label>
                <input type="number" id="unitCost" value="300" oninput="calculateBreakeven()">
            </div>
            
            <div class="input-group">
                <label>প্রত্যাশিত বিক্রয় (ইউনিট)</label>
                <input type="number" id="expectedSales" value="1000" oninput="calculateBreakeven()">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="result-box">
            <div class="result-label">ব্রেক-ইভেন পয়েন্ট</div>
            <div class="result-value" id="breakevenPoint">৫০০ ইউনিট</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="breakeven-chart">
            <div class="chart-line">
                <span class="line-label">ব্রেক-ইভেন</span>
                <div class="line-bar">
                    <div class="line-fill" id="breakevenBar" style="width: 50%"></div>
                    <div class="marker" id="breakevenMarker" style="left: 50%"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="analysis">
            <div class="analysis-card">
                <div class="analysis-label">কন্ট্রিবিউশন মার্জিন</div>
                <div class="analysis-value" id="contributionMargin">২০০ টাকা</div>
            </div>
            <div class="analysis-card">
                <div class="analysis-label">কন্ট্রিবিউশন রেশিও</div>
                <div class="analysis-value" id="contributionRatio">৪০%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="analysis-card">
                <div class="analysis-label">সেফটি মার্জিন</div>
                <div class="analysis-value" id="safetyMargin">৫০%</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="profit-loss" id="profitLoss">
            প্রত্যাশিত মুনাফা: ৫০,০০০ টাকা
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function calculateBreakeven() {
            const fixedCost = parseFloat(document.getElementById('fixedCost').value) || 0;
            const unitPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitPrice').value) || 0;
            const unitCost = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitCost').value) || 0;
            const expectedSales = parseFloat(document.getElementById('expectedSales').value) || 0;

            const contributionMargin = unitPrice - unitCost;
            const breakevenUnits = contributionMargin > 0 ? Math.ceil(fixedCost / contributionMargin) : 0;

            document.getElementById('breakevenPoint').textContent = breakevenUnits + ' ইউনিট';

            const totalRevenue = expectedSales * unitPrice;
            const totalCost = fixedCost + (expectedSales * unitCost);
            const profit = totalRevenue - totalCost;

            const profitLossDiv = document.getElementById('profitLoss');
            if (profit > 0) {
                profitLossDiv.className = 'profit-loss profit';
                profitLossDiv.textContent = `প্রত্যাশিত মুনাফা: ${formatMoney(profit)}`;
            } else if (profit < 0) {
                profitLossDiv.className = 'profit-loss loss';
                profitLossDiv.textContent = `প্রত্যাশিত ক্ষতি: ${formatMoney(Math.abs(profit))}`;
            } else {
                profitLossDiv.className = 'profit-loss';
                profitLossDiv.textContent = 'ব্রেক-ইভেন পয়েন্টে আছেন';
            }

            document.getElementById('contributionMargin').textContent = formatMoney(contributionMargin);

            const contributionRatio = unitPrice > 0 ? (contributionMargin / unitPrice * 100) : 0;
            document.getElementById('contributionRatio').textContent = contributionRatio.toFixed(1) + '%';

            const safetyMargin = expectedSales > 0 ? ((expectedSales - breakevenUnits) / expectedSales * 100) : 0;
            document.getElementById('safetyMargin').textContent = safetyMargin.toFixed(1) + '%';

            const breakevenPercent = expectedSales > 0 ? (breakevenUnits / expectedSales * 100) : 0;
            document.getElementById('breakevenBar').style.width = Math.min(breakevenPercent, 100) + '%';
            document.getElementById('breakevenMarker').style.left = Math.min(breakevenPercent, 100) + '%';
        }

        function formatMoney(amount) {
            return '৳ ' + amount.toFixed(0).toLocaleString();
        }

        calculateBreakeven();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ৯১: মার্কডাউন এডিটর
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>মার্কডাউন এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .editor-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            height: 500px;
        }
        
        .editor-pane, .preview-pane {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        .pane-header {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        #markdownInput {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            resize: none;
        }
        #preview {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            background: white;
        }
        
        /* মার্কডাউন স্টাইল */
        #preview h1 {
            font-size: 2em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }
        #preview h2 {
            font-size: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }
        #preview h3 {
            font-size: 1.17em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }
        #preview p {
            margin-bottom: 1em;
        }
        #preview ul, #preview ol {
            margin-left: 2em;
            margin-bottom: 1em;
        }
        #preview code {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 2px 5px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            font-family: monospace;
        }
        #preview pre {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }
        #preview blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid #43e97b;
            padding-left: 1em;
            margin-left: 0;
            color: #666;
        }
        #preview table {
            border-collapse: collapse;
            width: 100%;
        }
        #preview th, #preview td {
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            padding: 8px;
        }
        #preview th {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 মার্কডাউন এডিটর</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('bold')">বোল্ড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('italic')">ইটালিক</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('h1')">H1</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('h2')">H2</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('h3')">H3</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('link')">লিংক</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('image')">ছবি</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('code')">কোড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('ul')">লিস্ট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('ol')">নম্বর লিস্ট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('quote')">কোট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertMarkdown('table')">টেবিল</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="downloadMarkdown()">ডাউনলোড</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="editor-container">
            <div class="editor-pane">
                <div class="pane-header">মার্কডাউন</div>
                <textarea id="markdownInput" oninput="renderMarkdown()"># শিরোনাম

## উপশিরোনাম

এটি একটি **বোল্ড** এবং _ইটালিক_ টেক্সট।

### লিস্ট উদাহরণ:

- আইটেম ১
- আইটেম ২
- আইটেম ৩

### কোড উদাহরণ:

````javascript
function hello() {
    console.log("Hello World!");
}
গুগল লিংক

https://picsum.photos/200/100

এইটি একটি কোটেশন</textarea>

</div> <div class="preview-pane"> <div class="pane-header">প্রিভিউ</div> <div id="preview"></div> </div> </div> </div> <script> function renderMarkdown() { const markdown = document.getElementById('markdownInput').value; let html = markdown; // হেডার html = html.replace(/^### (.*$)/gim, '<h3>$1</h3>'); html = html.replace(/^## (.*$)/gim, '<h2>$1</h2>'); html = html.replace(/^# (.*$)/gim, '<h1>$1</h1>'); // বোল্ড ও ইটালিক html = html.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/gim, '<strong>$1</strong>'); html = html.replace(/\*(.*?)\*/gim, '<em>$1</em>'); // লিংক html = html.replace(/\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/gim, '<a href="$2">$1</a>'); // ছবি html = html.replace(/!\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/gim, '<img src="$2" alt="$1">'); // কোড ব্লক html = html.replace(/```(.*?)```/gs, '<pre><code>$1</code></pre>');
html = html.replace(/(.*?)/gim, '<code>$1</code>');

// লিস্ট
html = html.replace(/^* (.*$)/gim, '<ul><li>$1</li></ul>');
html = html.replace(/^- (.*$)/gim, '<ul><li>$1</li></ul>');
html = html.replace(/^\d. (.*$)/gim, '<ol><li>$1</li></ol>');

// কোট
html = html.replace(/^> (.*$)/gim, '<blockquote>$1</blockquote>');

// প্যারাগ্রাফ
html = html.replace(/^(?!<[a-z])(.*$)/gim, '<p>$1</p>');

// ফিক্স লিস্ট
html = html.replace(/</ul>\s<ul>/g, '');
html = html.replace(/</ol>\s<ol>/g, '');

document.getElementById('preview').innerHTML = html;
}

function insertMarkdown(type) {
const textarea = document.getElementById('markdownInput');
const start = textarea.selectionStart;
const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
const selectedText = textarea.value.substring(start, end);
let insertText = '';

switch(type) {
case 'bold':
insertText = **${selectedText || 'বোল্ড টেক্সট'}**;
break;
case 'italic':
insertText = *${selectedText || 'ইটালিক টেক্সট'}*;
break;
case 'h1':
insertText = # ${selectedText || 'শিরোনাম'};
break;
case 'h2':
insertText = ## ${selectedText || 'উপশিরোনাম'};
break;
case 'h3':
insertText = ### ${selectedText || 'সাবশিরোনাম'};
break;
case 'link':
insertText = [${selectedText || 'লিংক টেক্সট'}](url);
break;
case 'image':
insertText = ![${selectedText || 'ছবির বিবরণ'}](image-url);
break;
case 'code':
insertText = selectedText ? \${selectedText}`: '```\nকোড\n```'; break; case 'ul': insertText = selectedText ? selectedText.split('\n').map(line =>- ${line}).join('\n') : '- লিস্ট আইটেম'; break; case 'ol': insertText = selectedText ? selectedText.split('\n').map((line, i) =>${i+1}. ${line}).join('\n') : '1. লিস্ট আইটেম'; break; case 'quote': insertText = selectedText ? selectedText.split('\n').map(line =>> ${line}`).join('\n') : '> কোটেশন';
break;
case 'table':
insertText = '| কলাম ১ | কলাম ২ |\n|--------|--------|\n| ডাটা ১ | ডাটা ২ |';
break;
}

textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + insertText + textarea.value.substring(end);
renderMarkdown();
}

function downloadMarkdown() {
const markdown = document.getElementById('markdownInput').value;
const blob = new Blob([markdown], { type: 'text/markdown' });
const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
const link = document.createElement('a');
link.href = url;
link.download = 'document.md';
link.click();
}

renderMarkdown();
</script>

</body> </html> ```
প্রজেক্ট ৯২: কোড এডিটর
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>কোড এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #1e1e1e;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .file-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            flex: 1;
        }
        .file-tab {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #2d2d2d;
            color: #ccc;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .file-tab.active {
            background: #3d3d3d;
            color: white;
        }
        .run-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .save-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .editor-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            height: 500px;
        }

        .editor-pane {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #1e1e1e;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .editor-header {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #2d2d2d;
            color: #ccc;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        #codeEditor {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #1e1e1e;
            color: #d4d4d4;
            border: none;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            resize: none;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        #codeEditor:focus {
            outline: none;
        }

        .output-pane {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #1e1e1e;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .output-header {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #2d2d2d;
            color: #ccc;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .clear-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #ff6b6b;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #output {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            color: #d4d4d4;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
        }

        .error {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .success {
            color: #43e97b;
        }

        .line-numbers {
            display: inline-block;
            padding-right: 10px;
            color: #666;
            text-align: right;
            user-select: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💻 কোড এডিটর</h1>

        <div class="toolbar">
            <div class="file-tabs">
                <button class="file-tab active">index.js</button>
                <button class="file-tab">style.css</button>
                <button class="file-tab">index.html</button>
            </div>
            <button class="run-btn" onclick="runCode()">▶ রান</button>
            <button class="save-btn" onclick="saveCode()">💾 সেভ</button>
        </div>

        <div class="editor-container">
            <div class="editor-pane">
                <div class="editor-header">editor</div>
                <textarea id="codeEditor" onkeydown="handleTab(event)">// আপনার জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট কোড লিখুন
function greet(name) {
    return "হ্যালো, " + name + "!";
}

console.log(greet("বিশ্ব"));

// লুপ উদাহরণ
for(let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    console.log("সংখ্যা: " + i);
}

// অ্যারে উদাহরণ
const fruits = ["আপেল", "কলা", "কমলা"];
fruits.forEach(fruit => {
    console.log(fruit);
});</textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="output-pane">
                <div class="output-header">
                    <span>output</span>
                    <button class="clear-btn" onclick="clearOutput()">clear</button>
                </div>
                <div id="output"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let consoleLogs = [];

        function runCode() {
            const code = document.getElementById('codeEditor').value;
            const outputDiv = document.getElementById('output');

            // ক্লিয়ার পূর্ববর্তী আউটপুট
            consoleLogs = [];
            outputDiv.innerHTML = '';

            // কনসোল ওভাররাইড
            const customConsole = {
                log: function(...args) {
                    const message = args.map(arg => {
                        if (typeof arg === 'object') {
                            return JSON.stringify(arg, null, 2);
                        }
                        return String(arg);
                    }).join(' ');

                    consoleLogs.push(message);
                    outputDiv.innerHTML += '<div>› ' + message + '</div>';
                },
                error: function(...args) {
                    const message = args.join(' ');
                    consoleLogs.push('Error: ' + message);
                    outputDiv.innerHTML += '<div class="error">⚠️ ' + message + '</div>';
                }
            };

            try {
                // কোড এক্সিকিউট
                const func = new Function('console', code);
                func(customConsole);

                if (consoleLogs.length === 0) {
                    outputDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="success">✅ কোড সফলভাবে রান হয়েছে (কোনো আউটপুট নেই)</div>';
                }
            } catch (error) {
                outputDiv.innerHTML += '<div class="error">❌ ' + error.message + '</div>';
            }
        }

        function clearOutput() {
            document.getElementById('output').innerHTML = '';
            consoleLogs = [];
        }

        function saveCode() {
            const code = document.getElementById('codeEditor').value;
            const blob = new Blob([code], { type: 'text/javascript' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = url;
            link.download = 'script.js';
            link.click();
        }

        function handleTab(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Tab') {
                e.preventDefault();
                const textarea = e.target;
                const start = textarea.selectionStart;
                const end = textarea.selectionEnd;

                textarea.value = textarea.value.substring(0, start) + '    ' + textarea.value.substring(end);
                textarea.selectionStart = textarea.selectionEnd = start + 4;
            }
        }

        // সিনট্যাক্স হাইলাইটিং (সিম্পল)
        function highlightSyntax() {
            // এই ফিচার পরে যোগ করা হবে
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ৯৩: এইচটিএমএল এডিটর
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>এইচটিএমএল এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .run-btn {
            padding: 8px 25px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-left: auto;
        }

        .editor-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            height: 500px;
        }

        .editor-pane {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        .pane-header {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #333;
            color: white;
            border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
        }
        #htmlEditor {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            border: 2px solid #333;
            border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            resize: none;
            background: #1e1e1e;
            color: #d4d4d4;
        }

        .preview-pane {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        #preview {
            flex: 1;
            border: 2px solid #333;
            border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
            background: white;
            padding: 15px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .templates {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .template-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🔧 এইচটিএমএল এডিটর</h1>

        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('h1')">H1</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('h2')">H2</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('p')">P</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('b')">বোল্ড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('i')">ইটালিক</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('a')">লিংক</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('img')">ছবি</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('ul')">লিস্ট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="insertTag('table')">টেবিল</button>
            <button class="run-btn" onclick="runHTML()">রান</button>
        </div>

        <div class="editor-container">
            <div class="editor-pane">
                <div class="pane-header">HTML</div>
                <textarea id="htmlEditor" onkeyup="runHTML()"><!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>আমার পৃষ্ঠা</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            margin: 20px;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .card {
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 10px 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>স্বাগতম!</h1>
    <p>এটি একটি HTML এডিটর। আপনি এখানে HTML কোড লিখে সাথে সাথে ফলাফল দেখতে পারেন।</p>

    <div class="card">
        <h3>কার্ড টাইটেল</h3>
        <p>কার্ডের কন্টেন্ট এখানে থাকবে।</p>
    </div>

    <ul>
        <li>আইটেম ১</li>
        <li>আইটেম ২</li>
        <li>আইটেম ৩</li>
    </ul>
</body>
</html></textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="preview-pane">
                <div class="pane-header">প্রিভিউ</div>
                <iframe id="preview" sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts"></iframe>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="templates">
            <h3>টেমপ্লেট</h3>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="loadTemplate('basic')">বেসিক</button>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="loadTemplate('form')">ফর্ম</button>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="loadTemplate('table')">টেবিল</button>
            <button class="template-btn" onclick="loadTemplate('card')">কার্ড</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function runHTML() {
            const html = document.getElementById('htmlEditor').value;
            const iframe = document.getElementById('preview');

            const doc = iframe.contentDocument || iframe.contentWindow.document;
            doc.open();
            doc.write(html);
            doc.close();
        }

        function insertTag(tag) {
            const textarea = document.getElementById('htmlEditor');
            const start = textarea.selectionStart;
            const end = textarea.selectionEnd;
            const selectedText = textarea.value.substring(start, end);

            let insertText = '';
            switch(tag) {
                case 'h1':
                    insertText = `<h1>${selectedText || 'শিরোনাম'}</h1>`;
                    break;
                case 'h2':
                    insertText = `<h2>${selectedText || 'উপশিরোনাম'}</h2>`;
                    break;
                case 'p':
                    insertText = `<p>${selectedText || 'প্যারাগ্রাফ'}</p>`;
                    break;
                case 'b':
                    insertText = `<b>${selectedText || 'বোল্ড'}</b>`;
                    break;
                case 'i':
                    insertText = `<i>${selectedText || 'ইটালিক'}</i>`;
                    break;
                case 'a':
                    insertText = `<a href="#">${selectedText || 'লিংক'}</a>`;
                    break;
                case 'img':
                    insertText = `<img src="https://picsum.photos/200/100" alt="${selectedText || 'ছবি'}">`;
                    break;
                case 'ul':
                    insertText = '<ul>\n    <li>আইটেম ১</li>\n    <li>আইটেম ২</li>\n    <li>আইটেম ৩</li>\n</ul>';
                    break;
                case 'table':
