            <a href="#">প্রোডাক্ট</a>
            <a href="#">অর্ডার</a>
            <div class="cart-icon" onclick="toggleCart()">
                🛒
                <span class="cart-count" id="cartCount">0</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>
    
    <!-- ক্যাটাগরি -->
    <div class="categories">
        <button class="category-btn active" onclick="filterByCategory('all')">সব</button>
        <button class="category-btn" onclick="filterByCategory('electronics')">ইলেকট্রনিক্স</button>
        <button class="category-btn" onclick="filterByCategory('fashion')">ফ্যাশন</button>
        <button class="category-btn" onclick="filterByCategory('books')">বই</button>
        <button class="category-btn" onclick="filterByCategory('sports')">স্পোর্টস</button>
    </div>
    
    <!-- প্রোডাক্ট সেকশন -->
    <section class="products-section">
        <h2>জনপ্রিয় প্রোডাক্ট</h2>
        <div class="products-grid" id="productsGrid"></div>
    </section>
    
    <!-- কার্ট সাইডবার -->
    <div class="cart-sidebar" id="cartSidebar">
        <div class="cart-header">
            <h3>আপনার কার্ট</h3>
            <button class="close-cart" onclick="toggleCart()">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div class="cart-items" id="cartItems"></div>
        <div class="cart-total">
            <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
                <span>সর্বমোট:</span>
                <span id="cartTotal">৳ ০</span>
            </div>
            <button class="checkout-btn" onclick="checkout()">অর্ডার সম্পন্ন করুন</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // প্রোডাক্ট ডাটা
        const products = [
            { id: 1, name: 'স্মার্টফোন', price: 25000, category: 'electronics', rating: 4.5, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=1' },
            { id: 2, name: 'ল্যাপটপ', price: 55000, category: 'electronics', rating: 4.8, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=2' },
            { id: 3, name: 'টি-শার্ট', price: 800, category: 'fashion', rating: 4.2, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=3' },
            { id: 4, name: 'জিন্স', price: 1500, category: 'fashion', rating: 4.3, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=4' },
            { id: 5, name: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট বই', price: 500, category: 'books', rating: 4.9, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=5' },
            { id: 6, name: 'ক্রিকেট ব্যাট', price: 3000, category: 'sports', rating: 4.6, image: 'https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=6' }
        ];

        let cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart')) || [];
        let currentCategory = 'all';
        let searchTerm = '';

        function renderProducts() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('productsGrid');
            let filtered = products;

            if (currentCategory !== 'all') {
                filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.category === currentCategory);
            }

            if (searchTerm) {
                filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.name.includes(searchTerm));
            }

            grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(p => `
                <div class="product-card">
                    <img src="${p.image}" alt="${p.name}" class="product-image">
                    <div class="product-info">
                        <div class="product-name">${p.name}</div>
                        <div class="product-price">৳ ${p.price}</div>
                        <div class="product-rating">${'⭐'.repeat(Math.floor(p.rating))}</div>
                        <button class="add-to-cart" onclick="addToCart(${p.id})">কার্টে যোগ করুন</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function addToCart(productId) {
            const product = products.find(p => p.id === productId);
            const cartItem = cart.find(item => item.id === productId);

            if (cartItem) {
                cartItem.quantity++;
            } else {
                cart.push({ ...product, quantity: 1 });
            }

            updateCart();
            saveCart();
        }

        function removeFromCart(productId) {
            cart = cart.filter(item => item.id !== productId);
            updateCart();
            saveCart();
        }

        function updateCart() {
            const cartItems = document.getElementById('cartItems');
            const cartCount = document.getElementById('cartCount');
            const cartTotal = document.getElementById('cartTotal');

            cartItems.innerHTML = cart.map(item => `
                <div class="cart-item">
                    <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.name}" class="cart-item-image">
                    <div class="cart-item-details">
                        <div class="cart-item-name">${item.name}</div>
                        <div class="cart-item-price">৳ ${item.price} x ${item.quantity}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="cart-item-remove" onclick="removeFromCart(${item.id})">🗑️</div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            const total = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);
            const itemCount = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);

            cartCount.textContent = itemCount;
            cartTotal.textContent = `৳ ${total}`;
        }

        function toggleCart() {
            document.getElementById('cartSidebar').classList.toggle('open');
        }

        function saveCart() {
            localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(cart));
        }

        function filterByCategory(category) {
            currentCategory = category;
            document.querySelectorAll('.category-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            renderProducts();
        }

        function searchProducts() {
            searchTerm = document.getElementById('searchInput').value;
            renderProducts();
        }

        function checkout() {
            if (cart.length === 0) {
                alert('কার্ট খালি!');
                return;
            }
            alert('অর্ডার সম্পন্ন হয়েছে!');
            cart = [];
            updateCart();
            saveCart();
            toggleCart();
        }

        renderProducts();
        updateCart();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০২: সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া অ্যাপ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* নেভিগেশন */
        .navbar {
            background: white;
            padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #4267B2;
        }
        .search-bar input {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 20px;
            width: 300px;
        }
        .nav-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .nav-icon {
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* মেইন কন্টেইনার */
        .container {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 20px auto;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            flex: 1;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            height: fit-content;
        }
        .profile-card {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .profile-avatar {
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .profile-name {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .profile-bio {
            color: #666;
            margin: 10px 0;
        }
        .menu-item {
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 5px 0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .menu-item:hover {
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* ফিড */
        .feed {
            flex: 2;
        }
        .create-post {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .post-input {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-input img {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .post-input textarea {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 20px;
            resize: none;
            height: 60px;
        }
        .post-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: flex-end;
        }
        .post-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #4267B2;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* পোস্ট */
        .post {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .post-header {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .post-author {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .post-time {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .post-content {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .post-image {
            width: 100%;
            max-height: 400px;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .post-stats {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .action-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .action-btn:hover {
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* রাইটবার */
        .rightbar {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .suggestions, .trending {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .suggestion-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 10px 0;
        }
        .suggestion-avatar {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .follow-btn {
            margin-left: auto;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: #4267B2;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <nav class="navbar">
        <div class="logo">সোশ্যাল</div>
        <div class="search-bar">
            <input type="text" placeholder="অনুসন্ধান...">
        </div>
        <div class="nav-icons">
            <span class="nav-icon">🏠</span>
            <span class="nav-icon">👥</span>
            <span class="nav-icon">🔔</span>
            <span class="nav-icon">💬</span>
        </div>
    </nav>
    
    <div class="container">
        <!-- লেফট সাইডবার -->
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="profile-card">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/100/100?random=1" alt="Profile" class="profile-avatar">
                <div class="profile-name">রহিম মিয়া</div>
                <div class="profile-bio">ওয়েব ডেভেলপার | প্রোগ্রামার</div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu-item">🏠 নিউজফিড</div>
            <div class="menu-item">👥 ফ্রেন্ডস</div>
            <div class="menu-item">💬 মেসেজ</div>
            <div class="menu-item">📸 ফটো</div>
            <div class="menu-item">📅 ইভেন্ট</div>
            <div class="menu-item">⚙️ সেটিংস</div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- মেইন ফিড -->
        <div class="feed" id="feed">
            <div class="create-post">
                <div class="post-input">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=1" alt="Avatar">
                    <textarea placeholder="কি ভাবছেন?"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <button class="post-btn">পোস্ট করুন</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=2" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <div>
                        <div class="post-author">করিম হোসেন</div>
                        <div class="post-time">২ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="post-content">
                    আজ একটি চমৎকার দিন। সবাইকে শুভেচ্ছা!
                </div>
                <div class="post-stats">
                    <span>❤️ ১২৫</span>
                    <span>💬 ৩৪</span>
                    <span>🔄 ১২</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <button class="action-btn">❤️ লাইক</button>
                    <button class="action-btn">💬 কমেন্ট</button>
                    <button class="action-btn">🔄 শেয়ার</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=3" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <div>
                        <div class="post-author">ফাতেমা বেগম</div>
                        <div class="post-time">৫ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="post-content">
                    নতুন জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট প্রজেক্ট শুরু করেছি। খুব মজা লাগছে!
                </div>
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/600/300?random=1" alt="Post" class="post-image">
                <div class="post-stats">
                    <span>❤️ ২৩০</span>
                    <span>💬 ৪৫</span>
                    <span>🔄 ২৩</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <button class="action-btn">❤️ লাইক</button>
                    <button class="action-btn">💬 কমেন্ট</button>
                    <button class="action-btn">🔄 শেয়ার</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- রাইট সাইডবার -->
        <div class="rightbar">
            <div class="suggestions">
                <h4>পরিচিত হতে পারেন</h4>
                <div class="suggestion-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/30/30?random=4" alt="Avatar" class="suggestion-avatar">
                    <span>সুমন আহমেদ</span>
                    <button class="follow-btn">ফলো</button>
                </div>
                <div class="suggestion-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/30/30?random=5" alt="Avatar" class="suggestion-avatar">
                    <span>নাসরিন আক্তার</span>
                    <button class="follow-btn">ফলো</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="trending">
                <h4>ট্রেন্ডিং</h4>
                <div style="padding: 10px 0;">#জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট</div>
                <div style="padding: 10px 0;">#ওয়েবডেভেলপমেন্ট</div>
                <div style="padding: 10px 0;">#প্রোগ্রামিং</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৩: টুইটার ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>টুইটার ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #fff;
        }
        
        .container {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 20px;
            border-right: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
            min-width: 250px;
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 30px;
            color: #1da1f2;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .nav-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            font-size: 18px;
            border-radius: 30px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .nav-item:hover {
            background: #e8f5fe;
            color: #1da1f2;
        }
        .tweet-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #1da1f2;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-top: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* মেইন ফিড */
        .main {
            flex: 2;
            border-right: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
            min-width: 600px;
        }
        .header {
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .tweet-box {
            display: flex;
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        }
        .tweet-box img {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-input {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .tweet-input textarea {
            width: 100%;
            border: none;
            resize: none;
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-input textarea:focus {
            outline: none;
        }
        .tweet-actions {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .tweet-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            color: #1da1f2;
        }
        .post-tweet-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #1da1f2;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* টুইট */
        .tweet {
            display: flex;
            padding: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        }
        .tweet-avatar {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-content {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .tweet-header {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .tweet-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .tweet-username {
            color: #657786;
        }
        .tweet-text {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-media {
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-stats {
            display: flex;
            gap: 50px;
            color: #657786;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .tweet-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 50px;
        }
        .action-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #657786;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .action-btn:hover {
            color: #1da1f2;
        }
        
        /* ট্রেন্ডস */
        .trends {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .search-box {
            background: #e1e8ed;
            border-radius: 30px;
            padding: 10px 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .search-box input {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
        }
        .search-box input:focus {
            outline: none;
        }
        .trends-box {
            background: #f5f8fa;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .trend-item {
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e1e8ed;
        }
        .trend-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        .trend-category {
            color: #657786;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .trend-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .trend-tweets {
            color: #657786;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <!-- সাইডবার -->
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="logo">𝕏</div>
            <div class="nav-item">🏠 হোম</div>
            <div class="nav-item">🔍 এক্সপ্লোর</div>
            <div class="nav-item">🔔 নোটিফিকেশন</div>
            <div class="nav-item">💬 মেসেজ</div>
            <div class="nav-item">📋 বুকমার্ক</div>
            <div class="nav-item">👤 প্রোফাইল</div>
            <button class="tweet-btn">টুইট</button>
        </div>
        
        <!-- মেইন ফিড -->
        <div class="main">
            <div class="header">হোম</div>
            
            <div class="tweet-box">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=1" alt="Avatar">
                <div class="tweet-input">
                    <textarea placeholder="কি হচ্ছে?"></textarea>
                    <div class="tweet-actions">
                        <div class="tweet-icons">
                            <span>📷</span>
                            <span>🎥</span>
                            <span>📊</span>
                            <span>😊</span>
                        </div>
                        <button class="post-tweet-btn">টুইট</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tweet">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=2" alt="Avatar" class="tweet-avatar">
                <div class="tweet-content">
                    <div class="tweet-header">
                        <span class="tweet-name">জন ডো</span>
                        <span class="tweet-username">@johndoe</span>
                        <span class="tweet-username">· ২ ঘন্টা</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tweet-text">
                        জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট শেখা সত্যিই মজার! প্রতিদিন নতুন কিছু শিখছি। #প্রোগ্রামিং #জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট
                    </div>
                    <div class="tweet-stats">
                        <span>❤️ ১২৫</span>
                        <span>🔄 ৩৪</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tweet-actions">
                        <button class="action-btn">💬 ১২</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">🔄 ৩৪</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">❤️ ১২৫</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">📋</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="tweet">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=3" alt="Avatar" class="tweet-avatar">
                <div class="tweet-content">
                    <div class="tweet-header">
                        <span class="tweet-name">জেন স্মিথ</span>
                        <span class="tweet-username">@janesmith</span>
                        <span class="tweet-username">· ৫ ঘন্টা</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tweet-text">
                        নতুন রিঅ্যাক্ট প্রজেক্ট শুরু করেছি। খুব এক্সাইটেড! 🚀
                    </div>
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/400/200?random=1" alt="Tweet media" class="tweet-media">
                    <div class="tweet-stats">
                        <span>❤️ ২৩০</span>
                        <span>🔄 ৪৫</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tweet-actions">
                        <button class="action-btn">💬 ২৩</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">🔄 ৪৫</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">❤️ ২৩০</button>
                        <button class="action-btn">📋</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- ট্রেন্ডস -->
        <div class="trends">
            <div class="search-box">
                <input type="text" placeholder="টুইট অনুসন্ধান">
            </div>
            
            <div class="trends-box">
                <h3>ট্রেন্ডস ফর ইউ</h3>
                <div class="trend-item">
                    <div class="trend-category">ট্রেন্ডিং</div>
                    <div class="trend-name">#জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট</div>
                    <div class="trend-tweets">২৫.৩কে টুইট</div>
                </div>
                <div class="trend-item">
                    <div class="trend-category">ট্রেন্ডিং</div>
                    <div class="trend-name">#প্রোগ্রামিং</div>
                    <div class="trend-tweets">১৮.৭কে টুইট</div>
                </div>
                <div class="trend-item">
                    <div class="trend-category">ট্রেন্ডিং</div>
                    <div class="trend-name">#ওয়েবডেভেলপমেন্ট</div>
                    <div class="trend-tweets">১২.২কে টুইট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৪: ইনস্টাগ্রাম ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইনস্টাগ্রাম ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #fafafa;
        }
        
        /* নেভিগেশন */
        .navbar {
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
            padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-family: 'Billabong', cursive;
        }
        .search-bar input {
            padding: 7px 15px;
            border: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
            border-radius: 3px;
            background: #fafafa;
            width: 250px;
        }
        .nav-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            font-size: 24px;
        }
        
        /* কন্টেইনার */
        .container {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 30px auto;
            gap: 30px;
        }
        
        /* ফিড */
        .feed {
            flex: 2;
        }
        .stories {
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
            border-radius: 3px;
            padding: 15px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .story {
            text-align: center;
        }
        .story-avatar {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid #c13584;
            padding: 2px;
        }
        .story-username {
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        
        /* পোস্ট */
        .post {
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
            border-radius: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .post-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .post-avatar {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        .post-username {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .post-image {
            width: 100%;
            max-height: 600px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .post-actions {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .post-actions-left {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            font-size: 24px;
        }
        .post-likes {
            padding: 0 15px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-caption {
            padding: 0 15px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-comments {
            padding: 0 15px;
            color: #8e8e8e;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .post-time {
            padding: 0 15px 15px;
            color: #8e8e8e;
            font-size: 10px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .add-comment {
            display: flex;
            padding: 15px;
            border-top: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
        }
        .add-comment input {
            flex: 1;
            border: none;
            padding: 5px;
        }
        .add-comment input:focus {
            outline: none;
        }
        .add-comment button {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #0095f6;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .profile-card {
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #dbdbdb;
            border-radius: 3px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .profile-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .profile-avatar {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .profile-info h4 {
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .profile-info p {
            color: #8e8e8e;
        }
        .suggestions h4 {
            color: #8e8e8e;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .suggestion-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .suggestion-avatar {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .suggestion-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .suggestion-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .suggestion-follow {
            color: #0095f6;
            font-size: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <nav class="navbar">
        <div class="logo">Instagram</div>
        <div class="search-bar">
            <input type="text" placeholder="অনুসন্ধান">
        </div>
        <div class="nav-icons">
            <span>🏠</span>
            <span>💬</span>
            <span>➕</span>
            <span>❤️</span>
            <span>👤</span>
        </div>
    </nav>
    
    <div class="container">
        <div class="feed">
            <!-- স্টোরি -->
            <div class="stories">
                <div class="story">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/60/60?random=1" alt="Story" class="story-avatar">
                    <div class="story-username">user1</div>
                </div>
                <div class="story">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/60/60?random=2" alt="Story" class="story-avatar">
                    <div class="story-username">user2</div>
                </div>
                <div class="story">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/60/60?random=3" alt="Story" class="story-avatar">
                    <div class="story-username">user3</div>
                </div>
                <div class="story">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/60/60?random=4" alt="Story" class="story-avatar">
                    <div class="story-username">user4</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- পোস্ট -->
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=5" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <span class="post-username">john_doe</span>
                </div>
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1" alt="Post" class="post-image">
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <div class="post-actions-left">
                        <span>❤️</span>
                        <span>💬</span>
                        <span>📤</span>
                    </div>
                    <span>🔖</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-likes">১,২৩৪ লাইক</div>
                <div class="post-caption">
                    <strong>john_doe</strong> প্রকৃতির সৌন্দর্য 🌅 #প্রকৃতি #সকাল
                </div>
                <div class="post-comments">সব কমেন্ট দেখুন (১২টি)</div>
                <div class="post-time">২ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                <div class="add-comment">
                    <input type="text" placeholder="কমেন্ট করুন...">
                    <button>পোস্ট</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=6" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <span class="post-username">jane_smith</span>
                </div>
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=2" alt="Post" class="post-image">
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <div class="post-actions-left">
                        <span>❤️</span>
                        <span>💬</span>
                        <span>📤</span>
                    </div>
                    <span>🔖</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-likes">৮৯০ লাইক</div>
                <div class="post-caption">
                    <strong>jane_smith</strong> শহরের আলো 🌃 #শহর #রাত
                </div>
                <div class="post-comments">সব কমেন্ট দেখুন (৮টি)</div>
                <div class="post-time">৫ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                <div class="add-comment">
                    <input type="text" placeholder="কমেন্ট করুন...">
                    <button>পোস্ট</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="profile-card">
                <div class="profile-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/56/56?random=7" alt="Profile" class="profile-avatar">
                    <div class="profile-info">
                        <h4>rahim_mia</h4>
                        <p>রহিম মিয়া</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="suggestions">
                    <h4>সাজেশন</h4>
                    <div class="suggestion-item">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=8" alt="Suggestion" class="suggestion-avatar">
                        <div class="suggestion-info">
                            <div class="suggestion-name">karim_h</div>
                            <div>ফলো করেন</div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="suggestion-follow">ফলো</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="suggestion-item">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=9" alt="Suggestion" class="suggestion-avatar">
                        <div class="suggestion-info">
                            <div class="suggestion-name">fatema_b</div>
                            <div>নতুন</div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="suggestion-follow">ফলো</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৫: ফেসবুক ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফেসবুক ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* নেভিগেশন */
        .navbar {
            background: white;
            padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 32px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #1877f2;
        }
        .search-bar {
            background: #f0f2f5;
            border-radius: 30px;
            padding: 8px 15px;
            width: 300px;
        }
        .search-bar input {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
        }
        .nav-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            font-size: 20px;
        }
        
        /* কন্টেইনার */
        .container {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 20px auto;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        /* লেফট সাইডবার */
        .left-sidebar {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .sidebar-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .sidebar-item:hover {
            background: #e4e6e9;
        }
        .sidebar-avatar {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        
        /* মেইন কন্টেন্ট */
        .main-content {
            flex: 2;
        }
        .create-post {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .post-input {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding-bottom: 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e6e9;
        }
        .post-input img {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .post-input input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #f0f2f5;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 30px;
        }
        .post-actions {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-around;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }
        .post-action {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .post-action:hover {
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* পোস্ট */
        .post {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .post-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .post-avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .post-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .post-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .post-time {
            color: #65676b;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .post-text {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .post-image {
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .post-stats {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 10px 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #e4e6e9;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e6e9;
            color: #65676b;
        }
        .post-buttons {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-around;
            padding-top: 10px;
        }
        .post-button {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .post-button:hover {
            background: #f0f2f5;
        }
        
        /* রাইট সাইডবার */
        .right-sidebar {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .sponsored, .contacts {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .sponsored h4, .contacts h4 {
            color: #65676b;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .contact-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .contact-item:hover {
            background: #e4e6e9;
        }
        .contact-avatar {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .online-status {
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #31a24c;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin-left: auto;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <nav class="navbar">
        <div class="logo">facebook</div>
        <div class="search-bar">
            <input type="text" placeholder="Facebook অনুসন্ধান">
        </div>
        <div class="nav-icons">
            <span>🏠</span>
            <span>👥</span>
            <span>📺</span>
            <span>👤</span>
            <span>🔔</span>
        </div>
    </nav>
    
    <div class="container">
        <div class="left-sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=1" alt="Avatar" class="sidebar-avatar">
                <span>রহিম মিয়া</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>👥</span>
                <span>ফ্রেন্ডস</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>💬</span>
                <span>মেসেঞ্জার</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>📺</span>
                <span>ওয়াচ</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>📅</span>
                <span>ইভেন্ট</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="main-content">
            <div class="create-post">
                <div class="post-input">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=1" alt="Avatar">
                    <input type="text" placeholder="কি ভাবছেন?">
                </div>
                <div class="post-actions">
                    <div class="post-action">📹 লাইভ</div>
                    <div class="post-action">📷 ফটো</div>
                    <div class="post-action">📌 রুম</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=2" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <div class="post-info">
                        <div class="post-name">করিম হোসেন</div>
                        <div class="post-time">২ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="post-text">
                    আজ একটি চমৎকার দিন। সবাইকে শুভেচ্ছা!
                </div>
                <div class="post-stats">
                    <span>❤️ ১২৫</span>
                    <span>💬 ৩৪ কমেন্ট</span>
                    <span>🔄 ১২ শেয়ার</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-buttons">
                    <button class="post-button">❤️ লাইক</button>
                    <button class="post-button">💬 কমেন্ট</button>
                    <button class="post-button">🔄 শেয়ার</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="post">
                <div class="post-header">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=3" alt="Avatar" class="post-avatar">
                    <div class="post-info">
                        <div class="post-name">ফাতেমা বেগম</div>
                        <div class="post-time">৫ ঘন্টা আগে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="post-text">
                    নতুন জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট প্রজেক্ট শুরু করেছি। খুব মজা লাগছে!
                </div>
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/600/400?random=1" alt="Post" class="post-image">
                <div class="post-stats">
                    <span>❤️ ২৩০</span>
                    <span>💬 ৪৫ কমেন্ট</span>
                    <span>🔄 ২৩ শেয়ার</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-buttons">
                    <button class="post-button">❤️ লাইক</button>
                    <button class="post-button">💬 কমেন্ট</button>
                    <button class="post-button">🔄 শেয়ার</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="right-sidebar">
            <div class="sponsored">
                <h4>স্পনসর্ড</h4>
                <div class="sidebar-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=4" alt="Ad" class="sidebar-avatar">
                    <span>অনলাইন শপ</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="contacts">
                <h4>কন্টাক্ট</h4>
                <div class="contact-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=5" alt="Contact" class="contact-avatar">
                    <span>সুমন আহমেদ</span>
                    <span class="online-status"></span>
                </div>
                <div class="contact-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/32/32?random=6" alt="Contact" class="contact-avatar">
                    <span>নাসরিন আক্তার</span>
                    <span class="online-status"></span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৬: হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #e5ddd5;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        .app {
            display: flex;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            width: 350px;
            background: white;
            border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .sidebar-header {
            background: #075e54;
            color: white;
            padding: 15px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .profile-pic {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .header-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .search-bar {
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f6f6f6;
        }
        .search-bar input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px 15px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .chats-list {
            overflow-y: auto;
            height: calc(100vh - 130px);
        }
        .chat-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .chat-item:hover {
            background: #f5f5f5;
        }
        .chat-item.active {
            background: #e0e0e0;
        }
        .chat-avatar {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .chat-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .chat-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .chat-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .chat-time {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .chat-last {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        /* চ্যাট এরিয়া */
        .chat-area {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #efeae2;
        }
        .chat-header {
            background: #075e54;
            color: white;
            padding: 15px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .chat-header-avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .chat-header-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .chat-header-name {
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .chat-header-status {
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .messages {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 20px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .message {
            max-width: 60%;
            padding: 10px 15px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            position: relative;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s;
        }
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .message.sent {
            background: #dcf8c6;
            align-self: flex-end;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 2px;
        }
        .message.received {
            background: white;
            align-self: flex-start;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 2px;
        }
        .message-time {
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #999;
            text-align: right;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        
        .message-input {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 15px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .message-input input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 25px;
            background: white;
        }
        .send-btn {
            width: 45px;
            height: 45px;
            background: #075e54;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .emoji-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            font-size: 24px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="app">
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-header">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=1" alt="Profile" class="profile-pic">
                <div class="header-icons">
                    <span>🔄</span>
                    <span>💬</span>
                    <span>⋯</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="search-bar">
                <input type="text" placeholder="অনুসন্ধান বা নতুন চ্যাট">
            </div>
            
            <div class="chats-list">
                <div class="chat-item active">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=2" alt="Avatar" class="chat-avatar">
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-header">
                            <span class="chat-name">করিম হোসেন</span>
                            <span class="chat-time">১২:৩০</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="chat-last">আপনি: ঠিক আছে, দেখা হবে</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="chat-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=3" alt="Avatar" class="chat-avatar">
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-header">
                            <span class="chat-name">ফাতেমা বেগম</span>
                            <span class="chat-time">১০:১৫</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="chat-last">আজকের মিটিং টা মনে করিয়ে দেবেন?</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="chat-item">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/50/50?random=4" alt="Avatar" class="chat-avatar">
                    <div class="chat-info">
                        <div class="chat-header">
                            <span class="chat-name">সুমন আহমেদ</span>
                            <span class="chat-time">গতকাল</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="chat-last">ধন্যবাদ!</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="chat-area">
            <div class="chat-header">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=2" alt="Avatar" class="chat-header-avatar">
                <div class="chat-header-info">
                    <div class="chat-header-name">করিম হোসেন</div>
                    <div class="chat-header-status">অনলাইন</div>
                </div>
                <div class="header-icons">
                    <span>📞</span>
                    <span>⋯</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="messages" id="messages">
                <div class="message received">
                    আসসালামু আলাইকুম
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩০</div>
                </div>
                <div class="message sent">
                    ওয়ালাইকুম আসসালাম, কেমন আছেন?
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩১</div>
                </div>
                <div class="message received">
                    আলহামদুলিল্লাহ্, ভালো আছি। আপনি?
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩২</div>
                </div>
                <div class="message sent">
                    আমিও ভালো আছি। আজকের মিটিং টা কি ৩টায়?
                    <div class="message-time">১০:৩৩</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="message-input">
                <button class="emoji-btn">😊</button>
                <input type="text" id="messageInput" placeholder="মেসেজ লিখুন...">
                <button class="send-btn" onclick="sendMessage()">➤</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function sendMessage() {
            const input = document.getElementById('messageInput');
            const message = input.value.trim();

            if (message) {
                const messagesDiv = document.getElementById('messages');
                const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('bn-BD', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });

                const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');
                messageDiv.className = 'message sent';
                messageDiv.innerHTML = `
                    ${message}
                    <div class="message-time">${time}</div>
                `;

                messagesDiv.appendChild(messageDiv);
                input.value = '';

                // স্ক্রোল ডাউন
                messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;
            }
        }

        // এন্টার চাপলে মেসেজ পাঠান
        document.getElementById('messageInput').addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                sendMessage();
            }
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৭: ইউটিউব ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ইউটিউব ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        
        /* হেডার */
        .header {
            background: white;
            padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .menu-icon {
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff0000;
        }
        .search-bar {
            display: flex;
            flex: 0 1 600px;
        }
        .search-bar input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px;
        }
        .search-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f8f8f8;
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            border-left: none;
            border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .header-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            font-size: 20px;
        }
        
        /* কন্টেইনার */
        .container {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 20px auto;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            width: 240px;
            position: sticky;
            top: 70px;
            height: calc(100vh - 70px);
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .sidebar-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .sidebar-item:hover {
            background: #e5e5e5;
        }
        .sidebar-item.active {
            background: #e5e5e5;
        }
        .sidebar hr {
            margin: 10px 0;
            border: none;
            border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
        }
        
        /* মেইন কন্টেন্ট */
        .main-content {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .categories {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .category-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .category-btn.active {
            background: #030303;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* ভিডিও গ্রিড */
        .video-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .video-card {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }
        .video-card:hover {
            transform: scale(1.02);
        }
        .video-thumbnail {
            width: 100%;
            height: 170px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .video-info {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .channel-avatar {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .video-details {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .video-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .video-channel {
            color: #606060;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .video-stats {
            color: #606060;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <header class="header">
        <div class="logo">
            <span class="menu-icon">☰</span>
            <span class="logo-text">YouTube</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="search-bar">
            <input type="text" placeholder="অনুসন্ধান">
            <button class="search-btn">🔍</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="header-icons">
            <span>📹</span>
            <span>🔔</span>
            <span>👤</span>
        </div>
    </header>
    
    <div class="container">
        <aside class="sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-item active">
                <span>🏠</span>
                <span>হোম</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>🔥</span>
                <span>ট্রেন্ডিং</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>📺</span>
                <span>সাবস্ক্রিপশন</span>
            </div>
            <hr>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>📚</span>
                <span>লাইব্রেরি</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-item">
                <span>⏱️</span>
                <span>ইতিহাস</span>
            </div>
        </aside>
        
        <main class="main-content">
            <div class="categories">
                <button class="category-btn active">সব</button>
                <button class="category-btn">গেমিং</button>
                <button class="category-btn">লাইভ</button>
                <button class="category-btn">মিউজিক</button>
                <button class="category-btn">ক্রিকেট</button>
                <button class="category-btn">প্রোগ্রামিং</button>
                <button class="category-btn">বাংলা গান</button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="video-grid">
                <div class="video-card">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/300/170?random=1" alt="Thumbnail" class="video-thumbnail">
                    <div class="video-info">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=1" alt="Channel" class="channel-avatar">
                        <div class="video-details">
                            <div class="video-title">জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট টিউটোরিয়াল ২০২৪</div>
                            <div class="video-channel">প্রোগ্রামিং হিরো</div>
                            <div class="video-stats">২৩০কে ভিউ • ২ দিন আগে</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="video-card">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/300/170?random=2" alt="Thumbnail" class="video-thumbnail">
                    <div class="video-info">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=2" alt="Channel" class="channel-avatar">
                        <div class="video-details">
                            <div class="video-title">ক্রিকেট বিশ্বকাপ ২০২৪ হাইলাইটস</div>
                            <div class="video-channel">স্পোর্টস বাংলা</div>
                            <div class="video-stats">১.২এম ভিউ • ৫ দিন আগে</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="video-card">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/300/170?random=3" alt="Thumbnail" class="video-thumbnail">
                    <div class="video-info">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=3" alt="Channel" class="channel-avatar">
                        <div class="video-details">
                            <div class="video-title">নতুন বাংলা গান ২০২৪</div>
                            <div class="video-channel">মিউজিক বাংলা</div>
                            <div class="video-stats">৮৫০কে ভিউ • ১ সপ্তাহ আগে</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="video-card">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/300/170?random=4" alt="Thumbnail" class="video-thumbnail">
                    <div class="video-info">
                        <img src="https://picsum.photos/36/36?random=4" alt="Channel" class="channel-avatar">
                        <div class="video-details">
                            <div class="video-title">রিঅ্যাক্ট জেএস সম্পূর্ণ কোর্স</div>
                            <div class="video-channel">টেক টিউটোরিয়াল</div>
                            <div class="video-stats">৪৫০কে ভিউ • ৩ দিন আগে</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৮: নেটফ্লিক্স ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>নেটফ্লিক্স ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background: #141414;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* নেভিগেশন */
        .navbar {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            padding: 20px 50px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            z-index: 100;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 10%, transparent);
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 32px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #e50914;
        }
        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-left: 50px;
        }
        .nav-links a {
            color: white;
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        .nav-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            align-items: center;
        }
        
        /* হিরো সেকশন */
        .hero {
            height: 90vh;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.5), rgba(0,0,0,0.8)), url('https://picsum.photos/1200/600?random=1');
            background-size: cover;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 50px;
        }
        .hero-content {
            max-width: 600px;
        }
        .hero-title {
            font-size: 50px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .hero-desc {
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .hero-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .play-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: white;
            color: black;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .info-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* রো সেকশন */
        .rows {
            margin-top: -100px;
            padding: 0 50px;
        }
        .row {
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }
        .row-header {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .row-posters {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            padding: 20px 0;
        }
        .row-posters::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }
        .poster {
            width: 200px;
            height: 300px;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 5px;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .poster:hover {
            transform: scale(1.08);
        }
        .poster.small {
            width: 150px;
            height: 225px;
        }
        
        /* ক্যাটাগরি */
        .categories {
            padding: 20px 50px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .category-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            color: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .category-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }
        
        /* ফুটার */
        .footer {
            padding: 50px;
            color: #808080;
        }
        .footer-links {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .footer-link {
            color: #808080;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .footer-link:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <nav class="navbar">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">
            <span class="logo">NETFLIX</span>
            <div class="nav-links">
                <a href="#">হোম</a>
                <a href="#">সিরিজ</a>
                <a href="#">সিনেমা</a>
                <a href="#">নতুন</a>
                <a href="#">আমার লিস্ট</a>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="nav-right">
            <span>🔍</span>
            <span>🔔</span>
            <span>👤</span>
        </div>
    </nav>
    
    <section class="hero">
        <div class="hero-content">
            <h1 class="hero-title">স্ট্রেঞ্জার থিংস</h1>
            <p class="hero-desc">৮০-এর দশকের একটি ছোট শহরে, একটি ছেলে নিখোঁজ হয় এবং একটি মেয়ে অলৌকিক ক্ষমতা নিয়ে আবির্ভূত হয়।</p>
            <div class="hero-buttons">
                <button class="play-btn">▶ প্লে</button>
                <button class="info-btn">ℹ️ আরও তথ্য</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    
    <div class="categories">
        <button class="category-btn">সব</button>
        <button class="category-btn">একশন</button>
        <button class="category-btn">কমেডি</button>
        <button class="category-btn">ড্রামা</button>
        <button class="category-btn">থ্রিলার</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="rows">
        <div class="row">
            <h2 class="row-header">আমার লিস্ট</h2>
            <div class="row-posters">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=1" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=2" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=3" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=4" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=5" alt="Poster" class="poster">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="row">
            <h2 class="row-header">ট্রেন্ডিং এখন</h2>
            <div class="row-posters">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/225?random=6" alt="Poster" class="poster small">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/225?random=7" alt="Poster" class="poster small">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/225?random=8" alt="Poster" class="poster small">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/225?random=9" alt="Poster" class="poster small">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/150/225?random=10" alt="Poster" class="poster small">
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="row">
            <h2 class="row-header">একশন সিনেমা</h2>
            <div class="row-posters">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=11" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=12" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=13" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=14" alt="Poster" class="poster">
                <img src="https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=15" alt="Poster" class="poster">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <footer class="footer">
        <div class="footer-links">
            <div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">অডিও বর্ণনা</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">বিনিয়োগ সম্পর্ক</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">লিগ্যাল নোটিশ</a></div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">সহায়তা কেন্দ্র</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">কর্মসংস্থান</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">কুকি প্রেফারেন্স</a></div>
            </div>
            <div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">গিফট কার্ড</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">প্রাইভেসি</a></div>
                <div><a href="#" class="footer-link">করপোরেট তথ্য</a></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <p>© ২০২৪ Netflix ক্লোন - শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক উদ্দেশ্যে</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১০৯: স্পটিফাই ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>স্পটিফাই ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Circular', Arial, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1db954, #191414);
            min-height: 100vh;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* সাইডবার */
        .sidebar {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 240px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: #000;
            padding: 24px 12px;
        }
        .logo {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #1db954;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding-left: 12px;
        }
        .nav-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 12px;
            color: #b3b3b3;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .nav-item:hover {
            color: white;
        }
        .playlist-item {
            padding: 12px;
            color: #b3b3b3;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .playlist-item:hover {
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* মেইন কন্টেন্ট */
        .main-content {
            margin-left: 240px;
            padding: 20px 30px;
        }
        .header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .nav-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .nav-btn {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .user-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
            padding: 3px 15px 3px 3px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .user-avatar {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        
        /* হিরো সেকশন */
        .hero {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #450af5, #c4efd9);
            padding: 40px;
