            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterArticles('unread')">অপঠিত</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterArticles('favorites')">পছন্দের</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterArticles('archived')">আর্কাইভ</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="stats">
            <div class="stat-item">
                <div class="stat-value" id="totalCount">১২</div>
                <div>মোট</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-item">
                <div class="stat-value" id="unreadCount">৫</div>
                <div>অপঠিত</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-item">
                <div class="stat-value" id="readCount">৭</div>
                <div>পঠিত</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="articles-grid" id="articlesGrid">
            <!-- আর্টিকেল কার্ড এখানে আসবে -->
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let articles = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('articles')) || [
            {
                id: 1,
                title: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট শেখার সহজ উপায়',
                url: 'https://example.com/js-tutorial',
                excerpt: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট শেখা এখন আগের চেয়ে সহজ। শুরু করুন আজই...',
                image: 'https://picsum.photos/350/150?random=1',
                tags: ['প্রোগ্রামিং', 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট'],
                isRead: false,
                isFavorite: true,
                isArchived: false,
                dateAdded: '২০২৪-০৩-১৫'
            },
            {
                id: 2,
                title: '১০টি স্বাস্থ্য টিপস',
                url: 'https://example.com/health-tips',
                excerpt: 'সুস্থ থাকার সহজ উপায়। প্রতিদিনের কিছু অভ্যাস...',
                image: 'https://picsum.photos/350/150?random=2',
                tags: ['স্বাস্থ্য', 'লাইফস্টাইল'],
                isRead: true,
                isFavorite: false,
                isArchived: false,
                dateAdded: '২০২৪-০৩-১৪'
            },
            {
                id: 3,
                title: 'ক্রিপ্টোকারেন্সি বিনিয়োগ গাইড',
                url: 'https://example.com/crypto-guide',
                excerpt: 'বিটকয়েন ও অন্যান্য ক্রিপ্টোতে বিনিয়োগের নিয়ম...',
                image: 'https://picsum.photos/350/150?random=3',
                tags: ['অর্থ', 'ক্রিপ্টো'],
                isRead: false,
                isFavorite: true,
                isArchived: false,
                dateAdded: '২০২৪-০৩-১৩'
            }
        ];

        let currentFilter = 'all';

        function renderArticles() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('articlesGrid');
            let filtered = articles;

            if (currentFilter === 'unread') {
                filtered = articles.filter(a => !a.isRead);
            } else if (currentFilter === 'favorites') {
                filtered = articles.filter(a => a.isFavorite);
            } else if (currentFilter === 'archived') {
                filtered = articles.filter(a => a.isArchived);
            }

            grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(a => `
                <div class="article-card">
                    <img src="${a.image}" alt="Article" class="article-image">
                    <div class="article-content">
                        <div class="tags">
                            ${a.tags.map(tag => `<span class="tag">${tag}</span>`).join('')}
                        </div>
                        <div class="article-title">${a.title}</div>
                        <div class="article-url">${a.url}</div>
                        <div class="article-excerpt">${a.excerpt}</div>
                        <div class="article-meta">
                            <div class="article-date">📅 ${a.dateAdded}</div>
                            <div class="article-actions">
                                <button class="article-btn ${a.isFavorite ? 'favorite' : ''}" onclick="toggleFavorite(${a.id})">⭐</button>
                                <button class="article-btn" onclick="toggleRead(${a.id})">${a.isRead ? '✓' : '◯'}</button>
                                <button class="article-btn" onclick="archiveArticle(${a.id})">📦</button>
                                <button class="article-btn" onclick="deleteArticle(${a.id})">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            updateStats();
        }

        function addArticle() {
            const url = document.getElementById('articleUrl').value;
            if (url) {
                const newArticle = {
                    id: Date.now(),
                    title: 'নতুন আর্টিকেল',
                    url: url,
                    excerpt: 'আর্টিকেলের বিবরণ এখানে থাকবে...',
                    image: 'https://picsum.photos/350/150?random=' + Math.random(),
                    tags: ['নতুন'],
                    isRead: false,
                    isFavorite: false,
                    isArchived: false,
                    dateAdded: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
                };

                articles.push(newArticle);
                localStorage.setItem('articles', JSON.stringify(articles));
                renderArticles();
                document.getElementById('articleUrl').value = '';
            }
        }

        function toggleFavorite(id) {
            const article = articles.find(a => a.id === id);
            if (article) {
                article.isFavorite = !article.isFavorite;
                localStorage.setItem('articles', JSON.stringify(articles));
                renderArticles();
            }
        }

        function toggleRead(id) {
            const article = articles.find(a => a.id === id);
            if (article) {
                article.isRead = !article.isRead;
                localStorage.setItem('articles', JSON.stringify(articles));
                renderArticles();
            }
        }

        function archiveArticle(id) {
            const article = articles.find(a => a.id === id);
            if (article) {
                article.isArchived = !article.isArchived;
                localStorage.setItem('articles', JSON.stringify(articles));
                renderArticles();
            }
        }

        function deleteArticle(id) {
            if (confirm('আর্টিকেলটি মুছে ফেলতে চান?')) {
                articles = articles.filter(a => a.id !== id);
                localStorage.setItem('articles', JSON.stringify(articles));
                renderArticles();
            }
        }

        function filterArticles(filter) {
            currentFilter = filter;
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            renderArticles();
        }

        function updateStats() {
            const total = articles.length;
            const unread = articles.filter(a => !a.isRead).length;
            const read = total - unread;

            document.getElementById('totalCount').textContent = total;
            document.getElementById('unreadCount').textContent = unread;
            document.getElementById('readCount').textContent = read;
        }

        renderArticles();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১১৭: রিড-ইট-লেটার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>রিড-ইট-লেটার - পরে পড়ুন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        /* এক্সটেনশন বার */
        .extension-bar {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .save-current {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .save-current input {
            padding: 10px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            width: 300px;
        }
        .save-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: white;
            color: #667eea;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* ক্যাটাগরি ট্যাব */
        .categories {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .category-tab {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;
        }
        .category-tab.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* লিস্ট ভিউ */
        .items-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .list-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border-left: 4px solid transparent;
        }
        .list-item:hover {
            transform: translateX(5px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .list-item.unread {
            border-left-color: #667eea;
        }
        .list-item.read {
            border-left-color: #43e97b;
        }
        .item-icon {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: #667eea;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-size: 24px;
        }
        .item-content {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .item-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .item-url {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .item-meta {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .item-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .item-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .read-btn {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .read-later-btn {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .delete-btn {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        /* ট্যাগ ক্লাউড */
        .tag-cloud {
            margin-top: 30px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .tag-cloud h3 {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .tags {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tag {
            padding: 5px 15px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .tag:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .tag.large {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .tag.medium {
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .tag.small {
            font-size: 12px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📚 রিড-ইট-লেটার</h1>
        
        <div class="extension-bar">
            <div class="save-current">
                <input type="url" id="currentUrl" placeholder="বর্তমান পৃষ্ঠার URL">
                <button class="save-btn" onclick="saveCurrentPage()">পরে পড়ুন</button>
            </div>
            <div>🔖 ২৩টি আইটেম সংরক্ষিত</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="categories">
            <div class="category-tab active">সব</div>
            <div class="category-tab">অপঠিত</div>
            <div class="category-tab">পঠিত</div>
            <div class="category-tab">ফেভারিট</div>
            <div class="category-tab">আর্কাইভ</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="items-list" id="itemsList">
            <div class="list-item unread">
                <div class="item-icon">📄</div>
                <div class="item-content">
                    <div class="item-title">জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট শেখার সম্পূর্ণ গাইড</div>
                    <div class="item-url">https://example.com/js-guide</div>
                    <div class="item-meta">
                        <span>📅 ১৫ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ১৫ মিনিট পড়া</span>
                        <span>🏷️ প্রোগ্রামিং, জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="item-actions">
                    <button class="item-btn read-btn">✓ পড়া শেষ</button>
                    <button class="item-btn read-later-btn">⭐</button>
                    <button class="item-btn delete-btn">🗑️</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="list-item unread">
                <div class="item-icon">📰</div>
                <div class="item-content">
                    <div class="item-title">বাংলাদেশের অর্থনীতি ২০২৪</div>
                    <div class="item-url">https://example.com/bd-economy</div>
                    <div class="item-meta">
                        <span>📅 ১৪ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ৮ মিনিট পড়া</span>
                        <span>🏷️ অর্থনীতি, বাংলাদেশ</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="item-actions">
                    <button class="item-btn read-btn">✓ পড়া শেষ</button>
                    <button class="item-btn read-later-btn">⭐</button>
                    <button class="item-btn delete-btn">🗑️</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="list-item read">
                <div class="item-icon">🎨</div>
                <div class="item-content">
                    <div class="item-title">ওয়েব ডিজাইনের ১০টি টিপস</div>
                    <div class="item-url">https://example.com/web-design</div>
                    <div class="item-meta">
                        <span>📅 ১০ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                        <span>⏱️ ১২ মিনিট পড়া</span>
                        <span>🏷️ ডিজাইন, ওয়েব</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="item-actions">
                    <button class="item-btn read-btn">✓ পড়া হয়েছে</button>
                    <button class="item-btn read-later-btn">⭐</button>
                    <button class="item-btn delete-btn">🗑️</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="tag-cloud">
            <h3>জনপ্রিয় ট্যাগ</h3>
            <div class="tags">
                <span class="tag large">প্রোগ্রামিং (১২)</span>
                <span class="tag large">জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট (৮)</span>
                <span class="tag medium">ওয়েব (৬)</span>
                <span class="tag medium">ডিজাইন (৫)</span>
                <span class="tag small">অর্থনীতি (৩)</span>
                <span class="tag small">স্বাস্থ্য (৩)</span>
                <span class="tag small">শিক্ষা (৪)</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function saveCurrentPage() {
            const url = document.getElementById('currentUrl').value;
            if (url) {
                alert('পৃষ্ঠাটি সংরক্ষিত হয়েছে!');
                document.getElementById('currentUrl').value = '';
            }
        }

        // ট্যাব পরিবর্তন
        document.querySelectorAll('.category-tab').forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.category-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                this.classList.add('active');
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১১৮: পিডিএফ ভিউয়ার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পিডিএফ ভিউয়ার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .page-info {
            margin-left: auto;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        #pageInput {
            width: 50px;
            padding: 5px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .pdf-container {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            min-height: 600px;
            position: relative;
        }
        #pdfCanvas {
            width: 100%;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #43e97b;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 50px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .upload-area:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .thumbnails {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .thumbnail {
            width: 70px;
            height: 100px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .thumbnail.active {
            border-color: #43e97b;
        }
        
        .loading {
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 50px;
        }
        .loading.active {
            display: block;
        }
        
        .zoom-controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            align-items: center;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📄 পিডিএফ ভিউয়ার</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="openFile()">📂 ওপেন</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="prevPage()">◀ পূর্ববর্তী</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="nextPage()">পরবর্তী ▶</button>
            <div class="page-info">
                <span>পৃষ্ঠা:</span>
                <input type="number" id="pageInput" value="1" min="1">
                <span>/ <span id="pageCount">১</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="zoom-controls">
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="zoomOut()">−</button>
                <span id="zoomLevel">১০০%</span>
                <button class="tool-btn" onclick="zoomIn()">+</button>
            </div>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="downloadPDF()">📥 ডাউনলোড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" onclick="printPDF()">🖨️ প্রিন্ট</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="pdf-container">
            <canvas id="pdfCanvas"></canvas>
            
            <div class="loading" id="loading">
                <h3>পিডিএফ লোড হচ্ছে...</h3>
            </div>
            
            <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
                <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept=".pdf" style="display: none;" onchange="loadPDF(this)">
                <h3>📁 পিডিএফ ফাইল আপলোড করুন</h3>
                <p>অথবা এখানে ড্র্যাগ করুন</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="thumbnails" id="thumbnails">
            <!-- থাম্বনেইল এখানে আসবে -->
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let pdfDoc = null;
        let pageNum = 1;
        let pageRendering = false;
        let pageNumPending = null;
        let scale = 1.0;
        let canvas = document.getElementById('pdfCanvas');
        let ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        function loadPDF(input) {
            const file = input.files[0];
            if (file && file.type === 'application/pdf') {
                document.getElementById('loading').classList.add('active');

                const fileReader = new FileReader();
                fileReader.onload = function() {
                    const typedarray = new Uint8Array(this.result);

                    // সিমুলেট পিডিএফ লোডিং
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        document.getElementById('loading').classList.remove('active');
                        document.querySelector('.upload-area').style.display = 'none';
                        document.getElementById('pageCount').textContent = '১০';
                        renderPage(1);
                    }, 1500);
                };
                fileReader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
            }
        }

        function renderPage(num) {
            pageRendering = true;

            canvas.width = 400 * scale;
            canvas.height = 600 * scale;

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.font = '20px Arial';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            ctx.fillText('পিডিএফ পৃষ্ঠা ' + num, 50, 100);

            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#f0f0f0';
                ctx.fillRect(50, 150 + i * 40, 300, 30);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#666';
                ctx.font = '14px Arial';
                ctx.fillText('লাইন ' + (i + 1) + ' - ডেমো টেক্সট', 60, 175 + i * 40);
            }

            pageRendering = false;
            if (pageNumPending !== null) {
                renderPage(pageNumPending);
                pageNumPending = null;
            }

            document.getElementById('pageInput').value = num;
        }

        function queueRenderPage(num) {
            if (pageRendering) {
                pageNumPending = num;
            } else {
                renderPage(num);
            }
        }

        function prevPage() {
            if (pageNum <= 1) return;
            pageNum--;
            queueRenderPage(pageNum);
        }

        function nextPage() {
            if (pageNum >= 10) return;
            pageNum++;
            queueRenderPage(pageNum);
        }

        function zoomIn() {
            scale += 0.1;
            renderPage(pageNum);
            document.getElementById('zoomLevel').textContent = Math.round(scale * 100) + '%';
        }

        function zoomOut() {
            if (scale > 0.5) {
                scale -= 0.1;
                renderPage(pageNum);
                document.getElementById('zoomLevel').textContent = Math.round(scale * 100) + '%';
            }
        }

        function openFile() {
            document.getElementById('fileInput').click();
        }

        function downloadPDF() {
            alert('পিডিএফ ডাউনলোড শুরু হবে...');
        }

        function printPDF() {
            alert('প্রিন্ট ডায়ালগ খোলা হবে...');
        }

        document.getElementById('pageInput').addEventListener('change', function() {
            let page = parseInt(this.value);
            if (page > 0 && page <= 10) {
                pageNum = page;
                queueRenderPage(pageNum);
            }
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১১৯: পিডিএফ এডিটর
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পিডিএফ এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .editor-layout {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .sidebar {
            width: 250px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .tool-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .tool-section h3 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: left;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .main-area {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .pdf-viewer {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            min-height: 600px;
            position: relative;
        }
        #pdfCanvas {
            width: 100%;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .properties-panel {
            width: 250px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .property-item {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .property-item label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .property-item input, .property-item select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .pages-list {
            margin-top: 20px;
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .page-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .page-number {
            width: 30px;
        }
        .page-thumb {
            width: 40px;
            height: 50px;
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>✏️ পিডিএফ এডিটর</h1>
        
        <div class="editor-layout">
            <div class="sidebar">
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>টুলস</h3>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🖱️ সিলেক্ট</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">✏️ টেক্সট যোগ</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🖼️ ইমেজ যোগ</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🔲 শেপ যোগ</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🖍️ হাইলাইট</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">📝 নোট যোগ</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="tool-section">
                    <h3>পৃষ্ঠা</h3>
                    <button class="tool-btn">➕ নতুন পৃষ্ঠা</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🗑️ পৃষ্ঠা মুছুন</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">🔄 ঘোরান</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn">✂️ ক্রপ</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="pages-list">
                    <div class="page-item">
                        <span class="page-number">১</span>
                        <div class="page-thumb"></div>
                        <span>পৃষ্ঠা ১</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="page-item">
                        <span class="page-number">২</span>
                        <div class="page-thumb"></div>
                        <span>পৃষ্ঠা ২</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="page-item">
                        <span class="page-number">৩</span>
                        <div class="page-thumb"></div>
                        <span>পৃষ্ঠা ৩</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="main-area">
                <div class="toolbar">
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">📂 ওপেন</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">💾 সেভ</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">↩️ আন্ডু</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">↪️ রিডু</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">🔍 জুম ইন</button>
                    <button class="tool-btn" style="width: auto;">🔍 জুম আউট</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="pdf-viewer">
                    <canvas id="pdfCanvas" width="600" height="800"></canvas>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="properties-panel">
                <h3>প্রপার্টি</h3>
                <div class="property-item">
                    <label>ফন্ট</label>
                    <select>
                        <option>Arial</option>
                        <option>Times New Roman</option>
                        <option>Courier New</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="property-item">
                    <label>আকার</label>
                    <input type="number" value="12">
                </div>
                <div class="property-item">
                    <label>রঙ</label>
                    <input type="color" value="#000000">
                </div>
                <div class="property-item">
                    <label>অপাসিটি</label>
                    <input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="100">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('pdfCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        // ডেমো কন্টেন্ট
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f9f9f9';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.font = 'bold 24px Arial';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
        ctx.fillText('পিডিএফ এডিটর ডেমো', 50, 100);

        ctx.font = '16px Arial';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#666';
        ctx.fillText('এটি একটি ডেমো পিডিএফ ফাইল।', 50, 150);
        ctx.fillText('আপনি এখানে টেক্সট, ইমেজ এবং শেপ যোগ করতে পারেন।', 50, 180);

        // টেবিল
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ccc';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            ctx.strokeRect(50, 250 + i * 40, 500, 40);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#666';
            ctx.font = '14px Arial';
            ctx.fillText('সেল ' + (i + 1), 60, 280 + i * 40);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২০: ডকুমেন্ট এডিটর
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ডকুমেন্ট এডিটর</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .menu-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .menu {
            position: relative;
        }
        .menu-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .menu-content {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            background: white;
            min-width: 150px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            border-radius: 5px;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .menu:hover .menu-content {
            display: block;
        }
        .menu-item {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .menu-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tool-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .document-area {
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 40px;
            min-height: 600px;
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        #documentEditor {
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 500px;
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1.8;
            resize: vertical;
        }
        
        .status-bar {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .ruler {
            height: 30px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            position: relative;
        }
        .ruler-mark {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 1px;
            height: 10px;
            background: #ccc;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 ডকুমেন্ট এডিটর</h1>
        
        <div class="menu-bar">
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">ফাইল</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item">নতুন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">ওপেন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">সেভ</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">সেভ এজ</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">প্রিন্ট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">এডিট</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item">আন্ডু</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">রিডু</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">কাট</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">কপি</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">পেস্ট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">ভিউ</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item">জুম ইন</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">জুম আউট</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">ফুল স্ক্রিন</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="menu">
                <button class="menu-btn">ইনসার্ট</button>
                <div class="menu-content">
                    <div class="menu-item">ছবি</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">টেবিল</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">লিংক</div>
                    <div class="menu-item">কমেন্ট</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <div class="tool-group">
                <select style="padding: 5px;">
                    <option>Arial</option>
                    <option>Times New Roman</option>
                    <option>Courier New</option>
                </select>
                <select style="padding: 5px;">
                    <option>১২</option>
                    <option>১৪</option>
                    <option>১৬</option>
                    <option>১৮</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn">B</button>
                <button class="tool-btn">I</button>
                <button class="tool-btn">U</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn">⬅️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn">⏺️</button>
                <button class="tool-btn">➡️</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="tool-btn">•</button>
                <button class="tool-btn">১.</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="ruler">
            <!-- রুলার মার্ক -->
        </div>
        
        <div class="document-area">
            <div id="documentEditor" contenteditable="true">
                <h1>ডকুমেন্টের শিরোনাম</h1>
                <p>এটি একটি নমুনা ডকুমেন্ট। আপনি এখানে টাইপ করতে পারেন এবং বিভিন্ন ফরম্যাটিং অপশন ব্যবহার করতে পারেন।</p>
                <p><strong>বোল্ড টেক্সট</strong> এবং <em>ইটালিক টেক্সট</em> উদাহরণ।</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>প্রথম আইটেম</li>
                    <li>দ্বিতীয় আইটেম</li>
                    <li>তৃতীয় আইটেম</li>
                </ul>
                <p>আপনি <a href="#">লিংক</a> ও যোগ করতে পারেন।</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="status-bar">
            <span>পৃষ্ঠা ১</span>
            <span>শব্দ: ১৫০ | অক্ষর: ৮৫০</span>
            <span>জুম: ১০০%</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const editor = document.getElementById('documentEditor');

        editor.addEventListener('input', function() {
            const text = this.innerText;
            const words = text.trim() ? text.trim().split(/\s+/).length : 0;
            const chars = text.length;

            document.querySelector('.status-bar span:nth-child(2)').textContent =
                `শব্দ: ${words} | অক্ষর: ${chars}`;
        });

        // সেভ ফাংশন
        function saveDocument() {
            const content = editor.innerHTML;
            localStorage.setItem('document', content);
            alert('ডকুমেন্ট সেভ করা হয়েছে!');
        }

        // লোড ফাংশন
        function loadDocument() {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem('document');
            if (saved) {
                editor.innerHTML = saved;
            }
        }

        loadDocument();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২১: স্প্রেডশিট
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>স্প্রেডশিট</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .formula-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .cell-address {
            width: 80px;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .formula-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .spreadsheet-container {
            overflow-x: auto;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .spreadsheet {
            display: inline-block;
            min-width: 100%;
        }
        .row {
            display: flex;
        }
        .row-header {
            width: 50px;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .col-header {
            min-width: 100px;
            padding: 8px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .cell {
            min-width: 100px;
            padding: 8px;
            border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            outline: none;
        }
        .cell.selected {
            background: #e8f0fe;
            border: 2px solid #43e97b;
        }
        
        .sheet-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .sheet-tab {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .sheet-tab.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .functions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .function-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .function-btn:hover {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 স্প্রেডশিট</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="function-btn">B</button>
            <button class="function-btn">I</button>
            <button class="function-btn">U</button>
            <select style="padding: 5px;">
                <option>জেনারেল</option>
                <option>সংখ্যা</option>
                <option>মুদ্রা</option>
                <option>শতাংশ</option>
            </select>
            <button class="function-btn">↔️ সাজান</button>
            <button class="function-btn">🔍 ফিল্টার</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="formula-bar">
            <div class="cell-address" id="currentCell">A1</div>
            <input type="text" class="formula-input" id="formulaInput" placeholder="ফর্মুলা লিখুন...">
        </div>
        
        <div class="spreadsheet-container">
            <div class="spreadsheet" id="spreadsheet"></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="sheet-tabs">
            <button class="sheet-tab active">Sheet1</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">Sheet2</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">Sheet3</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">+</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="functions">
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('SUM')">SUM</button>
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('AVERAGE')">AVERAGE</button>
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('COUNT')">COUNT</button>
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('MAX')">MAX</button>
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('MIN')">MIN</button>
            <button class="function-btn" onclick="insertFunction('IF')">IF</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const rows = 20;
        const cols = 10;
        let selectedRow = 0;
        let selectedCol = 0;

        function createSpreadsheet() {
            const spreadsheet = document.getElementById('spreadsheet');

            // কলাম হেডার
            const headerRow = document.createElement('div');
            headerRow.className = 'row';

            const cornerCell = document.createElement('div');
            cornerCell.className = 'row-header';
            cornerCell.textContent = '';
            headerRow.appendChild(cornerCell);

            for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
                const colHeader = document.createElement('div');
                colHeader.className = 'col-header';
                colHeader.textContent = String.fromCharCode(65 + c);
                headerRow.appendChild(colHeader);
            }
            spreadsheet.appendChild(headerRow);

            // ডাটা রো
            for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
                const row = document.createElement('div');
                row.className = 'row';

                const rowHeader = document.createElement('div');
                rowHeader.className = 'row-header';
                rowHeader.textContent = r + 1;
                row.appendChild(rowHeader);

                for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
                    const cell = document.createElement('div');
                    cell.className = 'cell';
                    cell.contentEditable = true;
                    cell.dataset.row = r;
                    cell.dataset.col = c;
                    cell.id = `${String.fromCharCode(65 + c)}${r + 1}`;

                    cell.addEventListener('focus', () => selectCell(r, c));
                    cell.addEventListener('input', () => updateFormulaBar(r, c));

                    row.appendChild(cell);
                }
                spreadsheet.appendChild(row);
            }
        }

        function selectCell(row, col) {
            selectedRow = row;
            selectedCol = col;

            document.querySelectorAll('.cell').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
            const cellId = `${String.fromCharCode(65 + col)}${row + 1}`;
            document.getElementById(cellId).classList.add('selected');
            document.getElementById('currentCell').textContent = cellId;

            const cell = document.getElementById(cellId);
            document.getElementById('formulaInput').value = cell.textContent;
        }

        function updateFormulaBar(row, col) {
            const cellId = `${String.fromCharCode(65 + col)}${row + 1}`;
            const cell = document.getElementById(cellId);
            document.getElementById('formulaInput').value = cell.textContent;
        }

        function insertFunction(func) {
            const input = document.getElementById('formulaInput');
            input.value = `=${func}()`;
            input.focus();
        }

        createSpreadsheet();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২২: গুগল শীট ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>গুগল শীট ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .menu-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .menu-item {
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 5px 10px;
        }
        .menu-item:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tool-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .formula-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .function-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .cell-range {
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .spreadsheet-wrapper {
            overflow: auto;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            max-height: 600px;
        }
        table {
            border-collapse: collapse;
            min-width: 100%;
        }
        td, th {
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            padding: 8px;
            min-width: 100px;
        }
        th {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        td:focus {
            outline: 2px solid #ff6b6b;
            background: #fff5f5;
        }
        
        .sheet-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .sheet-tab {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .sheet-tab.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .chart-sidebar {
            position: fixed;
            right: -300px;
            top: 0;
            width: 300px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: white;
            box-shadow: -2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: right 0.3s;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .chart-sidebar.open {
            right: 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📗 গুগল শীট ক্লোন</h1>
        
        <div class="menu-bar">
            <span class="menu-item">ফাইল</span>
            <span class="menu-item">এডিট</span>
            <span class="menu-item">ভিউ</span>
            <span class="menu-item">ইনসার্ট</span>
            <span class="menu-item">ফরম্যাট</span>
            <span class="menu-item">ডাটা</span>
            <span class="menu-item">টুলস</span>
            <span class="menu-item">এক্সটেনশন</span>
            <span class="menu-item">হেল্প</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="function-btn">🔄</button>
                <button class="function-btn">↩️</button>
                <button class="function-btn">↪️</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <select style="padding: 5px;">
                    <option>Arial</option>
                    <option>Calibri</option>
                    <option>Roboto</option>
                </select>
                <select style="padding: 5px;">
                    <option>১০</option>
                    <option>১১</option>
                    <option>১২</option>
                    <option>১৪</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="function-btn">B</button>
                <button class="function-btn">I</button>
                <button class="function-btn">U</button>
                <button class="function-btn">S</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-group">
                <button class="function-btn">⬅️</button>
                <button class="function-btn">⏺️</button>
                <button class="function-btn">➡️</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="formula-container">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                <span class="function-btn">fx</span>
                <span class="cell-range" id="selectedRange">A1</span>
            </div>
            <input type="text" style="flex: 1; padding: 8px;" placeholder="ফর্মুলা লিখুন...">
        </div>
        
        <div class="spreadsheet-wrapper">
            <table id="spreadsheet" contenteditable="true">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th></th>
                        <th>A</th>
                        <th>B</th>
                        <th>C</th>
                        <th>D</th>
                        <th>E</th>
                        <th>F</th>
                        <th>G</th>
                        <th>H</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <tr>
                        <th>১</th>
                        <td>নাম</td>
                        <td>বয়স</td>
                        <td>শহর</td>
                        <td>বেতন</td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th>২</th>
                        <td>রহিম</td>
                        <td>২৫</td>
                        <td>ঢাকা</td>
                        <td>২৫০০০</td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th>৩</th>
                        <td>করিম</td>
                        <td>৩০</td>
                        <td>চট্টগ্রাম</td>
                        <td>৩০০০০</td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th>৪</th>
                        <td>ফাতেমা</td>
                        <td>২৮</td>
                        <td>সিলেট</td>
                        <td>২৮০০০</td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                        <td></td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        
        <div class="sheet-tabs">
            <button class="sheet-tab active">Sheet1</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">Sheet2</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">Sheet3</button>
            <button class="sheet-tab">+</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const table = document.getElementById('spreadsheet');
        const cells = table.querySelectorAll('td');

        cells.forEach(cell => {
            cell.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                document.getElementById('selectedRange').textContent = 'সিলেক্টেড সেল';
            });
        });

        // সেল ফরম্যাটিং
        function formatCell(command) {
            document.execCommand(command, false, null);
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৩: ফর্ম বিল্ডার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফর্ম বিল্ডার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .builder-layout {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .components-panel {
            width: 250px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .component-item {
            padding: 12px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            cursor: move;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .component-item:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border-color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .canvas-area {
            flex: 1;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            min-height: 500px;
        }
        .form-preview {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            min-height: 400px;
        }
        .form-element {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .form-element:hover {
            border-color: #667eea;
        }
        .form-element.selected {
            border-color: #43e97b;
            background: #f0fff0;
        }
        .element-label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .element-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .properties-panel {
            width: 250px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .property-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .property-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .property-group input,
        .property-group select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        .preview-btn {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 30px;
            right: 30px;
            padding: 15px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50px;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🛠️ ফর্ম বিল্ডার</h1>
        
        <div class="builder-layout">
            <div class="components-panel">
                <h3>কম্পোনেন্ট</h3>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="text">📝 টেক্সট ইনপুট</div>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="textarea">📄 টেক্সট এরিয়া</div>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="select">📋 ড্রপডাউন</div>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="checkbox">✅ চেকবক্স</div>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="radio">🔘 রেডিও</div>
                <div class="component-item" draggable="true" ondragstart="drag(event)" data-type="button">🔘 বাটন</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="canvas-area" id="canvas" ondragover="allowDrop(event)" ondrop="drop(event)">
                <div class="form-preview" id="formPreview">
                    <div class="form-element">
                        <label class="element-label">নাম</label>
                        <input type="text" class="element-input" placeholder="আপনার নাম লিখুন">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-element">
                        <label class="element-label">ইমেইল</label>
                        <input type="email" class="element-input" placeholder="ইমেইল">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-element">
                        <label class="element-label">বার্তা</label>
                        <textarea class="element-input" rows="4" placeholder="আপনার বার্তা"></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-element">
                        <button class="element-input" style="background: #667eea; color: white;">পাঠান</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="properties-panel">
                <h3>প্রপার্টি</h3>
                <div class="property-group">
                    <label>লেবেল</label>
                    <input type="text" value="নাম">
                </div>
                <div class="property-group">
                    <label>প্লেসহোল্ডার</label>
                    <input type="text" value="আপনার নাম লিখুন">
                </div>
                <div class="property-group">
                    <label>রিকোয়ার্ড</label>
                    <input type="checkbox" checked>
                </div>
                <div class="property-group">
                    <label>সাইজ</label>
                    <select>
                        <option>ছোট</option>
                        <option selected>মাঝারি</option>
                        <option>বড়</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <button class="preview-btn" onclick="previewForm()">🔍 প্রিভিউ</button>
    </div>

    <script>
        function allowDrop(ev) {
            ev.preventDefault();
        }

        function drag(ev) {
            ev.dataTransfer.setData("text", ev.target.dataset.type);
        }

        function drop(ev) {
            ev.preventDefault();
            const type = ev.dataTransfer.getData("text");
            const canvas = document.getElementById('formPreview');

            let element = '';
            switch(type) {
                case 'text':
                    element = `
                        <div class="form-element">
                            <label class="element-label">নতুন টেক্সট ফিল্ড</label>
                            <input type="text" class="element-input" placeholder="টেক্সট লিখুন">
                        </div>
                    `;
                    break;
                case 'textarea':
                    element = `
                        <div class="form-element">
                            <label class="element-label">নতুন টেক্সট এরিয়া</label>
                            <textarea class="element-input" rows="4" placeholder="টেক্সট লিখুন"></textarea>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    break;
                case 'select':
                    element = `
                        <div class="form-element">
                            <label class="element-label">নতুন ড্রপডাউন</label>
                            <select class="element-input">
                                <option>অপশন ১</option>
                                <option>অপশন ২</option>
                                <option>অপশন ৩</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    break;
                case 'checkbox':
                    element = `
                        <div class="form-element">
                            <label>
                                <input type="checkbox"> নতুন চেকবক্স
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    break;
                case 'button':
                    element = `
                        <div class="form-element">
                            <button class="element-input" style="background: #43e97b; color: white;">নতুন বাটন</button>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    break;
            }

            canvas.innerHTML += element;
        }

        function previewForm() {
            alert('ফর্ম প্রিভিউ মোডে দেখা যাচ্ছে!');
        }

        // এলিমেন্ট সিলেক্ট
        document.querySelectorAll('.form-element').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.form-element').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('selected'));
                this.classList.add('selected');
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৪: সার্ভে অ্যাপ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সার্ভে অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .survey-header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }
        .survey-title {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .survey-desc {
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .question {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .question-number {
            color: #43e97b;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .question-text {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .options {
            margin-left: 20px;
        }
        .option {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .option input {
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        
        .progress-bar {
            height: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin: 30px 0;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #43e97b, #38f9d7);
            border-radius: 5px;
            width: 0%;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .nav-buttons {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }
        .nav-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .prev-btn {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            color: #666;
        }
        .next-btn {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .submit-btn {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .survey-result {
            display: none;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .result-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }
        .thank-you {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #43e97b;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <div id="surveySection">
            <div class="survey-header">
                <div class="survey-title">গ্রাহক সন্তুষ্টি জরিপ</div>
                <div class="survey-desc">আমাদের সেবা সম্পর্কে আপনার মতামত জানান</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="progress-bar">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill" style="width: 25%"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="question" id="question1">
                <div class="question-number">প্রশ্ন ১/৪</div>
                <div class="question-text">আপনি আমাদের সেবা নিয়ে কতটুকু সন্তুষ্ট?</div>
                <div class="options">
                    <div class="option">
                        <input type="radio" name="q1" value="5"> অত্যন্ত সন্তুষ্ট
                    </div>
                    <div class="option">
                        <input type="radio" name="q1" value="4"> সন্তুষ্ট
                    </div>
                    <div class="option">
                        <input type="radio" name="q1" value="3"> নিরপেক্ষ
                    </div>
                    <div class="option">
                        <input type="radio" name="q1" value="2"> অসন্তুষ্ট
                    </div>
                    <div class="option">
                        <input type="radio" name="q1" value="1"> অত্যন্ত অসন্তুষ্ট
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="nav-buttons">
                <button class="nav-btn prev-btn" disabled>পূর্ববর্তী</button>
                <button class="nav-btn next-btn" onclick="nextQuestion()">পরবর্তী</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="survey-result" id="resultSection">
            <div class="result-card">
                <div class="thank-you">🎉 ধন্যবাদ!</div>
                <p>আপনার মতামত আমাদের কাছে খুবই মূল্যবান।</p>
                <p>আপনার রেসপন্স সফলভাবে জমা হয়েছে।</p>
                <button class="nav-btn submit-btn" style="margin-top: 30px;" onclick="restartSurvey()">আবার শুরু করুন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentQuestion = 1;
        const totalQuestions = 4;

        function nextQuestion() {
            if (currentQuestion < totalQuestions) {
                currentQuestion++;
                updateQuestion();
            } else {
                submitSurvey();
            }
        }

        function prevQuestion() {
            if (currentQuestion > 1) {
                currentQuestion--;
                updateQuestion();
            }
        }

        function updateQuestion() {
            const progress = (currentQuestion / totalQuestions) * 100;
            document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = progress + '%';

            // বাটন স্টেট আপডেট
            document.querySelector('.prev-btn').disabled = currentQuestion === 1;

            if (currentQuestion === totalQuestions) {
                document.querySelector('.next-btn').textContent = 'জমা দিন';
            } else {
                document.querySelector('.next-btn').textContent = 'পরবর্তী';
            }

            // এখানে প্রশ্ন আপডেট করার লজিক যোগ করুন
        }

        function submitSurvey() {
            document.getElementById('surveySection').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('resultSection').style.display = 'block';
        }

        function restartSurvey() {
            currentQuestion = 1;
            document.getElementById('surveySection').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('resultSection').style.display = 'none';
            updateQuestion();
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ১২৫: পোল অ্যাপ (সম্পূর্ণ)
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পোল অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .create-poll {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .create-poll h3 {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .poll-input {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .poll-input input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .option-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .option-row input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .add-option {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .create-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }
        
        .poll-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .poll-question {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .poll-option {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .option-text {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 30px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e8e);
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        .vote-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .total-votes {
            margin-top: 10px;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .poll-filters {
