            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .filter-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 পোল অ্যাপ</h1>
        
        <div class="create-poll" id="createPollSection">
            <h3>নতুন পোল তৈরি করুন</h3>
            <div class="poll-input">
                <input type="text" id="pollQuestion" placeholder="পোলের প্রশ্ন লিখুন">
            </div>
            <div id="optionsContainer">
                <div class="option-row">
                    <input type="text" id="option1" placeholder="অপশন ১">
                </div>
                <div class="option-row">
                    <input type="text" id="option2" placeholder="অপশন ২">
                </div>
            </div>
            <button class="add-option" onclick="addOption()">+ আরও অপশন</button>
            <button class="create-btn" onclick="createPoll()">পোল তৈরি করুন</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="poll-filters">
            <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterPolls('all')">সব</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPolls('active')">সক্রিয়</button>
            <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPolls('closed')">বন্ধ</button>
        </div>
        
        <div id="pollsContainer"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let polls = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('polls')) || [
            {
                id: 1,
                question: 'আপনার প্রিয় প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা কোনটি?',
                options: ['জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট', 'পাইথন', 'জাভা', 'সি++'],
                votes: [45, 30, 15, 10],
                active: true,
                created: '২০২৪-০৩-১৫'
            },
            {
                id: 2,
                question: 'আপনি কোন ওএস ব্যবহার করেন?',
                options: ['উইন্ডোজ', 'ম্যাকওএস', 'লিনাক্স'],
                votes: [60, 25, 15],
                active: true,
                created: '২০২৪-০৩-১৪'
            }
        ];

        function renderPolls() {
            const container = document.getElementById('pollsContainer');
            container.innerHTML = polls.map(poll => {
                const totalVotes = poll.votes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

                return `
                    <div class="poll-card">
                        <div class="poll-question">${poll.question}</div>
                        ${poll.options.map((opt, index) => {
                            const percentage = totalVotes > 0 ? (poll.votes[index] / totalVotes * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;
                            return `
                                <div class="poll-option">
                                    <div class="option-text">
                                        <span>${opt}</span>
                                        <span>${poll.votes[index]} ভোট (${percentage}%)</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="progress-bar">
                                        <div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${percentage}%"></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `;
                        }).join('')}
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                            <span class="total-votes">মোট ভোট: ${totalVotes}</span>
                            <button class="vote-btn" onclick="votePoll(${poll.id})">ভোট দিন</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        function addOption() {
            const container = document.getElementById('optionsContainer');
            const newRow = document.createElement('div');
            newRow.className = 'option-row';
            newRow.innerHTML = '<input type="text" placeholder="অপশন ' + (container.children.length + 1) + '">';
            container.appendChild(newRow);
        }

        function createPoll() {
            const question = document.getElementById('pollQuestion').value;
            const optionInputs = document.querySelectorAll('#optionsContainer input');
            const options = Array.from(optionInputs).map(input => input.value).filter(v => v);

            if (question && options.length >= 2) {
                const newPoll = {
                    id: Date.now(),
                    question: question,
                    options: options,
                    votes: new Array(options.length).fill(0),
                    active: true,
                    created: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
                };

                polls.push(newPoll);
                localStorage.setItem('polls', JSON.stringify(polls));
                renderPolls();

                // ফর্ম ক্লিয়ার
                document.getElementById('pollQuestion').value = '';
                document.getElementById('optionsContainer').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="option-row"><input type="text" placeholder="অপশন ১"></div>
                    <div class="option-row"><input type="text" placeholder="অপশন ২"></div>
                `;
            } else {
                alert('প্রশ্ন এবং কমপক্ষে ২টি অপশন দিন');
            }
        }

        function votePoll(id) {
            const poll = polls.find(p => p.id === id);
            if (poll && poll.active) {
                const options = poll.options.map((opt, index) => `${index + 1}. ${opt}`).join('\n');
                const choice = prompt(`আপনার ভোট দিন:\n${options}\n\nঅপশন নম্বর লিখুন:`);

                if (choice && !isNaN(choice) && choice > 0 && choice <= poll.options.length) {
                    poll.votes[choice - 1]++;
                    localStorage.setItem('polls', JSON.stringify(polls));
                    renderPolls();
                }
            }
        }

        function filterPolls(filter) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            // ফিল্টার লজিক এখানে
            renderPolls();
        }

        renderPolls();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৬: ভোটিং অ্যাপ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ভোটিং অ্যাপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .election-info {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .election-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .election-date {
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .candidates-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .candidate-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }
        .candidate-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .candidate-image {
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin: 0 auto 15px;
            background: #667eea;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-size: 40px;
        }
        .candidate-name {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .candidate-party {
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .vote-count {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .vote-btn {
            padding: 10px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .vote-btn:disabled {
            background: #ccc;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        
        .voting-status {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .status-message {
            color: #ff6b6b;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .results {
            margin-top: 30px;
        }
        .result-bar {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .result-label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .progress {
            height: 30px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🗳️ ভোটিং অ্যাপ</h1>
        
        <div class="election-info">
            <div class="election-title">ছাত্র সংসদ নির্বাচন ২০২৪</div>
            <div class="election-date">ভোটের তারিখ: ১৫ মার্চ ২০২৪</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="candidates-grid" id="candidatesGrid"></div>
        
        <div class="voting-status" id="votingStatus">
            <div class="status-message">আপনি এখনও ভোট দেননি</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="results" id="results"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let candidates = [
            { id: 1, name: 'রহিম মিয়া', party: 'ছাত্রলীগ', votes: 450, color: '#ff6b6b' },
            { id: 2, name: 'করিম হোসেন', party: 'ছাত্রদল', votes: 380, color: '#667eea' },
            { id: 3, name: 'ফাতেমা বেগম', party: 'স্বতন্ত্র', votes: 220, color: '#43e97b' }
        ];

        let hasVoted = localStorage.getItem('hasVoted') === 'true';

        function renderCandidates() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('candidatesGrid');
            grid.innerHTML = candidates.map(c => `
                <div class="candidate-card">
                    <div class="candidate-image">${c.name[0]}</div>
                    <div class="candidate-name">${c.name}</div>
                    <div class="candidate-party">${c.party}</div>
                    <div class="vote-count">${c.votes} ভোট</div>
                    <button class="vote-btn" onclick="vote(${c.id})" ${hasVoted ? 'disabled' : ''}>ভোট দিন</button>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            updateStatus();
            renderResults();
        }

        function vote(candidateId) {
            if (!hasVoted) {
                const candidate = candidates.find(c => c.id === candidateId);
                if (candidate) {
                    candidate.votes++;
                    hasVoted = true;
                    localStorage.setItem('hasVoted', 'true');
                    renderCandidates();
                }
            }
        }

        function updateStatus() {
            const status = document.getElementById('votingStatus');
            if (hasVoted) {
                status.innerHTML = '<div class="status-message" style="color: #43e97b;">✅ আপনার ভোট সফলভাবে জমা হয়েছে</div>';
            } else {
                status.innerHTML = '<div class="status-message">আপনার ভোট দিন উপরের যেকোনো প্রার্থীকে</div>';
            }
        }

        function renderResults() {
            const totalVotes = candidates.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.votes, 0);
            const results = document.getElementById('results');

            results.innerHTML = '<h3>ফলাফল</h3>' + candidates.map(c => {
                const percentage = totalVotes > 0 ? (c.votes / totalVotes * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;
                return `
                    <div class="result-bar">
                        <div class="result-label">
                            <span>${c.name} (${c.party})</span>
                            <span>${c.votes} ভোট (${percentage}%)</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress">
                            <div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${percentage}%; background: ${c.color};"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        renderCandidates();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৭: রিয়েল-টাইম পোল
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>রিয়েল-টাইম পোল</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .poll-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .live-badge {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 14px;
            animation: pulse 1.5s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.7; }
            100% { opacity: 1; }
        }
        
        .poll-question {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .options-container {
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }
        .option-item {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .option-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .vote-input {
            width: 60px;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .vote-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .results-panel {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .result-item {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .result-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 30px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #43e97b, #38f9d7);
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .total-votes {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .participants {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-top: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .participant-avatar {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="poll-header">
            <h1>📊 রিয়েল-টাইম পোল</h1>
            <span class="live-badge">🔴 লাইভ</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="poll-question">
            কোনটি আপনার প্রিয় প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা?
        </div>
        
        <div class="options-container" id="optionsContainer"></div>
        
        <div class="results-panel">
            <h3>লাইভ ফলাফল</h3>
            <div id="resultsContainer"></div>
            <div class="total-votes" id="totalVotes">মোট ভোট: ০</div>
            <div class="participants" id="participants"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let pollData = {
            question: 'কোনটি আপনার প্রিয় প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা?',
            options: [
                { id: 1, text: 'জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট', votes: 45 },
                { id: 2, text: 'পাইথন', votes: 32 },
                { id: 3, text: 'জাভা', votes: 23 },
                { id: 4, text: 'সি++', votes: 18 }
            ]
        };

        let participants = ['R', 'K', 'F', 'S', 'A', 'M', 'N'];
        let voteHistory = [];

        function renderOptions() {
            const container = document.getElementById('optionsContainer');
            container.innerHTML = pollData.options.map(opt => `
                <div class="option-item">
                    <div class="option-row">
                        <span style="flex: 1;">${opt.text}</span>
                        <input type="number" id="vote-${opt.id}" class="vote-input" min="1" max="10" value="1">
                        <button class="vote-btn" onclick="vote(${opt.id})">ভোট দিন</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function vote(optionId) {
            const input = document.getElementById(`vote-${optionId}`);
            const count = parseInt(input.value) || 1;

            const option = pollData.options.find(o => o.id === optionId);
            if (option) {
                option.votes += count;

                // ভোট ইতিহাস
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    voteHistory.push({
                        option: option.text,
                        timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString()
                    });
                }

                // নতুন পার্টিসিপ্যান্ট যোগ
                const randomChar = String.fromCharCode(65 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 26));
                participants.push(randomChar);

                renderResults();
                updateParticipants();
            }
        }

        function renderResults() {
            const container = document.getElementById('resultsContainer');
            const total = pollData.options.reduce((sum, opt) => sum + opt.votes, 0);

            container.innerHTML = pollData.options.map(opt => {
                const percentage = total > 0 ? (opt.votes / total * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;
                return `
                    <div class="result-item">
                        <div class="result-header">
                            <span>${opt.text}</span>
                            <span>${opt.votes} ভোট (${percentage}%)</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress-bar">
                            <div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${percentage}%"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');

            document.getElementById('totalVotes').textContent = `মোট ভোট: ${total}`;
        }

        function updateParticipants() {
            const container = document.getElementById('participants');
            container.innerHTML = participants.slice(-10).map(p => `
                <div class="participant-avatar">${p}</div>
            `).join('');
        }

        // সিমুলেট রিয়েল-টাইম আপডেট
        setInterval(() => {
            if (Math.random() > 0.7) {
                const randomOption = Math.floor(Math.random() * pollData.options.length);
                pollData.options[randomOption].votes++;

                const randomChar = String.fromCharCode(65 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 26));
                participants.push(randomChar);

                renderResults();
                updateParticipants();
            }
        }, 3000);

        renderOptions();
        renderResults();
        updateParticipants();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৮: লাইভ চ্যাট
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>লাইভ চ্যাট</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .chat-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
            border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
        }
        .online-count {
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 20px;
        }
        
        .messages-container {
            height: 400px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-left: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-right: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .message {
            display: flex;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s;
        }
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .message.sent {
            flex-direction: row-reverse;
        }
        .message-avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin: 0 10px;
        }
        .message-content {
            max-width: 70%;
        }
        .message-bubble {
            padding: 10px 15px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            background: white;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .message.sent .message-bubble {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .message-time {
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #999;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        .message.sent .message-time {
            text-align: right;
        }
        
        .typing-indicator {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            color: #666;
            font-style: italic;
        }
        
        .input-area {
            display: flex;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
        }
        .message-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-right: 10px;
        }
        .send-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .users-list {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }
        .user-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
        }
        .online-dot {
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            background: #43e97b;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>💬 লাইভ চ্যাট</h1>
        
        <div class="users-list" id="usersList"></div>
        
        <div class="chat-header">
            <span>সাধারণ চ্যাট</span>
            <span class="online-count" id="onlineCount">৫ জন অনলাইন</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="messages-container" id="messages"></div>
        
        <div class="typing-indicator" id="typingIndicator"></div>
        
        <div class="input-area">
            <input type="text" class="message-input" id="messageInput" placeholder="মেসেজ লিখুন..." onkeyup="checkTyping()">
            <button class="send-btn" onclick="sendMessage()">পাঠান</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let messages = [
            { user: 'রহিম', text: 'আসসালামু আলাইকুম', time: '১০:৩০', sent: false },
            { user: 'করিম', text: 'ওয়ালাইকুম আসসালাম', time: '১০:৩১', sent: true },
            { user: 'ফাতেমা', text: 'সবাই কেমন আছেন?', time: '১০:৩২', sent: false }
        ];

        let users = [
            { name: 'রহিম', online: true },
            { name: 'করিম', online: true },
            { name: 'ফাতেমা', online: true },
            { name: 'সুমন', online: false },
            { name: 'নাসরিন', online: true }
        ];

        let typingTimeout;

        function renderMessages() {
            const container = document.getElementById('messages');
            container.innerHTML = messages.map(m => `
                <div class="message ${m.sent ? 'sent' : ''}">
                    <img src="https://picsum.photos/40/40?random=${m.user}" alt="Avatar" class="message-avatar">
                    <div class="message-content">
                        <div class="message-bubble">${m.text}</div>
                        <div class="message-time">${m.user} • ${m.time}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
            container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
        }

        function renderUsers() {
            const container = document.getElementById('usersList');
            container.innerHTML = users.map(u => `
                <div class="user-item">
                    <span class="online-dot" style="background: ${u.online ? '#43e97b' : '#ccc'};"></span>
                    <span>${u.name}</span>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            const online = users.filter(u => u.online).length;
            document.getElementById('onlineCount').textContent = `${online} জন অনলাইন`;
        }

        function sendMessage() {
            const input = document.getElementById('messageInput');
            const text = input.value.trim();

            if (text) {
                messages.push({
                    user: 'আপনি',
                    text: text,
                    time: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('bn-BD', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }),
                    sent: true
                });

                renderMessages();
                input.value = '';

                // সিমুলেট রিপ্লাই
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const replies = ['ঠিক আছে', 'ধন্যবাদ', 'আপনিও ভালো থাকবেন'];
                    const randomReply = replies[Math.floor(Math.random() * replies.length)];

                    messages.push({
                        user: 'রহিম',
                        text: randomReply,
                        time: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('bn-BD', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }),
                        sent: false
                    });

                    renderMessages();
                }, 2000);
            }
        }

        function checkTyping() {
            const indicator = document.getElementById('typingIndicator');
            indicator.textContent = 'আপনি টাইপ করছেন...';

            clearTimeout(typingTimeout);
            typingTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                indicator.textContent = '';
            }, 1000);
        }

        // এন্টার চাপলে মেসেজ পাঠান
        document.getElementById('messageInput').addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                sendMessage();
            }
        });

        renderMessages();
        renderUsers();

        // সিমুলেট অনলাইন আপডেট
        setInterval(() => {
            users.forEach(u => {
                u.online = Math.random() > 0.3;
            });
            renderUsers();
        }, 10000);
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১২৯: ভিডিও কনফারেন্সিং
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ভিডিও কনফারেন্সিং</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .meeting-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .meeting-info {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .meeting-id {
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .video-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .video-container {
            position: relative;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
        }
        .video-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-size: 40px;
        }
        .participant-name {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 10px;
            left: 10px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            color: white;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .audio-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 50px;
        }
        .control-btn {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .control-btn:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .control-btn.audio {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .control-btn.video {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .control-btn.screen {
            background: #ff9800;
            color: white;
        }
        .control-btn.end {
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .chat-sidebar {
            position: fixed;
            right: -300px;
            top: 0;
            width: 300px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: white;
            box-shadow: -2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: right 0.3s;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .chat-sidebar.open {
            right: 0;
        }
        .chat-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .chat-messages {
            height: calc(100vh - 150px);
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .participants-list {
            position: fixed;
            left: -300px;
            top: 0;
            width: 300px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: white;
            box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: left 0.3s;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .participants-list.open {
            left: 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎥 ভিডিও কনফারেন্সিং</h1>
        
        <div class="meeting-header">
            <div class="meeting-info">
                <span class="meeting-id">মিটিং আইডি: abc-1234-xyz</span>
            </div>
            <button class="control-btn" style="width: auto; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px;" onclick="copyMeetingId()">কপি লিংক</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="video-grid">
            <div class="video-container">
                <div class="video-placeholder">👤</div>
                <span class="participant-name">আপনি</span>
                <span class="audio-indicator">🔊</span>
            </div>
            <div class="video-container">
                <div class="video-placeholder">👤</div>
                <span class="participant-name">রহিম মিয়া</span>
                <span class="audio-indicator">🔇</span>
            </div>
            <div class="video-container">
                <div class="video-placeholder">👤</div>
                <span class="participant-name">করিম হোসেন</span>
                <span class="audio-indicator">🔊</span>
            </div>
            <div class="video-container">
                <div class="video-placeholder">👤</div>
                <span class="participant-name">ফাতেমা বেগম</span>
                <span class="audio-indicator">🔊</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="control-btn audio" onclick="toggleAudio(this)">🎤</button>
            <button class="control-btn video" onclick="toggleVideo(this)">📹</button>
            <button class="control-btn screen" onclick="shareScreen()">🖥️</button>
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="toggleParticipants()">👥</button>
            <button class="control-btn" onclick="toggleChat()">💬</button>
            <button class="control-btn end" onclick="endCall()">📞</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="participants-list" id="participantsList">
        <h3>অংশগ্রহণকারী (৪)</h3>
        <div style="padding: 10px 0;">👤 আপনি</div>
        <div style="padding: 10px 0;">👤 রহিম মিয়া</div>
        <div style="padding: 10px 0;">👤 করিম হোসেন</div>
        <div style="padding: 10px 0;">👤 ফাতেমা বেগম</div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="chat-sidebar" id="chatSidebar">
        <div class="chat-header">
            <h3>চ্যাট</h3>
            <button onclick="toggleChat()">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="chat-messages"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function toggleAudio(btn) {
            btn.classList.toggle('audio');
            btn.style.background = btn.style.background === 'rgb(67, 233, 123)' ? '#ccc' : '#43e97b';
        }

        function toggleVideo(btn) {
            btn.classList.toggle('video');
            btn.style.background = btn.style.background === 'rgb(102, 126, 234)' ? '#ccc' : '#667eea';
        }

        function shareScreen() {
            alert('স্ক্রিন শেয়ারিং শুরু হচ্ছে...');
        }

        function toggleParticipants() {
            document.getElementById('participantsList').classList.toggle('open');
        }

        function toggleChat() {
            document.getElementById('chatSidebar').classList.toggle('open');
        }

        function endCall() {
            if (confirm('কল শেষ করতে চান?')) {
                alert('কল শেষ হয়েছে');
            }
        }

        function copyMeetingId() {
            navigator.clipboard.writeText('abc-1234-xyz');
            alert('মিটিং আইডি কপি হয়েছে!');
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৩০: স্ক্রিন শেয়ারিং
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>স্ক্রিন শেয়ারিং</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .sharing-area {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .screen-preview {
            flex: 2;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            position: relative;
        }
        #screenVideo {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: contain;
        }
        .preview-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            background: rgba(255,0,0,0.7);
            color: white;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .camera-preview {
            flex: 1;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            aspect-ratio: 4/3;
            position: relative;
        }
        #cameraVideo {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .control-btn {
            padding: 15px 30px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .start-btn {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .stop-btn {
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
        }
        .camera-btn {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .options {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .option-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .option-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .radio-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .participants {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .participant {
            text-align: center;
        }
        .participant-avatar {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🖥️ স্ক্রিন শেয়ারিং</h1>
        
        <div class="sharing-area">
            <div class="screen-preview">
                <video id="screenVideo" autoplay playsinline></video>
                <div class="preview-overlay">🔴 শেয়ারিং</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="camera-preview">
                <video id="cameraVideo" autoplay playsinline muted></video>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="control-btn start-btn" onclick="startSharing()">শুরু করুন</button>
            <button class="control-btn stop-btn" onclick="stopSharing()">বন্ধ করুন</button>
            <button class="control-btn camera-btn" onclick="toggleCamera()">ক্যামেরা</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="options">
            <div class="option-card">
                <div class="option-title">শেয়ার করার অপশন</div>
                <div class="radio-group">
                    <label><input type="radio" name="share" value="screen" checked> সম্পূর্ণ স্ক্রিন</label>
                    <label><input type="radio" name="share" value="window"> উইন্ডো</label>
                    <label><input type="radio" name="share" value="tab"> ট্যাব</label>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="option-card">
                <div class="option-title">অডিও অপশন</div>
                <div class="radio-group">
                    <label><input type="checkbox" id="shareAudio"> সিস্টেম অডিও</label>
                    <label><input type="checkbox" id="micAudio" checked> মাইক্রোফোন</label>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="participants">
            <div class="participant">
                <div class="participant-avatar">আ</div>
                <div>আপনি</div>
            </div>
            <div class="participant">
                <div class="participant-avatar">র</div>
                <div>রহিম</div>
            </div>
            <div class="participant">
                <div class="participant-avatar">ক</div>
                <div>করিম</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let screenStream;
        let cameraStream;
        let isSharing = false;
        let isCameraOn = false;

        const screenVideo = document.getElementById('screenVideo');
        const cameraVideo = document.getElementById('cameraVideo');

        async function startSharing() {
            try {
                const shareType = document.querySelector('input[name="share"]:checked').value;
                const includeAudio = document.getElementById('shareAudio').checked;

                const constraints = {
                    video: true,
                    audio: includeAudio
                };

                if (shareType === 'screen') {
                    screenStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia(constraints);
                } else {
                    screenStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints);
                }

                screenVideo.srcObject = screenStream;
                isSharing = true;

                screenStream.getVideoTracks()[0].onended = () => {
                    stopSharing();
                };

            } catch (err) {
                alert('স্ক্রিন শেয়ার করতে সমস্যা হয়েছে: ' + err.message);
            }
        }

        function stopSharing() {
            if (screenStream) {
                screenStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
                screenVideo.srcObject = null;
                isSharing = false;
            }
        }

        async function toggleCamera() {
            if (!isCameraOn) {
                try {
                    cameraStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true, audio: true });
                    cameraVideo.srcObject = cameraStream;
                    isCameraOn = true;
                    event.target.style.background = '#f44336';
                } catch (err) {
                    alert('ক্যামেরা চালু করতে সমস্যা হয়েছে');
                }
            } else {
                if (cameraStream) {
                    cameraStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
                    cameraVideo.srcObject = null;
                    isCameraOn = false;
                    event.target.style.background = '#667eea';
                }
            }
        }
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৩১: রিমোট ডেস্কটপ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>রিমোট ডেস্কটপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .connection-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .connection-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .connect-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .disconnect-btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .remote-screen {
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            position: relative;
        }
        #remoteScreen {
            width: 100%;
            height: 500px;
            object-fit: contain;
        }
        .connection-status {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .status-connected {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .status-disconnected {
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .remote-controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .control-group {
            background: white;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
        .control-group h4 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .key-btn {
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 2px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            min-width: 40px;
        }
        .key-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .file-transfer {
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .file-list {
            margin-top: 10px;
            max-height: 150px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        .file-item {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 8px;
            background: white;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🖥️ রিমোট ডেস্কটপ</h1>
        
        <div class="connection-bar">
            <input type="text" class="connection-input" placeholder="আইপি এড্রেস বা হোস্টনেম" value="192.168.1.100">
            <input type="text" class="connection-input" placeholder="পোর্ট" value="5900">
            <input type="password" class="connection-input" placeholder="পাসওয়ার্ড">
            <button class="connect-btn" onclick="connect()">সংযোগ</button>
            <button class="disconnect-btn" onclick="disconnect()">বিচ্ছিন্ন</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="remote-screen">
            <canvas id="remoteScreen" width="1024" height="500"></canvas>
            <div class="connection-status status-disconnected" id="connectionStatus">বিচ্ছিন্ন</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="remote-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <h4>মাউস নিয়ন্ত্রণ</h4>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 5px;">
                    <button class="key-btn">↖</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">↑</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">↗</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">←</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">⚫</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">→</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">↙</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">↓</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">↘</button>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top: 10px;">
                    <button class="key-btn" style="width: 100%;">ক্লিক</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group">
                <h4>কীবোর্ড</h4>
                <div>
                    <button class="key-btn">Ctrl</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">Alt</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">Shift</button>
                    <button class="key-btn">Win</button>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top: 10px;">
                    <button class="key-btn" style="width: 100%;">Enter</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group">
                <h4>সিস্টেম</h4>
                <div>
                    <button class="key-btn" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">Ctrl+Alt+Del</button>
                    <button class="key-btn" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px;">লক স্ক্রিন</button>
                    <button class="key-btn" style="width: 100%;">রিস্টার্ট</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="file-transfer">
            <h3>ফাইল ট্রান্সফার</h3>
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px;">
                <input type="file" multiple>
                <button class="connect-btn">আপলোড</button>
                <button class="disconnect-btn">ডাউনলোড</button>
            </div>
            <div class="file-list">
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span>document.pdf</span>
                    <span>২.৩ MB</span>
                </div>
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span>image.jpg</span>
                    <span>১.১ MB</span>
                </div>
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span>video.mp4</span>
                    <span>১৫.৭ MB</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('remoteScreen');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let isConnected = false;

        function connect() {
            isConnected = true;
            document.getElementById('connectionStatus').textContent = 'সংযুক্ত';
            document.getElementById('connectionStatus').className = 'connection-status status-connected';

            // সিমুলেট রিমোট স্ক্রিন
            drawRemoteScreen();
        }

        function disconnect() {
            isConnected = false;
            document.getElementById('connectionStatus').textContent = 'বিচ্ছিন্ন';
            document.getElementById('connectionStatus').className = 'connection-status status-disconnected';
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        }

        function drawRemoteScreen() {
            if (!isConnected) return;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            ctx.fillRect(50, 50, canvas.width - 100, 100);

            ctx.font = '24px Arial';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.fillText('রিমোট ডেস্কটপ সংযুক্ত', 100, 120);

            ctx.font = '14px Arial';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ccc';
            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                ctx.fillText('লাইন ' + (i + 1), 100, 200 + i * 30);
            }

            setTimeout(drawRemoteScreen, 1000);
        }

        drawRemoteScreen();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৩২: ক্লাউড স্টোরেজ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ক্লাউড স্টোরেজ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .storage-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .user-info {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        .user-avatar {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 24px;
        }
        
        .storage-stats {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .storage-bar {
            height: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin: 10px 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .storage-used {
            height: 100%;
            width: 35%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
        }
        .storage-details {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .quick-actions {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .action-btn {
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .action-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border-color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .file-browser {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .browser-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .path-nav {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .path-item {
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .path-item:hover {
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .file-list {
            padding: 15px;
        }
        .file-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .file-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        .file-icon {
            width: 30px;
            font-size: 20px;
            margin-right: 15px;
        }
        .file-info {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .file-name {
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .file-size {
            color: #666;
        }
        .file-date {
            color: #999;
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        .file-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .file-action {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 3px dashed #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>☁️ ক্লাউড স্টোরেজ</h1>
        
        <div class="storage-header">
            <div class="user-info">
                <div class="user-avatar">র</div>
                <div>
                    <h3>রহিম মিয়া</h3>
                    <p style="color: #666;">rahim@email.com</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <button class="action-btn" style="padding: 10px 20px;">আপগ্রেড</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="storage-stats">
            <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                <span><strong>১৫.৩ জিবি</strong> ব্যবহৃত</span>
                <span>মোট ৫০ জিবি</span>
            </div>
            <div class="storage-bar">
                <div class="storage-used"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="storage-details">
                <span>📷 ছবি: ৫.২ জিবি</span>
                <span>🎵 মিউজিক: ৩.১ জিবি</span>
                <span>🎥 ভিডিও: ৪.৮ জিবি</span>
                <span>📄 ডক: ২.২ জিবি</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="quick-actions">
            <div class="action-btn">📁 ফোল্ডার</div>
            <div class="action-btn">📄 ফাইল</div>
            <div class="action-btn">⬆️ আপলোড</div>
            <div class="action-btn">📥 ডাউনলোড</div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="file-browser">
            <div class="browser-header">
                <div class="path-nav">
                    <span class="path-item">মাই ড্রাইভ</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="path-item">ডকুমেন্টস</span>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <input type="text" placeholder="🔍 ফাইল খুঁজুন..." style="padding: 5px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 5px;">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="file-list">
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span class="file-icon">📁</span>
                    <div class="file-info">
                        <span class="file-name">প্রজেক্ট ফাইল</span>
                        <span class="file-size">—</span>
                        <span class="file-date">১৫ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="file-actions">
                        <button class="file-action">⬇️</button>
                        <button class="file-action">⋯</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span class="file-icon">📄</span>
                    <div class="file-info">
                        <span class="file-name">রিপোর্ট.পিডিএফ</span>
                        <span class="file-size">২.৩ এমবি</span>
                        <span class="file-date">১৪ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="file-actions">
                        <button class="file-action">⬇️</button>
                        <button class="file-action">⋯</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="file-item">
                    <span class="file-icon">🖼️</span>
                    <div class="file-info">
                        <span class="file-name">ছবি.jpg</span>
                        <span class="file-size">১.৫ এমবি</span>
                        <span class="file-date">১৩ মার্চ ২০২৪</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="file-actions">
                        <button class="file-action">⬇️</button>
                        <button class="file-action">⋯</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
            <input type="file" id="fileInput" multiple style="display: none;">
            <h3>📤 ফাইল আপলোড করুন</h3>
            <p>অথবা এখানে ড্র্যাগ করুন</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        document.getElementById('fileInput').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
            if (e.target.files.length > 0) {
                alert(`${e.target.files.length}টি ফাইল আপলোডের জন্য নির্বাচিত হয়েছে`);
            }
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৩৩: ফাইল ম্যানেজার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফাইল ম্যানেজার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .tool-btn {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .tool-btn:hover {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .path-bar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .path-item {
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .path-item:hover {
            color: #43e97b;
        }
        
        .file-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            min-height: 400px;
        }
        .file-item {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .file-item:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .file-item.selected {
            background: #e3f2fd;
            border: 2px solid #43e97b;
        }
        .file-icon {
            font-size: 48px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .file-name {
            font-size: 14px;
            word-break: break-word;
        }
        .file-size {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 12px;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }
        
        .details-panel {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .details-row {
            display: flex;
            padding: 8px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .details-label {
            width: 100px;
            color: #666;
        }
        .details-value {
            flex: 1;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📁 ফাইল ম্যানেজার</h1>
        
        <div class="toolbar">
            <button class="tool-btn">➕ নতুন ফোল্ডার</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">📄 নতুন ফাইল</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">⬆️ আপলোড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">📥 ডাউনলোড</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">✂️ কাট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">📋 কপি</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">📌 পেস্ট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">🗑️ ডিলিট</button>
            <button class="tool-btn">⟲ রিফ্রেশ</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="path-bar">
            <span class="path-item">🏠 হোম</span>
            <span>/</span>
            <span class="path-item">📁 ডকুমেন্টস</span>
            <span>/</span>
            <span class="path-item">📁 প্রজেক্ট</span>
        </div>
        
        <div class="file-grid">
            <div class="file-item">
                <div class="file-icon">📁</div>
                <div class="file-name">প্রজেক্ট ফাইল</div>
                <div class="file-size">—</div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item">
                <div class="file-icon">📁</div>
                <div class="file-name">ছবি</div>
                <div class="file-size">—</div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item selected">
                <div class="file-icon">📄</div>
                <div class="file-name">রিপোর্ট-২০২৪.পিডিএফ</div>
                <div class="file-size">২.৩ এমবি</div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item">
                <div class="file-icon">🖼️</div>
                <div class="file-name">প্রোফাইল.jpg</div>
                <div class="file-size">১.৫ এমবি</div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item">
                <div class="file-icon">📄</div>
                <div class="file-name">নোটস.টেক্সট</div>
                <div class="file-size">২৪ কেবি</div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item">
                <div class="file-icon">📊</div>
                <div class="file-name">ডাটা.এক্সএলএসএক্স</div>
                <div class="file-size">৩.১ এমবি</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="details-panel">
            <h3>বিবরণ</h3>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">নাম:</span>
                <span class="details-value">রিপোর্ট-২০২৪.পিডিএফ</span>
            </div>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">ধরন:</span>
                <span class="details-value">পিডিএফ ডকুমেন্ট</span>
            </div>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">আকার:</span>
                <span class="details-value">২.৩ এমবি (২,৩৪৫,৬৭৮ বাইট)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">অবস্থান:</span>
                <span class="details-value">/ডকুমেন্টস/প্রজেক্ট/</span>
            </div>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">সৃষ্টির তারিখ:</span>
                <span class="details-value">১৫ মার্চ ২০২৪, ১০:৩০ এএম</span>
            </div>
            <div class="details-row">
                <span class="details-label">পরিবর্তনের তারিখ:</span>
                <span class="details-value">১৬ মার্চ ২০২৪, ০২:৪৫ পিএম</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ফাইল আইটেম সিলেক্ট
        document.querySelectorAll('.file-item').forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelectorAll('.file-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
                this.classList.add('selected');
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৩৪: টাস্ক ম্যানেজার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>টাস্ক ম্যানেজার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .system-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .stat-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .stat-value {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .cpu-meter {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .meter-label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .progress-bar {
            height: 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e8e);
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .process-list {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .list-header {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 3fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .process-item {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 3fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            align-items: center;
        }
        .process-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        .process-name {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .process-icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: #ff6b6b;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .cpu-bar {
            width: 60px;
            height: 6px;
            background: #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 3px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .cpu-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .end-task {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background: #f44336;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📊 টাস্ক ম্যানেজার</h1>
        
        <div class="system-stats">
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div>সিপিইউ</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="cpuUsage">৪৫%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div>মেমোরি</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="memoryUsage">৬২%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div>ডিস্ক</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="diskUsage">৩৮%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div>নেটওয়ার্ক</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="networkUsage">২৩%</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="cpu-meter">
            <div class="meter-label">
                <span>সিপিইউ ব্যবহার</span>
                <span id="cpuDetail">৪৫% (২.৩ GHz)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="progress-bar">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="cpuBar" style="width: 45%"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="cpu-meter">
            <div class="meter-label">
                <span>মেমোরি ব্যবহার</span>
                <span id="memoryDetail">৬.২ জিবি / ১৬ জিবি</span>
            </div>
            <div class="progress-bar">
                <div class="progress-fill" id="memoryBar" style="width: 62%"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="process-list">
            <div class="list-header">
                <span>প্রসেস</span>
                <span>সিপিইউ</span>
                <span>মেমোরি</span>
                <span>ডিস্ক</span>
                <span></span>
            </div>
            
            <div id="processes"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let processes = [
            { name: 'সিস্টেম', cpu: 12, memory: 245, disk: 5, icon: '⚙️' },
            { name: 'ক্রোম', cpu: 25, memory: 512, disk: 2, icon: '🌐' },
            { name: 'ভিএস কোড', cpu: 8, memory: 380, disk: 1, icon: '📝' },
            { name: 'স্পটিফাই', cpu: 5, memory: 180, disk: 0, icon: '🎵' },
            { name: 'ডিসকর্ড', cpu: 4, memory: 210, disk: 1, icon: '💬' }
        ];

        function renderProcesses() {
            const container = document.getElementById('processes');
            container.innerHTML = processes.map(p => `
                <div class="process-item">
                    <div class="process-name">
                        <span class="process-icon" style="background: none; font-size: 20px;">${p.icon}</span>
                        <span>${p.name}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="cpu-bar">
                            <div class="cpu-fill" style="width: ${p.cpu}%"></div>
                        </div>
                        <span style="font-size: 12px;">${p.cpu}%</span>
                    </div>
                    <div>${p.memory} MB</div>
                    <div>${p.disk} MB/s</div>
                    <div><button class="end-task" onclick="endTask('${p.name}')">শেষ করুন</button></div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function endTask(name) {
            if (confirm(`"${name}" প্রসেসটি শেষ করতে চান?`)) {
                processes = processes.filter(p => p.name !== name);
                renderProcesses();
            }
        }

        // সিমুলেট রিয়েল-টাইম আপডেট
        setInterval(() => {
            processes.forEach(p => {
                p.cpu = Math.max(0, p.cpu + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10);
                p.memory = Math.max(0, p.memory + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50);
            });

            const totalCpu = processes.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.cpu, 0);
            const totalMemory = processes.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.memory, 0);

            document.getElementById('cpuUsage').textContent = Math.round(totalCpu) + '%';
            document.getElementById('memoryUsage').textContent = Math.round(totalMemory / 16384 * 100) + '%';
