        let ghosts = [
            { x: 100, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ff6b6b', dx: 1, dy: 0 },
            { x: 300, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#43e97b', dx: -1, dy: 0 },
            { x: 100, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#667eea', dx: 0, dy: 1 },
            { x: 300, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ffd700', dx: 0, dy: -1 }
        ];

        let dots = [];
        let score = 0;
        let lives = 3;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function initDots() {
            dots = [];
            for (let i = 30; i < 400; i += 30) {
                for (let j = 30; j < 400; j += 30) {
                    if (Math.random() > 0.2) {
                        dots.push({ x: i, y: j, radius: 3, active: true });
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 400);

            // মেজ আঁকা
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#00f';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(20, 20, 360, 360);

            // ডট আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            dots.forEach(dot => {
                if (dot.active) {
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(dot.x, dot.y, dot.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            });

            // প্যাক-ম্যান আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(pacman.x, pacman.y, pacman.radius,
                   pacman.mouth + pacman.direction,
                   2 * Math.PI - pacman.mouth + pacman.direction);
            ctx.lineTo(pacman.x, pacman.y);
            ctx.fill();

            // ঘোস্ট আঁকা
            ghosts.forEach(ghost => {
                ctx.fillStyle = ghost.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ghost.x, ghost.y, ghost.radius, 0, Math.PI, true);
                ctx.lineTo(ghost.x - ghost.radius, ghost.y + ghost.radius);
                ctx.lineTo(ghost.x + ghost.radius, ghost.y + ghost.radius);
                ctx.closePath();
                ctx.fill();

                // চোখ
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ghost.x - 4, ghost.y - 4, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ghost.x + 4, ghost.y - 4, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();

                ctx.fillStyle = 'black';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ghost.x - 5, ghost.y - 5, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(ghost.x + 3, ghost.y - 5, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            });
        }

        function update() {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            // প্যাক-ম্যান মুভ
            switch(pacman.direction) {
                case 0: pacman.x += 2; break;
                case Math.PI/2: pacman.y -= 2; break;
                case Math.PI: pacman.x -= 2; break;
                case 3*Math.PI/2: pacman.y += 2; break;
            }

            // সীমানা চেক
            if (pacman.x < 25) pacman.x = 375;
            if (pacman.x > 375) pacman.x = 25;
            if (pacman.y < 25) pacman.y = 375;
            if (pacman.y > 375) pacman.y = 25;

            // ডট খাওয়া
            dots.forEach(dot => {
                if (dot.active) {
                    const dist = Math.hypot(pacman.x - dot.x, pacman.y - dot.y);
                    if (dist < pacman.radius + dot.radius) {
                        dot.active = false;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                }
            });

            // ঘোস্ট মুভ
            ghosts.forEach(ghost => {
                ghost.x += ghost.dx * 1.5;
                ghost.y += ghost.dy * 1.5;

                // সীমানা চেক
                if (ghost.x < 25 || ghost.x > 375) ghost.dx *= -1;
                if (ghost.y < 25 || ghost.y > 375) ghost.dy *= -1;

                // কোলিশন চেক
                const dist = Math.hypot(pacman.x - ghost.x, pacman.y - ghost.y);
                if (dist < pacman.radius + ghost.radius) {
                    lives--;
                    document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                    if (lives <= 0) {
                        gameOver();
                    } else {
                        resetPositions();
                    }
                }
            });

            pacman.mouth = 0.2 + 0.1 * Math.sin(Date.now() / 100);
        }

        function resetPositions() {
            pacman.x = 200;
            pacman.y = 200;
            ghosts = [
                { x: 100, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ff6b6b', dx: 1, dy: 0 },
                { x: 300, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#43e97b', dx: -1, dy: 0 },
                { x: 100, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#667eea', dx: 0, dy: 1 },
                { x: 300, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ffd700', dx: 0, dy: -1 }
            ];
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(update, 50);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);

            pacman = { x: 200, y: 200, radius: 15, mouth: 0.2, direction: 0 };
            ghosts = [
                { x: 100, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ff6b6b', dx: 1, dy: 0 },
                { x: 300, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#43e97b', dx: -1, dy: 0 },
                { x: 100, y: 300, radius: 12, color: '#667eea', dx: 0, dy: 1 },
                { x: 300, y: 100, radius: 12, color: '#ffd700', dx: 0, dy: -1 }
            ];
            score = 0;
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            initDots();
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            switch(e.key) {
                case 'ArrowRight': pacman.direction = 0; break;
                case 'ArrowUp': pacman.direction = Math.PI/2; break;
                case 'ArrowLeft': pacman.direction = Math.PI; break;
                case 'ArrowDown': pacman.direction = 3*Math.PI/2; break;
            }
        });

        initDots();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৫৮: সুপার মারিও
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সুপার মারিও</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #43e97b;
        }
        .coins {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ffd700;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #43e97b;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>👨 সুপার মারিও</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="coins">🪙 <span id="coins">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let mario = {
            x: 100,
            y: 300,
            width: 30,
            height: 40,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            grounded: false
        };

        let platforms = [
            { x: 0, y: 340, width: 800, height: 60 },
            { x: 200, y: 280, width: 100, height: 20 },
            { x: 400, y: 240, width: 100, height: 20 },
            { x: 600, y: 200, width: 100, height: 20 }
        ];

        let coins = [
            { x: 250, y: 240, radius: 10, collected: false },
            { x: 450, y: 200, radius: 10, collected: false },
            { x: 650, y: 160, radius: 10, collected: false }
        ];

        let enemies = [
            { x: 300, y: 320, width: 30, height: 30, vx: 1, alive: true }
        ];

        let score = 0;
        let coinCount = 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let keys = {};

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // স্কাই
            ctx.fillStyle = '#87CEEB';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // ক্লাউড
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(100, 50, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(130, 70, 35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(70, 70, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, p.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#654321';
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, 5);
            });

            // কয়েন
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            coins.forEach(coin => {
                if (!coin.collected) {
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(coin.x, coin.y, coin.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    ctx.strokeStyle = '#b8860b';
                    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                    ctx.stroke();
                }
            });

            // শত্রু
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                if (enemy.alive) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x + 5, enemy.y + 5, 5, 5);
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x + 20, enemy.y + 5, 5, 5);
                }
            });

            // মারিও
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
            ctx.fillRect(mario.x, mario.y, mario.width, mario.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#654321';
            ctx.fillRect(mario.x + 5, mario.y + 10, 5, 5);
            ctx.fillRect(mario.x + 20, mario.y + 10, 5, 5);
        }

        function update() {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            // গ্র্যাভিটি
            mario.vy += 0.5;
            mario.y += mario.vy;

            // হরিজন্টাল মুভমেন্ট
            if (keys['ArrowRight']) mario.vx = 5;
            else if (keys['ArrowLeft']) mario.vx = -5;
            else mario.vx *= 0.8;

            mario.x += mario.vx;

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম কোলিশন
            mario.grounded = false;
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                if (mario.x < p.x + p.width &&
                    mario.x + mario.width > p.x &&
                    mario.y + mario.height > p.y &&
                    mario.y + mario.height < p.y + p.height + 10) {
                    mario.y = p.y - mario.height;
                    mario.vy = 0;
                    mario.grounded = true;
                }
            });

            // কয়েন সংগ্রহ
            coins.forEach(coin => {
                if (!coin.collected) {
                    const dist = Math.hypot(
                        (mario.x + mario.width/2) - coin.x,
                        (mario.y + mario.height/2) - coin.y
                    );
                    if (dist < 20) {
                        coin.collected = true;
                        coinCount++;
                        score += 100;
                        document.getElementById('coins').textContent = coinCount;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                }
            });

            // শত্রু আপডেট
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                if (enemy.alive) {
                    enemy.x += enemy.vx;

                    // সীমানা চেক
                    if (enemy.x < 200 || enemy.x > 700) enemy.vx *= -1;

                    // মারিওর সাথে কোলিশন
                    if (mario.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        mario.x + mario.width > enemy.x &&
                        mario.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        mario.y + mario.height > enemy.y) {

                        if (mario.vy > 0 && mario.y + mario.height < enemy.y + 10) {
                            enemy.alive = false;
                            score += 200;
                        } else {
                            resetGame();
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // স্ক্রিন লিমিট
            mario.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(770, mario.x));
        }

        function jump() {
            if (mario.grounded) {
                mario.vy = -10;
            }
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(update, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);

            mario = { x: 100, y: 300, width: 30, height: 40, vx: 0, vy: 0, grounded: false };
            coins.forEach(coin => coin.collected = false);
            enemies = [{ x: 300, y: 320, width: 30, height: 30, vx: 1, alive: true }];
            score = 0;
            coinCount = 0;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('coins').textContent = coinCount;
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = true;
            if (e.key === ' ') {
                e.preventDefault();
                jump();
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = false;
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৫৯: ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .moves {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .board {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 50px);
            gap: 5px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .cell {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .cell:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }
        .cell.selected {
            border: 3px solid #43e97b;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .candy1 { background: #ff6b6b; }
        .candy2 { background: #43e97b; }
        .candy3 { background: #667eea; }
        .candy4 { background: #ffd700; }
        .candy5 { background: #ff9800; }
        .candy6 { background: #9c27b0; }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🍬 ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="moves">চাল: <span id="moves">২০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="board" id="board"></div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">নতুন খেলা</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let board = [];
        let rows = 8;
        let cols = 8;
        let score = 0;
        let moves = 20;
        let selectedRow = -1;
        let selectedCol = -1;
        let gameActive = true;

        const candies = ['candy1', 'candy2', 'candy3', 'candy4', 'candy5', 'candy6'];

        function initBoard() {
            board = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                board[i] = [];
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    board[i][j] = Math.floor(Math.random() * candies.length);
                }
            }
            removeMatches();
        }

        function renderBoard() {
            const boardEl = document.getElementById('board');
            boardEl.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    const cell = document.createElement('div');
                    cell.className = `cell ${candies[board[i][j]]}`;
                    if (selectedRow === i && selectedCol === j) {
                        cell.classList.add('selected');
                    }
                    cell.addEventListener('click', () => handleCellClick(i, j));
                    boardEl.appendChild(cell);
                }
            }
        }

        function handleCellClick(row, col) {
            if (!gameActive || moves <= 0) return;

            if (selectedRow === -1) {
                selectedRow = row;
                selectedCol = col;
                renderBoard();
                return;
            }

            // চেক যদি সন্নিহিত সেল হয়
            if (Math.abs(selectedRow - row) + Math.abs(selectedCol - col) === 1) {
                swapCandies(selectedRow, selectedCol, row, col);
            }

            selectedRow = -1;
            selectedCol = -1;
            renderBoard();
        }

        function swapCandies(r1, c1, r2, c2) {
            // সোয়াপ
            [board[r1][c1], board[r2][c2]] = [board[r2][c2], board[r1][c1]];

            // চেক ম্যাচ
            if (checkMatches()) {
                moves--;
                document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves;
                removeMatches();
            } else {
                // সোয়াপ ফিরিয়ে দাও
                [board[r1][c1], board[r2][c2]] = [board[r2][c2], board[r1][c1]];
            }

            if (moves <= 0) {
                gameActive = false;
                alert('গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ' + score);
            }
        }

        function checkMatches() {
            let hasMatches = false;

            // হরিজন্টাল চেক
            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols - 2; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === board[i][j+1] && board[i][j] === board[i][j+2]) {
                        hasMatches = true;
                    }
                }
            }

            // ভার্টিক্যাল চেক
            for (let i = 0; i < rows - 2; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === board[i+1][j] && board[i][j] === board[i+2][j]) {
                        hasMatches = true;
                    }
                }
            }

            return hasMatches;
        }

        function removeMatches() {
            let matchesFound = true;

            while (matchesFound) {
                matchesFound = false;
                let matches = [];

                // হরিজন্টাল ম্যাচ
                for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < cols - 2; j++) {
                        if (board[i][j] === board[i][j+1] && board[i][j] === board[i][j+2]) {
                            let k = j;
                            while (k < cols && board[i][k] === board[i][j]) {
                                matches.push([i, k]);
                                k++;
                            }
                            matchesFound = true;
                        }
                    }
                }

                // ভার্টিক্যাল ম্যাচ
                for (let i = 0; i < rows - 2; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                        if (board[i][j] === board[i+1][j] && board[i][j] === board[i+2][j]) {
                            let k = i;
                            while (k < rows && board[k][j] === board[i][j]) {
                                matches.push([k, j]);
                                k++;
                            }
                            matchesFound = true;
                        }
                    }
                }

                // ম্যাচ মুছে ফেলা এবং স্কোর যোগ
                if (matchesFound) {
                    score += matches.length * 10;
                    document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;

                    matches.forEach(([r, c]) => {
                        board[r][c] = -1;
                    });

                    // ক্যান্ডি ফেলা
                    for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                        for (let i = rows - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            if (board[i][j] === -1) {
                                for (let k = i - 1; k >= 0; k--) {
                                    if (board[k][j] !== -1) {
                                        board[i][j] = board[k][j];
                                        board[k][j] = -1;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                                if (board[i][j] === -1) {
                                    board[i][j] = Math.floor(Math.random() * candies.length);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            renderBoard();
        }

        function resetGame() {
            score = 0;
            moves = 20;
            gameActive = true;
            selectedRow = -1;
            selectedCol = -1;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves;
            initBoard();
            renderBoard();
        }

        initBoard();
        renderBoard();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬০: টেট্রিস
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>টেট্রিস</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-area {
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .info-panel {
            width: 150px;
            text-align: left;
        }
        .next-piece {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .level {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="game-area">
            <h1>🧩 টেট্রিস</h1>
            <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="300" height="600"></canvas>
            <div class="controls">
                <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
                <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="info-panel">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="level">লেভেল: <span id="level">১</span></div>
            <div class="next-piece">
                <h3>পরবর্তী</h3>
                <canvas id="nextCanvas" width="120" height="120"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const nextCanvas = document.getElementById('nextCanvas');
        const nextCtx = nextCanvas.getContext('2d');

        const COLS = 10;
        const ROWS = 20;
        const BLOCK_SIZE = 30;

        let board = [];
        let score = 0;
        let level = 1;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        const PIECES = [
            // I
            [[1,1,1,1]],
            // O
            [[1,1],
             [1,1]],
            // T
            [[0,1,0],
             [1,1,1]],
            // S
            [[0,1,1],
             [1,1,0]],
            // Z
            [[1,1,0],
             [0,1,1]],
            // L
            [[1,0,0],
             [1,1,1]],
            // J
            [[0,0,1],
             [1,1,1]]
        ];

        const COLORS = [
            '#00f0f0', // I - সায়ান
            '#f0f000', // O - হলুদ
            '#a000f0', // T - বেগুনি
            '#00f000', // S - সবুজ
            '#f00000', // Z - লাল
            '#f0a000', // L - কমলা
            '#0000f0'  // J - নীল
        ];

        let currentPiece = null;
        let nextPiece = null;
        let currentX = 0;
        let currentY = 0;

        function initBoard() {
            board = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < ROWS; i++) {
                board[i] = [];
                for (let j = 0; j < COLS; j++) {
                    board[i][j] = 0;
                }
            }
        }

        function spawnPiece() {
            if (!nextPiece) {
                nextPiece = Math.floor(Math.random() * PIECES.length);
            }

            currentPiece = nextPiece;
            nextPiece = Math.floor(Math.random() * PIECES.length);

            currentX = Math.floor(COLS / 2) - Math.floor(PIECES[currentPiece][0].length / 2);
            currentY = 0;

            if (collision()) {
                gameOver();
            }

            drawNext();
        }

        function collision() {
            const piece = PIECES[currentPiece];
            for (let i = 0; i < piece.length; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < piece[i].length; j++) {
                    if (piece[i][j]) {
                        const x = currentX + j;
                        const y = currentY + i;

                        if (x < 0 || x >= COLS || y >= ROWS || (y >= 0 && board[y][x])) {
                            return true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        function mergePiece() {
            const piece = PIECES[currentPiece];
            for (let i = 0; i < piece.length; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < piece[i].length; j++) {
                    if (piece[i][j]) {
                        const x = currentX + j;
                        const y = currentY + i;
                        if (y >= 0) {
                            board[y][x] = currentPiece + 1;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            clearLines();
            spawnPiece();
        }

        function clearLines() {
            let linesCleared = 0;

            for (let i = ROWS - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (board[i].every(cell => cell !== 0)) {
                    // লাইন সরান
                    for (let j = i; j > 0; j--) {
                        board[j] = [...board[j-1]];
                    }
                    board[0] = new Array(COLS).fill(0);
                    linesCleared++;
                    i++;
                }
            }

            if (linesCleared > 0) {
                score += linesCleared * 100 * level;
                level = Math.floor(score / 1000) + 1;
                document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                document.getElementById('level').textContent = level;
            }
        }

        function moveLeft() {
            currentX--;
            if (collision()) {
                currentX++;
            }
        }

        function moveRight() {
            currentX++;
            if (collision()) {
                currentX--;
            }
        }

        function rotatePiece() {
            const piece = PIECES[currentPiece];
            const rotated = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < piece[0].length; i++) {
                rotated[i] = [];
                for (let j = piece.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                    rotated[i].push(piece[j][i]);
                }
            }

            // টেম্পোরারি সোয়াপ
            const originalPiece = PIECES[currentPiece];
            PIECES[currentPiece] = rotated;

            if (collision()) {
                PIECES[currentPiece] = originalPiece;
            }
        }

        function dropPiece() {
            currentY++;
            if (collision()) {
                currentY--;
                mergePiece();
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // বোর্ড আঁকা
            for (let i = 0; i < ROWS; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < COLS; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j]) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = COLORS[board[i][j] - 1];
                        ctx.fillRect(j * BLOCK_SIZE, i * BLOCK_SIZE, BLOCK_SIZE - 1, BLOCK_SIZE - 1);
                    } else {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
                        ctx.fillRect(j * BLOCK_SIZE, i * BLOCK_SIZE, BLOCK_SIZE - 1, BLOCK_SIZE - 1);
                    }
                }
            }

            // বর্তমান পিস আঁকা
            if (currentPiece !== null) {
                const piece = PIECES[currentPiece];
                ctx.fillStyle = COLORS[currentPiece];
                for (let i = 0; i < piece.length; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < piece[i].length; j++) {
                        if (piece[i][j]) {
                            const x = (currentX + j) * BLOCK_SIZE;
                            const y = (currentY + i) * BLOCK_SIZE;
                            ctx.fillRect(x, y, BLOCK_SIZE - 1, BLOCK_SIZE - 1);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function drawNext() {
            nextCtx.clearRect(0, 0, 120, 120);
            if (nextPiece !== null) {
                const piece = PIECES[nextPiece];
                nextCtx.fillStyle = COLORS[nextPiece];
                const offsetX = (120 - piece[0].length * 30) / 2;
                const offsetY = (120 - piece.length * 30) / 2;
                for (let i = 0; i < piece.length; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < piece[i].length; j++) {
                        if (piece[i][j]) {
                            nextCtx.fillRect(offsetX + j * 30, offsetY + i * 30, 29, 29);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function update() {
            if (!gameRunning || gamePaused) return;
            dropPiece();
            draw();
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(update, 500 / level);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            gamePaused = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);

            initBoard();
            score = 0;
            level = 1;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('level').textContent = level;

            nextPiece = Math.floor(Math.random() * PIECES.length);
            spawnPiece();
            draw();
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning || gamePaused) return;

            switch(e.key) {
                case 'ArrowLeft': moveLeft(); break;
                case 'ArrowRight': moveRight(); break;
                case 'ArrowDown': dropPiece(); break;
                case 'ArrowUp': rotatePiece(); break;
                case ' ':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    while (!collision()) {
                        currentY++;
                    }
                    currentY--;
                    mergePiece();
                    break;
            }
            draw();
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ১৬১: সাডোকু
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সাডোকু</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .difficulty {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .difficulty-btn {
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .difficulty-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .sudoku-board {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(9, 50px);
            gap: 2px;
            background: #333;
            padding: 2px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .cell {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            border: none;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .cell:nth-child(3n) {
            border-right: 2px solid #333;
        }
        .cell:nth-child(9n) {
            border-right: none;
        }
        .cell:nth-child(n+19):nth-child(-n+27),
        .cell:nth-child(n+46):nth-child(-n+54) {
            border-bottom: 2px solid #333;
        }
        .cell.fixed {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            color: #333;
        }
        .cell input {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .cell input:focus {
            outline: 2px solid #667eea;
        }
        
        .number-pad {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 50px);
            gap: 5px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .number-btn {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .number-btn:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🧩 সাডোকু</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="difficulty">
                <button class="difficulty-btn active" onclick="setDifficulty('easy')">সহজ</button>
                <button class="difficulty-btn" onclick="setDifficulty('medium')">মাঝারি</button>
                <button class="difficulty-btn" onclick="setDifficulty('hard')">কঠিন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="sudoku-board" id="sudokuBoard"></div>
        
        <div class="number-pad">
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(1)">১</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(2)">২</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(3)">৩</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(4)">৪</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(5)">৫</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(6)">৬</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(7)">৭</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(8)">৮</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="enterNumber(9)">৯</button>
            <button class="number-btn" onclick="clearCell()">C</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="checkSolution()">চেক</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="newGame()">নতুন খেলা</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="solveGame()">সল্ভ</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let board = [];
        let fixed = [];
        let selectedRow = -1;
        let selectedCol = -1;

        const puzzles = {
            easy: [
                [5,3,0,0,7,0,0,0,0],
                [6,0,0,1,9,5,0,0,0],
                [0,9,8,0,0,0,0,6,0],
                [8,0,0,0,6,0,0,0,3],
                [4,0,0,8,0,3,0,0,1],
                [7,0,0,0,2,0,0,0,6],
                [0,6,0,0,0,0,2,8,0],
                [0,0,0,4,1,9,0,0,5],
                [0,0,0,0,8,0,0,7,9]
            ],
            medium: [
                [0,0,4,3,0,0,2,0,9],
                [0,0,5,0,0,9,0,0,1],
                [0,7,0,0,6,0,0,4,3],
                [0,0,6,0,0,2,0,8,7],
                [1,9,0,0,0,7,4,0,0],
                [0,5,0,1,9,0,0,0,0],
                [9,0,0,4,0,0,7,0,0],
                [3,0,2,0,0,1,0,0,8],
                [0,4,0,0,5,8,0,0,6]
            ],
            hard: [
                [0,6,0,0,0,0,9,0,0],
                [0,0,5,0,2,0,0,7,0],
                [1,0,0,9,0,3,0,0,8],
                [2,0,0,0,7,0,0,9,0],
                [0,7,9,2,0,8,1,0,0],
                [0,1,0,0,4,0,0,0,6],
                [7,0,0,6,0,5,0,0,2],
                [0,4,0,0,9,0,3,0,0],
                [0,0,3,0,0,0,0,5,0]
            ]
        };

        function renderBoard() {
            const boardEl = document.getElementById('sudokuBoard');
            boardEl.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 9; j++) {
                    const cell = document.createElement('div');
                    cell.className = 'cell';

                    if (fixed[i][j]) {
                        cell.classList.add('fixed');
                        cell.textContent = board[i][j] || '';
                    } else {
                        const input = document.createElement('input');
                        input.type = 'text';
                        input.maxLength = 1;
                        input.value = board[i][j] || '';
                        input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                            selectedRow = i;
                            selectedCol = j;
                        });
                        input.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                            const val = e.target.value;
                            if (val && !isNaN(val) && val >= 1 && val <= 9) {
                                board[i][j] = parseInt(val);
                            } else {
                                board[i][j] = 0;
                                e.target.value = '';
                            }
                        });
                        cell.appendChild(input);
                    }

                    boardEl.appendChild(cell);
                }
            }
        }

        function setDifficulty(level) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.difficulty-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            loadPuzzle(level);
        }

        function loadPuzzle(level) {
            board = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(puzzles[level]));
            fixed = board.map(row => row.map(cell => cell !== 0));
            renderBoard();
        }

        function enterNumber(num) {
            if (selectedRow !== -1 && selectedCol !== -1 && !fixed[selectedRow][selectedCol]) {
                board[selectedRow][selectedCol] = num;
                renderBoard();
            }
        }

        function clearCell() {
            if (selectedRow !== -1 && selectedCol !== -1 && !fixed[selectedRow][selectedCol]) {
                board[selectedRow][selectedCol] = 0;
                renderBoard();
            }
        }

        function isValid(board, row, col, num) {
            // রো চেক
            for (let x = 0; x < 9; x++) {
                if (board[row][x] === num) return false;
            }

            // কলাম চেক
            for (let x = 0; x < 9; x++) {
                if (board[x][col] === num) return false;
            }

            // ৩x৩ বক্স চেক
            let startRow = row - row % 3;
            let startCol = col - col % 3;
            for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
                    if (board[i + startRow][j + startCol] === num) return false;
                }
            }

            return true;
        }

        function checkSolution() {
            for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 9; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === 0) {
                        alert('সমস্ত ঘর পূরণ হয়নি!');
                        return;
                    }
                    const num = board[i][j];
                    board[i][j] = 0;
                    if (!isValid(board, i, j, num)) {
                        board[i][j] = num;
                        alert('ভুল সমাধান!');
                        return;
                    }
                    board[i][j] = num;
                }
            }
            alert('অভিনন্দন! সঠিক সমাধান!');
        }

        function solveGame() {
            solveSudoku(board);
            renderBoard();
        }

        function solveSudoku(board) {
            for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 9; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === 0) {
                        for (let num = 1; num <= 9; num++) {
                            if (isValid(board, i, j, num)) {
                                board[i][j] = num;
                                if (solveSudoku(board)) {
                                    return true;
                                }
                                board[i][j] = 0;
                            }
                        }
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            return true;
        }

        function newGame() {
            const activeBtn = document.querySelector('.difficulty-btn.active');
            loadPuzzle(activeBtn.textContent.toLowerCase());
        }

        loadPuzzle('easy');
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬২: ক্রসওয়ার্ড
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ক্রসওয়ার্ড</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .crossword-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .grid-container {
            flex: 1;
        }
        .crossword-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(10, 40px);
            gap: 2px;
            background: #333;
            padding: 2px;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .cell {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .cell.black {
            background: #333;
        }
        .cell input {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: none;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .cell input:focus {
            outline: 2px solid #43e97b;
        }
        
        .clues-container {
            flex: 1;
            text-align: left;
        }
        .clue-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .clue-section h3 {
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .clue-item {
            padding: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .clue-item:hover {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        .clue-item.active {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 ক্রসওয়ার্ড</h1>
        
        <div class="crossword-container">
            <div class="grid-container">
                <div class="crossword-grid" id="crosswordGrid"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="clues-container">
                <div class="clue-section">
                    <h3>আড়াআড়ি</h3>
                    <div id="acrossClues"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="clue-section">
                    <h3>সোজা</h3>
                    <div id="downClues"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="checkAnswers()">চেক</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="revealAnswers()">উত্তর দেখুন</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="newPuzzle()">নতুন পাজল</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let puzzle = {
            grid: [
                ['C', 'A', 'T', '', '', 'D', 'O', 'G', '', ''],
                ['', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', ''],
                ['R', 'U', 'N', '', 'B', 'I', 'R', 'D', '', ''],
                ['', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', ''],
                ['F', 'I', 'S', 'H', '', 'L', 'I', 'O', 'N', ''],
                ['', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', ''],
                ['', 'B', 'E', 'A', 'R', '', 'W', 'O', 'L', 'F'],
                ['', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', ''],
                ['', '', 'E', 'A', 'G', 'L', 'E', '', '', ''],
                ['', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '']
            ],
            across: [
                { number: 1, clue: 'বিড়াল জাতীয় প্রাণী', answer: 'CAT', row: 0, col: 0 },
                { number: 2, clue: 'মানুষের সেরা বন্ধু', answer: 'DOG', row: 0, col: 5 },
                { number: 3, clue: 'দ্রুত চলা', answer: 'RUN', row: 2, col: 0 },
                { number: 4, clue: 'পাখি', answer: 'BIRD', row: 2, col: 4 },
                { number: 5, clue: 'জলে বাস করা প্রাণী', answer: 'FISH', row: 4, col: 0 },
                { number: 6, clue: 'বনের রাজা', answer: 'LION', row: 4, col: 5 },
                { number: 7, clue: 'কালো প্রাণী', answer: 'BEAR', row: 6, col: 1 },
                { number: 8, clue: 'নেকড়ে', answer: 'WOLF', row: 6, col: 6 },
                { number: 9, clue: 'বড় পাখি', answer: 'EAGLE', row: 8, col: 2 }
            ],
            down: [
                { number: 1, clue: 'গবাদি পশু', answer: 'COW', row: 0, col: 0 },
                { number: 2, clue: 'ইঁদুর', answer: 'RAT', row: 0, col: 1 },
                { number: 3, clue: 'পাখির খাবার', answer: 'SEED', row: 0, col: 2 },
                { number: 4, clue: 'মাছের দল', answer: 'SCHOOL', row: 0, col: 4 },
                { number: 5, clue: 'পশুপাল', answer: 'HERD', row: 2, col: 4 }
            ]
        };

        function renderGrid() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('crosswordGrid');
            grid.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
                    const cell = document.createElement('div');
                    cell.className = 'cell';

                    if (puzzle.grid[i][j] === '') {
                        cell.classList.add('black');
                    } else {
                        const input = document.createElement('input');
                        input.type = 'text';
                        input.maxLength = 1;
                        input.dataset.row = i;
                        input.dataset.col = j;
                        cell.appendChild(input);
                    }

                    grid.appendChild(cell);
                }
            }
        }

        function renderClues() {
            const acrossDiv = document.getElementById('acrossClues');
            const downDiv = document.getElementById('downClues');

            acrossDiv.innerHTML = puzzle.across.map(clue =>
                `<div class="clue-item" onclick="selectClue('across', ${clue.number})">
                    ${clue.number}. ${clue.clue}
                </div>`
            ).join('');

            downDiv.innerHTML = puzzle.down.map(clue =>
                `<div class="clue-item" onclick="selectClue('down', ${clue.number})">
                    ${clue.number}. ${clue.clue}
                </div>`
            ).join('');
        }

        function selectClue(type, number) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.clue-item').forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove('active');
            });
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            const clue = type === 'across'
                ? puzzle.across.find(c => c.number === number)
                : puzzle.down.find(c => c.number === number);

            if (clue) {
                highlightClue(clue);
            }
        }

        function highlightClue(clue) {
            // হাইলাইট ইমপ্লিমেন্ট
        }

        function checkAnswers() {
            let correct = 0;
            let total = 0;

            puzzle.across.forEach(clue => {
                let answer = '';
                for (let i = 0; i < clue.answer.length; i++) {
                    const cell = document.querySelector(
                        `[data-row="${clue.row}"][data-col="${clue.col + i}"]`
                    );
                    if (cell) {
                        answer += cell.value.toUpperCase();
                    }
                }
                if (answer === clue.answer) correct++;
                total++;
            });

            puzzle.down.forEach(clue => {
                let answer = '';
                for (let i = 0; i < clue.answer.length; i++) {
                    const cell = document.querySelector(
                        `[data-row="${clue.row + i}"][data-col="${clue.col}"]`
                    );
                    if (cell) {
                        answer += cell.value.toUpperCase();
                    }
                }
                if (answer === clue.answer) correct++;
                total++;
            });

            alert(`আপনার স্কোর: ${correct}/${total}`);
        }

        function revealAnswers() {
            puzzle.across.forEach(clue => {
                for (let i = 0; i < clue.answer.length; i++) {
                    const cell = document.querySelector(
                        `[data-row="${clue.row}"][data-col="${clue.col + i}"]`
                    );
                    if (cell) {
                        cell.value = clue.answer[i];
                    }
                }
            });

            puzzle.down.forEach(clue => {
                for (let i = 0; i < clue.answer.length; i++) {
                    const cell = document.querySelector(
                        `[data-row="${clue.row + i}"][data-col="${clue.col}"]`
                    );
                    if (cell) {
                        cell.value = clue.answer[i];
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function newPuzzle() {
            renderGrid();
        }

        renderGrid();
        renderClues();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৩: ওয়ার্ডল
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ওয়ার্ডল</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .board {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-rows: repeat(6, 60px);
            gap: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 60px);
            gap: 5px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .tile {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border: 2px solid #d3d6da;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 30px;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .tile.correct {
            background: #6aaa64;
            color: white;
            border-color: #6aaa64;
        }
        .tile.present {
            background: #c9b458;
            color: white;
            border-color: #c9b458;
        }
        .tile.absent {
            background: #787c7e;
            color: white;
            border-color: #787c7e;
        }
        
        .keyboard {
            display: grid;
            gap: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .keyboard-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .key {
            min-width: 40px;
            height: 50px;
            background: #d3d6da;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0 10px;
        }
        .key:hover {
            background: #bbb;
        }
        .key.correct {
            background: #6aaa64;
            color: white;
        }
        .key.present {
            background: #c9b458;
            color: white;
        }
        .key.absent {
            background: #787c7e;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .message {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 ওয়ার্ডল</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div>চেষ্টা: <span id="attempts">০/৬</span></div>
            <div id="message" class="message"></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="board" id="board"></div>
        
        <div class="keyboard" id="keyboard"></div>
        
        <button class="btn" onclick="newGame()">নতুন খেলা</button>
    </div>

    <script>
        const words = ['APPLE', 'BRAIN', 'CRANE', 'DREAM', 'EAGLE', 'FRUIT', 'GRAPE', 'HOUSE', 'INPUT', 'JOKER'];
        let targetWord = '';
        let currentRow = 0;
        let currentCol = 0;
        let board = [];
        let gameOver = false;

        function initBoard() {
            board = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                board[i] = [];
                for (let j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
                    board[i][j] = '';
                }
            }
            currentRow = 0;
            currentCol = 0;
            gameOver = false;
            document.getElementById('attempts').textContent = `০/৬`;
            document.getElementById('message').innerHTML = '';
        }

        function renderBoard() {
            const boardEl = document.getElementById('board');
            boardEl.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                const row = document.createElement('div');
                row.className = 'row';
                for (let j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
                    const tile = document.createElement('div');
                    tile.className = 'tile';
                    tile.textContent = board[i][j];
                    row.appendChild(tile);
                }
                boardEl.appendChild(row);
            }
        }

        function renderKeyboard() {
            const keyboardEl = document.getElementById('keyboard');
            keyboardEl.innerHTML = '';

            const rows = [
                ['Q', 'W', 'E', 'R', 'T', 'Y', 'U', 'I', 'O', 'P'],
                ['A', 'S', 'D', 'F', 'G', 'H', 'J', 'K', 'L'],
                ['↵', 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', 'M', '⌫']
            ];

            rows.forEach(row => {
                const rowEl = document.createElement('div');
                rowEl.className = 'keyboard-row';
                row.forEach(key => {
                    const btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.className = 'key';
                    btn.textContent = key;
                    btn.onclick = () => handleKeyPress(key);
                    rowEl.appendChild(btn);
                });
                keyboardEl.appendChild(rowEl);
            });
        }

        function handleKeyPress(key) {
            if (gameOver) return;

            if (key === '↵') {
                submitGuess();
            } else if (key === '⌫') {
                if (currentCol > 0) {
                    currentCol--;
                    board[currentRow][currentCol] = '';
                    renderBoard();
                }
            } else if (currentCol < 5) {
                board[currentRow][currentCol] = key;
                currentCol++;
                renderBoard();
            }
        }

        function submitGuess() {
            if (currentCol !== 5) {
                showMessage('শব্দটি ৫ অক্ষরের হতে হবে');
                return;
            }

            const guess = board[currentRow].join('');

            // রঙ আপডেট
            const tiles = document.querySelectorAll('.row')[currentRow].children;
            const keyButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.key');

            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                const letter = guess[i];
                const tile = tiles[i];

                if (letter === targetWord[i]) {
                    tile.classList.add('correct');
                    updateKeyColor(letter, 'correct');
                } else if (targetWord.includes(letter)) {
                    tile.classList.add('present');
                    updateKeyColor(letter, 'present');
                } else {
                    tile.classList.add('absent');
                    updateKeyColor(letter, 'absent');
                }
            }

            if (guess === targetWord) {
                gameOver = true;
                showMessage('অভিনন্দন! আপনি জিতেছেন! 🎉');
            } else {
                currentRow++;
                currentCol = 0;
                document.getElementById('attempts').textContent = `${currentRow}/৬`;

                if (currentRow === 6) {
                    gameOver = true;
                    showMessage(`গেম ওভার! শব্দটি ছিল: ${targetWord}`);
                }
            }
        }

        function updateKeyColor(letter, status) {
            const keys = document.querySelectorAll('.key');
            keys.forEach(key => {
                if (key.textContent === letter) {
                    if (!key.classList.contains('correct') && status === 'correct') {
                        key.classList.add('correct');
                    } else if (!key.classList.contains('correct') && !key.classList.contains('present') && status === 'present') {
                        key.classList.add('present');
                    } else if (!key.classList.contains('correct') && !key.classList.contains('present') && status === 'absent') {
                        key.classList.add('absent');
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function showMessage(msg) {
            document.getElementById('message').innerHTML = msg;
        }

        function newGame() {
            targetWord = words[Math.floor(Math.random() * words.length)];
            initBoard();
            renderBoard();

            document.querySelectorAll('.key').forEach(key => {
                key.classList.remove('correct', 'present', 'absent');
            });
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (gameOver) return;

            const key = e.key.toUpperCase();
            if (key === 'ENTER') {
                handleKeyPress('↵');
            } else if (key === 'BACKSPACE') {
                handleKeyPress('⌫');
            } else if (key.length === 1 && key >= 'A' && key <= 'Z') {
                handleKeyPress(key);
            }
        });

        renderKeyboard();
        newGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৪: হ্যাংম্যান
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>হ্যাংম্যান</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .attempts {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .hangman-drawing {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        canvas {
            border: 2px solid #333;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .word-display {
            font-size: 40px;
            letter-spacing: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-family: monospace;
        }
        
        .wrong-letters {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .keyboard {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .key {
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .key:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .key.disabled {
            background: #ddd;
            cursor: not-allowed;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎭 হ্যাংম্যান</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="attempts">বাকি চেষ্টা: <span id="remainingAttempts">৬</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="hangman-drawing">
            <canvas id="hangmanCanvas" width="200" height="200"></canvas>
        </div>
        
        <div class="word-display" id="wordDisplay">_ _ _ _ _</div>
        
        <div class="wrong-letters" id="wrongLetters">ভুল অক্ষর: </div>
        
        <div class="keyboard" id="keyboard"></div>
        
        <button class="btn" onclick="newGame()">নতুন খেলা</button>
    </div>

    <script>
        const words = ['JAVASCRIPT', 'PROGRAMMING', 'DEVELOPER', 'COMPUTER', 'KEYBOARD', 'FUNCTION', 'VARIABLE'];
        let selectedWord = '';
        let guessedLetters = [];
        let wrongGuesses = 0;
        const maxAttempts = 6;

        function initGame() {
            selectedWord = words[Math.floor(Math.random() * words.length)];
            guessedLetters = [];
            wrongGuesses = 0;
            updateDisplay();
            renderKeyboard();
            drawHangman();
        }

        function renderKeyboard() {
            const keyboard = document.getElementById('keyboard');
            const letters = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'.split('');

            keyboard.innerHTML = letters.map(letter =>
                `<button class="key ${guessedLetters.includes(letter) ? 'disabled' : ''}"
                    onclick="guessLetter('${letter}')">${letter}</button>`
            ).join('');
        }

        function guessLetter(letter) {
            if (guessedLetters.includes(letter) || wrongGuesses >= maxAttempts) return;

            guessedLetters.push(letter);

            if (selectedWord.includes(letter)) {
                // সঠিক অনুমান
            } else {
                wrongGuesses++;
                drawHangman();
            }

            updateDisplay();
            renderKeyboard();
            checkGameStatus();
        }

        function updateDisplay() {
            const wordDisplay = document.getElementById('wordDisplay');
            const wrongLetters = document.getElementById('wrongLetters');

            const display = selectedWord.split('').map(letter =>
                guessedLetters.includes(letter) ? letter : '_'
            ).join(' ');

            wordDisplay.textContent = display;

            const wrong = guessedLetters.filter(letter => !selectedWord.includes(letter));
            wrongLetters.textContent = `ভুল অক্ষর: ${wrong.join(', ')}`;

            document.getElementById('remainingAttempts').textContent = maxAttempts - wrongGuesses;
        }

        function drawHangman() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('hangmanCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 200, 200);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#333';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;

            // গ্যালোস
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(50, 180);
            ctx.lineTo(150, 180);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(100, 180);
            ctx.lineTo(100, 50);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(100, 50);
            ctx.lineTo(150, 50);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(150, 50);
            ctx.lineTo(150, 70);
            ctx.stroke();

            // মাথা
            if (wrongGuesses >= 1) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(150, 85, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // শরীর
            if (wrongGuesses >= 2) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(150, 100);
                ctx.lineTo(150, 140);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // বাম হাত
            if (wrongGuesses >= 3) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(150, 110);
                ctx.lineTo(130, 120);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // ডান হাত
            if (wrongGuesses >= 4) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(150, 110);
                ctx.lineTo(170, 120);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // বাম পা
            if (wrongGuesses >= 5) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(150, 140);
                ctx.lineTo(130, 160);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // ডান পা
            if (wrongGuesses >= 6) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(150, 140);
                ctx.lineTo(170, 160);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
        }

        function checkGameStatus() {
            const wordCompleted = selectedWord.split('').every(letter => guessedLetters.includes(letter));

            if (wordCompleted) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert('অভিনন্দন! আপনি জিতেছেন! 🎉');
                }, 100);
            } else if (wrongGuesses >= maxAttempts) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    alert(`গেম ওভার! শব্দটি ছিল: ${selectedWord}`);
                }, 100);
            }
        }

        function newGame() {
            initGame();
        }

        initGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৫: ট্রিভিয়া গেম
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ট্রিভিয়া গেম</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .question-number {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .question-container {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .question {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .options {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .option {
            padding: 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .option:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .option.correct {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        .option.wrong {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: white;
        }
        .option.disabled {
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0.6;
        }
        
        .timer {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
