            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .next-btn {
            padding: 15px 40px;
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
            display: none;
        }
        .next-btn.visible {
            display: inline-block;
        }
        
        .result {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🧠 ট্রিভিয়া গেম</h1>
        
        <div class="game-header">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="question-number">প্রশ্ন <span id="currentQuestion">১</span>/<span id="totalQuestions">৫</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="timer" id="timer">১৫</div>
        
        <div class="question-container">
            <div class="question" id="question"></div>
            <div class="options" id="options"></div>
        </div>
        
        <button class="next-btn" id="nextBtn" onclick="nextQuestion()">পরবর্তী প্রশ্ন</button>
        
        <div class="result" id="result"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const questions = [
            {
                question: 'বাংলাদেশের রাজধানীর নাম কী?',
                options: ['চট্টগ্রাম', 'ঢাকা', 'খুলনা', 'রাজশাহী'],
                correct: 1
            },
            {
                question: 'কম্পিউটারের মস্তিষ্ক বলা হয় কোন অংশকে?',
                options: ['মেমোরি', 'হার্ড ডিস্ক', 'সিপিইউ', 'মাদারবোর্ড'],
                correct: 2
            },
            {
                question: 'HTML এর পূর্ণরূপ কী?',
                options: [
                    'Hyper Text Markup Language',
                    'High Tech Modern Language',
                    'Hyper Transfer Markup Language',
                    'Home Tool Markup Language'
                ],
                correct: 0
            },
            {
                question: 'নিচের কোনটি প্রোগ্রামিং ভাষা নয়?',
                options: ['জাভা', 'পাইথন', 'ফটোশপ', 'সি++'],
                correct: 2
            },
            {
                question: 'বিশ্বের সর্বোচ্চ শৃঙ্গ কোনটি?',
                options: ['কেফ', 'মাউন্ট এভারেস্ট', 'কাঞ্চনজঙ্ঘা', 'আল্পস'],
                correct: 1
            }
        ];

        let currentQuestion = 0;
        let score = 0;
        let timerInterval;
        let timeLeft = 15;
        let answerSelected = false;

        function loadQuestion() {
            const q = questions[currentQuestion];
            document.getElementById('question').textContent = q.question;
            document.getElementById('currentQuestion').textContent = currentQuestion + 1;
            document.getElementById('totalQuestions').textContent = questions.length;

            const optionsDiv = document.getElementById('options');
            optionsDiv.innerHTML = '';

            q.options.forEach((opt, index) => {
                const btn = document.createElement('button');
                btn.className = 'option';
                btn.textContent = opt;
                btn.onclick = () => selectAnswer(index);
                optionsDiv.appendChild(btn);
            });

            document.getElementById('nextBtn').classList.remove('visible');
            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = '';
            answerSelected = false;

            startTimer();
        }

        function startTimer() {
            timeLeft = 15;
            document.getElementById('timer').textContent = timeLeft;

            if (timerInterval) clearInterval(timerInterval);

            timerInterval = setInterval(() => {
                timeLeft--;
                document.getElementById('timer').textContent = timeLeft;

                if (timeLeft <= 0) {
                    clearInterval(timerInterval);
                    if (!answerSelected) {
                        timeOut();
                    }
                }
            }, 1000);
        }

        function selectAnswer(index) {
            if (answerSelected) return;

            clearInterval(timerInterval);
            answerSelected = true;

            const q = questions[currentQuestion];
            const options = document.querySelectorAll('.option');

            options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.add('disabled'));

            if (index === q.correct) {
                options[index].classList.add('correct');
                score += 10;
                document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = '✅ সঠিক উত্তর!';
            } else {
                options[index].classList.add('wrong');
                options[q.correct].classList.add('correct');
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = '❌ ভুল উত্তর!';
            }

            document.getElementById('nextBtn').classList.add('visible');
        }

        function timeOut() {
            const q = questions[currentQuestion];
            const options = document.querySelectorAll('.option');

            options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.add('disabled'));
            options[q.correct].classList.add('correct');

            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = '⏰ সময় শেষ!';
            document.getElementById('nextBtn').classList.add('visible');
        }

        function nextQuestion() {
            currentQuestion++;

            if (currentQuestion < questions.length) {
                loadQuestion();
            } else {
                gameOver();
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            document.querySelector('.question-container').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('timer').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('nextBtn').style.display = 'none';

            const percentage = (score / (questions.length * 10)) * 100;
            let message = '';

            if (percentage >= 80) {
                message = '🎉 অসাধারণ! আপনি খুব ভালো করেছেন!';
            } else if (percentage >= 60) {
                message = '👍 ভালো করেছেন, আরও অনুশীলন করুন!';
            } else if (percentage >= 40) {
                message = '👌 ঠিক আছে, আরও মনোযোগ দিন!';
            } else {
                message = '💪 চেষ্টা চালিয়ে যান, আপনি পারবেন!';
            }

            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `
                <h2>খেলা শেষ!</h2>
                <p>আপনার স্কোর: ${score}/${questions.length * 10}</p>
                <p>${message}</p>
                <button class="next-btn visible" onclick="restartGame()">আবার খেলুন</button>
            `;
        }

        function restartGame() {
            currentQuestion = 0;
            score = 0;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.querySelector('.question-container').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('timer').style.display = 'block';
            loadQuestion();
        }

        loadQuestion();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৬: কুইজ গেম
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>কুইজ গেম</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 100%;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .category-selector {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .category-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .category-btn.active {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .quiz-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        
        .question-box {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .question {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .options {
            display: grid;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .option {
            padding: 15px;
            background: white;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .option:hover {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .option.selected {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .prev-btn {
            background: #f0f0f0;
        }
        .next-btn {
            background: #667eea;
            color: white;
        }
        .submit-btn {
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .result-screen {
            display: none;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .result-screen.active {
            display: block;
        }
        .final-score {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>📝 কুইজ গেম</h1>
        
        <div class="category-selector">
            <button class="category-btn active">সাধারণ জ্ঞান</button>
            <button class="category-btn">বিজ্ঞান</button>
            <button class="category-btn">ইতিহাস</button>
            <button class="category-btn">ভূগোল</button>
        </div>
        
        <div class="quiz-header">
            <div>প্রশ্ন <span id="currentQuestion">১</span>/<span id="totalQuestions">১০</span></div>
            <div>স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <div id="quizScreen">
            <div class="question-box">
                <div class="question" id="question"></div>
                <div class="options" id="options"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="controls">
                <button class="btn prev-btn" onclick="prevQuestion()">পূর্ববর্তী</button>
                <button class="btn next-btn" onclick="nextQuestion()">পরবর্তী</button>
                <button class="btn submit-btn" onclick="submitQuiz()">জমা দিন</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="result-screen" id="resultScreen">
            <h2>কুইজ শেষ!</h2>
            <div class="final-score" id="finalScore">০/১০০</div>
            <p id="resultMessage"></p>
            <button class="btn next-btn" onclick="restartQuiz()">আবার শুরু করুন</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const questions = [
            {
                question: 'বাংলাদেশের স্বাধীনতা দিবস কবে?',
                options: ['১৬ ডিসেম্বর', '২৬ মার্চ', '২১ ফেব্রুয়ারি', '১৫ আগস্ট'],
                correct: 1
            },
            {
                question: 'সূর্যের সবচেয়ে কাছের গ্রহ কোনটি?',
                options: ['শুক্র', 'বুধ', 'মঙ্গল', 'পৃথিবী'],
                correct: 1
            },
            {
                question: 'পানির রাসায়নিক সংকেত কী?',
                options: ['CO2', 'O2', 'H2O', 'NaCl'],
                correct: 2
            },
            {
                question: 'কম্পিউটারের স্থায়ী স্মৃতি কোনটি?',
                options: ['RAM', 'ROM', 'CPU', 'ALU'],
                correct: 1
            },
            {
                question: 'বাংলা নববর্ষের প্রথম মাস কোনটি?',
                options: ['বৈশাখ', 'জ্যৈষ্ঠ', 'আষাঢ়', 'শ্রাবণ'],
                correct: 0
            }
        ];

        let currentIndex = 0;
        let userAnswers = new Array(questions.length).fill(-1);
        let score = 0;
        let quizSubmitted = false;

        function renderQuestion() {
            const q = questions[currentIndex];
            document.getElementById('question').textContent = q.question;
            document.getElementById('currentQuestion').textContent = currentIndex + 1;
            document.getElementById('totalQuestions').textContent = questions.length;

            const optionsDiv = document.getElementById('options');
            optionsDiv.innerHTML = '';

            q.options.forEach((opt, index) => {
                const optionDiv = document.createElement('div');
                optionDiv.className = `option ${userAnswers[currentIndex] === index ? 'selected' : ''}`;
                optionDiv.textContent = opt;
                optionDiv.onclick = () => selectOption(index);
                optionsDiv.appendChild(optionDiv);
            });
        }

        function selectOption(index) {
            if (quizSubmitted) return;

            userAnswers[currentIndex] = index;
            renderQuestion();
        }

        function prevQuestion() {
            if (currentIndex > 0) {
                currentIndex--;
                renderQuestion();
            }
        }

        function nextQuestion() {
            if (currentIndex < questions.length - 1) {
                currentIndex++;
                renderQuestion();
            }
        }

        function submitQuiz() {
            score = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < questions.length; i++) {
                if (userAnswers[i] === questions[i].correct) {
                    score += 10;
                }
            }

            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;

            document.getElementById('quizScreen').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('resultScreen').classList.add('active');

            document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = `${score}/${questions.length * 10}`;

            let message = '';
            if (score >= 40) {
                message = '🎉 অসাধারণ! আপনি খুব ভালো করেছেন!';
            } else if (score >= 30) {
                message = '👍 ভালো করেছেন, আরও অনুশীলন করুন!';
            } else if (score >= 20) {
                message = '👌 ঠিক আছে, আরও মনোযোগ দিন!';
            } else {
                message = '💪 চেষ্টা চালিয়ে যান, আপনি পারবেন!';
            }
            document.getElementById('resultMessage').textContent = message;

            quizSubmitted = true;
        }

        function restartQuiz() {
            currentIndex = 0;
            userAnswers = new Array(questions.length).fill(-1);
            score = 0;
            quizSubmitted = false;

            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('quizScreen').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('resultScreen').classList.remove('active');

            renderQuestion();
        }

        renderQuestion();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৭: রেসিং গেম
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>রেসিং গেম</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .speed {
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #43e97b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .arrow-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 50px);
            gap: 5px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🏎️ রেসিং গেম</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="speed">গতি: <span id="speed">০</span> km/h</div>
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="400" height="600"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let car = {
            x: 175,
            y: 500,
            width: 50,
            height: 80
        };

        let obstacles = [];
        let roadLines = [];
        let gameSpeed = 5;
        let score = 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        function init() {
            car = { x: 175, y: 500, width: 50, height: 80 };
            obstacles = [];
            roadLines = [];
            gameSpeed = 5;
            score = 0;

            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                roadLines.push({
                    x: 200,
                    y: i * 60,
                    width: 5,
                    height: 30
                });
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // রাস্তা আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.lineWidth = 5;
            ctx.setLineDash([20, 20]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(100, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(100, 600);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(300, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(300, 600);
            ctx.stroke();

            // রাস্তার মাঝের লাইন
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            roadLines.forEach(line => {
                ctx.fillRect(line.x, line.y, line.width, line.height);
                line.y += gameSpeed;
                if (line.y > 600) {
                    line.y = -30;
                }
            });

            // গাড়ি আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.fillRect(car.x, car.y, car.width, car.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.fillRect(car.x + 10, car.y + 15, 10, 15);
            ctx.fillRect(car.x + 30, car.y + 15, 10, 15);

            // বাধা আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            obstacles.forEach(obs => {
                ctx.fillRect(obs.x, obs.y, obs.width, obs.height);
                obs.y += gameSpeed;

                // কোলিশন চেক
                if (obs.y + obs.height > car.y && obs.y < car.y + car.height &&
                    obs.x + obs.width > car.x && obs.x < car.x + car.width) {
                    gameOver();
                }

                if (obs.y > 600) {
                    score += 10;
                    document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                }
            });

            // নতুন বাধা তৈরি
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                obstacles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 200 + 100,
                    y: -50,
                    width: 40,
                    height: 40
                });
            }

            // পুরনো বাধা সরান
            obstacles = obstacles.filter(obs => obs.y < 650);

            document.getElementById('speed').textContent = gameSpeed * 10;
        }

        function moveLeft() {
            if (car.x > 100) {
                car.x -= 20;
            }
        }

        function moveRight() {
            if (car.x < 250) {
                car.x += 20;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            init();
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning || gamePaused) return;

            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                moveLeft();
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                moveRight();
            }
        });

        init();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৮: ফ্ল্যাপি বার্ড
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফ্ল্যাপি বার্ড</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🐦 ফ্ল্যাপি বার্ড</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="400" height="600"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let bird = {
            x: 100,
            y: 300,
            width: 30,
            height: 30,
            velocity: 0,
            gravity: 0.5,
            jump: -8
        };

        let pipes = [];
        let score = 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function init() {
            bird = { x: 100, y: 300, width: 30, height: 30, velocity: 0, gravity: 0.5, jump: -8 };
            pipes = [];
            score = 0;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // স্কাই
            ctx.fillStyle = '#87CEEB';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // মেঘ
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(100, 100, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(130, 80, 35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(70, 80, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // পাইপ
            ctx.fillStyle = '#228B22';
            pipes.forEach(pipe => {
                // উপরের পাইপ
                ctx.fillRect(pipe.x, 0, pipe.width, pipe.top);
                // নিচের পাইপ
                ctx.fillRect(pipe.x, pipe.bottom, pipe.width, 600 - pipe.bottom);

                pipe.x -= 3;

                // স্কোর চেক
                if (!pipe.passed && pipe.x + pipe.width < bird.x) {
                    pipe.passed = true;
                    score += 10;
                    document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                }
            });

            // পাইপ রিমুভ
            pipes = pipes.filter(pipe => pipe.x + pipe.width > 0);

            // নতুন পাইপ
            if (pipes.length === 0 || pipes[pipes.length - 1].x < 300) {
                let gap = 200;
                let topHeight = Math.random() * 200 + 100;
                pipes.push({
                    x: 400,
                    width: 50,
                    top: topHeight,
                    bottom: topHeight + gap,
                    passed: false
                });
            }

            // পাখি
            bird.velocity += bird.gravity;
            bird.y += bird.velocity;

            // কোলিশন চেক
            if (bird.y < 0 || bird.y + bird.height > 600) {
                gameOver();
                return;
            }

            pipes.forEach(pipe => {
                if (bird.x + bird.width > pipe.x && bird.x < pipe.x + pipe.width) {
                    if (bird.y < pipe.top || bird.y + bird.height > pipe.bottom) {
                        gameOver();
                        return;
                    }
                }
            });

            // পাখি আঁকা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            ctx.fillRect(bird.x, bird.y, bird.width, bird.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
            ctx.fillRect(bird.x + 20, bird.y + 10, 5, 5);
        }

        function jump() {
            if (gameRunning) {
                bird.velocity = bird.jump;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            init();
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.code === 'Space') {
                e.preventDefault();
                jump();
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('click', jump);

        init();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৬৯: ডাইনোসর গেম
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ডাইনোসর গেম</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .high-score {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🦖 ডাইনোসর গেম</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="high-score">সর্বোচ্চ: <span id="highScore">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="300"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let dino = {
            x: 50,
            y: 200,
            width: 40,
            height: 50,
            velocity: 0,
            gravity: 0.8,
            jumpPower: -15,
            grounded: true
        };

        let obstacles = [];
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('dinoHighScore') || 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gameSpeed = 5;

        document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 300);

            // মাটি
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 250, 800, 50);

            // ঘাস
            ctx.fillStyle = '#228B22';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 250, 800, 5);

            // ডাইনোসর
            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            ctx.fillRect(dino.x, dino.y, dino.width, dino.height);

            // চোখ
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.fillRect(dino.x + 25, dino.y + 10, 5, 5);

            // বাধা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            obstacles.forEach(obs => {
                ctx.fillRect(obs.x, obs.y, obs.width, obs.height);
                obs.x -= gameSpeed;

                // কোলিশন
                if (dino.x < obs.x + obs.width &&
                    dino.x + dino.width > obs.x &&
                    dino.y < obs.y + obs.height &&
                    dino.y + dino.height > obs.y) {
                    gameOver();
                }
            });

            // বাধা সরান
            obstacles = obstacles.filter(obs => obs.x + obs.width > 0);

            // নতুন বাধা
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                obstacles.push({
                    x: 800,
                    y: 215,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 35
                });
            }

            // ফিজিক্স
            dino.y += dino.velocity;
            dino.velocity += dino.gravity;

            if (dino.y >= 200) {
                dino.y = 200;
                dino.velocity = 0;
                dino.grounded = true;
            } else {
                dino.grounded = false;
            }

            // স্কোর
            score++;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = Math.floor(score / 10);

            // স্পিড বাড়ান
            if (score % 500 === 0) {
                gameSpeed++;
            }
        }

        function jump() {
            if (dino.grounded) {
                dino.velocity = dino.jumpPower;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);

            const finalScore = Math.floor(score / 10);
            if (finalScore > highScore) {
                highScore = finalScore;
                localStorage.setItem('dinoHighScore', highScore);
                document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore;
            }

            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${finalScore}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);

            dino = { x: 50, y: 200, width: 40, height: 50, velocity: 0, gravity: 0.8, jumpPower: -15, grounded: true };
            obstacles = [];
            score = 0;
            gameSpeed = 5;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = '0';
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.code === 'Space') {
                e.preventDefault();
                jump();
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('click', jump);

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭০: ব্রিক ব্রেকার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ব্রিক ব্রেকার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .lives {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🧱 ব্রিক ব্রেকার</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="lives">❤️ <span id="lives">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let paddle = {
            x: 250,
            y: 350,
            width: 100,
            height: 15,
            speed: 7
        };

        let ball = {
            x: 300,
            y: 300,
            radius: 8,
            dx: 4,
            dy: -4
        };

        let bricks = [];
        let score = 0;
        let lives = 3;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        function initBricks() {
            bricks = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 8; j++) {
                    bricks.push({
                        x: j * 70 + 35,
                        y: i * 30 + 50,
                        width: 60,
                        height: 20,
                        active: true
                    });
                }
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // প্যাডেল
            ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            ctx.fillRect(paddle.x, paddle.y, paddle.width, paddle.height);

            // বল
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // ইট
            bricks.forEach(brick => {
                if (brick.active) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                    ctx.fillRect(brick.x, brick.y, brick.width, brick.height);
                    ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
                    ctx.strokeRect(brick.x, brick.y, brick.width, brick.height);
                }
            });

            // মুভমেন্ট
            ball.x += ball.dx;
            ball.y += ball.dy;

            // দেয়ালে লেগে ফিরে আসা
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > 600 || ball.x - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.dx *= -1;
            }
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.dy *= -1;
            }

            // নিচে পড়ে গেলে
            if (ball.y + ball.radius > 400) {
                lives--;
                document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                if (lives <= 0) {
                    gameOver();
                } else {
                    resetBall();
                }
            }

            // প্যাডেলে লেগে ফিরে আসা
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > paddle.x &&
                ball.x - ball.radius < paddle.x + paddle.width &&
                ball.y + ball.radius > paddle.y) {
                ball.dy *= -1;
            }

            // ইটের সাথে সংঘর্ষ
            bricks.forEach(brick => {
                if (brick.active) {
                    if (ball.x + ball.radius > brick.x &&
                        ball.x - ball.radius < brick.x + brick.width &&
                        ball.y + ball.radius > brick.y &&
                        ball.y - ball.radius < brick.y + brick.height) {

                        ball.dy *= -1;
                        brick.active = false;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                }
            });

            // প্যাডেল মুভমেন্ট
            if (rightPressed && paddle.x < 500) {
                paddle.x += paddle.speed;
            }
            if (leftPressed && paddle.x > 0) {
                paddle.x -= paddle.speed;
            }

            // সব ইট ভেঙে গেলে
            if (bricks.every(brick => !brick.active)) {
                alert('আপনি জিতেছেন!');
                resetGame();
            }
        }

        function resetBall() {
            ball.x = 300;
            ball.y = 300;
            ball.dx = 4;
            ball.dy = -4;
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 20);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            initBricks();
            score = 0;
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            resetBall();
            draw();
        }

        let leftPressed = false;
        let rightPressed = false;

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = true;
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = true;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = false;
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = false;
            }
        });

        initBricks();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭১: পং গেম
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পং গেম</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .player1-score {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        .player2-score {
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🏓 পং গেম</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score player1-score">খেলোয়াড় ১: <span id="player1Score">০</span></div>
            <div class="score player2-score">খেলোয়াড় ২: <span id="player2Score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let paddle1 = {
            y: 150,
            width: 15,
            height: 100,
            speed: 5
        };

        let paddle2 = {
            y: 150,
            width: 15,
            height: 100,
            speed: 5
        };

        let ball = {
            x: 400,
            y: 200,
            radius: 10,
            dx: 5,
            dy: 3
        };

        let player1Score = 0;
        let player2Score = 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // মাঝের লাইন
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.setLineDash([10, 10]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(400, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(400, 400);
            ctx.stroke();

            // প্যাডেল ১
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.fillRect(30, paddle1.y, paddle1.width, paddle1.height);

            // প্যাডেল ২
            ctx.fillStyle = '#667eea';
            ctx.fillRect(755, paddle2.y, paddle2.width, paddle2.height);

            // বল
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // মুভমেন্ট
            ball.x += ball.dx;
            ball.y += ball.dy;

            // উপরে নিচে
            if (ball.y + ball.radius > 400 || ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.dy *= -1;
            }

            // প্যাডেল ১ এর সাথে সংঘর্ষ
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 30 + paddle1.width &&
                ball.x + ball.radius > 30 &&
                ball.y > paddle1.y &&
                ball.y < paddle1.y + paddle1.height) {
                ball.dx *= -1;
            }

            // প্যাডেল ২ এর সাথে সংঘর্ষ
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > 755 &&
                ball.x - ball.radius < 755 + paddle2.width &&
                ball.y > paddle2.y &&
                ball.y < paddle2.y + paddle2.height) {
                ball.dx *= -1;
            }

            // স্কোর
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 0) {
                player2Score++;
                document.getElementById('player2Score').textContent = player2Score;
                resetBall();
            }
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > 800) {
                player1Score++;
                document.getElementById('player1Score').textContent = player1Score;
                resetBall();
            }

            // প্যাডেল মুভমেন্ট
            if (wPressed && paddle1.y > 0) {
                paddle1.y -= paddle1.speed;
            }
            if (sPressed && paddle1.y < 300) {
                paddle1.y += paddle1.speed;
            }
            if (upPressed && paddle2.y > 0) {
                paddle2.y -= paddle2.speed;
            }
            if (downPressed && paddle2.y < 300) {
                paddle2.y += paddle2.speed;
            }
        }

        function resetBall() {
            ball.x = 400;
            ball.y = 200;
            ball.dx = ball.dx > 0 ? 5 : -5;
            ball.dy = 3;
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 20);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            player1Score = 0;
            player2Score = 0;
            document.getElementById('player1Score').textContent = player1Score;
            document.getElementById('player2Score').textContent = player2Score;
            resetBall();
            draw();
        }

        let wPressed = false;
        let sPressed = false;
        let upPressed = false;
        let downPressed = false;

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'w') wPressed = true;
            if (e.key === 's') sPressed = true;
            if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') upPressed = true;
            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') downPressed = true;
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'w') wPressed = false;
            if (e.key === 's') sPressed = false;
            if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') upPressed = false;
            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') downPressed = false;
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭২: স্পেস ইনভেডার্স
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>স্পেস ইনভেডার্স</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .lives {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #000;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>👾 স্পেস ইনভেডার্স</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="lives">❤️ <span id="lives">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let player = {
            x: 250,
            y: 350,
            width: 50,
            height: 30,
            speed: 5
        };

        let bullets = [];
        let enemies = [];
        let enemyDirection = 1;
        let enemySpeed = 1;
        let score = 0;
        let lives = 3;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        function initEnemies() {
            enemies = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < 8; j++) {
                    enemies.push({
                        x: j * 60 + 50,
                        y: i * 40 + 50,
                        width: 40,
                        height: 30,
                        active: true
                    });
                }
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // প্লেয়ার
            ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // বুলেট
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            bullets.forEach((bullet, index) => {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, 5, 10);
                bullet.y -= 5;

                if (bullet.y < 0) {
                    bullets.splice(index, 1);
                }

                // শত্রুর সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                    if (enemy.active &&
                        bullet.x > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.y > enemy.y &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height) {
                        enemy.active = false;
                        bullets.splice(index, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                });
            });

            // শত্রু
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                if (enemy.active) {
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                    enemy.x += enemySpeed * enemyDirection;

                    // দিক পরিবর্তন
                    if (enemy.x > 550 || enemy.x < 0) {
                        enemyDirection *= -1;
                        enemies.forEach(e => {
                            e.y += 20;
                        });
                    }

                    // প্লেয়ারের সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                    if (enemy.y + enemy.height > player.y &&
                        enemy.x + enemy.width > player.x &&
                        enemy.x < player.x + player.width) {
                        lives--;
                        document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                        if (lives <= 0) {
                            gameOver();
                        } else {
                            resetPositions();
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // পুরনো শত্রু সরান
            enemies = enemies.filter(enemy => enemy.active);

            // সব শত্রু মারা গেলে
            if (enemies.length === 0) {
                alert('আপনি জিতেছেন!');
                resetGame();
            }
        }

        function shoot() {
            bullets.push({
                x: player.x + player.width / 2,
                y: player.y,
                width: 5,
                height: 10
            });
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function resetPositions() {
            player.x = 250;
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                enemy.x = enemy.originalX;
                enemy.y = enemy.originalY;
            });
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            initEnemies();
            player.x = 250;
            bullets = [];
            score = 0;
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            draw();
        }

        let leftPressed = false;
        let rightPressed = false;

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = true;
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = true;
            } else if (e.code === 'Space') {
                e.preventDefault();
                shoot();
            }

            if (leftPressed && player.x > 0) {
                player.x -= player.speed;
            }
            if (rightPressed && player.x < 550) {
                player.x += player.speed;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = false;
            }
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = false;
            }
        });

        initEnemies();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৩: গ্যালাক্সা
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>গ্যালাক্সা</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #000;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🌌 গ্যালাক্সা</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="pauseGame()">বিরতি</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let spaceship = {
            x: 250,
            y: 350,
            width: 50,
            height: 30,
            speed: 5
        };

        let lasers = [];
        let enemies = [];
        let stars = [];
        let score = 0;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let gamePaused = false;

        function init() {
            stars = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                stars.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 600,
                    y: Math.random() * 400,
                    size: Math.random() * 2 + 1,
                    speed: Math.random() * 3 + 1
                });
            }

            enemies = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                enemies.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 500,
                    y: Math.random() * 200,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: Math.random() * 2 + 1,
                    active: true
                });
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // তারা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
            stars.forEach(star => {
                ctx.fillRect(star.x, star.y, star.size, star.size);
                star.y += star.speed;
                if (star.y > 400) {
                    star.y = 0;
                    star.x = Math.random() * 600;
                }
            });

            // স্পেসশিপ
            ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(spaceship.x, spaceship.y);
            ctx.lineTo(spaceship.x + spaceship.width, spaceship.y + spaceship.height / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(spaceship.x, spaceship.y + spaceship.height);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            // লেজার
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            lasers.forEach((laser, index) => {
                ctx.fillRect(laser.x, laser.y, 3, 10);
                laser.y -= 5;

                if (laser.y < 0) {
                    lasers.splice(index, 1);
                }

                // শত্রুর সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                    if (enemy.active &&
                        laser.x > enemy.x &&
                        laser.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        laser.y > enemy.y &&
                        laser.y < enemy.y + enemy.height) {
                        enemy.active = false;
                        lasers.splice(index, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                });
            });

            // শত্রু
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                if (enemy.active) {
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                    enemy.y += enemy.speed;

                    // নিচে চলে গেলে
                    if (enemy.y > 400) {
                        enemy.y = 0;
                        enemy.x = Math.random() * 550;
                    }

                    // স্পেসশিপের সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                    if (enemy.y + enemy.height > spaceship.y &&
                        enemy.x + enemy.width > spaceship.x &&
                        enemy.x < spaceship.x + spaceship.width) {
                        gameOver();
                    }
                }
            });

            // নতুন শত্রু
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                enemies.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 550,
                    y: 0,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
                    active: true
                });
            }
        }

        function shoot() {
            lasers.push({
                x: spaceship.x + spaceship.width / 2,
                y: spaceship.y
            });
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gamePaused = false;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            } else if (gamePaused) {
                gamePaused = false;
            }
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            gamePaused = true;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            spaceship.x = 250;
            lasers = [];
            score = 0;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            init();
            draw();
        }

        let leftPressed = false;
        let rightPressed = false;

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = true;
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = true;
            } else if (e.code === 'Space') {
                e.preventDefault();
                shoot();
            }

            if (leftPressed && spaceship.x > 0) {
                spaceship.x -= spaceship.speed;
            }
            if (rightPressed && spaceship.x < 550) {
                spaceship.x += spaceship.speed;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                leftPressed = false;
            }
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                rightPressed = false;
            }
        });

        init();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৪: কন্ট্রা
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>কন্ট্রা</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .lives {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #87CEEB, #228B22);
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🎮 কন্ট্রা</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="lives">❤️ <span id="lives">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let player = {
            x: 100,
            y: 300,
            width: 30,
            height: 40,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            speed: 3,
            jumpPower: -10,
            grounded: false,
            direction: 1
        };

        let bullets = [];
        let enemies = [];
        let platforms = [
            { x: 0, y: 340, width: 800, height: 60 },
            { x: 200, y: 250, width: 100, height: 20 },
            { x: 500, y: 200, width: 100, height: 20 }
        ];

        let lives = 3;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // ব্যাকগ্রাউন্ড
            ctx.fillStyle = '#87CEEB';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 800, 250);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#228B22';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 250, 800, 150);

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, p.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#654321';
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, 5);
            });

            // প্লেয়ার
            ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // বুলেট
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            bullets.forEach((bullet, index) => {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, 5, 2);
                bullet.x += bullet.dx;

                if (bullet.x > 800 || bullet.x < 0) {
                    bullets.splice(index, 1);
                }
            });

            // শত্রু
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                enemy.x += enemy.dx;

                if (enemy.x < 100 || enemy.x > 700) {
                    enemy.dx *= -1;
                }
            });

            // ফিজিক্স
            player.vy += 0.5;
            player.y += player.vy;
            player.x += player.vx;

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম চেক
            player.grounded = false;
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                if (player.x < p.x + p.width &&
                    player.x + player.width > p.x &&
                    player.y + player.height > p.y &&
                    player.y + player.height < p.y + p.height + 10) {
                    player.y = p.y - player.height;
                    player.vy = 0;
                    player.grounded = true;
                }
            });

            // সীমানা
            player.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(770, player.x));

            // শত্রু কোলিশন
            enemies.forEach((enemy, index) => {
                if (player.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                    player.x + player.width > enemy.x &&
                    player.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                    player.y + player.height > enemy.y) {
                    lives--;
                    document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                    if (lives <= 0) {
                        gameOver();
                    } else {
                        resetPosition();
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function shoot() {
            bullets.push({
                x: player.x + player.width,
                y: player.y + player.height / 2,
                dx: 10 * player.direction
            });
        }

        function jump() {
            if (player.grounded) {
                player.vy = player.jumpPower;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert('গেম ওভার!');
        }

        function resetPosition() {
            player.x = 100;
            player.y = 300;
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            player = { x: 100, y: 300, width: 30, height: 40, vx: 0, vy: 0, speed: 3, jumpPower: -10, grounded: false, direction: 1 };
            bullets = [];
            enemies = [
                { x: 500, y: 300, width: 30, height: 40, dx: 2 },
                { x: 300, y: 200, width: 30, height: 40, dx: 3 }
            ];
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            switch(e.key) {
                case 'ArrowLeft':
                    player.vx = -player.speed;
                    player.direction = -1;
                    break;
                case 'ArrowRight':
                    player.vx = player.speed;
                    player.direction = 1;
                    break;
                case 'ArrowUp':
                    jump();
                    break;
                case ' ':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    shoot();
                    break;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                player.vx = 0;
            }
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>

প্রজেক্ট ১৭৫: মারিও ক্লোন
html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>মারিও ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .lives {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>👨 মারিও ক্লোন</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="lives">❤️ <span id="lives">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let mario = {
            x: 100,
            y: 300,
            width: 30,
            height: 40,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            speed: 4,
            jumpPower: -10,
            grounded: false,
            direction: 1
        };

        let platforms = [
            { x: 0, y: 340, width: 800, height: 60 },
            { x: 200, y: 250, width: 100, height: 20 },
            { x: 400, y: 200, width: 100, height: 20 },
            { x: 600, y: 150, width: 100, height: 20 }
        ];

        let coins = [
            { x: 250, y: 200, radius: 10, active: true },
            { x: 450, y: 150, radius: 10, active: true },
            { x: 650, y: 100, radius: 10, active: true }
        ];

        let enemies = [
            { x: 300, y: 300, width: 30, height: 30, dx: 2, active: true },
            { x: 500, y: 200, width: 30, height: 30, dx: -2, active: true }
        ];

        let score = 0;
        let lives = 3;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;
        let cameraX = 0;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // ক্যামেরা
            cameraX = mario.x - 300;
            if (cameraX < 0) cameraX = 0;
            if (cameraX > 2000) cameraX = 2000;
