            ctx.save();
            ctx.translate(-cameraX, 0);

            // স্কাই
            ctx.fillStyle = '#87CEEB';
            ctx.fillRect(cameraX, 0, 800, 400);

            // মেঘ
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(200, 50, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(230, 70, 35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.arc(170, 70, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, p.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#654321';
                ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y, p.width, 5);
            });

            // কয়েন
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            coins.forEach(coin => {
                if (coin.active) {
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(coin.x, coin.y, coin.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            });

            // শত্রু
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                if (enemy.active) {
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                    enemy.x += enemy.dx;

                    if (enemy.x < 100 || enemy.x > 700) {
                        enemy.dx *= -1;
                    }
                }
            });

            // মারিও
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
            ctx.fillRect(mario.x, mario.y, mario.width, mario.height);

            // টুপি
            ctx.fillStyle = '#a52a2a';
            ctx.fillRect(mario.x + 5, mario.y - 5, 20, 5);

            ctx.restore();

            // ফিজিক্স
            mario.vy += 0.5;
            mario.y += mario.vy;
            mario.x += mario.vx;

            // প্ল্যাটফর্ম চেক
            mario.grounded = false;
            platforms.forEach(p => {
                if (mario.x < p.x + p.width &&
                    mario.x + mario.width > p.x &&
                    mario.y + mario.height > p.y &&
                    mario.y + mario.height < p.y + p.height + 10) {
                    mario.y = p.y - mario.height;
                    mario.vy = 0;
                    mario.grounded = true;
                }
            });

            // কয়েন সংগ্রহ
            coins.forEach(coin => {
                if (coin.active) {
                    const dist = Math.hypot(
                        (mario.x + mario.width/2) - coin.x,
                        (mario.y + mario.height/2) - coin.y
                    );
                    if (dist < 20) {
                        coin.active = false;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                }
            });

            // শত্রু কোলিশন
            enemies.forEach((enemy, index) => {
                if (enemy.active) {
                    if (mario.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        mario.x + mario.width > enemy.x &&
                        mario.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        mario.y + mario.height > enemy.y) {

                        if (mario.vy > 0 && mario.y + mario.height < enemy.y + 10) {
                            enemy.active = false;
                            score += 50;
                            mario.vy = mario.jumpPower / 2;
                        } else {
                            lives--;
                            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                            if (lives <= 0) {
                                gameOver();
                            } else {
                                mario.x = 100;
                                mario.y = 300;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // সীমানা
            mario.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(2000, mario.x));
        }

        function jump() {
            if (mario.grounded) {
                mario.vy = mario.jumpPower;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            mario = { x: 100, y: 300, width: 30, height: 40, vx: 0, vy: 0, speed: 4, jumpPower: -10, grounded: false, direction: 1 };
            coins.forEach(coin => coin.active = true);
            enemies.forEach(enemy => enemy.active = true);
            score = 0;
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            switch(e.key) {
                case 'ArrowLeft':
                    mario.vx = -mario.speed;
                    break;
                case 'ArrowRight':
                    mario.vx = mario.speed;
                    break;
                case 'ArrowUp':
                case ' ':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    jump();
                    break;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                mario.vx = 0;
            }
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৬: অ্যাংরি বার্ডস
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>অ্যাংরি বার্ডস</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🐦 অ্যাংরি বার্ডস</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="score">বার্ডস: <span id="birds">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="launchBird()">ছুঁড়ুন</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let bird = {
            x: 100,
            y: 300,
            radius: 15,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            launched: false,
            active: true
        };

        let structures = [];
        let pigs = [];
        let score = 0;
        let birdsRemaining = 3;
        let isDragging = false;
        let dragStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        let dragEnd = { x: 0, y: 0 };

        function init() {
            structures = [];
            pigs = [];
            birdsRemaining = 3;
            score = 0;

            // স্ট্রাকচার তৈরি
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                structures.push({
                    x: 600 + i * 30,
                    y: 350 - i * 30,
                    width: 25,
                    height: 50,
                    active: true
                });
            }

            // পিগ
            pigs.push({
                x: 650,
                y: 300,
                radius: 20,
                active: true
            });

            resetBird();
        }

        function resetBird() {
            bird = {
                x: 100,
                y: 300,
                radius: 15,
                vx: 0,
                vy: 0,
                launched: false,
                active: true
            };
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 800, 400);

            // মাটি
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 350, 800, 50);

            // স্লিংশট
            ctx.fillStyle = '#654321';
            ctx.fillRect(50, 300, 20, 50);
            ctx.fillRect(30, 320, 60, 10);

            // বার্ড
            if (bird.active) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bird.x, bird.y, bird.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();

                // চোখ
                ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bird.x - 5, bird.y - 5, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bird.x - 6, bird.y - 6, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }

            // ড্র্যাগ লাইন
            if (isDragging && !bird.launched) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
                ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(60, 320);
                ctx.lineTo(dragEnd.x, dragEnd.y);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // স্ট্রাকচার
            structures.forEach(s => {
                if (s.active) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
                    ctx.fillRect(s.x, s.y, s.width, s.height);
                }
            });

            // পিগ
            pigs.forEach(p => {
                if (p.active) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            });

            // ফিজিক্স
            if (bird.launched) {
                bird.x += bird.vx;
                bird.y += bird.vy;
                bird.vy += 0.2;

                // সীমানা
                if (bird.y > 340) {
                    bird.active = false;
                    birdsRemaining--;
                    document.getElementById('birds').textContent = birdsRemaining;
                    setTimeout(resetBird, 500);
                }

                // স্ট্রাকচার কোলিশন
                structures.forEach(s => {
                    if (s.active &&
                        bird.x + bird.radius > s.x &&
                        bird.x - bird.radius < s.x + s.width &&
                        bird.y + bird.radius > s.y &&
                        bird.y - bird.radius < s.y + s.height) {
                        s.active = false;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                });

                // পিগ কোলিশন
                pigs.forEach(p => {
                    if (p.active) {
                        const dist = Math.hypot(bird.x - p.x, bird.y - p.y);
                        if (dist < bird.radius + p.radius) {
                            p.active = false;
                            score += 50;
                            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }

        function launchBird() {
            if (!bird.launched && bird.active) {
                const dx = (60 - bird.x) * 0.1;
                const dy = (320 - bird.y) * 0.1;
                bird.vx = dx;
                bird.vy = dy;
                bird.launched = true;
            }
        }

        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;

            if (!bird.launched && bird.active) {
                isDragging = true;
                dragStart = { x, y };
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            if (isDragging) {
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                dragEnd.x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                dragEnd.y = e.clientY - rect.top;

                // বার্ডের অবস্থান সীমিত করুন
                bird.x = Math.max(50, Math.min(150, dragEnd.x));
                bird.y = Math.max(250, Math.min(350, dragEnd.y));
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
            if (isDragging) {
                isDragging = false;
                launchBird();
            }
        });

        function resetGame() {
            init();
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('birds').textContent = birdsRemaining;
        }

        init();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৭: কাট দ্যা রোপ
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>কাট দ্যা রোপ</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>✂️ কাট দ্যা রোপ</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let candies = [];
        let ropes = [];
        let score = 0;
        let isCutting = false;
        let cutPoints = [];

        function init() {
            candies = [];
            ropes = [];

            // ক্যান্ডি
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                candies.push({
                    x: 100 + i * 100,
                    y: 100,
                    radius: 15,
                    collected: false
                });
            }

            // দড়ি
            candies.forEach((candy, index) => {
                ropes.push({
                    startX: candy.x,
                    startY: candy.y,
                    endX: candy.x,
                    endY: 350,
                    cut: false
                });
            });
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // দড়ি
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#8B4513';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ropes.forEach(rope => {
                if (!rope.cut) {
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(rope.startX, rope.startY);
                    ctx.lineTo(rope.endX, rope.endY);
                    ctx.stroke();
                } else {
                    // কাটা দড়ি
                    ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(rope.startX, rope.startY);
                    ctx.lineTo(rope.startX, (rope.startY + rope.endY) / 2);
                    ctx.stroke();

                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(rope.startX, (rope.startY + rope.endY) / 2 + 10);
                    ctx.lineTo(rope.endX, rope.endY);
                    ctx.stroke();
                    ctx.setLineDash([]);
                }
            });

            // ক্যান্ডি
            candies.forEach((candy, index) => {
                if (!candy.collected && !ropes[index].cut) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(candy.x, candy.y, candy.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();

                    // চোখ
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(candy.x - 5, candy.y - 5, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(candy.x - 6, candy.y - 6, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            });

            // কাটিং লাইন
            if (isCutting && cutPoints.length > 1) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff0';
                ctx.lineWidth = 5;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(cutPoints[0].x, cutPoints[0].y);
                for (let i = 1; i < cutPoints.length; i++) {
                    ctx.lineTo(cutPoints[i].x, cutPoints[i].y);
                }
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // ক্যান্ডি পড়া
            candies.forEach((candy, index) => {
                if (ropes[index].cut && !candy.collected) {
                    candy.y += 2;

                    // নিচে পড়ে গেলে
                    if (candy.y > 380) {
                        candy.collected = true;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function checkCut(x, y) {
            ropes.forEach((rope, index) => {
                if (!rope.cut) {
                    // দড়ির সাথে কাটার দূরত্ব চেক
                    const dist = Math.abs((rope.endY - rope.startY) * x -
                                        (rope.endX - rope.startX) * y +
                                        rope.endX * rope.startY - rope.endY * rope.startX) /
                                        Math.hypot(rope.endX - rope.startX, rope.endY - rope.startY);

                    if (dist < 10 && x > rope.startX - 20 && x < rope.startX + 20) {
                        rope.cut = true;
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            isCutting = true;
            cutPoints = [];
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            cutPoints.push({
                x: e.clientX - rect.left,
                y: e.clientY - rect.top
            });
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            if (isCutting) {
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                cutPoints.push({
                    x: e.clientX - rect.left,
                    y: e.clientY - rect.top
                });

                // কাট চেক
                checkCut(e.clientX - rect.left, e.clientY - rect.top);
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
            isCutting = false;
            cutPoints = [];
        });

        function resetGame() {
            init();
            score = 0;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
        }

        function gameLoop() {
            draw();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        init();
        gameLoop();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৮: টেম্পল রান
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>টেম্পল রান</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .distance {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .coins {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ffd700;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #8B4513;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🏃 টেম্পল রান</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="distance">দূরত্ব: <span id="distance">০</span>মি</div>
            <div class="coins">🪙 <span id="coins">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="400" height="600"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let player = {
            x: 175,
            y: 500,
            width: 30,
            height: 40,
            lane: 1 // 0 = বাম, 1 = মাঝ, 2 = ডান
        };

        let obstacles = [];
        let coins = [];
        let distance = 0;
        let coinCount = 0;
        let gameSpeed = 5;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // রাস্তা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // লেন
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.setLineDash([10, 10]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(133, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(133, 600);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(266, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(266, 600);
            ctx.stroke();

            // প্লেয়ার
            ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // বাধা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            obstacles.forEach(obs => {
                ctx.fillRect(obs.x, obs.y, obs.width, obs.height);
                obs.y += gameSpeed;

                // কোলিশন
                if (obs.y + obs.height > player.y &&
                    obs.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    obs.x === player.x) {
                    gameOver();
                }
            });

            // কয়েন
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            coins.forEach((coin, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(coin.x + 15, coin.y + 10, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                coin.y += gameSpeed;

                // সংগ্রহ
                if (coin.y + 20 > player.y &&
                    coin.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    coin.x === player.x) {
                    coins.splice(index, 1);
                    coinCount++;
                    document.getElementById('coins').textContent = coinCount;
                }
            });

            // নতুন বাধা
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                obstacles.push({
                    x: 33 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) * 133,
                    y: -50,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 50
                });
            }

            // নতুন কয়েন
            if (Math.random() < 0.03) {
                coins.push({
                    x: 33 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) * 133,
                    y: -20,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 20
                });
            }

            // দূরত্ব বাড়ান
            distance += gameSpeed / 10;
            document.getElementById('distance').textContent = Math.floor(distance);

            // পুরনো বস্তু সরান
            obstacles = obstacles.filter(obs => obs.y < 600);
            coins = coins.filter(coin => coin.y < 600);
        }

        function moveLeft() {
            if (player.lane > 0) {
                player.lane--;
                player.x -= 133;
            }
        }

        function moveRight() {
            if (player.lane < 2) {
                player.lane++;
                player.x += 133;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! দূরত্ব: ${Math.floor(distance)}মি, কয়েন: ${coinCount}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            player.lane = 1;
            player.x = 175;
            obstacles = [];
            coins = [];
            distance = 0;
            coinCount = 0;
            gameSpeed = 5;
            document.getElementById('distance').textContent = distance;
            document.getElementById('coins').textContent = coinCount;
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                moveLeft();
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                moveRight();
            }
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৭৯: সাবওয়ে সার্ফার
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>সাবওয়ে সার্ফার</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🚇 সাবওয়ে সার্ফার</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="400" height="600"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let player = {
            x: 175,
            y: 500,
            width: 30,
            height: 40,
            lane: 1,
            isRolling: false,
            rollTimer: 0
        };

        let obstacles = [];
        let trains = [];
        let powerups = [];
        let score = 0;
        let gameSpeed = 5;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // ট্র্যাক
            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                ctx.fillRect(i * 100 + 20, 0, 10, 600);
            }

            // প্লেয়ার
            if (player.isRolling) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffa500';
                player.rollTimer--;
                if (player.rollTimer <= 0) {
                    player.isRolling = false;
                }
            } else {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#43e97b';
            }
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // ট্রেন
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            trains.forEach(train => {
                ctx.fillRect(train.x, train.y, train.width, train.height);
                train.y += gameSpeed;

                // কোলিশন
                if (!player.isRolling &&
                    train.y + train.height > player.y &&
                    train.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    train.x === player.x) {
                    gameOver();
                }
            });

            // বাধা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            obstacles.forEach(obs => {
                ctx.fillRect(obs.x, obs.y, obs.width, obs.height);
                obs.y += gameSpeed;

                // কোলিশন
                if (!player.isRolling &&
                    obs.y + obs.height > player.y &&
                    obs.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    obs.x === player.x) {
                    gameOver();
                }
            });

            // পাওয়ার-আপ
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            powerups.forEach(p => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(p.x + 15, p.y + 15, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                p.y += gameSpeed;

                // সংগ্রহ
                if (p.y + 30 > player.y &&
                    p.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    p.x === player.x) {
                    powerups = powerups.filter(pow => pow !== p);
                    player.isRolling = true;
                    player.rollTimer = 100;
                    score += 50;
                }
            });

            // নতুন বস্তু
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                trains.push({
                    x: 33 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) * 100,
                    y: -100,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 100
                });
            }

            if (Math.random() < 0.03) {
                obstacles.push({
                    x: 33 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) * 100,
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30
                });
            }

            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                powerups.push({
                    x: 33 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) * 100,
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30
                });
            }

            // স্কোর
            score++;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = Math.floor(score / 10);

            // পুরনো বস্তু সরান
            trains = trains.filter(t => t.y < 600);
            obstacles = obstacles.filter(o => o.y < 600);
            powerups = powerups.filter(p => p.y < 600);
        }

        function moveLeft() {
            if (player.lane > 0) {
                player.lane--;
                player.x -= 100;
            }
        }

        function moveRight() {
            if (player.lane < 2) {
                player.lane++;
                player.x += 100;
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${Math.floor(score / 10)}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            player.lane = 1;
            player.x = 175;
            player.isRolling = false;
            trains = [];
            obstacles = [];
            powerups = [];
            score = 0;
            gameSpeed = 5;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                moveLeft();
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                moveRight();
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
                player.isRolling = true;
                player.rollTimer = 30;
            }
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮০: ফ্রুট নিনজা
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ফ্রুট নিনজা</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .lives {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
            cursor: none;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🍉 ফ্রুট নিনজা</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="lives">❤️ <span id="lives">৩</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let fruits = [];
        let bombs = [];
        let score = 0;
        let lives = 3;
        let mouseX = 0;
        let mouseY = 0;
        let mousePressed = false;
        let swipePoints = [];
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // ফল
            fruits.forEach((fruit, index) => {
                ctx.fillStyle = fruit.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(fruit.x, fruit.y, fruit.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();

                fruit.x += fruit.vx;
                fruit.y += fruit.vy;
                fruit.vy += 0.1;

                // নিচে পড়ে গেলে
                if (fruit.y > 400) {
                    fruits.splice(index, 1);
                    lives--;
                    document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                    if (lives <= 0) {
                        gameOver();
                    }
                }
            });

            // বোমা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
            bombs.forEach((bomb, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bomb.x, bomb.y, bomb.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();

                bomb.x += bomb.vx;
                bomb.y += bomb.vy;
                bomb.vy += 0.1;

                if (bomb.y > 400) {
                    bombs.splice(index, 1);
                }
            });

            // সুইপ লাইন
            if (mousePressed && swipePoints.length > 1) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
                ctx.lineWidth = 3;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(swipePoints[0].x, swipePoints[0].y);
                for (let i = 1; i < swipePoints.length; i++) {
                    ctx.lineTo(swipePoints[i].x, swipePoints[i].y);
                }
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // কাটিং চেক
            if (mousePressed && swipePoints.length > 1) {
                checkCut();
            }

            // নতুন ফল
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                fruits.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 600,
                    y: 400,
                    radius: 15,
                    vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,
                    vy: -Math.random() * 10 - 5,
                    color: ['#ff6b6b', '#ffd700', '#ffa500'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)]
                });
            }

            // নতুন বোমা
            if (Math.random() < 0.005) {
                bombs.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 600,
                    y: 400,
                    radius: 15,
                    vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,
                    vy: -Math.random() * 8 - 4
                });
            }
        }

        function checkCut() {
            for (let i = swipePoints.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
                const p1 = swipePoints[i];
                const p2 = swipePoints[i - 1];

                // ফল কাটা
                fruits.forEach((fruit, index) => {
                    if (lineIntersectsCircle(p1, p2, fruit)) {
                        fruits.splice(index, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
                    }
                });

                // বোমা কাটা
                bombs.forEach((bomb, index) => {
                    if (lineIntersectsCircle(p1, p2, bomb)) {
                        bombs.splice(index, 1);
                        lives--;
                        document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;

                        if (lives <= 0) {
                            gameOver();
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        function lineIntersectsCircle(p1, p2, circle) {
            const dist = distanceToLine(p1, p2, {x: circle.x, y: circle.y});
            return dist < circle.radius;
        }

        function distanceToLine(p1, p2, p) {
            const x1 = p1.x, y1 = p1.y;
            const x2 = p2.x, y2 = p2.y;
            const x = p.x, y = p.y;

            const A = x - x1;
            const B = y - y1;
            const C = x2 - x1;
            const D = y2 - y1;

            const dot = A * C + B * D;
            const len_sq = C * C + D * D;
            let param = -1;
            if (len_sq != 0) param = dot / len_sq;

            let xx, yy;

            if (param < 0) {
                xx = x1;
                yy = y1;
            } else if (param > 1) {
                xx = x2;
                yy = y2;
            } else {
                xx = x1 + param * C;
                yy = y1 + param * D;
            }

            const dx = x - xx;
            const dy = y - yy;
            return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            fruits = [];
            bombs = [];
            score = 0;
            lives = 3;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives;
            draw();
        }

        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
            mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;

            if (mousePressed) {
                swipePoints.push({ x: mouseX, y: mouseY });
                if (swipePoints.length > 10) {
                    swipePoints.shift();
                }
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            mousePressed = true;
            swipePoints = [];
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
            mousePressed = false;
        });

        resetGame();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮১: প্ল্যান্টস ভি.এস জম্বি
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>প্ল্যান্টস ভি.এস জম্বি</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .sun {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #ffd700;
        }
        .wave {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #90EE90;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🌱 প্ল্যান্টস ভি.এস জম্বি</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="sun">☀️ <span id="sun">১০০</span></div>
            <div class="wave">ওয়েভ: <span id="wave">১</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="plantSunflower()">🌻 সানফ্লাওয়ার (৫০)</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="plantPeaShooter()">🌱 পি শুটার (১০০)</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let sun = 100;
        let wave = 1;
        let plants = [];
        let zombies = [];
        let peas = [];
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = true;

        const rows = [80, 160, 240, 320];

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // গ্রিড
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, rows[i]);
                ctx.lineTo(600, rows[i]);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // গাছ
            plants.forEach(plant => {
                if (plant.type === 'sunflower') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(plant.x + 25, plant.y + 15, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                } else {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
                    ctx.fillRect(plant.x, plant.y, 50, 30);
                    // কামান
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
                    ctx.fillRect(plant.x + 40, plant.y + 10, 10, 10);
                }
            });

            // মটর
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0';
            peas.forEach((pea, index) => {
                ctx.fillRect(pea.x, pea.y, 5, 5);
                pea.x += 5;

                // জম্বির সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                zombies.forEach(zombie => {
                    if (pea.x > zombie.x && pea.x < zombie.x + 30 &&
                        pea.y > zombie.y && pea.y < zombie.y + 40) {
                        peas.splice(index, 1);
                        zombie.health--;

                        if (zombie.health <= 0) {
                            zombies = zombies.filter(z => z !== zombie);
                            sun += 50;
                            document.getElementById('sun').textContent = sun;
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            // জম্বি
            ctx.fillStyle = '#808080';
            zombies.forEach(zombie => {
                ctx.fillRect(zombie.x, zombie.y, 30, 40);
                zombie.x -= zombie.speed;

                // গাছের সাথে সংঘর্ষ
                plants.forEach(plant => {
                    if (zombie.x < plant.x + 50 &&
                        zombie.x + 30 > plant.x &&
                        zombie.y === plant.y) {
                        plants = plants.filter(p => p !== plant);
                        zombies = zombies.filter(z => z !== zombie);
                    }
                });

                // ঘরে ঢুকে গেলে
                if (zombie.x < 0) {
                    zombies = zombies.filter(z => z !== zombie);
                }
            });

            // নতুন জম্বি
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                zombies.push({
                    x: 600,
                    y: rows[Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)],
                    health: 3,
                    speed: 1 + wave * 0.2
                });
            }

            // সানফ্লাওয়ার থেকে সূর্য
            plants.forEach(plant => {
                if (plant.type === 'sunflower' && Math.random() < 0.005) {
                    sun += 25;
                    document.getElementById('sun').textContent = sun;
                }
            });

            // পি শুটার থেকে মটর
            plants.forEach(plant => {
                if (plant.type === 'peashooter' && Math.random() < 0.03) {
                    peas.push({
                        x: plant.x + 50,
                        y: plant.y + 15,
                        vx: 5
                    });
                }
            });

            // প্রতি ওয়েভে জম্বি বাড়ে
            if (zombies.length > wave * 3) {
                wave++;
                document.getElementById('wave').textContent = wave;
            }
        }

        function plantSunflower() {
            if (sun >= 50) {
                const row = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
                plants.push({
                    x: 100,
                    y: rows[row],
                    type: 'sunflower'
                });
                sun -= 50;
                document.getElementById('sun').textContent = sun;
            }
        }

        function plantPeaShooter() {
            if (sun >= 100) {
                const row = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
                plants.push({
                    x: 200,
                    y: rows[row],
                    type: 'peashooter'
                });
                sun -= 100;
                document.getElementById('sun').textContent = sun;
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            plants = [];
            zombies = [];
            peas = [];
            sun = 100;
            wave = 1;
            document.getElementById('sun').textContent = sun;
            document.getElementById('wave').textContent = wave;
        }

        function gameLoopFunction() {
            draw();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoopFunction);
        }

        gameLoopFunction();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮২: ক্ল্যাশ অফ ক্ল্যান্স
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ক্ল্যাশ অফ ক্ল্যান্স</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .resources {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .gold {
            color: #ffd700;
        }
        .elixir {
            color: #ff00ff;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #90EE90;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>⚔️ ক্ল্যাশ অফ ক্ল্যান্স</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="resources">🪙 সোনা: <span id="gold">৫০০</span></div>
            <div class="resources">💧 এলিক্সির: <span id="elixir">৫০০</span></div>
            <div class="resources">🏆 ট্রফি: <span id="trophies">১০০০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="trainBarbarian()">🪓 বার্বেরিয়ান (৫০)</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="trainArcher()">🏹 আর্চার (৭৫)</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let gold = 500;
        let elixir = 500;
        let trophies = 1000;

        let playerTroops = [];
        let enemyTroops = [];
        let playerBase = [];
        let enemyBase = [];

        function init() {
            // প্লেয়ার বেস
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                playerBase.push({
                    x: 100,
                    y: 50 + i * 60,
                    health: 100,
                    type: 'cannon'
                });
            }

            // শত্রু বেস
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                enemyBase.push({
                    x: 500,
                    y: 50 + i * 60,
                    health: 100,
                    type: 'cannon'
                });
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 400);

            // বিভাজক রেখা
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(300, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(300, 400);
            ctx.stroke();

            // প্লেয়ার বেস
            ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
            playerBase.forEach(b => {
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y, 40, 40);
                // স্বাস্থ্য বার
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y - 10, 40, 5);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y - 10, 40 * (b.health / 100), 5);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
            });

            // শত্রু বেস
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
            enemyBase.forEach(b => {
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y, 40, 40);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y - 10, 40, 5);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00';
                ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y - 10, 40 * (b.health / 100), 5);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
            });

            // প্লেয়ার সৈন্য
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0000ff';
            playerTroops.forEach(troop => {
                ctx.fillRect(troop.x, troop.y, 20, 20);
                troop.x += troop.speed;

                // শত্রু বেস আক্রমণ
                enemyBase.forEach(base => {
                    if (troop.x + 20 > base.x && troop.x < base.x + 40 &&
                        troop.y + 20 > base.y && troop.y < base.y + 40) {
                        base.health -= troop.damage;
                        if (base.health <= 0) {
                            enemyBase = enemyBase.filter(b => b !== base);
                            gold += 50;
                            elixir += 25;
                            trophies += 10;
                            updateResources();
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            // শত্রু সৈন্য
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff00ff';
            enemyTroops.forEach(troop => {
                ctx.fillRect(troop.x, troop.y, 20, 20);
                troop.x -= troop.speed;

                // প্লেয়ার বেস আক্রমণ
                playerBase.forEach(base => {
                    if (troop.x + 20 > base.x && troop.x < base.x + 40 &&
                        troop.y + 20 > base.y && troop.y < base.y + 40) {
                        base.health -= troop.damage;
                        if (base.health <= 0) {
                            playerBase = playerBase.filter(b => b !== base);
                            trophies -= 5;
                            updateResources();
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            // নতুন শত্রু সৈন্য
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
                enemyTroops.push({
                    x: 580,
                    y: 50 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 6) * 60,
                    speed: 1,
                    damage: 10
                });
            }
        }

        function trainBarbarian() {
            if (elixir >= 50) {
                playerTroops.push({
                    x: 20,
                    y: 50 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 6) * 60,
                    speed: 2,
                    damage: 15
                });
                elixir -= 50;
                updateResources();
            }
        }

        function trainArcher() {
            if (elixir >= 75) {
                playerTroops.push({
                    x: 20,
                    y: 50 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 6) * 60,
                    speed: 3,
                    damage: 10
                });
                elixir -= 75;
                updateResources();
            }
        }

        function updateResources() {
            document.getElementById('gold').textContent = gold;
            document.getElementById('elixir').textContent = elixir;
            document.getElementById('trophies').textContent = trophies;
        }

        function resetGame() {
            playerTroops = [];
            enemyTroops = [];
            playerBase = [];
            enemyBase = [];
            gold = 500;
            elixir = 500;
            trophies = 1000;
            init();
            updateResources();
        }

        function gameLoop() {
            draw();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        init();
        gameLoop();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮৩: ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ ক্লোন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ ক্লোন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .moves {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .board {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 50px);
            gap: 5px;
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .cell {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .cell.selected {
            border: 3px solid #43e97b;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .candy1 { background: #ff6b6b; }
        .candy2 { background: #ffd700; }
        .candy3 { background: #43e97b; }
        .candy4 { background: #667eea; }
        .candy5 { background: #ff9800; }
        .candy6 { background: #9c27b0; }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🍭 ক্যান্ডি ক্রাশ ক্লোন</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="moves">চাল: <span id="moves">৩০</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="board" id="board"></div>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">নতুন খেলা</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let board = [];
        let rows = 8;
        let cols = 8;
        let score = 0;
        let moves = 30;
        let selectedRow = -1;
        let selectedCol = -1;
        let gameActive = true;

        const candies = ['candy1', 'candy2', 'candy3', 'candy4', 'candy5', 'candy6'];

        function initBoard() {
            board = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                board[i] = [];
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    board[i][j] = Math.floor(Math.random() * candies.length);
                }
            }
            removeMatches();
        }

        function renderBoard() {
            const boardEl = document.getElementById('board');
            boardEl.innerHTML = '';

            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    const cell = document.createElement('div');
                    cell.className = `cell ${candies[board[i][j]]}`;
                    if (selectedRow === i && selectedCol === j) {
                        cell.classList.add('selected');
                    }
                    cell.addEventListener('click', () => handleCellClick(i, j));
                    boardEl.appendChild(cell);
                }
            }
        }

        function handleCellClick(row, col) {
            if (!gameActive || moves <= 0) return;

            if (selectedRow === -1) {
                selectedRow = row;
                selectedCol = col;
                renderBoard();
                return;
            }

            if (Math.abs(selectedRow - row) + Math.abs(selectedCol - col) === 1) {
                swapCandies(selectedRow, selectedCol, row, col);
                moves--;
                document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves;
            }

            selectedRow = -1;
            selectedCol = -1;
            renderBoard();

            if (moves <= 0) {
                gameActive = false;
                alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
            }
        }

        function swapCandies(r1, c1, r2, c2) {
            [board[r1][c1], board[r2][c2]] = [board[r2][c2], board[r1][c1]];

            if (checkMatches()) {
                removeMatches();
            } else {
                [board[r1][c1], board[r2][c2]] = [board[r2][c2], board[r1][c1]];
            }
        }

        function checkMatches() {
            let hasMatches = false;

            for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols - 2; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === board[i][j+1] && board[i][j] === board[i][j+2]) {
                        hasMatches = true;
                    }
                }
            }

            for (let i = 0; i < rows - 2; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    if (board[i][j] === board[i+1][j] && board[i][j] === board[i+2][j]) {
                        hasMatches = true;
                    }
                }
            }

            return hasMatches;
        }

        function removeMatches() {
            let matchesFound = true;

            while (matchesFound) {
                matchesFound = false;
                let matches = [];

                for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < cols - 2; j++) {
                        if (board[i][j] === board[i][j+1] && board[i][j] === board[i][j+2]) {
                            let k = j;
                            while (k < cols && board[i][k] === board[i][j]) {
                                matches.push([i, k]);
                                k++;
                            }
                            matchesFound = true;
                        }
                    }
                }

                for (let i = 0; i < rows - 2; i++) {
                    for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                        if (board[i][j] === board[i+1][j] && board[i][j] === board[i+2][j]) {
                            let k = i;
                            while (k < rows && board[k][j] === board[i][j]) {
                                matches.push([k, j]);
                                k++;
                            }
                            matchesFound = true;
                        }
                    }
                }

                if (matchesFound) {
                    score += matches.length * 10;
                    document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;

                    matches.forEach(([r, c]) => {
                        board[r][c] = -1;
                    });

                    for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                        for (let i = rows - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            if (board[i][j] === -1) {
                                for (let k = i - 1; k >= 0; k--) {
                                    if (board[k][j] !== -1) {
                                        board[i][j] = board[k][j];
                                        board[k][j] = -1;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                                if (board[i][j] === -1) {
                                    board[i][j] = Math.floor(Math.random() * candies.length);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            renderBoard();
        }

        function resetGame() {
            score = 0;
            moves = 30;
            gameActive = true;
            selectedRow = -1;
            selectedCol = -1;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves;
            initBoard();
            renderBoard();
        }

        initBoard();
        renderBoard();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮৪: বিম্বল
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>বিম্বল</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ff8e8e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .game-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        .level {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        canvas {
            border: 3px solid #667eea;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #87CEEB;
        }
        
        .controls {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            margin: 5px;
            background: #43e97b;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>🐝 বিম্বল</h1>
        
        <div class="game-info">
            <div class="score">স্কোর: <span id="score">০</span></div>
            <div class="level">লেভেল: <span id="level">১</span></div>
        </div>
        
        <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="400" height="600"></canvas>
        
        <div class="controls">
            <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">শুরু</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="resetGame()">রিসেট</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        let bee = {
            x: 200,
            y: 300,
            radius: 20,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0
        };

        let flowers = [];
        let obstacles = [];
        let score = 0;
        let level = 1;
        let gameLoop;
        let gameRunning = false;

        function init() {
            bee = { x: 200, y: 300, radius: 20, vx: 0, vy: 0 };
            flowers = [];
            obstacles = [];

            for (let i = 0; i < 5 + level; i++) {
                flowers.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 350 + 25,
                    y: Math.random() * 550 + 25,
                    radius: 15,
                    collected: false
                });
            }

            for (let i = 0; i < level; i++) {
                obstacles.push({
                    x: Math.random() * 350 + 25,
                    y: Math.random() * 550 + 25,
                    radius: 20
                });
            }
        }

        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 600);

            // মৌমাছি
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(bee.x, bee.y, bee.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // ডানা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffff00';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(bee.x - 15, bee.y - 10, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(bee.x + 15, bee.y - 10, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // চোখ
            ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(bee.x - 7, bee.y - 5, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(bee.x + 7, bee.y - 5, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // ফুল
            flowers.forEach((flower, index) => {
                if (!flower.collected) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(flower.x, flower.y, flower.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();

                    // সংগ্রহ চেক
                    const dist = Math.hypot(bee.x - flower.x, bee.y - flower.y);
                    if (dist < bee.radius + flower.radius) {
                        flower.collected = true;
                        score += 10;
                        document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;

                        if (score >= level * 50) {
                            level++;
                            document.getElementById('level').textContent = level;
                            init();
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // বাধা
            ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
            obstacles.forEach(obstacle => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(obstacle.x, obstacle.y, obstacle.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();

                const dist = Math.hypot(bee.x - obstacle.x, bee.y - obstacle.y);
                if (dist < bee.radius + obstacle.radius) {
                    gameOver();
                }
            });

            // মুভমেন্ট
            bee.x += bee.vx;
            bee.y += bee.vy;

            // সীমানা
            bee.x = Math.max(bee.radius, Math.min(400 - bee.radius, bee.x));
            bee.y = Math.max(bee.radius, Math.min(600 - bee.radius, bee.y));
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            alert(`গেম ওভার! আপনার স্কোর: ${score}`);
        }

        function startGame() {
            if (!gameRunning) {
                gameRunning = true;
                gameLoop = setInterval(draw, 30);
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            gameRunning = false;
            clearInterval(gameLoop);
            score = 0;
            level = 1;
            document.getElementById('score').textContent = score;
            document.getElementById('level').textContent = level;
            init();
            draw();
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (!gameRunning) return;

            switch(e.key) {
                case 'ArrowLeft': bee.vx = -3; break;
                case 'ArrowRight': bee.vx = 3; break;
                case 'ArrowUp': bee.vy = -3; break;
                case 'ArrowDown': bee.vy = 3; break;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (e.key.startsWith('Arrow')) {
                bee.vx = 0;
                bee.vy = 0;
            }
        });

        init();
        draw();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
প্রজেক্ট ১৮৫: পোকেমন
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>পোকেমন</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .container {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            text-align: center;
        }
        h1 {
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .battle-scene {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .pokemon-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            width: 200px;
        }
        .pokemon-image {
            width: 100px;
